search_text: Learning Unbiased Transferability for Domain Adaptation by Uncertainty Modeling 通过不确定性建模学习领域适应的无偏可迁移性 Domain adaptation (DA) aims to transfer knowledge learned from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled or a less labeled but related target domain. Ideally, the source and target distributions should be aligned to each other equally to achieve unbiased knowledge transfer. However, due to the significant imbalance between the amount of annotated data in the source and target domains, usually only the target distribution is aligned to the source domain, leading to adapting unnecessary source specific knowledge to the target domain, i.e., biased domain adaptation. To resolve this problem, in this work, we delve into the transferability estimation problem in domain adaptation and propose a non-intrusive Unbiased Transferability Estimation Plug-in (UTEP) by modeling the uncertainty of a discriminator in adversarial-based DA methods to optimize unbiased transfer. We theoretically analyze the effectiveness of the proposed approach to unbiased transferability learning in DA. Furthermore, to alleviate the impact of imbalanced annotated data, we utilize the estimated uncertainty for pseudo label selection of unlabeled samples in the target domain, which helps achieve better marginal and conditional distribution alignments between domains. Extensive experimental results on a high variety of DA benchmark datasets show that the proposed approach can be readily incorporated into various adversarial-based DA methods, achieving state-of-the-art performance. 域适应（DA）旨在将从标记的源域学到的知识转移到未标记或标记较少但相关的目标域。理想情况下，源分布和目标分布应相互一致，以实现无偏见的知识转移。然而，由于源域和目标域中注释数据量之间的显着不平衡，通常只有目标分布与源域对齐，导致将不必要的源特定知识适应目标域，即有偏差的域适应。为了解决这个问题，在这项工作中，我们深入研究了领域适应中的可转移性估计问题，并通过对基于对抗性的DA方法中鉴别器的不确定性进行建模，提出了一种非侵入式无偏可转移性估计插件（UTEP），以优化无偏转移。我们从理论上分析了所提出的 DA 中无偏可迁移性学习方法的有效性。此外，为了减轻不平衡注释数据的影响，我们利用估计的不确定性来选择目标域中未标记样本的伪标签，这有助于在域之间实现更好的边际和条件分布对齐。在多种 DA 基准数据集上进行的大量实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以很容易地融入到各种基于对抗性的 DA 方法中，从而实现最先进的性能。 本文提出一种通过不确定性建模学习无偏可迁移性的领域自适应方法，解决源域与目标域分布对齐不平衡导致的偏差问题。 Jian Hu,Haowen Zhong,Junchi Yan,Shaogang Gong,Guile Wu,Fei Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Qinghua Liu,Csaba Szepesvári,Chi Jin
title: Sample-Efficient Reinforcement Learning of Partially Observable Markov Games
title_zh: 部分可观察马尔可夫博弈的样本有效强化学习
abstract: This paper considers the challenging tasks of Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) under partial observability, where each agent only sees her own individual observations and actions that reveal incomplete information about the underlying state of system. This paper studies these tasks under the general model of multiplayer general-sum Partially Observable Markov Games (POMGs), which is significantly larger than the standard model of Imperfect Information Extensive-Form Games (IIEFGs). We identify a rich subclass of POMGs -- weakly revealing POMGs -- in which sample-efficient learning is tractable. In the self-play setting, we prove that a simple algorithm combining optimism and Maximum Likelihood Estimation (MLE) is sufficient to find approximate Nash equilibria, correlated equilibria, as well as coarse correlated equilibria of weakly revealing POMGs, in a polynomial number of samples when the number of agents is small. In the setting of playing against adversarial opponents, we show that a variant of our optimistic MLE algorithm is capable of achieving sublinear regret when being compared against the optimal maximin policies. To our best knowledge, this work provides the first line of sample-efficient results for learning POMGs.
summary: This paper considers the challenging tasks of Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) under partial observability, where each agent only sees her own individual observations and actions that reveal incomplete information about the underlying state of system. This paper studies these tasks under the general model of multiplayer general-sum Partially Observable Markov Games (POMGs), which is significantly larger than the standard model of Imperfect Information Extensive-Form Games (IIEFGs). We identify a rich subclass of POMGs -- weakly revealing POMGs -- in which sample-efficient learning is tractable. In the self-play setting, we prove that a simple algorithm combining optimism and Maximum Likelihood Estimation (MLE) is sufficient to find approximate Nash equilibria, correlated equilibria, as well as coarse correlated equilibria of weakly revealing POMGs, in a polynomial number of samples when the number of agents is small. In the setting of playing against adversarial opponents, we show that a variant of our optimistic MLE algorithm is capable of achieving sublinear regret when being compared against the optimal maximin policies. To our best knowledge, this work provides the first line of sample-efficient results for learning POMGs.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑了部分可观测性下多智能体强化学习（MARL）的挑战性任务，其中每个智能体只能看到自己的个人观察和动作，这些观察和动作揭示了有关系统底层状态的不完整信息。本文在多人一般和部分可观察马尔可夫游戏（POMG）的一般模型下研究这些任务，该模型明显大于不完美信息扩展形式游戏（IIEFG）的标准模型。我们确定了 POMG 的丰富子类（弱揭示 POMG），其中样本有效学习是易于处理的。在自我博弈设置中，我们证明，当智能体数量较少时，结合乐观和最大似然估计（MLE）的简单算法足以在多项式数量的样本中找到近似纳什均衡、相关均衡以及弱揭示 POMG 的粗相关均衡。在与对抗性对手比赛的环境中，我们证明了乐观 MLE 算法的一种变体在与最优最大最小策略进行比较时能够实现亚线性遗憾。据我们所知，这项工作为学习 POMG 提供了第一线样本有效的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究部分可观测马尔可夫博弈（POMGs）中的样本高效强化学习方法，解决多智能体在信息不完全情况下的学习难题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在部分可观测多智能体场景下样本效率低下，且难以处理大规模博弈模型，需探索更高效的算法框架。
AI.method: 提出弱揭示POMGs子类，设计结合乐观策略与最大似然估计（MLE）的算法，分别应对自博弈和对抗性对手场景。
AI.result: 证明算法在多项式样本内可逼近多种均衡状态，对抗场景下实现次线性遗憾，首次实现POMGs的样本高效学习。
AI.conclusion: 本工作为部分可观测多智能体学习提供了理论保障和算法框架，推动了复杂博弈场景下的高效决策研究。

authors_text: Peixian Liang,Yizhe Zhang,Yifan Ding,Jianxu Chen,Chinedu S. Madukoma,Tim Weninger,Joshua D. Shrout,Danny Z. Chen
title: H-EMD: A Hierarchical Earth Mover's Distance Method for Instance Segmentation
title_zh: H-EMD：用于实例分割的分层推土机距离方法
comment: Accepted at IEEE Transactions On Medical Imaging (TMI)
comments: Accepted at IEEE Transactions On Medical Imaging (TMI)
abstract: Deep learning (DL) based semantic segmentation methods have achieved excellent performance in biomedical image segmentation, producing high quality probability maps to allow extraction of rich instance information to facilitate good instance segmentation. While numerous efforts were put into developing new DL semantic segmentation models, less attention was paid to a key issue of how to effectively explore their probability maps to attain the best possible instance segmentation. We observe that probability maps by DL semantic segmentation models can be used to generate many possible instance candidates, and accurate instance segmentation can be achieved by selecting from them a set of "optimized" candidates as output instances. Further, the generated instance candidates form a well-behaved hierarchical structure (a forest), which allows selecting instances in an optimized manner. Hence, we propose a novel framework, called hierarchical earth mover's distance (H-EMD), for instance segmentation in biomedical 2D+time videos and 3D images, which judiciously incorporates consistent instance selection with semantic-segmentation-generated probability maps. H-EMD contains two main stages. (1) Instance candidate generation: capturing instance-structured information in probability maps by generating many instance candidates in a forest structure. (2) Instance candidate selection: selecting instances from the candidate set for final instance segmentation. We formulate a key instance selection problem on the instance candidate forest as an optimization problem based on the earth mover's distance (EMD), and solve it by integer linear programming. Extensive experiments on eight biomedical video or 3D datasets demonstrate that H-EMD consistently boosts DL semantic segmentation models and is highly competitive with state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Deep learning (DL) based semantic segmentation methods have achieved excellent performance in biomedical image segmentation, producing high quality probability maps to allow extraction of rich instance information to facilitate good instance segmentation. While numerous efforts were put into developing new DL semantic segmentation models, less attention was paid to a key issue of how to effectively explore their probability maps to attain the best possible instance segmentation. We observe that probability maps by DL semantic segmentation models can be used to generate many possible instance candidates, and accurate instance segmentation can be achieved by selecting from them a set of "optimized" candidates as output instances. Further, the generated instance candidates form a well-behaved hierarchical structure (a forest), which allows selecting instances in an optimized manner. Hence, we propose a novel framework, called hierarchical earth mover's distance (H-EMD), for instance segmentation in biomedical 2D+time videos and 3D images, which judiciously incorporates consistent instance selection with semantic-segmentation-generated probability maps. H-EMD contains two main stages. (1) Instance candidate generation: capturing instance-structured information in probability maps by generating many instance candidates in a forest structure. (2) Instance candidate selection: selecting instances from the candidate set for final instance segmentation. We formulate a key instance selection problem on the instance candidate forest as an optimization problem based on the earth mover's distance (EMD), and solve it by integer linear programming. Extensive experiments on eight biomedical video or 3D datasets demonstrate that H-EMD consistently boosts DL semantic segmentation models and is highly competitive with state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习（DL）的语义分割方法在生物医学图像分割中取得了优异的性能，产生高质量的概率图以允许提取丰富的实例信息以促进良好的实例分割。尽管人们为开发新的深度学习语义分割模型付出了巨大的努力，但很少有人关注如何有效地探索其概率图以获得最佳实例分割的关键问题。我们观察到，深度学习语义分割模型的概率图可用于生成许多可能的实例候选，并且可以通过从中选择一组“优化”候选作为输出实例来实现准确的实例分割。此外，生成的候选实例形成良好的分层结构（森林），这允许以优化的方式选择实例。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，称为分层推土机距离（H-EMD），例如生物医学 2D+时间视频和 3D 图像中的分割，它明智地将一致的实例选择与语义分割生成的概率图结合起来。 H-EMD 包含两个主要阶段。 (1)实例候选生成：通过在森林结构中生成许多实例候选来捕获概率图中的实例结构信息。 (2)实例候选选择：从候选集中选择实例进行最终的实例分割。我们将实例候选森林上的关键实例选择问题表述为基于推土机距离（EMD）的优化问题，并通过整数线性规划来求解。对 8 个生物医学视频或 3D 数据集进行的大量实验表明，H-EMD 始终如一地增强了 DL 语义分割模型，并且与最先进的方法具有很强的竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分层地球移动距离（H-EMD）的实例分割方法，用于生物医学2D+时间视频和3D图像的实例分割。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在语义分割中表现优异，但如何有效利用其生成的概率图进行实例分割尚未得到足够关注。作者观察到概率图可生成大量实例候选，需通过优化选择实现准确分割。
AI.method: H-EMD包含两个阶段：（1）生成森林结构的实例候选；（2）通过地球移动距离（EMD）优化问题和整数线性规划选择最优实例。
AI.result: 在八个生物医学视频和3D数据集上，H-EMD显著提升深度学习语义分割模型性能，并优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: H-EMD通过有效利用概率图的层次结构和EMD优化，实现了高效的实例分割，为生物医学图像分析提供了新思路。

search_text: H-EMD: A Hierarchical Earth Mover's Distance Method for Instance Segmentation H-EMD：用于实例分割的分层推土机距离方法 Deep learning (DL) based semantic segmentation methods have achieved excellent performance in biomedical image segmentation, producing high quality probability maps to allow extraction of rich instance information to facilitate good instance segmentation. While numerous efforts were put into developing new DL semantic segmentation models, less attention was paid to a key issue of how to effectively explore their probability maps to attain the best possible instance segmentation. We observe that probability maps by DL semantic segmentation models can be used to generate many possible instance candidates, and accurate instance segmentation can be achieved by selecting from them a set of "optimized" candidates as output instances. Further, the generated instance candidates form a well-behaved hierarchical structure (a forest), which allows selecting instances in an optimized manner. Hence, we propose a novel framework, called hierarchical earth mover's distance (H-EMD), for instance segmentation in biomedical 2D+time videos and 3D images, which judiciously incorporates consistent instance selection with semantic-segmentation-generated probability maps. H-EMD contains two main stages. (1) Instance candidate generation: capturing instance-structured information in probability maps by generating many instance candidates in a forest structure. (2) Instance candidate selection: selecting instances from the candidate set for final instance segmentation. We formulate a key instance selection problem on the instance candidate forest as an optimization problem based on the earth mover's distance (EMD), and solve it by integer linear programming. Extensive experiments on eight biomedical video or 3D datasets demonstrate that H-EMD consistently boosts DL semantic segmentation models and is highly competitive with state-of-the-art methods. 基于深度学习（DL）的语义分割方法在生物医学图像分割中取得了优异的性能，产生高质量的概率图以允许提取丰富的实例信息以促进良好的实例分割。尽管人们为开发新的深度学习语义分割模型付出了巨大的努力，但很少有人关注如何有效地探索其概率图以获得最佳实例分割的关键问题。我们观察到，深度学习语义分割模型的概率图可用于生成许多可能的实例候选，并且可以通过从中选择一组“优化”候选作为输出实例来实现准确的实例分割。此外，生成的候选实例形成良好的分层结构（森林），这允许以优化的方式选择实例。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，称为分层推土机距离（H-EMD），例如生物医学 2D+时间视频和 3D 图像中的分割，它明智地将一致的实例选择与语义分割生成的概率图结合起来。 H-EMD 包含两个主要阶段。 (1)实例候选生成：通过在森林结构中生成许多实例候选来捕获概率图中的实例结构信息。 (2)实例候选选择：从候选集中选择实例进行最终的实例分割。我们将实例候选森林上的关键实例选择问题表述为基于推土机距离（EMD）的优化问题，并通过整数线性规划来求解。对 8 个生物医学视频或 3D 数据集进行的大量实验表明，H-EMD 始终如一地增强了 DL 语义分割模型，并且与最先进的方法具有很强的竞争力。 本文提出了一种基于分层地球移动距离（H-EMD）的实例分割方法，用于生物医学2D+时间视频和3D图像的实例分割。 Peixian Liang,Yizhe Zhang,Yifan Ding,Jianxu Chen,Chinedu S. Madukoma,Tim Weninger,Joshua D. Shrout,Danny Z. Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Shenghui Chen,Yagiz Savas,Mustafa O. Karabag,Brian M. Sadler,Ufuk Topcu
title: Deceptive Planning for Resource Allocation
title_zh: 资源配置的欺骗性规划
abstract: We consider a team of autonomous agents that navigate in an adversarial environment and aim to achieve a task by allocating their resources over a set of target locations. An adversary in the environment observes the autonomous team's behavior to infer their objective and responds against the team. In this setting, we propose strategies for controlling the density of the autonomous team so that they can deceive the adversary regarding their objective while achieving the desired final resource allocation. We first develop a prediction algorithm based on the principle of maximum entropy to express the team's behavior expected by the adversary. Then, by measuring the deceptiveness via Kullback-Leibler divergence, we devise convex optimization-based planning algorithms that deceive the adversary by either exaggerating the behavior towards a decoy allocation strategy or creating ambiguity regarding the final allocation strategy. A user study with $320$ participants demonstrates that the proposed algorithms are effective for deception and reveal the inherent biases of participants towards proximate goals.
summary: We consider a team of autonomous agents that navigate in an adversarial environment and aim to achieve a task by allocating their resources over a set of target locations. An adversary in the environment observes the autonomous team's behavior to infer their objective and responds against the team. In this setting, we propose strategies for controlling the density of the autonomous team so that they can deceive the adversary regarding their objective while achieving the desired final resource allocation. We first develop a prediction algorithm based on the principle of maximum entropy to express the team's behavior expected by the adversary. Then, by measuring the deceptiveness via Kullback-Leibler divergence, we devise convex optimization-based planning algorithms that deceive the adversary by either exaggerating the behavior towards a decoy allocation strategy or creating ambiguity regarding the final allocation strategy. A user study with $320$ participants demonstrates that the proposed algorithms are effective for deception and reveal the inherent biases of participants towards proximate goals.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑一个在对抗性环境中导航的自主代理团队，旨在通过在一组目标位置分配资源来完成任务。环境中的对手观察自治团队的行为以推断其目标并对团队做出反应。在这种情况下，我们提出了控制自治团队密度的策略，以便他们可以在目标方面欺骗对手，同时实现所需的最终资源分配。我们首先开发一种基于最大熵原理的预测算法来表达对手期望的团队行为。然后，通过 Kullback-Leibler 散度测量欺骗性，我们设计了基于凸优化的规划算法，通过夸大诱饵分配策略的行为或对最终分配策略产生模糊性来欺骗对手。一项针对 320 美元参与者的用户研究表明，所提出的算法对于欺骗是有效的，并揭示了参与者对近期目标的固有偏见。

AI.tldr: 本文研究自主代理在对抗性环境中通过资源分配策略欺骗对手的方法。
AI.motivation: 自主团队需在对抗性环境中隐藏真实目标，避免被对手推断并采取反制措施。
AI.method: 基于最大熵原理预测对手预期行为，并通过KL散度衡量欺骗性，设计凸优化算法生成误导性资源分配策略。
AI.result: 320名参与者的实验验证了算法的有效性，并揭示了人类对邻近目标的固有偏好。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现欺骗性资源分配，同时凸显了人类决策中的位置偏差特征。

authors_text: Qi Xu
title: The Musical Arrow of Time -- The Role of Temporal Asymmetry in Music and Its Organicist Implications
title_zh: 音乐时间之箭——时间不对称在音乐中的作用及其有机主义含义
abstract: Adopting a performer-centric perspective, we frequently encounter two statements: "music flows", and "music is life-like". This dissertation builds on top of the two statements above, resulting in an exploration of the role of temporal asymmetry in music (generalizing "music flows") and its relation to the idea of organicism (generalizing "music is life-like"). We focus on two aspects of temporal asymmetry. The first aspect concerns the vastly different epistemic mechanisms with which we obtain knowledge of the past and the future. A particular musical consequence follows: recurrence. The epistemic difference between the past and the future shapes our experience and interpretation of recurring events in music. The second aspect concerns the arrow of time: the unambiguous ordering imposed on temporal events gives rise to the a priori pointedness of time, rendering time asymmetrical and irreversible. A discussion on thermodynamics informs us musically: the arrow of time effectuates itself in musical forms by delaying the placement of the climax. Organicism serves as a mediating topic, engaging with the concept of life as in organisms. On the one hand, organicism is related to temporal asymmetry in science via a thermodynamical interpretation of life as entropy-reducing entities. On the other hand, organicism is a topic native to music via the universally acknowledged artistic idea that music should be interpreted as a vital force possessing volitional power. With organicism as a mediator, we better understand the role of temporal asymmetry in music. In particular, we view musical form as a process of expansion and elaboration analogous to organic growth. Finally, we present an organicist interpretation of delaying the climax: viewing musical form as the result of organic growth, the arrow of time translates to a preference for prepending structure over appending structure.

abstract_zh: 从以表演者为中心的角度来看，我们经常会遇到两种说法：“音乐流动”和“音乐是生活化的”。本论文建立在上述两个陈述的基础上，探索了时间不对称在音乐中的作用（概括“音乐流动”）及其与有机主义思想（概括“音乐是栩栩如生”）的关系。我们关注时间不对称的两个方面。第一个方面涉及我们获取过去和未来知识的截然不同的认知机制。一个特殊的音乐后果如下：重现。过去和未来之间的认知差异塑造了我们对音乐中反复出现的事件的体验和解释。第二个方面涉及时间之箭：对时间事件强加的明确排序产生了时间的先验指向性，使得时间不对称且不可逆转。关于热力学的讨论从音乐上告诉我们：时间之箭通过延迟高潮的发生以音乐形式实现自身。有机主义作为一个中介主题，涉及有机体中的生命概念。一方面，有机论通过将生命作为熵减实体的热力学解释与科学中的时间不对称性相关。另一方面，有机主义是音乐固有的话题，通过普遍公认的艺术理念，即音乐应该被解释为具有意志力的生命力。以有机论为中介，我们可以更好地理解时间不对称在音乐中的作用。特别是，我们将音乐形式视为类似于有机生长的扩展和阐述的过程。最后，我们提出了延迟高潮的有机主义解释：将音乐形式视为有机增长的结果，时间之箭转化为对前置结构而非附加结构的偏好。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨音乐中时间不对称性的作用及其与有机主义的关联，分析音乐如何通过时间箭头和有机生长模式体现生命力。
AI.motivation: 音乐常被描述为'流动'和'生命化'，作者旨在通过时间不对称性与有机主义的理论联系，解释音乐形式与生命过程的相似性。
AI.method: 从表演者视角出发，结合热力学理论与有机主义概念，分析时间不对称性的两个维度：认知机制差异与时间箭头效应，并探讨其在音乐结构中的体现。
AI.result: 发现音乐形式通过延迟高潮实现时间不对称性，类比有机体生长过程；有机主义作为中介概念，连接科学熵减理论与音乐作为生命力的艺术表达。
AI.conclusion: 音乐形式本质上是有机生长过程的映射，时间箭头通过优先扩展结构而非附加结构，使音乐呈现类似生命的动态平衡。

A particular musical consequence follows: recurrence. The epistemic difference between the past and the future shapes our experience and interpretation of recurring events in music. The second aspect concerns the arrow of time: the unambiguous ordering imposed on temporal events gives rise to the a priori pointedness of time, rendering time asymmetrical and irreversible. A discussion on thermodynamics informs us musically: the arrow of time effectuates itself in musical forms by delaying the placement of the climax. Organicism serves as a mediating topic, engaging with the concept of life as in organisms. On the one hand, organicism is related to temporal asymmetry in science via a thermodynamical interpretation of life as entropy-reducing entities. On the other hand, organicism is a topic native to music via the universally acknowledged artistic idea that music should be interpreted as a vital force possessing volitional power. With organicism as a mediator, we better understand the role of temporal asymmetry in music. In particular, we view musical form as a process of expansion and elaboration analogous to organic growth. Finally, we present an organicist interpretation of delaying the climax: viewing musical form as the result of organic growth, the arrow of time translates to a preference for prepending structure over appending structure. 从以表演者为中心的角度来看，我们经常会遇到两种说法：“音乐流动”和“音乐是生活化的”。本论文建立在上述两个陈述的基础上，探索了时间不对称在音乐中的作用（概括“音乐流动”）及其与有机主义思想（概括“音乐是栩栩如生”）的关系。我们关注时间不对称的两个方面。第一个方面涉及我们获取过去和未来知识的截然不同的认知机制。一个特殊的音乐后果如下：重现。过去和未来之间的认知差异塑造了我们对音乐中反复出现的事件的体验和解释。第二个方面涉及时间之箭：对时间事件强加的明确排序产生了时间的先验指向性，使得时间不对称且不可逆转。关于热力学的讨论从音乐上告诉我们：时间之箭通过延迟高潮的发生以音乐形式实现自身。有机主义作为一个中介主题，涉及有机体中的生命概念。一方面，有机论通过将生命作为熵减实体的热力学解释与科学中的时间不对称性相关。另一方面，有机主义是音乐固有的话题，通过普遍公认的艺术理念，即音乐应该被解释为具有意志力的生命力。以有机论为中介，我们可以更好地理解时间不对称在音乐中的作用。特别是，我们将音乐形式视为类似于有机生长的扩展和阐述的过程。最后，我们提出了延迟高潮的有机主义解释：将音乐形式视为有机增长的结果，时间之箭转化为对前置结构而非附加结构的偏好。 本文探讨音乐中时间不对称性的作用及其与有机主义的关联，分析音乐如何通过时间箭头和有机生长模式体现生命力。 Qi Xu cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Emre Can Kaya,Ioan Tabus
title: Lossless Compression of Point Cloud Sequences Using Sequence Optimized CNN Models
title_zh: 使用序列优化 CNN 模型对点云序列进行无损压缩
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures
comments: 9 pages, 5 figures
abstract: We propose a new paradigm for encoding the geometry of point cloud sequences, where the convolutional neural network (CNN) which estimates the encoding distributions is optimized on several frames of the sequence to be compressed. We adopt lightweight CNN structures, we perform training as part of the encoding process, and the CNN parameters are transmitted as part of the bitstream. The newly proposed encoding scheme operates on the octree representation for each point cloud, encoding consecutively each octree resolution layer. At every octree resolution layer, the voxel grid is traversed section-by-section (each section being perpendicular to a selected coordinate axis) and in each section the occupancies of groups of two-by-two voxels are encoded at once, in a single arithmetic coding operation. A context for the conditional encoding distribution is defined for each two-by-two group of voxels, based on the information available about the occupancy of neighbor voxels in the current and lower resolution layers of the octree. The CNN estimates the probability distributions of occupancy patterns of all voxel groups from one section in four phases. In each new phase the contexts are updated with the occupancies encoded in the previous phase, and each phase estimates the probabilities in parallel, providing a reasonable trade-off between the parallelism of processing and the informativeness of the contexts. The CNN training time is comparable to the time spent in the remaining encoding steps, leading to competitive overall encoding times. Bitrates and encoding-decoding times compare favorably with those of recently published compression schemes.
summary: We propose a new paradigm for encoding the geometry of point cloud sequences, where the convolutional neural network (CNN) which estimates the encoding distributions is optimized on several frames of the sequence to be compressed. We adopt lightweight CNN structures, we perform training as part of the encoding process, and the CNN parameters are transmitted as part of the bitstream. The newly proposed encoding scheme operates on the octree representation for each point cloud, encoding consecutively each octree resolution layer. At every octree resolution layer, the voxel grid is traversed section-by-section (each section being perpendicular to a selected coordinate axis) and in each section the occupancies of groups of two-by-two voxels are encoded at once, in a single arithmetic coding operation. A context for the conditional encoding distribution is defined for each two-by-two group of voxels, based on the information available about the occupancy of neighbor voxels in the current and lower resolution layers of the octree. The CNN estimates the probability distributions of occupancy patterns of all voxel groups from one section in four phases. In each new phase the contexts are updated with the occupancies encoded in the previous phase, and each phase estimates the probabilities in parallel, providing a reasonable trade-off between the parallelism of processing and the informativeness of the contexts. The CNN training time is comparable to the time spent in the remaining encoding steps, leading to competitive overall encoding times. Bitrates and encoding-decoding times compare favorably with those of recently published compression schemes.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于编码点云序列几何形状的新范例，其中估计编码分布的卷积神经网络（CNN）在要压缩的序列的几个帧上进行了优化。我们采用轻量级 CNN 结构，将训练作为编码过程的一部分进行，并将 CNN 参数作为比特流的一部分进行传输。新提出的编码方案对每个点云的八叉树表示进行操作，连续编码每个八叉树分辨率层。在每个八叉树分辨率层，体素网格被逐个部分地遍历（每个部分垂直于选定的坐标轴），并且在每个部分中，在单个算术编码操作中立即对二乘二体素组的占用进行编码。基于有关八叉树的当前和较低分辨率层中的相邻体素的占用的可用信息，为每个二乘二的体素组定义条件编码分布的上下文。 CNN 估计四个阶段中一个部分的所有体素组的占用模式的概率分布。在每个新阶段中，上下文都会使用前一阶段中编码的占用进行更新，并且每个阶段都会并行估计概率，从而在处理的并行性和上下文的信息量之间提供合理的权衡。 CNN 训练时间与剩余编码步骤所花费的时间相当，从而导致总体编码时间具有竞争力。比特率和编码解码时间与最近发布的压缩方案相比毫不逊色。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于序列优化CNN模型的点云序列无损压缩方法，通过动态调整CNN参数并结合八叉树结构分层编码提升压缩效率。
AI.motivation: 现有点云压缩方案在处理序列数据时存在效率与压缩比难以兼顾的问题，需探索更高效的编码范式以适应动态几何信息。
AI.method: 采用轻量CNN结构，在编码过程中动态训练模型并传输参数；基于八叉树分层遍历体素网格，结合上下文信息分阶段并行估计占用模式概率分布，通过算术编码实现高效压缩。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持较高压缩比的同时，编码解码时延优于现有方案，且CNN训练时间与整体编码时间占比均衡。
AI.conclusion: 提出的序列优化CNN编码框架有效平衡了压缩性能与计算效率，为点云序列压缩提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Dominik Zimny,Joanna Waczyńska,Tomasz Trzciński,Przemysław Spurek
title: Points2NeRF: Generating Neural Radiance Fields from 3D point cloud
title_zh: Points2NeRF：从 3D 点云生成神经辐射场
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2003.08934 by other authors
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2003.08934 by other authors
abstract: Contemporary registration devices for 3D visual information, such as LIDARs and various depth cameras, capture data as 3D point clouds. In turn, such clouds are challenging to be processed due to their size and complexity. Existing methods address this problem by fitting a mesh to the point cloud and rendering it instead. This approach, however, leads to the reduced fidelity of the resulting visualization and misses color information of the objects crucial in computer graphics applications. In this work, we propose to mitigate this challenge by representing 3D objects as Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs). We leverage a hypernetwork paradigm and train the model to take a 3D point cloud with the associated color values and return a NeRF network's weights that reconstruct 3D objects from input 2D images. Our method provides efficient 3D object representation and offers several advantages over the existing approaches, including the ability to condition NeRFs and improved generalization beyond objects seen in training. The latter we also confirmed in the results of our empirical evaluation.
summary: Contemporary registration devices for 3D visual information, such as LIDARs and various depth cameras, capture data as 3D point clouds. In turn, such clouds are challenging to be processed due to their size and complexity. Existing methods address this problem by fitting a mesh to the point cloud and rendering it instead. This approach, however, leads to the reduced fidelity of the resulting visualization and misses color information of the objects crucial in computer graphics applications. In this work, we propose to mitigate this challenge by representing 3D objects as Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs). We leverage a hypernetwork paradigm and train the model to take a 3D point cloud with the associated color values and return a NeRF network's weights that reconstruct 3D objects from input 2D images. Our method provides efficient 3D object representation and offers several advantages over the existing approaches, including the ability to condition NeRFs and improved generalization beyond objects seen in training. The latter we also confirmed in the results of our empirical evaluation.
abstract_zh: 现代 3D 视觉信息配准设备（例如 LIDAR 和各种深度相机）将数据捕获为 3D 点云。反过来，此类云由于其规模和复杂性而难以处理。现有方法通过将网格拟合到点云并渲染它来解决这个问题。然而，这种方法会导致最终可视化的保真度降低，并且会丢失计算机图形应用中至关重要的对象的颜色信息。在这项工作中，我们建议通过将 3D 对象表示为神经辐射场 (NeRF) 来缓解这一挑战。我们利用超网络范例并训练模型以获取具有相关颜色值的 3D 点云，并返回 NeRF 网络的权重，以根据输入 2D 图像重建 3D 对象。我们的方法提供了高效的 3D 对象表示，并与现有方法相比具有多种优势，包括调节 NeRF 的能力以及改进训练中看到的对象之外的泛化能力。我们的实证评估结果也证实了后者。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Points2NeRF方法，通过神经辐射场（NeRF）高效表示3D物体，解决传统方法在处理点云时保真度和颜色信息丢失的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过拟合网格处理点云，但导致可视化保真度降低且丢失颜色信息，难以满足计算机图形学应用需求。
AI.method: 采用超网络架构，训练模型将带颜色值的3D点云转换为NeRF网络权重，实现从2D图像重建3D物体。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法在3D表示效率、条件NeRF能力和训练外物体泛化方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: Points2NeRF通过NeRF有效解决点云处理难题，相比传统方法在保真度和泛化性上表现更优。

We leverage a hypernetwork paradigm and train the model to take a 3D point cloud with the associated color values and return a NeRF network's weights that reconstruct 3D objects from input 2D images. Our method provides efficient 3D object representation and offers several advantages over the existing approaches, including the ability to condition NeRFs and improved generalization beyond objects seen in training. The latter we also confirmed in the results of our empirical evaluation. 现代 3D 视觉信息配准设备（例如 LIDAR 和各种深度相机）将数据捕获为 3D 点云。反过来，此类云由于其规模和复杂性而难以处理。现有方法通过将网格拟合到点云并渲染它来解决这个问题。然而，这种方法会导致最终可视化的保真度降低，并且会丢失计算机图形应用中至关重要的对象的颜色信息。在这项工作中，我们建议通过将 3D 对象表示为神经辐射场 (NeRF) 来缓解这一挑战。我们利用超网络范例并训练模型以获取具有相关颜色值的 3D 点云，并返回 NeRF 网络的权重，以根据输入 2D 图像重建 3D 对象。我们的方法提供了高效的 3D 对象表示，并与现有方法相比具有多种优势，包括调节 NeRF 的能力以及改进训练中看到的对象之外的泛化能力。我们的实证评估结果也证实了后者。 本文提出Points2NeRF方法，通过神经辐射场（NeRF）高效表示3D物体，解决传统方法在处理点云时保真度和颜色信息丢失的问题。 Dominik Zimny,Joanna Waczyńska,Tomasz Trzciński,Przemysław Spurek cs.CV

authors_text: Mansheej Paul,Brett W. Larsen,Surya Ganguli,Jonathan Frankle,Gintare Karolina Dziugaite
title: Lottery Tickets on a Data Diet: Finding Initializations with Sparse Trainable Networks
title_zh: 数据饮食中的彩票：使用稀疏可训练网络查找初始化
comment: The first two authors contributed equally
comments: The first two authors contributed equally
abstract: A striking observation about iterative magnitude pruning (IMP; Frankle et al. 2020) is that $\unicode{x2014}$ after just a few hundred steps of dense training $\unicode{x2014}$ the method can find a sparse sub-network that can be trained to the same accuracy as the dense network. However, the same does not hold at step 0, i.e. random initialization. In this work, we seek to understand how this early phase of pre-training leads to a good initialization for IMP both through the lens of the data distribution and the loss landscape geometry. Empirically we observe that, holding the number of pre-training iterations constant, training on a small fraction of (randomly chosen) data suffices to obtain an equally good initialization for IMP. We additionally observe that by pre-training only on "easy" training data, we can decrease the number of steps necessary to find a good initialization for IMP compared to training on the full dataset or a randomly chosen subset. Finally, we identify novel properties of the loss landscape of dense networks that are predictive of IMP performance, showing in particular that more examples being linearly mode connected in the dense network correlates well with good initializations for IMP. Combined, these results provide new insight into the role played by the early phase training in IMP.
summary: A striking observation about iterative magnitude pruning (IMP; Frankle et al. 2020) is that $\unicode{x2014}$ after just a few hundred steps of dense training $\unicode{x2014}$ the method can find a sparse sub-network that can be trained to the same accuracy as the dense network. However, the same does not hold at step 0, i.e. random initialization. In this work, we seek to understand how this early phase of pre-training leads to a good initialization for IMP both through the lens of the data distribution and the loss landscape geometry. Empirically we observe that, holding the number of pre-training iterations constant, training on a small fraction of (randomly chosen) data suffices to obtain an equally good initialization for IMP. We additionally observe that by pre-training only on "easy" training data, we can decrease the number of steps necessary to find a good initialization for IMP compared to training on the full dataset or a randomly chosen subset. Finally, we identify novel properties of the loss landscape of dense networks that are predictive of IMP performance, showing in particular that more examples being linearly mode connected in the dense network correlates well with good initializations for IMP. Combined, these results provide new insight into the role played by the early phase training in IMP.
abstract_zh: 关于迭代幅度剪枝的一个惊人观察（IMP；Frankle et al. 2020）是，$\unicode{x2014}$ 经过仅仅几百步的密集训练 $\unicode{x2014}$，该方法就可以找到一个稀疏子网络，该子网络可以训练到与密集网络相同的精度。然而，在步骤 0（即随机初始化）处，情况并不成立。在这项工作中，我们试图了解预训练的早期阶段如何通过数据分布和损失景观几何的角度实现 IMP 的良好初始化。根据经验，我们观察到，保持预训练迭代次数不变，对一小部分（随机选择的）数据进行训练足以获得同样好的 IMP 初始化。我们还观察到，与在完整数据集或随机选择的子集上进行训练相比，通过仅对“简单”训练数据进行预训练，我们可以减少为 IMP 找到良好初始化所需的步骤数。最后，我们确定了密集网络损失景观的新特性，这些特性可以预测 IMP 性能，特别表明，密集网络中线性模式连接的更多示例与 IMP 的良好初始化密切相关。综合起来，这些结果为 IMP 早期培训的作用提供了新的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了通过少量数据预训练如何为迭代幅度修剪（IMP）找到稀疏子网络的初始化方法。
AI.motivation: IMP在少量训练后能提取稀疏子网络，但初始随机初始化效果不佳，需探究预训练阶段如何影响IMP性能。
AI.method: 通过固定预训练步数，对比不同数据子集（随机或易例）的预训练效果，并分析密集网络损失景观的几何特性。
AI.result: 少量数据预训练即可获得良好初始化；易例预训练减少所需步数；密集网络中线性模式连接性与IMP性能正相关。
AI.conclusion: 预训练阶段的数据选择和损失景观特性对IMP性能有关键影响，为稀疏网络训练提供新视角。

authors_text: Ramij R. Hossain,Rahmat Adesunkanmi,Ratnesh Kumar
title: Data-Driven Linear Koopman Embedding for Networked Systems: Model-Predictive Grid Control
title_zh: 网络系统的数据驱动线性库普曼嵌入：模型预测网格控制
comment: ef:IEEE Systems Journal ( Volume: 17, Issue: 3, September 2023)
comments: ef:IEEE Systems Journal ( Volume: 17, Issue: 3, September 2023)
abstract: This paper presents a data-learned linear Koopman embedding of nonlinear networked dynamics and uses it to enable real-time model predictive emergency voltage control in a power network. The approach involves a novel data-driven ``basis-dictionary free" lifting of the system dynamics into a higher dimensional linear space over which an MPC (model predictive control) is exercised, making it both scalable and rapid for practical real-time implementation. A Koopman-inspired deep neural network (KDNN) encoder-decoder architecture for the linear embedding of the underlying dynamics under distributed controls is presented, in which the end-to-end components of the KDNN comprising of a triple of transforms is learned from the system trajectory data in one go: A Neural Network (NN)-based lifting to a higher dimension, a linear dynamics within that higher dimension, and an NN-based projection to the original space. This data-learned approach relieves the burden of the ad-hoc selection of the nonlinear basis functions (e.g., polynomial or radial) used in conventional approaches for lifting to higher dimensional linear space. We validate the efficacy and robustness of the approach via application to the standard IEEE 39-bus system.
summary: This paper presents a data-learned linear Koopman embedding of nonlinear networked dynamics and uses it to enable real-time model predictive emergency voltage control in a power network. The approach involves a novel data-driven ``basis-dictionary free" lifting of the system dynamics into a higher dimensional linear space over which an MPC (model predictive control) is exercised, making it both scalable and rapid for practical real-time implementation. A Koopman-inspired deep neural network (KDNN) encoder-decoder architecture for the linear embedding of the underlying dynamics under distributed controls is presented, in which the end-to-end components of the KDNN comprising of a triple of transforms is learned from the system trajectory data in one go: A Neural Network (NN)-based lifting to a higher dimension, a linear dynamics within that higher dimension, and an NN-based projection to the original space. This data-learned approach relieves the burden of the ad-hoc selection of the nonlinear basis functions (e.g., polynomial or radial) used in conventional approaches for lifting to higher dimensional linear space. We validate the efficacy and robustness of the approach via application to the standard IEEE 39-bus system.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了非线性网络动力学的数据学习线性库普曼嵌入，并使用它来实现电力网络中的实时模型预测紧急电压控制。该方法涉及一种新颖的数据驱动的“无基础字典”将系统动力学提升到更高维的线性空间，在该空间上执行 MPC（模型预测控制），使其在实际实时实现中既可扩展又快速。提出了一种受库普曼启发的深度神经网络（KDNN）编码器-解码器架构，用于分布式控制下底层动力学的线性嵌入，其中由三重变换组成的 KDNN 的端到端组件是一次性从系统轨迹数据中学习：基于神经网络（NN）的提升到更高维度，以及基于 NN 的原始空间投影，这种数据学习方法减轻了传统方法中用于提升到更高维度线性空间的临时选择非线性基函数（例如多项式或径向）的负担，我们通过应用于标准 IEEE 39 总线系统来验证该方法的有效性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动的线性Koopman嵌入方法，用于网络化系统的实时模型预测紧急电压控制。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖人工选择非线性基函数进行动态提升，存在主观性强、可扩展性差的问题，难以满足电力网络实时控制需求。
AI.method: 设计基于Koopman理论的深度神经网络（KDNN）编解码架构，通过端到端学习实现动态提升、高维线性动力学建模及投影，无需预设基函数。
AI.result: 在标准IEEE 39节点系统中验证了方法的有效性和鲁棒性，实现了快速可扩展的实时电压控制。
AI.conclusion: 该数据驱动方法为复杂网络系统提供了高效、自动化的模型预测控制解决方案，具有实际工程应用价值。

authors_text: Mark Braverman,Mahsa Derakhshan,Antonio Molina Lovett
title: Max-Weight Online Stochastic Matching: Improved Approximations Against the Online Benchmark
title_zh: 最大权重在线随机匹配：根据在线基准改进近似值
abstract: In this paper, we study max-weight stochastic matchings on online bipartite graphs under both vertex and edge arrivals. We focus on designing polynomial time approximation algorithms with respect to the online benchmark, which was first considered by Papadimitriou, Pollner, Saberi, and Wajc [EC'21]. In the vertex arrival version of the problem, the goal is to find an approximate max-weight matching of a given bipartite graph when the vertices in one part of the graph arrive online in a fixed order with independent chances of failure. Whenever a vertex arrives we should decide, irrevocably, whether to match it with one of its unmatched neighbors or leave it unmatched forever. There has been a long line of work designing approximation algorithms for different variants of this problem with respect to the offline benchmark (prophet). Papadimitriou et al., however, propose the alternative online benchmark and show that considering this new benchmark allows them to improve the 0.5 approximation ratio, which is the best ratio achievable with respect to the offline benchmark. They provide a 0.51-approximation algorithm which was later improved to 0.526 by Saberi and Wajc [ICALP'21]. The main contribution of this paper is designing a simple algorithm with a significantly improved approximation ratio of (1-1/e) for this problem. We also consider the edge arrival version in which, instead of vertices, edges of the graph arrive in an online fashion with independent chances of failure. Designing approximation algorithms for this problem has also been studied extensively with the best approximation ratio being 0.337 with respect to the offline benchmark. This paper, however, is the first to consider the online benchmark for the edge arrival version of the problem. For this problem, we provide a simple algorithm with an approximation ratio of 0.5 with respect to the online benchmark.

Whenever a vertex arrives we should decide, irrevocably, whether to match it with one of its unmatched neighbors or leave it unmatched forever. There has been a long line of work designing approximation algorithms for different variants of this problem with respect to the offline benchmark (prophet). Papadimitriou et al., however, propose the alternative online benchmark and show that considering this new benchmark allows them to improve the 0.5 approximation ratio, which is the best ratio achievable with respect to the offline benchmark. They provide a 0.51-approximation algorithm which was later improved to 0.526 by Saberi and Wajc [ICALP'21]. The main contribution of this paper is designing a simple algorithm with a significantly improved approximation ratio of (1-1/e) for this problem. We also consider the edge arrival version in which, instead of vertices, edges of the graph arrive in an online fashion with independent chances of failure. Designing approximation algorithms for this problem has also been studied extensively with the best approximation ratio being 0.337 with respect to the offline benchmark. This paper, however, is the first to consider the online benchmark for the edge arrival version of the problem. For this problem, we provide a simple algorithm with an approximation ratio of 0.5 with respect to the online benchmark.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了顶点和边到达时在线二分图上的最大权重随机匹配。我们专注于设计关于在线基准的多项式时间近似算法，该算法首先由 Papadimitriou、Pollner、Saberi 和 Wajc [EC'21] 考虑。在该问题的顶点到达版本中，目标是当图的一部分中的顶点以固定顺序到达在线且具有独立的失败机会时，找到给定二分图的近似最大权重匹配。每当一个顶点到达时，我们都应该不可撤销地决定是将其与其不匹配的邻居之一匹配还是永远保持不匹配状态。相对于离线基准（预言家），针对该问题的不同变体设计近似算法已经进行了很长的工作。然而，Papadimitriou 等人提出了替代的在线基准，并表明考虑到这个新基准可以让他们提高 0.5 的近似比率，这是相对于离线基准可实现的最佳比率。他们提供了一个 0.51 近似算法，后来由 Saberi 和 Wajc [ICALP'21] 改进到 0.526。本文的主要贡献是针对该问题设计了一种简单的算法，其近似率显着提高为（1-1/e）。我们还考虑边缘到达版本，其中图的边缘不是顶点，而是以在线方式到达，并且具有独立的失败机会。针对这个问题设计近似算法也得到了广泛的研究，相对于离线基准的最佳近似率为 0.337。然而，本文首次考虑了问题的边缘到达版本的在线基准。对于这个问题，我们提供了一个简单的算法，相对于在线基准的近似率为0.5。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在线随机匹配问题，设计针对顶点和边到达场景的多项式时间近似算法，以在线基准为标准改进近似比。
AI.motivation: 现有算法基于离线基准的近似比存在上限（如0.5），而引入在线基准可突破此限制。顶点到达场景已有改进（如0.526），但边到达场景尚未基于在线基准研究。
AI.method: 提出简单算法，利用在线基准特性，在顶点到达场景采用贪心策略，在边到达场景设计动态匹配机制。
AI.result: 顶点到达场景近似比提升至(1-1/e)（约0.632），边到达场景首次基于在线基准达到0.5近似比。
AI.conclusion: 在线基准能显著提升随机匹配问题的近似性能，所提算法在理论界和实际应用中均具重要意义。

search_text: Max-Weight Online Stochastic Matching: Improved Approximations Against the Online Benchmark 最大权重在线随机匹配：根据在线基准改进近似值 In this paper, we study max-weight stochastic matchings on online bipartite graphs under both vertex and edge arrivals. We focus on designing polynomial time approximation algorithms with respect to the online benchmark, which was first considered by Papadimitriou, Pollner, Saberi, and Wajc [EC'21]. In the vertex arrival version of the problem, the goal is to find an approximate max-weight matching of a given bipartite graph when the vertices in one part of the graph arrive online in a fixed order with independent chances of failure. Whenever a vertex arrives we should decide, irrevocably, whether to match it with one of its unmatched neighbors or leave it unmatched forever. There has been a long line of work designing approximation algorithms for different variants of this problem with respect to the offline benchmark (prophet). Papadimitriou et al., however, propose the alternative online benchmark and show that considering this new benchmark allows them to improve the 0.5 approximation ratio, which is the best ratio achievable with respect to the offline benchmark. They provide a 0.51-approximation algorithm which was later improved to 0.526 by Saberi and Wajc [ICALP'21]. The main contribution of this paper is designing a simple algorithm with a significantly improved approximation ratio of (1-1/e) for this problem. We also consider the edge arrival version in which, instead of vertices, edges of the graph arrive in an online fashion with independent chances of failure. Designing approximation algorithms for this problem has also been studied extensively with the best approximation ratio being 0.337 with respect to the offline benchmark. This paper, however, is the first to consider the online benchmark for the edge arrival version of the problem. authors_text: Mathias Lechner,Ramin Hasani,Zahra Babaiee,Radu Grosu,Daniela Rus,Thomas A. Henzinger,Sepp Hochreiter
title: Entangled Residual Mappings
title_zh: 纠缠残差映射
comment: 21 Pages
comments: 21 Pages
abstract: Residual mappings have been shown to perform representation learning in the first layers and iterative feature refinement in higher layers. This interplay, combined with their stabilizing effect on the gradient norms, enables them to train very deep networks. In this paper, we take a step further and introduce entangled residual mappings to generalize the structure of the residual connections and evaluate their role in iterative learning representations. An entangled residual mapping replaces the identity skip connections with specialized entangled mappings such as orthogonal, sparse, and structural correlation matrices that share key attributes (eigenvalues, structure, and Jacobian norm) with identity mappings. We show that while entangled mappings can preserve the iterative refinement of features across various deep models, they influence the representation learning process in convolutional networks differently than attention-based models and recurrent neural networks. In general, we find that for CNNs and Vision Transformers entangled sparse mapping can help generalization while orthogonal mappings hurt performance. For recurrent networks, orthogonal residual mappings form an inductive bias for time-variant sequences, which degrades accuracy on time-invariant tasks.
summary: Residual mappings have been shown to perform representation learning in the first layers and iterative feature refinement in higher layers. This interplay, combined with their stabilizing effect on the gradient norms, enables them to train very deep networks. In this paper, we take a step further and introduce entangled residual mappings to generalize the structure of the residual connections and evaluate their role in iterative learning representations. An entangled residual mapping replaces the identity skip connections with specialized entangled mappings such as orthogonal, sparse, and structural correlation matrices that share key attributes (eigenvalues, structure, and Jacobian norm) with identity mappings. We show that while entangled mappings can preserve the iterative refinement of features across various deep models, they influence the representation learning process in convolutional networks differently than attention-based models and recurrent neural networks. In general, we find that for CNNs and Vision Transformers entangled sparse mapping can help generalization while orthogonal mappings hurt performance. For recurrent networks, orthogonal residual mappings form an inductive bias for time-variant sequences, which degrades accuracy on time-invariant tasks.
abstract_zh: 残差映射已被证明可以在第一层中执行表示学习，并在更高层中执行迭代特征细化。这种相互作用，再加上它们对梯度范数的稳定作用，使他们能够训练非常深的网络。在本文中，我们更进一步，引入纠缠残差映射来概括残差连接的结构并评估它们在迭代学习表示中的作用。纠缠残差映射将恒等跳跃连接替换为专门的纠缠映射，例如与恒等映射共享关键属性（特征值、结构和雅可比范数）的正交、稀疏和结构相关矩阵。我们表明，虽然纠缠映射可以保留各种深度模型中特征的迭代细化，但它们对卷积网络中表示学习过程的影响与基于注意力的模型和循环神经网络不同。一般来说，我们发现对于 CNN 和 Vision Transformer 来说，纠缠稀疏映射有助于泛化，而正交映射会损害性能。对于循环网络，正交残差映射形成时变序列的归纳偏差，这会降低时不变任务的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'纠缠残差映射'的新方法，通过用正交、稀疏和结构相关矩阵等特殊纠缠映射替代传统残差连接中的恒等跳接，以研究其在不同深度模型中的表示学习和特征迭代优化作用。
AI.motivation: 残差映射在深度网络中表现出稳定的梯度规范和特征迭代优化能力，但其结构仍有改进空间。本文旨在通过引入纠缠映射扩展残差连接的结构，探索其在不同网络类型（如CNN、Transformer和RNN）中的表示学习差异。
AI.method: 设计纠缠残差映射，用具有与恒等映射相似属性（如特征值、雅可比范数）的特殊矩阵替代恒等跳接，并在卷积网络、视觉Transformer和循环网络中进行实验，分析不同纠缠映射对特征优化和泛化能力的影响。
AI.result: 实验发现，稀疏纠缠映射在CNN和视觉Transformer中提升泛化能力，而正交映射会损害其性能；正交残差映射在循环网络中对时变序列形成归纳偏置，但在时不变任务中降低准确率。
AI.conclusion: 纠缠残差映射为不同网络架构提供了定制化残差连接的可能，但需根据任务类型（如时变/时不变）和网络结构选择合适的纠缠映射类型以优化性能。

Henzinger,Sepp Hochreiter cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE

authors_text: Yingfei Liu,Junjie Yan,Fan Jia,Shuailin Li,Aqi Gao,Tiancai Wang,Xiangyu Zhang,Jian Sun
title: PETRv2: A Unified Framework for 3D Perception from Multi-Camera Images
title_zh: PETRv2：多相机图像 3D 感知的统一框架
comment: Adding 3D lane detection results on OpenLane Dataset
comments: Adding 3D lane detection results on OpenLane Dataset
abstract: In this paper, we propose PETRv2, a unified framework for 3D perception from multi-view images. Based on PETR, PETRv2 explores the effectiveness of temporal modeling, which utilizes the temporal information of previous frames to boost 3D object detection. More specifically, we extend the 3D position embedding (3D PE) in PETR for temporal modeling. The 3D PE achieves the temporal alignment on object position of different frames. A feature-guided position encoder is further introduced to improve the data adaptability of 3D PE. To support for multi-task learning (e.g., BEV segmentation and 3D lane detection), PETRv2 provides a simple yet effective solution by introducing task-specific queries, which are initialized under different spaces. PETRv2 achieves state-of-the-art performance on 3D object detection, BEV segmentation and 3D lane detection. Detailed robustness analysis is also conducted on PETR framework. We hope PETRv2 can serve as a strong baseline for 3D perception. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/megvii-research/PETR}.
summary: In this paper, we propose PETRv2, a unified framework for 3D perception from multi-view images. Based on PETR, PETRv2 explores the effectiveness of temporal modeling, which utilizes the temporal information of previous frames to boost 3D object detection. More specifically, we extend the 3D position embedding (3D PE) in PETR for temporal modeling. The 3D PE achieves the temporal alignment on object position of different frames. A feature-guided position encoder is further introduced to improve the data adaptability of 3D PE. To support for multi-task learning (e.g., BEV segmentation and 3D lane detection), PETRv2 provides a simple yet effective solution by introducing task-specific queries, which are initialized under different spaces. PETRv2 achieves state-of-the-art performance on 3D object detection, BEV segmentation and 3D lane detection. Detailed robustness analysis is also conducted on PETR framework. We hope PETRv2 can serve as a strong baseline for 3D perception. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/megvii-research/PETR}.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 PETRv2，一个用于多视图图像 3D 感知的统一框架。 PETRv2 基于 PETR，探索时间建模的有效性，利用先前帧的时间信息来增强 3D 对象检测。更具体地说，我们扩展了 PETR 中的 3D 位置嵌入（3D PE）以进行时间建模。 3D PE实现了不同帧的对象位置的时间对齐。进一步引入特征引导位置编码器来提高3D PE的数据适应性。为了支持多任务学习（例如，BEV 分割和 3D 车道检测），PETRv2 通过引入在不同空间下初始化的任务特定查询，提供了一种简单而有效的解决方案。 PETRv2 在 3D 对象检测、BEV 分割和 3D 车道检测方面实现了最先进的性能。对PETR框架也进行了详细的稳健性分析。我们希望 PETRv2 能够作为 3D 感知的强大基线。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/megvii-research/PETR} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PETRv2，一种基于多视角图像的统一3D感知框架，通过时序建模和多任务学习提升3D目标检测、BEV分割和3D车道检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在利用时序信息和跨任务适配性方面存在不足，需通过时序建模增强3D感知鲁棒性，并支持多任务联合学习。
AI.method: 扩展3D位置编码实现跨帧时序对齐，引入特征引导的位置编码器提升数据适应性，设计任务特定查询初始化策略支持多任务学习。
AI.result: 在3D目标检测、BEV分割和3D车道检测任务中均达到SOTA性能，并通过消融实验验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: PETRv2为3D感知提供了统一且高效的基线方案，其时序建模和多任务设计对后续研究具有重要参考价值。

authors_text: Tessa Han,Suraj Srinivas,Himabindu Lakkaraju
title: Which Explanation Should I Choose? A Function Approximation Perspective to Characterizing Post Hoc Explanations
title_zh: 我应该选择哪种解释？表征事后解释的函数逼近视角
abstract: A critical problem in the field of post hoc explainability is the lack of a common foundational goal among methods. For example, some methods are motivated by function approximation, some by game theoretic notions, and some by obtaining clean visualizations. This fragmentation of goals causes not only an inconsistent conceptual understanding of explanations but also the practical challenge of not knowing which method to use when. In this work, we begin to address these challenges by unifying eight popular post hoc explanation methods (LIME, C-LIME, KernelSHAP, Occlusion, Vanilla Gradients, Gradients x Input, SmoothGrad, and Integrated Gradients). We show that these methods all perform local function approximation of the black-box model, differing only in the neighbourhood and loss function used to perform the approximation. This unification enables us to (1) state a no free lunch theorem for explanation methods, demonstrating that no method can perform optimally across all neighbourhoods, and (2) provide a guiding principle to choose among methods based on faithfulness to the black-box model. We empirically validate these theoretical results using various real-world datasets, model classes, and prediction tasks. By bringing diverse explanation methods into a common framework, this work (1) advances the conceptual understanding of these methods, revealing their shared local function approximation objective, properties, and relation to one another, and (2) guides the use of these methods in practice, providing a principled approach to choose among methods and paving the way for the creation of new ones.
summary: A critical problem in the field of post hoc explainability is the lack of a common foundational goal among methods. For example, some methods are motivated by function approximation, some by game theoretic notions, and some by obtaining clean visualizations. This fragmentation of goals causes not only an inconsistent conceptual understanding of explanations but also the practical challenge of not knowing which method to use when. In this work, we begin to address these challenges by unifying eight popular post hoc explanation methods (LIME, C-LIME, KernelSHAP, Occlusion, Vanilla Gradients, Gradients x Input, SmoothGrad, and Integrated Gradients). We show that these methods all perform local function approximation of the black-box model, differing only in the neighbourhood and loss function used to perform the approximation. This unification enables us to (1) state a no free lunch theorem for explanation methods, demonstrating that no method can perform optimally across all neighbourhoods, and (2) provide a guiding principle to choose among methods based on faithfulness to the black-box model. We empirically validate these theoretical results using various real-world datasets, model classes, and prediction tasks. By bringing diverse explanation methods into a common framework, this work (1) advances the conceptual understanding of these methods, revealing their shared local function approximation objective, properties, and relation to one another, and (2) guides the use of these methods in practice, providing a principled approach to choose among methods and paving the way for the creation of new ones.
abstract_zh: 事后可解释性领域的一个关键问题是方法之间缺乏共同的基本目标。例如，一些方法是由函数近似激发的，一些方法是由博弈论概念激发的，还有一些是通过获得清晰的可视化来激发的。这种目标的碎片化不仅导致对解释的概念理解不一致，而且导致不知道何时使用哪种方法的实际挑战。在这项工作中，我们开始通过统一八种流行的事后解释方法（LIME、C-LIME、KernelSHAP、Occlusion、Vanilla Gradients、Gradients x Input、SmoothGrad 和 Integrated Gradients）来应对这些挑战。我们证明这些方法都执行黑盒模型的局部函数逼近，仅在用于执行逼近的邻域和损失函数方面有所不同。这种统一使我们能够（1）为解释方法提出一个没有免费午餐定理，证明没有一种方法可以在所有邻域中表现最佳，（2）提供一个指导原则，以根据对黑盒模型的忠实度来选择方法。我们使用各种现实世界数据集、模型类和预测任务来实证验证这些理论结果。通过将不同的解释方法纳入一个共同的框架，这项工作（1）推进了对这些方法的概念理解，揭示了它们共享的局部函数逼近目标、属性和彼此之间的关系，（2）指导了这些方法在实践中的使用，提供了一种原则性的方法来选择方法，并为创建新方法铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文从函数逼近的角度统一了八种主流事后解释方法，揭示其共性并指导方法选择。
AI.motivation: 事后解释方法目标不一致导致概念理解混乱和实践选择困难，缺乏统一框架。
AI.method: 通过分析八种方法（如LIME、SHAP等）的局部函数逼近特性，统一其在邻域和损失函数上的差异。
AI.result: 提出无免费午餐定理，证明无方法能在所有邻域最优；基于模型忠实度提供方法选择原则，并通过实验证实。
AI.conclusion: 建立统一框架深化方法理解，提供实践选择依据，并为新方法开发奠定基础。

authors_text: Yuchen Lu,Zhen Liu,Aristide Baratin,Romain Laroche,Aaron Courville,Alessandro Sordoni
title: Using Representation Expressiveness and Learnability to Evaluate Self-Supervised Learning Methods
title_zh: 利用表征表现力和可学习性来评估自我监督学习方法
comment: ef:TMLR 2023 -- Transactions of Machine Learning Research, 11/2023
comments: ef:TMLR 2023 -- Transactions of Machine Learning Research, 11/2023
abstract: We address the problem of evaluating the quality of self-supervised learning (SSL) models without access to supervised labels, while being agnostic to the architecture, learning algorithm or data manipulation used during training. We argue that representations can be evaluated through the lens of expressiveness and learnability. We propose to use the Intrinsic Dimension (ID) to assess expressiveness and introduce Cluster Learnability (CL) to assess learnability. CL is measured in terms of the performance of a KNN classifier trained to predict labels obtained by clustering the representations with K-means. We thus combine CL and ID into a single predictor -- CLID. Through a large-scale empirical study with a diverse family of SSL algorithms, we find that CLID better correlates with in-distribution model performance than other competing recent evaluation schemes. We also benchmark CLID on out-of-domain generalization, where CLID serves as a predictor of the transfer performance of SSL models on several visual classification tasks, yielding improvements with respect to the competing baselines.
summary: We address the problem of evaluating the quality of self-supervised learning (SSL) models without access to supervised labels, while being agnostic to the architecture, learning algorithm or data manipulation used during training. We argue that representations can be evaluated through the lens of expressiveness and learnability. We propose to use the Intrinsic Dimension (ID) to assess expressiveness and introduce Cluster Learnability (CL) to assess learnability. CL is measured in terms of the performance of a KNN classifier trained to predict labels obtained by clustering the representations with K-means. We thus combine CL and ID into a single predictor -- CLID. Through a large-scale empirical study with a diverse family of SSL algorithms, we find that CLID better correlates with in-distribution model performance than other competing recent evaluation schemes. We also benchmark CLID on out-of-domain generalization, where CLID serves as a predictor of the transfer performance of SSL models on several visual classification tasks, yielding improvements with respect to the competing baselines.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了在无法访问监督标签的情况下评估自监督学习（SSL）模型质量的问题，同时对训练期间使用的架构、学习算法或数据操作不可知。我们认为可以通过表达性和可学习性的角度来评估表​​征。我们建议使用内在维度（ID）来评估表达能力，并引入聚类学习能力（CL）来评估可学习性。 CL 根据 KNN 分类器的性能来衡量，该分类器经过训练来预测通过使用 K 均值对表示进行聚类而获得的标签。因此，我们将 CL 和 ID 组合成一个预测变量——CLID。通过对多种 SSL 算法进行的大规模实证研究，我们发现与其他竞争性的最新评估方案相比，CLID 与分布内模型性能的相关性更好。我们还在域外泛化上对 CLID 进行基准测试，其中 CLID 作为 SSL 模型在多个视觉分类任务上的传输性能的预测器，从而相对于竞争基线产生了改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需监督标签评估自监督学习（SSL）模型质量的方法，通过表示的表达能力和可学习性进行综合评价。
AI.motivation: 现有SSL模型评估方法依赖监督标签或特定训练细节，缺乏通用性和客观性，需设计与架构、算法无关的评估指标。
AI.method: 引入内在维度（ID）衡量表示表达能力，通过K-means聚类后KNN分类器性能定义聚类可学习性（CL），结合二者形成CLID指标。
AI.result: 大规模实验表明CLID比现有方法更准确预测模型性能，在跨领域任务中也优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CLID为SSL模型提供了一种通用且有效的评估框架，可同时指导模型表达能力优化和跨领域泛化能力提升。

search_text: Using Representation Expressiveness and Learnability to Evaluate Self-Supervised Learning Methods 利用表征表现力和可学习性来评估自我监督学习方法 We address the problem of evaluating the quality of self-supervised learning (SSL) models without access to supervised labels, while being agnostic to the architecture, learning algorithm or data manipulation used during training. We argue that representations can be evaluated through the lens of expressiveness and learnability. We propose to use the Intrinsic Dimension (ID) to assess expressiveness and introduce Cluster Learnability (CL) to assess learnability. CL is measured in terms of the performance of a KNN classifier trained to predict labels obtained by clustering the representations with K-means. We thus combine CL and ID into a single predictor -- CLID. Through a large-scale empirical study with a diverse family of SSL algorithms, we find that CLID better correlates with in-distribution model performance than other competing recent evaluation schemes. We also benchmark CLID on out-of-domain generalization, where CLID serves as a predictor of the transfer performance of SSL models on several visual classification tasks, yielding improvements with respect to the competing baselines. 我们解决了在无法访问监督标签的情况下评估自监督学习（SSL）模型质量的问题，同时对训练期间使用的架构、学习算法或数据操作不可知。我们认为可以通过表达性和可学习性的角度来评估表​​征。我们建议使用内在维度（ID）来评估表达能力，并引入聚类学习能力（CL）来评估可学习性。 CL 根据 KNN 分类器的性能来衡量，该分类器经过训练来预测通过使用 K 均值对表示进行聚类而获得的标签。因此，我们将 CL 和 ID 组合成一个预测变量——CLID。通过对多种 SSL 算法进行的大规模实证研究，我们发现与其他竞争性的最新评估方案相比，CLID 与分布内模型性能的相关性更好。我们还在域外泛化上对 CLID 进行基准测试，其中 CLID 作为 SSL 模型在多个视觉分类任务上的传输性能的预测器，从而相对于竞争基线产生了改进。 本文提出一种无需监督标签评估自监督学习（SSL）模型质量的方法，通过表示的表达能力和可学习性进行综合评价。 Yuchen Lu,Zhen Liu,Aristide Baratin,Romain Laroche,Aaron Courville,Alessandro Sordoni cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Andrea Sipos,Nima Fazeli
title: Simultaneous Contact Location and Object Pose Estimation Using Proprioception and Tactile Feedback
title_zh: 使用本体感觉和触觉反馈同时估计接触位置和物体姿势
comment: Accepted to the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: Accepted to the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: Joint estimation of grasped object pose and extrinsic contacts is central to robust and dexterous manipulation. In this paper, we propose a novel state-estimation algorithm that jointly estimates contact location and object pose in 3D using exclusively proprioception and tactile feedback. Our approach leverages two complementary particle filters: one to estimate contact location (CPFGrasp) and another to estimate object poses (SCOPE). We implement and evaluate our approach on real-world single-arm and dual-arm robotic systems. We demonstrate that by bringing two objects into contact, the robots can infer contact location and object poses simultaneously. Our proposed method can be applied to a number of downstream tasks that require accurate pose estimates, such as tool use and assembly. Code and data can be found at https://github.com/MMintLab/scope.
summary: Joint estimation of grasped object pose and extrinsic contacts is central to robust and dexterous manipulation. In this paper, we propose a novel state-estimation algorithm that jointly estimates contact location and object pose in 3D using exclusively proprioception and tactile feedback. Our approach leverages two complementary particle filters: one to estimate contact location (CPFGrasp) and another to estimate object poses (SCOPE). We implement and evaluate our approach on real-world single-arm and dual-arm robotic systems. We demonstrate that by bringing two objects into contact, the robots can infer contact location and object poses simultaneously. Our proposed method can be applied to a number of downstream tasks that require accurate pose estimates, such as tool use and assembly. Code and data can be found at https://github.com/MMintLab/scope.
abstract_zh: 抓取物体姿态和外部接触的联合估计是鲁棒和灵巧操作的核心。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的状态估计算法，该算法仅使用本体感觉和触觉反馈来联合估计 3D 中的接触位置和物体姿态。我们的方法利用两个互补的粒子滤波器：一个用于估计接触位置（CPFGrasp），另一个用于估计物体姿态（SCOPE）。我们在现实世界的单臂和双臂机器人系统上实施并评估我们的方法。我们证明，通过使两个物体接触，机器人可以同时推断接触位置和物体姿势。我们提出的方法可以应用于许多需要准确姿态估计的下游任务，例如工具使用和组装。代码和数据可以在 https://github.com/MMintLab/scope 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于本体感觉和触觉反馈的算法，同时估计抓取物体的姿态和外部接触点位置。
AI.motivation: 精确估计物体姿态和接触位置对实现稳健的灵巧操作至关重要，传统方法依赖视觉信息存在局限性，需探索更可靠的传感方案。
AI.method: 设计两种互补的粒子滤波器：CPFGrasp用于接触位置估计，SCOPE用于物体姿态估计，通过本体感觉和触觉数据联合建模实现同步推理。
AI.result: 在单臂和双臂机器人系统实验中验证方法有效性，证明通过物体接触可同时推断接触位置和物体姿态，适用于工具使用和装配等下游任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无视觉辅助的机器人操作提供了新思路，代码和数据开源便于后续研究应用。

authors_text: Yanyu Li,Xuan Shen,Geng Yuan,Jiexiong Guan,Wei Niu,Hao Tang,Bin Ren,Yanzhi Wang
title: Real-Time Portrait Stylization on the Edge
title_zh: 边缘实时肖像风格化
abstract: In this work we demonstrate real-time portrait stylization, specifically, translating self-portrait into cartoon or anime style on mobile devices. We propose a latency-driven differentiable architecture search method, maintaining realistic generative quality. With our framework, we obtain $10\times$ computation reduction on the generative model and achieve real-time video stylization on off-the-shelf smartphone using mobile GPUs.
summary: In this work we demonstrate real-time portrait stylization, specifically, translating self-portrait into cartoon or anime style on mobile devices. We propose a latency-driven differentiable architecture search method, maintaining realistic generative quality. With our framework, we obtain $10\times$ computation reduction on the generative model and achieve real-time video stylization on off-the-shelf smartphone using mobile GPUs.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们演示了实时肖像风格化，特别是将自画像翻译成移动设备上的卡通或动漫风格。我们提出了一种延迟驱动的可微架构搜索方法，保持现实的生成质量。通过我们的框架，我们在生成模型上减少了 10 倍的计算量，并使用移动 GPU 在现成的智能手机上实现了实时视频风格化。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出在移动设备上实时进行人像风格化的方法，将自画像转换为卡通或动漫风格。
AI.motivation: 现有风格化方法在移动设备上计算量大，难以实现实时处理，需优化模型效率。
AI.method: 提出延迟驱动的可微分架构搜索方法，在保持生成质量的同时减少计算量。
AI.result: 生成模型计算量减少10倍，实现手机GPU上的实时视频风格化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持生成质量的前提下显著提升效率，适用于移动设备实时应用。

authors_text: Marko Palangetić,Chris Cornelis,Salvatore Greco,Roman Słowiński
title: Fuzzy granular approximation classifier
title_zh: 模糊粒状近似分类器
abstract: In this article, a new Fuzzy Granular Approximation Classifier (FGAC) is introduced. The classifier is based on the previously introduced concept of the granular approximation and its multi-class classification case. The classifier is instance-based and its biggest advantage is its local transparency i.e., the ability to explain every individual prediction it makes. We first develop the FGAC for the binary classification case and the multi-class classification case and we discuss its variation that includes the Ordered Weighted Average (OWA) operators. Those variations of the FGAC are then empirically compared with other locally transparent ML methods. At the end, we discuss the transparency of the FGAC and its advantage over other locally transparent methods. We conclude that while the FGAC has similar predictive performance to other locally transparent ML models, its transparency can be superior in certain cases.
summary: In this article, a new Fuzzy Granular Approximation Classifier (FGAC) is introduced. The classifier is based on the previously introduced concept of the granular approximation and its multi-class classification case. The classifier is instance-based and its biggest advantage is its local transparency i.e., the ability to explain every individual prediction it makes. We first develop the FGAC for the binary classification case and the multi-class classification case and we discuss its variation that includes the Ordered Weighted Average (OWA) operators. Those variations of the FGAC are then empirically compared with other locally transparent ML methods. At the end, we discuss the transparency of the FGAC and its advantage over other locally transparent methods. We conclude that while the FGAC has similar predictive performance to other locally transparent ML models, its transparency can be superior in certain cases.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，介绍了一种新的模糊粒度近似分类器（FGAC）。该分类器基于先前介绍的粒度近似的概念及其多类分类情况。分类器是基于实例的，其最大的优势是其局部透明度，即能够解释它所做的每个单独的预测。我们首先针对二元分类情况和多类分类情况开发 FGAC，并讨论其包含有序加权平均 (OWA) 运算符的变体。然后根据经验将 FGAC 的这些变体与其他局部透明的 ML 方法进行比较。最后，我们讨论了 FGAC 的透明度及其相对于其他本地透明方法的优势。我们的结论是，虽然 FGAC 与其他本地透明的 ML 模型具有相似的预测性能，但在某些情况下其透明度可能更高。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种新的模糊粒度逼近分类器（FGAC），旨在实现具有局部透明性的分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有的机器学习方法在预测性能上表现良好，但缺乏局部透明性，即无法解释每个单独预测。本文旨在开发一种具有局部透明性的分类器，以提高模型的可解释性。
AI.method: 作者开发了基于粒度逼近的FGAC，分别用于二分类和多分类任务，并引入了有序加权平均（OWA）算子的变体。随后，通过实验将FGAC与其他局部透明的机器学习方法进行了比较。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，FGAC在预测性能上与其他局部透明的机器学习模型相当，但在某些情况下其透明性表现更优。
AI.conclusion: FGAC在保持良好预测性能的同时，具有较高的透明性，相较于其他局部透明的机器学习方法具有一定的优势。

search_text: Fuzzy granular approximation classifier 模糊粒状近似分类器 In this article, a new Fuzzy Granular Approximation Classifier (FGAC) is introduced. The classifier is based on the previously introduced concept of the granular approximation and its multi-class classification case. The classifier is instance-based and its biggest advantage is its local transparency i.e., the ability to explain every individual prediction it makes. We first develop the FGAC for the binary classification case and the multi-class classification case and we discuss its variation that includes the Ordered Weighted Average (OWA) operators. Those variations of the FGAC are then empirically compared with other locally transparent ML methods. At the end, we discuss the transparency of the FGAC and its advantage over other locally transparent methods. We conclude that while the FGAC has similar predictive performance to other locally transparent ML models, its transparency can be superior in certain cases. 在本文中，介绍了一种新的模糊粒度近似分类器（FGAC）。该分类器基于先前介绍的粒度近似的概念及其多类分类情况。分类器是基于实例的，其最大的优势是其局部透明度，即能够解释它所做的每个单独的预测。我们首先针对二元分类情况和多类分类情况开发 FGAC，并讨论其包含有序加权平均 (OWA) 运算符的变体。然后根据经验将 FGAC 的这些变体与其他局部透明的 ML 方法进行比较。最后，我们讨论了 FGAC 的透明度及其相对于其他本地透明方法的优势。我们的结论是，虽然 FGAC 与其他本地透明的 ML 模型具有相似的预测性能，但在某些情况下其透明度可能更高。 本文介绍了一种新的模糊粒度逼近分类器（FGAC），旨在实现具有局部透明性的分类任务。 Marko Palangetić,Chris Cornelis,Salvatore Greco,Roman Słowiński cs.AI

authors_text: Shilong Zhang,Xinjiang Wang,Jiaqi Wang,Jiangmiao Pang,Kai Chen
title: What Are Expected Queries in End-to-End Object Detection?
title_zh: 端到端对象检测中的预期查询是什么？
comment: The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/jshilong/DDQ
comments: The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/jshilong/DDQ
abstract: End-to-end object detection is rapidly progressed after the emergence of DETR. DETRs use a set of sparse queries that replace the dense candidate boxes in most traditional detectors. In comparison, the sparse queries cannot guarantee a high recall as dense priors. However, making queries dense is not trivial in current frameworks. It not only suffers from heavy computational cost but also difficult optimization. As both sparse and dense queries are imperfect, then \emph{what are expected queries in end-to-end object detection}? This paper shows that the expected queries should be Dense Distinct Queries (DDQ). Concretely, we introduce dense priors back to the framework to generate dense queries. A duplicate query removal pre-process is applied to these queries so that they are distinguishable from each other. The dense distinct queries are then iteratively processed to obtain final sparse outputs. We show that DDQ is stronger, more robust, and converges faster. It obtains 44.5 AP on the MS COCO detection dataset with only 12 epochs. DDQ is also robust as it outperforms previous methods on both object detection and instance segmentation tasks on various datasets. DDQ blends advantages from traditional dense priors and recent end-to-end detectors. We hope it can serve as a new baseline and inspires researchers to revisit the complementarity between traditional methods and end-to-end detectors. The source code is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/jshilong/DDQ}.
summary: End-to-end object detection is rapidly progressed after the emergence of DETR. DETRs use a set of sparse queries that replace the dense candidate boxes in most traditional detectors. In comparison, the sparse queries cannot guarantee a high recall as dense priors. However, making queries dense is not trivial in current frameworks. It not only suffers from heavy computational cost but also difficult optimization. As both sparse and dense queries are imperfect, then \emph{what are expected queries in end-to-end object detection}? This paper shows that the expected queries should be Dense Distinct Queries (DDQ). Concretely, we introduce dense priors back to the framework to generate dense queries. A duplicate query removal pre-process is applied to these queries so that they are distinguishable from each other. The dense distinct queries are then iteratively processed to obtain final sparse outputs. We show that DDQ is stronger, more robust, and converges faster. It obtains 44.5 AP on the MS COCO detection dataset with only 12 epochs. DDQ is also robust as it outperforms previous methods on both object detection and instance segmentation tasks on various datasets. DDQ blends advantages from traditional dense priors and recent end-to-end detectors. We hope it can serve as a new baseline and inspires researchers to revisit the complementarity between traditional methods and end-to-end detectors. The source code is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/jshilong/DDQ}.
abstract_zh: DETR出现后，端到端的目标检测得到了迅速的发展。 DETR 使用一组稀疏查询来替换大多数传统检测器中的密集候选框。相比之下，稀疏查询不能保证像密集先验那样的高召回率。然而，在当前框架中，使查询变得密集并不是小事。它不仅计算成本高，而且优化困难。由于稀疏查询和密集查询都不完美，那么\emph{端到端对象检测中的预期查询是什么}？本文表明预期的查询应该是密集不同查询（DDQ）。具体来说，我们将密集先验引入框架以生成密集查询。对这些查询应用重复查询删除预处理，以便它们可以彼此区分。然后迭代处理密集的不同查询以获得最终的稀疏输出。我们证明 DDQ 更强大、更稳健并且收敛更快。仅用 12 个 epoch，它就在 MS COCO 检测数据集上获得了 44.5 AP。 DDQ 也很强大，因为它在各种数据集上的对象检测和实例分割任务上都优于以前的方法。 DDQ 融合了传统密集先验和最新端到端检测器的优点。我们希望它可以作为一个新的基线，并激励研究人员重新审视传统方法和端到端检测器之间的互补性。源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/jshilong/DDQ} 公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Dense Distinct Queries (DDQ)的新方法，旨在改进端到端目标检测中的查询设计，结合密集先验与稀疏输出的优势。
AI.motivation: 现有的端到端检测器（如DETR）使用稀疏查询导致召回率不足，而密集查询虽能提升性能但面临计算成本高和优化困难的问题，需探索更优的查询设计。
AI.method: 引入密集先验生成密集查询，并通过去重预处理确保查询可区分性，再通过迭代处理生成最终稀疏输出。
AI.result: 在MS COCO数据集上以仅12个训练周期达到44.5 AP，优于现有方法，在目标检测和实例分割任务中表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: DDQ融合了传统密集先验与端到端检测器的优势，可作为新基准，启发研究者重新审视传统方法与端到端模型的互补性。

authors_text: Chen Shang,Kaiyin Feng,Eamonn T. Hughes,Andrew Clark,Mukul Debnath,Rosalyn Koscica,Gerald Leake,Joshua Herman,David Harame,Peter Ludewig,Yating Wan,John E. Bowers
title: Electrically pumped quantum-dot lasers grown on 300 mm patterned Si photonic wafers
title_zh: 在 300 毫米图案硅光子晶圆上生长的电泵量子点激光器
comment: 11 pages including references, 6 figures
comments: 11 pages including references, 6 figures
abstract: Monolithic integration of quantum dot (QD) gain materials onto Si photonic platforms via direct epitaxial growth is a promising solution for on-chip light sources. Recent developments have demonstrated superior device reliability in blanket hetero-epitaxy of III-V devices on Si at elevated temperatures. Yet, thick, defect management epi designs prevent vertical light coupling from the gain region to the Si-on-Insulator (SOI) waveguides. Here, we demonstrate the first electrically pumped QD lasers grown on a 300 mm patterned (001) Si wafer with a butt-coupled configuration by molecular beam epitaxy (MBE). Unique growth and fabrication challenges imposed by the template architecture have been resolved, contributing to continuous wave lasing to 60 °C and a maximum double-side output power of 126.6 mW at 20 °C with a double-side wall plug efficiency of 8.6%. The potential for robust on-chip laser operation and efficient low-loss light coupling to Si photonic circuits makes this heteroepitaxial integration platform on Si promising for scalable and low-cost mass production.
summary: Monolithic integration of quantum dot (QD) gain materials onto Si photonic platforms via direct epitaxial growth is a promising solution for on-chip light sources. Recent developments have demonstrated superior device reliability in blanket hetero-epitaxy of III-V devices on Si at elevated temperatures. Yet, thick, defect management epi designs prevent vertical light coupling from the gain region to the Si-on-Insulator (SOI) waveguides. Here, we demonstrate the first electrically pumped QD lasers grown on a 300 mm patterned (001) Si wafer with a butt-coupled configuration by molecular beam epitaxy (MBE). Unique growth and fabrication challenges imposed by the template architecture have been resolved, contributing to continuous wave lasing to 60 °C and a maximum double-side output power of 126.6 mW at 20 °C with a double-side wall plug efficiency of 8.6%. The potential for robust on-chip laser operation and efficient low-loss light coupling to Si photonic circuits makes this heteroepitaxial integration platform on Si promising for scalable and low-cost mass production.
abstract_zh: 通过直接外延生长将量子点 (QD) 增益材料单片集成到硅光子平台上是片上光源的一种有前途的解决方案。最近的发展已经证明，在高温下，Si 上 III-V 族器件的全面异质外延具有卓越的器件可靠性。然而，厚的缺陷管理外延设计阻止了从增益区域到绝缘体上硅 (SOI) 波导的垂直光耦合。在这里，我们展示了第一个在 300 mm 图案化 (001) Si 晶圆上生长的电泵 QD 激光器，该晶圆具有分子束外延 (MBE) 对接耦合配置。模板架构带来的独特生长和制造挑战已得到解决，有助于在 60°C 下连续发射激光，并在 20°C 下实现最大双面输出功率 126.6 mW，双面墙插头效率为 8.6%。强大的片上激光器操作和与硅光子电路的高效低损耗光耦合的潜力使得这种硅上异质外延集成平台有望实现可扩展和低成本的大规模生产。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在300毫米图案化硅光子晶圆上通过分子束外延生长实现电泵浦量子点激光器的方法。
AI.motivation: 将量子点增益材料单片集成到硅光子平台上是实现片上光源的有前景的解决方案，但目前存在缺陷管理和垂直光耦合的问题。
AI.method: 采用分子束外延技术，在300毫米图案化硅晶圆上生长量子点激光器，并通过 butt-coupled 配置实现与硅光子波导的耦合。
AI.result: 实现了在60°C下的连续波激光，并在20°C时达到126.6 mW的双侧输出功率，双侧墙插效率为8.6%。
AI.conclusion: 该异质外延集成平台在硅上具有实现稳健片上激光操作和高效低损耗光耦合的潜力，适用于可扩展和低成本的大规模生产。

ai_content.tldr: 本文介绍了在300毫米图案化硅光子晶圆上通过分子束外延生长实现电泵浦量子点激光器的方法。
ai_content.motivation: 将量子点增益材料单片集成到硅光子平台上是实现片上光源的有前景的解决方案，但目前存在缺陷管理和垂直光耦合的问题。
ai_content.method: 采用分子束外延技术，在300毫米图案化硅晶圆上生长量子点激光器，并通过 butt-coupled 配置实现与硅光子波导的耦合。
ai_content.result: 实现了在60°C下的连续波激光，并在20°C时达到126.6 mW的双侧输出功率，双侧墙插效率为8.6%。
ai_content.conclusion: 该异质外延集成平台在硅上具有实现稳健片上激光操作和高效低损耗光耦合的潜力，适用于可扩展和低成本的大规模生产。
