search_text: Electrically pumped quantum-dot lasers grown on 300 mm patterned Si photonic wafers 在 300 毫米图案硅光子晶圆上生长的电泵量子点激光器 Monolithic integration of quantum dot (QD) gain materials onto Si photonic platforms via direct epitaxial growth is a promising solution for on-chip light sources. Recent developments have demonstrated superior device reliability in blanket hetero-epitaxy of III-V devices on Si at elevated temperatures. Yet, thick, defect management epi designs prevent vertical light coupling from the gain region to the Si-on-Insulator (SOI) waveguides. Here, we demonstrate the first electrically pumped QD lasers grown on a 300 mm patterned (001) Si wafer with a butt-coupled configuration by molecular beam epitaxy (MBE). Unique growth and fabrication challenges imposed by the template architecture have been resolved, contributing to continuous wave lasing to 60 °C and a maximum double-side output power of 126.6 mW at 20 °C with a double-side wall plug efficiency of 8.6%. The potential for robust on-chip laser operation and efficient low-loss light coupling to Si photonic circuits makes this heteroepitaxial integration platform on Si promising for scalable and low-cost mass production. 通过直接外延生长将量子点 (QD) 增益材料单片集成到硅光子平台上是片上光源的一种有前途的解决方案。最近的发展已经证明，在高温下，Si 上 III-V 族器件的全面异质外延具有卓越的器件可靠性。然而，厚的缺陷管理外延设计阻止了从增益区域到绝缘体上硅 (SOI) 波导的垂直光耦合。在这里，我们展示了第一个在 300 mm 图案化 (001) Si 晶圆上生长的电泵 QD 激光器，该晶圆具有分子束外延 (MBE) 对接耦合配置。模板架构带来的独特生长和制造挑战已得到解决，有助于在 60°C 下连续发射激光，并在 20°C 下实现最大双面输出功率 126.6 mW，双面墙插头效率为 8.6%。强大的片上激光器操作和与硅光子电路的高效低损耗光耦合的潜力使得这种硅上异质外延集成平台有望实现可扩展和低成本的大规模生产。 本文介绍了在300毫米图案化硅光子晶圆上通过分子束外延生长实现电泵浦量子点激光器的方法。 Chen Shang,Kaiyin Feng,Eamonn T. Hughes,Andrew Clark,Mukul Debnath,Rosalyn Koscica,Gerald Leake,Joshua Herman,David Harame,Peter Ludewig,Yating Wan,John E. Bowers physics.optics,cs.ET

authors_text: Hao Chen,Guangkai Yang,Junge Zhang,Qiyue Yin,Kaiqi Huang
title: RACA: Relation-Aware Credit Assignment for Ad-Hoc Cooperation in Multi-Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: RACA：多智能体深度强化学习中临时合作的关系感知信用分配
comment: Accepted at IJCNN 2022 (Oral)
comments: Accepted at IJCNN 2022 (Oral)
abstract: In recent years, reinforcement learning has faced several challenges in the multi-agent domain, such as the credit assignment issue. Value function factorization emerges as a promising way to handle the credit assignment issue under the centralized training with decentralized execution (CTDE) paradigm. However, existing value function factorization methods cannot deal with ad-hoc cooperation, that is, adapting to new configurations of teammates at test time. Specifically, these methods do not explicitly utilize the relationship between agents and cannot adapt to different sizes of inputs. To address these limitations, we propose a novel method, called Relation-Aware Credit Assignment (RACA), which achieves zero-shot generalization in ad-hoc cooperation scenarios. RACA takes advantage of a graph-based relation encoder to encode the topological structure between agents. Furthermore, RACA utilizes an attention-based observation abstraction mechanism that can generalize to an arbitrary number of teammates with a fixed number of parameters. Experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms baseline methods on the StarCraftII micromanagement benchmark and ad-hoc cooperation scenarios.
summary: In recent years, reinforcement learning has faced several challenges in the multi-agent domain, such as the credit assignment issue. Value function factorization emerges as a promising way to handle the credit assignment issue under the centralized training with decentralized execution (CTDE) paradigm. However, existing value function factorization methods cannot deal with ad-hoc cooperation, that is, adapting to new configurations of teammates at test time. Specifically, these methods do not explicitly utilize the relationship between agents and cannot adapt to different sizes of inputs. To address these limitations, we propose a novel method, called Relation-Aware Credit Assignment (RACA), which achieves zero-shot generalization in ad-hoc cooperation scenarios. RACA takes advantage of a graph-based relation encoder to encode the topological structure between agents. Furthermore, RACA utilizes an attention-based observation abstraction mechanism that can generalize to an arbitrary number of teammates with a fixed number of parameters. Experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms baseline methods on the StarCraftII micromanagement benchmark and ad-hoc cooperation scenarios.
abstract_zh: 近年来，强化学习在多智能体领域面临着一些挑战，例如学分分配问题。价值函数分解成为在集中式训练与分散执行（CTDE）范式下处理学分分配问题的一种有前景的方法。然而，现有的价值函数分解方法无法处理临时合作，即在测试时适应队友的新配置。具体来说，这些方法没有明确地利用代理之间的关系，并且无法适应不同大小的输入。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种称为关系感知信用分配（RACA）的新方法，它在临时合作场景中实现了零样本泛化。 RACA 利用基于图的关系编码器来编码代理之间的拓扑结构。此外，RACA 利用基于注意力的观察抽象机制，可以推广到具有固定数量参数的任意数量的队友。实验表明，我们的方法在《星际争霸 II》微观管理基准和临时合作场景上优于基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RACA的关系感知信用分配方法，用于解决多智能体深度强化学习中的即兴合作场景下的信用分配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于价值函数分解的方法无法处理测试时新队友配置的即兴合作场景，且难以适应不同规模的输入。
AI.method: 通过图结构关系编码器捕捉智能体间拓扑关系，并采用基于注意力的观测抽象机制实现参数固定下的任意队友数量泛化。
AI.result: 在StarCraftII微管理基准测试和即兴合作场景中，RACA方法优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: RACA通过关系感知机制有效解决了多智能体系统中即兴合作的信用分配难题，实现了零样本泛化能力。

authors_text: Anish Acharya,Sujay Sanghavi,Li Jing,Bhargav Bhushanam,Dhruv Choudhary,Michael Rabbat,Inderjit Dhillon
title: Positive Unlabeled Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 积极的无标签对比学习
abstract: Self-supervised pretraining on unlabeled data followed by supervised fine-tuning on labeled data is a popular paradigm for learning from limited labeled examples. We extend this paradigm to the classical positive unlabeled (PU) setting, where the task is to learn a binary classifier given only a few labeled positive samples, and (often) a large amount of unlabeled samples (which could be positive or negative). We first propose a simple extension of standard infoNCE family of contrastive losses, to the PU setting; and show that this learns superior representations, as compared to existing unsupervised and supervised approaches. We then develop a simple methodology to pseudo-label the unlabeled samples using a new PU-specific clustering scheme; these pseudo-labels can then be used to train the final (positive vs. negative) classifier. Our method handily outperforms state-of-the-art PU methods over several standard PU benchmark datasets, while not requiring a-priori knowledge of any class prior (which is a common assumption in other PU methods). We also provide a simple theoretical analysis that motivates our methods.
summary: Self-supervised pretraining on unlabeled data followed by supervised fine-tuning on labeled data is a popular paradigm for learning from limited labeled examples. We extend this paradigm to the classical positive unlabeled (PU) setting, where the task is to learn a binary classifier given only a few labeled positive samples, and (often) a large amount of unlabeled samples (which could be positive or negative). We first propose a simple extension of standard infoNCE family of contrastive losses, to the PU setting; and show that this learns superior representations, as compared to existing unsupervised and supervised approaches. We then develop a simple methodology to pseudo-label the unlabeled samples using a new PU-specific clustering scheme; these pseudo-labels can then be used to train the final (positive vs. negative) classifier. Our method handily outperforms state-of-the-art PU methods over several standard PU benchmark datasets, while not requiring a-priori knowledge of any class prior (which is a common assumption in other PU methods). We also provide a simple theoretical analysis that motivates our methods.
abstract_zh: 对未标记数据进行自监督预训练，然后对标记数据进行监督微调，是从有限标记示例中学习的流行范例。我们将此范例扩展到经典的正未标记（PU）设置，其中任务是学习仅给定一些标记正样本和（通常）大量未标记样本（可能是正样本或负样本）的二元分类器。我们首先提出将对比损失的标准 infoNCE 系列简单扩展到 PU 设置；并表明，与现有的无监督和监督方法相比，它可以学习更好的表示。然后，我们开发了一种简单的方法，使用新的 PU 特定聚类方案对未标记的样本进行伪标记；然后可以使用这些伪标签来训练最终的（正与负）分类器。我们的方法在几个标准 PU 基准数据集上轻松优于最先进的 PU 方法，同时不需要任何类先验的先验知识（这是其他 PU 方法中的常见假设）。我们还提供了一个简单的理论分析来激发我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对正例未标记（PU）设置的对比学习方法，通过改进对比损失和伪标签生成策略，在有限正例和大量未标记数据下训练二分类器。
AI.motivation: 传统PU方法依赖先验类别分布假设或表现不足，需设计无需先验知识且更有效的学习框架以提升分类性能。
AI.method: 扩展infoNCE对比损失适应PU场景，并设计基于PU特性的聚类方案生成伪标签，结合自监督预训练与伪标签微调训练最终分类器。
AI.result: 在多个PU基准数据集上显著优于现有方法，且无需假设类别先验分布。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过理论分析与实验验证，在PU学习任务中实现了更优的表示学习与分类性能。

We then develop a simple methodology to pseudo-label the unlabeled samples using a new PU-specific clustering scheme; these pseudo-labels can then be used to train the final (positive vs. negative) classifier. We also provide a simple theoretical analysis that motivates our methods. 对未标记数据进行自监督预训练，然后对标记数据进行监督微调，是从有限标记示例中学习的流行范例。我们将此范例扩展到经典的正未标记（PU）设置，其中任务是学习仅给定一些标记正样本和（通常）大量未标记样本（可能是正样本或负样本）的二元分类器。我们首先提出将对比损失的标准 infoNCE 系列简单扩展到 PU 设置；并表明，与现有的无监督和监督方法相比，它可以学习更好的表示。然后，我们开发了一种简单的方法，使用新的 PU 特定聚类方案对未标记的样本进行伪标记；然后可以使用这些伪标签来训练最终的（正与负）分类器。我们的方法在几个标准 PU 基准数据集上轻松优于最先进的 PU 方法，同时不需要任何类先验的先验知识（这是其他 PU 方法中的常见假设）。我们还提供了一个简单的理论分析来激发我们的方法。 本文提出一种针对正例未标记（PU）设置的对比学习方法，通过改进对比损失和伪标签生成策略，在有限正例和大量未标记数据下训练二分类器。 Anish Acharya,Sujay Sanghavi,Li Jing,Bhargav Bhushanam,Dhruv Choudhary,Michael Rabbat,Inderjit Dhillon cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Kavitha Raju,Anjaly V,Ryan Lish,Joel Mathew
title: Snow Mountain: Dataset of Audio Recordings of The Bible in Low Resource Languages
title_zh: 雪山：低资源语言圣经录音数据集
comment: See dataset at https://huggingface.co/datasets/bridgeconn/snow-mountain
comments: See dataset at https://huggingface.co/datasets/bridgeconn/snow-mountain
abstract: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) has increasing utility in the modern world. There are a many ASR models available for languages with large amounts of training data like English. However, low-resource languages are poorly represented. In response we create and release an open-licensed and formatted dataset of audio recordings of the Bible in low-resource northern Indian languages. We setup multiple experimental splits and train and analyze two competitive ASR models to serve as the baseline for future research using this data.
summary: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) has increasing utility in the modern world. There are a many ASR models available for languages with large amounts of training data like English. However, low-resource languages are poorly represented. In response we create and release an open-licensed and formatted dataset of audio recordings of the Bible in low-resource northern Indian languages. We setup multiple experimental splits and train and analyze two competitive ASR models to serve as the baseline for future research using this data.
abstract_zh: 自动语音识别 (ASR) 在现代世界中的实用性越来越大。有许多 ASR 模型可用于具有大量训练数据的语言，例如英语。然而，资源匮乏的语言的代表性较差。作为回应，我们创建并发布了一个开放许可的格式化数据集，其中包含资源匮乏的北印度语言的《圣经》录音。我们设置了多个实验分组，并训练和分析了两个有竞争力的 ASR 模型，作为未来使用这些数据进行研究的基线。

AI.tldr: 创建低资源语言圣经音频数据集并训练ASR基线模型
AI.motivation: 解决低资源语言在自动语音识别领域数据不足的问题，推动相关技术研究
AI.method: 收集北印度低资源语言圣经音频，构建开放数据集并训练分析两个竞争性ASR模型
AI.result: 发布标准化数据集及实验分割方案，建立ASR模型基线性能参考
AI.conclusion: 数据集为低资源语言语音识别研究提供重要基础，促进跨语言技术发展

authors_text: Chenxin Tao,Xizhou Zhu,Weijie Su,Gao Huang,Bin Li,Jie Zhou,Yu Qiao,Xiaogang Wang,Jifeng Dai
title: Siamese Image Modeling for Self-Supervised Vision Representation Learning
title_zh: 用于自监督视觉表示学习的连体图像建模
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has delivered superior performance on a variety of downstream vision tasks. Two main-stream SSL frameworks have been proposed, i.e., Instance Discrimination (ID) and Masked Image Modeling (MIM). ID pulls together representations from different views of the same image, while avoiding feature collapse. It lacks spatial sensitivity, which requires modeling the local structure within each image. On the other hand, MIM reconstructs the original content given a masked image. It instead does not have good semantic alignment, which requires projecting semantically similar views into nearby representations. To address this dilemma, we observe that (1) semantic alignment can be achieved by matching different image views with strong augmentations; (2) spatial sensitivity can benefit from predicting dense representations with masked images. Driven by these analysis, we propose Siamese Image Modeling (SiameseIM), which predicts the dense representations of an augmented view, based on another masked view from the same image but with different augmentations. SiameseIM uses a Siamese network with two branches. The online branch encodes the first view, and predicts the second view's representation according to the relative positions between these two views. The target branch produces the target by encoding the second view. SiameseIM can surpass both ID and MIM on a wide range of downstream tasks, including ImageNet finetuning and linear probing, COCO and LVIS detection, and ADE20k semantic segmentation. The improvement is more significant in few-shot, long-tail and robustness-concerned scenarios. Code shall be released at https://github.com/fundamentalvision/Siamese-Image-Modeling.
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has delivered superior performance on a variety of downstream vision tasks. Two main-stream SSL frameworks have been proposed, i.e., Instance Discrimination (ID) and Masked Image Modeling (MIM). ID pulls together representations from different views of the same image, while avoiding feature collapse. It lacks spatial sensitivity, which requires modeling the local structure within each image. On the other hand, MIM reconstructs the original content given a masked image. It instead does not have good semantic alignment, which requires projecting semantically similar views into nearby representations. To address this dilemma, we observe that (1) semantic alignment can be achieved by matching different image views with strong augmentations; (2) spatial sensitivity can benefit from predicting dense representations with masked images. Driven by these analysis, we propose Siamese Image Modeling (SiameseIM), which predicts the dense representations of an augmented view, based on another masked view from the same image but with different augmentations. SiameseIM uses a Siamese network with two branches. The online branch encodes the first view, and predicts the second view's representation according to the relative positions between these two views. The target branch produces the target by encoding the second view. SiameseIM can surpass both ID and MIM on a wide range of downstream tasks, including ImageNet finetuning and linear probing, COCO and LVIS detection, and ADE20k semantic segmentation. The improvement is more significant in few-shot, long-tail and robustness-concerned scenarios. Code shall be released at https://github.com/fundamentalvision/Siamese-Image-Modeling.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习 (SSL) 在各种下游视觉任务中表现出色。已经提出了两种主流的 SSL 框架，即实例判别（ID）和掩模图像建模（MIM）。 ID 将同一图像的不同视图的表示汇集在一起​​，同时避免特征崩溃。它缺乏空间敏感性，需要对每个图像内的局部结构进行建模。另一方面，MIM 在给定掩模图像的情况下重建原始内容。相反，它没有良好的语义对齐，这需要将语义相似的视图投影到附近的表示中。为了解决这个困境，我们观察到（1）可以通过将不同的图像视图与强增强相匹配来实现语义对齐； (2) 空间敏感性可以受益于使用掩模图像预测密集表示。在这些分析的推动下，我们提出了暹罗图像建模（SiameseIM），它基于来自同一图像但具有不同增强的另一个屏蔽视图来预测增强视图的密集表示。 SiameseIM 使用具有两个分支的 Siamese 网络。在线分支对第一个视图进行编码，并根据这两个视图之间的相对位置预测第二个视图的表示。目标分支通过对第二视图进行编码来产生目标。 SiameseIM 在广泛的下游任务上可以超越 ID 和 MIM，包括 ImageNet 微调和线性探测、COCO 和 LVIS 检测以及 ADE20k 语义分割。在少镜头、长尾和鲁棒性相关的场景中，这种改进更为显着。代码应在 https://github.com/fundamentalvision/Siamese-Image-Modeling 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Siamese Image Modeling (SiameseIM)的自监督视觉表征学习方法，结合实例判别和遮罩图像建模的优势，通过Siamese网络结构实现更优的视觉表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有两种主流自监督学习框架（实例判别ID和遮罩图像建模MIM）分别存在空间敏感性不足和语义对齐不佳的问题，需设计新方法同时解决这两个缺陷。
AI.method: 设计Siamese网络双分支结构：在线分支编码第一视角图像并预测第二视角表示，目标分支编码第二视角生成目标表示，通过不同增强视角间的相对位置关系实现密集表示预测。
AI.result: 在ImageNet微调、COCO检测、ADE20k分割等任务中超越ID和MIM方法，尤其在少样本、长尾分布和鲁棒性场景下提升显著。
AI.conclusion: SiameseIM通过结合视角匹配与遮罩预测机制，有效解决了自监督视觉学习中的空间敏感性和语义对齐问题，代码已开源。

authors_text: Julian Chibane,Francis Engelmann,Tuan Anh Tran,Gerard Pons-Moll
title: Box2Mask: Weakly Supervised 3D Semantic Instance Segmentation Using Bounding Boxes
title_zh: Box2Mask：使用边界框的弱监督 3D 语义实例分割
comment: Project page: https://virtualhumans.mpi-inf.mpg.de/box2mask/
comments: Project page: https://virtualhumans.mpi-inf.mpg.de/box2mask/
abstract: Current 3D segmentation methods heavily rely on large-scale point-cloud datasets, which are notoriously laborious to annotate. Few attempts have been made to circumvent the need for dense per-point annotations. In this work, we look at weakly-supervised 3D semantic instance segmentation. The key idea is to leverage 3D bounding box labels which are easier and faster to annotate. Indeed, we show that it is possible to train dense segmentation models using only bounding box labels. At the core of our method, \name{}, lies a deep model, inspired by classical Hough voting, that directly votes for bounding box parameters, and a clustering method specifically tailored to bounding box votes. This goes beyond commonly used center votes, which would not fully exploit the bounding box annotations. On ScanNet test, our weakly supervised model attains leading performance among other weakly supervised approaches (+18 mAP@50). Remarkably, it also achieves 97% of the mAP@50 score of current fully supervised models. To further illustrate the practicality of our work, we train Box2Mask on the recently released ARKitScenes dataset which is annotated with 3D bounding boxes only, and show, for the first time, compelling 3D instance segmentation masks.
summary: Current 3D segmentation methods heavily rely on large-scale point-cloud datasets, which are notoriously laborious to annotate. Few attempts have been made to circumvent the need for dense per-point annotations. In this work, we look at weakly-supervised 3D semantic instance segmentation. The key idea is to leverage 3D bounding box labels which are easier and faster to annotate. Indeed, we show that it is possible to train dense segmentation models using only bounding box labels. At the core of our method, \name{}, lies a deep model, inspired by classical Hough voting, that directly votes for bounding box parameters, and a clustering method specifically tailored to bounding box votes. This goes beyond commonly used center votes, which would not fully exploit the bounding box annotations. On ScanNet test, our weakly supervised model attains leading performance among other weakly supervised approaches (+18 mAP@50). Remarkably, it also achieves 97% of the mAP@50 score of current fully supervised models. To further illustrate the practicality of our work, we train Box2Mask on the recently released ARKitScenes dataset which is annotated with 3D bounding boxes only, and show, for the first time, compelling 3D instance segmentation masks.
abstract_zh: 当前的 3D 分割方法严重依赖于大规模点云数据集，而这些数据集的注释非常费力。很少有尝试来规避对密集的每点注释的需求。在这项工作中，我们研究弱监督 3D 语义实例分割。关键思想是利用 3D 边界框标签，这样可以更轻松、更快速地进行注释。事实上，我们表明仅使用边界框标签来训练密集分割模型是可能的。我们的方法的核心 \name{} 是一个受经典霍夫投票启发的深度模型，它直接对边界框参数进行投票，以及专门针对边界框投票定制的聚类方法。这超出了常用的中心投票，它不会充分利用边界框注释。在 ScanNet 测试中，我们的弱监督模型在其他弱监督方法中取得了领先的性能 (+18 mAP@50)。值得注意的是，它还达到了当前全监督模型 mAP@50 分数的 97%。为了进一步说明我们工作的实用性，我们在最近发布的 ARKitScenes 数据集上训练 Box2Mask，该数据集仅用 3D 边界框注释，并首次显示引人注目的 3D 实例分割掩模。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督的3D语义实例分割方法Box2Mask，仅使用3D包围盒标注训练密集分割模型。
AI.motivation: 现有3D分割方法依赖大规模密集标注点云数据，而人工标注成本极高。包围盒标注更易获取，但如何有效利用其进行弱监督分割尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 设计受Hough投票启发的深度模型直接预测包围盒参数，并结合定制化聚类方法处理包围盒投票结果，超越传统中心点投票策略。
AI.result: 在ScanNet数据集上弱监督方法mAP@50领先同类方法18%，达到全监督模型97%性能；首次在仅含包围盒标注的ARKitScenes数据集生成高质量3D分割掩码。
AI.conclusion: 证明仅用包围盒标注即可实现高性能3D分割，为减少密集标注依赖提供新思路，推动弱监督3D视觉发展。

search_text: Box2Mask: Weakly Supervised 3D Semantic Instance Segmentation Using Bounding Boxes Box2Mask：使用边界框的弱监督 3D 语义实例分割 Current 3D segmentation methods heavily rely on large-scale point-cloud datasets, which are notoriously laborious to annotate. Few attempts have been made to circumvent the need for dense per-point annotations. In this work, we look at weakly-supervised 3D semantic instance segmentation. The key idea is to leverage 3D bounding box labels which are easier and faster to annotate. Indeed, we show that it is possible to train dense segmentation models using only bounding box labels. At the core of our method, \name{}, lies a deep model, inspired by classical Hough voting, that directly votes for bounding box parameters, and a clustering method specifically tailored to bounding box votes. This goes beyond commonly used center votes, which would not fully exploit the bounding box annotations. On ScanNet test, our weakly supervised model attains leading performance among other weakly supervised approaches (+18 mAP@50). Remarkably, it also achieves 97% of the mAP@50 score of current fully supervised models. To further illustrate the practicality of our work, we train Box2Mask on the recently released ARKitScenes dataset which is annotated with 3D bounding boxes only, and show, for the first time, compelling 3D instance segmentation masks. 当前的 3D 分割方法严重依赖于大规模点云数据集，而这些数据集的注释非常费力。很少有尝试来规避对密集的每点注释的需求。在这项工作中，我们研究弱监督 3D 语义实例分割。关键思想是利用 3D 边界框标签，这样可以更轻松、更快速地进行注释。事实上，我们表明仅使用边界框标签来训练密集分割模型是可能的。我们的方法的核心 \name{} 是一个受经典霍夫投票启发的深度模型，它直接对边界框参数进行投票，以及专门针对边界框投票定制的聚类方法。这超出了常用的中心投票，它不会充分利用边界框注释。在 ScanNet 测试中，我们的弱监督模型在其他弱监督方法中取得了领先的性能 (+18 mAP@50)。值得注意的是，它还达到了当前全监督模型 mAP@50 分数的 97%。为了进一步说明我们工作的实用性，我们在最近发布的 ARKitScenes 数据集上训练 Box2Mask，该数据集仅用 3D 边界框注释，并首次显示引人注目的 3D 实例分割掩模。 本文提出一种弱监督的3D语义实例分割方法Box2Mask，仅使用3D包围盒标注训练密集分割模型。 Julian Chibane,Francis Engelmann,Tuan Anh Tran,Gerard Pons-Moll cs.CV

authors_text: Chieh Hubert Lin,Hsin-Ying Lee,Hung-Yu Tseng,Maneesh Singh,Ming-Hsuan Yang
title: Unveiling The Mask of Position-Information Pattern Through the Mist of Image Features
title_zh: 透过图像特征的迷雾揭开位置信息模式的面具
abstract: Recent studies show that paddings in convolutional neural networks encode absolute position information which can negatively affect the model performance for certain tasks. However, existing metrics for quantifying the strength of positional information remain unreliable and frequently lead to erroneous results. To address this issue, we propose novel metrics for measuring (and visualizing) the encoded positional information. We formally define the encoded information as PPP (Position-information Pattern from Padding) and conduct a series of experiments to study its properties as well as its formation. The proposed metrics measure the presence of positional information more reliably than the existing metrics based on PosENet and a test in F-Conv. We also demonstrate that for any extant (and proposed) padding schemes, PPP is primarily a learning artifact and is less dependent on the characteristics of the underlying padding schemes.
summary: Recent studies show that paddings in convolutional neural networks encode absolute position information which can negatively affect the model performance for certain tasks. However, existing metrics for quantifying the strength of positional information remain unreliable and frequently lead to erroneous results. To address this issue, we propose novel metrics for measuring (and visualizing) the encoded positional information. We formally define the encoded information as PPP (Position-information Pattern from Padding) and conduct a series of experiments to study its properties as well as its formation. The proposed metrics measure the presence of positional information more reliably than the existing metrics based on PosENet and a test in F-Conv. We also demonstrate that for any extant (and proposed) padding schemes, PPP is primarily a learning artifact and is less dependent on the characteristics of the underlying padding schemes.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，卷积神经网络中的填充编码绝对位置信息，这可能会对某些任务的模型性能产生负面影响。然而，用于量化位置信息强度的现有指标仍然不可靠，并且经常导致错误的结果。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了用于测量（和可视化）编码位置信息的新指标。我们将编码信息正式定义为 PPP（来自 Padding 的位置信息模式），并进行了一系列实验来研究其属性及其形成。所提出的指标比基于 PosENet 和 F-Conv 中的测试的现有指标更可靠地测量位置信息的存在。我们还证明，对于任何现有（和提议的）填充方案，PPP 主要是一种学习工件，并且较少依赖于底层填充方案的特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型指标PPP，用于可靠测量和可视化卷积神经网络中由填充操作编码的绝对位置信息模式。
AI.motivation: 现有位置信息量化指标存在可靠性不足、易产生错误结果的问题，需改进方法准确评估填充操作对模型性能的影响。
AI.method: 定义PPP为位置信息模式，设计基于PosENet和F-Conv测试的新指标，通过实验分析不同填充方案下PPP的生成机制与特性。
AI.result: 新指标较现有方法更可靠，实验表明PPP主要源于学习过程而非填充方案本身特性，且其形成与填充方式关联性较低。
AI.conclusion: 位置信息模式PPP本质是模型学习产物，与填充方案特性关联不大，新型指标可有效量化该现象。

authors_text: Yuanze Lin,Yujia Xie,Dongdong Chen,Yichong Xu,Chenguang Zhu,Lu Yuan
title: REVIVE: Regional Visual Representation Matters in Knowledge-Based Visual Question Answering
title_zh: REVIVE：区域视觉表示在基于知识的视觉问答中很重要
comment: Accepted by NeurIPS 2022
comments: Accepted by NeurIPS 2022
abstract: This paper revisits visual representation in knowledge-based visual question answering (VQA) and demonstrates that using regional information in a better way can significantly improve the performance. While visual representation is extensively studied in traditional VQA, it is under-explored in knowledge-based VQA even though these two tasks share the common spirit, i.e., rely on visual input to answer the question. Specifically, we observe that in most state-of-the-art knowledge-based VQA methods: 1) visual features are extracted either from the whole image or in a sliding window manner for retrieving knowledge, and the important relationship within/among object regions is neglected; 2) visual features are not well utilized in the final answering model, which is counter-intuitive to some extent. Based on these observations, we propose a new knowledge-based VQA method REVIVE, which tries to utilize the explicit information of object regions not only in the knowledge retrieval stage but also in the answering model. The key motivation is that object regions and inherent relationship are important for knowledge-based VQA. We perform extensive experiments on the standard OK-VQA dataset and achieve new state-of-the-art performance, i.e., 58.0% accuracy, surpassing previous state-of-the-art method by a large margin (+3.6%). We also conduct detailed analysis and show the necessity of regional information in different framework components for knowledge-based VQA. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/yzleroy/REVIVE.
summary: This paper revisits visual representation in knowledge-based visual question answering (VQA) and demonstrates that using regional information in a better way can significantly improve the performance. While visual representation is extensively studied in traditional VQA, it is under-explored in knowledge-based VQA even though these two tasks share the common spirit, i.e., rely on visual input to answer the question. Specifically, we observe that in most state-of-the-art knowledge-based VQA methods: 1) visual features are extracted either from the whole image or in a sliding window manner for retrieving knowledge, and the important relationship within/among object regions is neglected; 2) visual features are not well utilized in the final answering model, which is counter-intuitive to some extent. Based on these observations, we propose a new knowledge-based VQA method REVIVE, which tries to utilize the explicit information of object regions not only in the knowledge retrieval stage but also in the answering model. The key motivation is that object regions and inherent relationship are important for knowledge-based VQA. We perform extensive experiments on the standard OK-VQA dataset and achieve new state-of-the-art performance, i.e., 58.0% accuracy, surpassing previous state-of-the-art method by a large margin (+3.6%). We also conduct detailed analysis and show the necessity of regional information in different framework components for knowledge-based VQA. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/yzleroy/REVIVE.
abstract_zh: 本文重新审视基于知识的视觉问答（VQA）中的视觉表示，并证明以更好的方式使用区域信息可以显着提高性能。虽然视觉表示在传统的 VQA 中得到了广泛的研究，但在基于知识的 VQA 中却没有得到充分的探索，尽管这两个任务有着共同的精神，即依赖视觉输入来回答问题。具体来说，我们观察到，在大多数最先进的基于知识的 VQA 方法中：1）从整个图像或以滑动窗口的方式提取视觉特征来检索知识，并且忽略了对象区域内/之间的重要关系； 2）最终的回答模型没有很好地利用视觉特征，这在一定程度上是反直觉的。基于这些观察，我们提出了一种新的基于知识的 VQA 方法 REVIVE，该方法尝试不仅在知识检索阶段而且在回答模型中利用对象区域的显式信息。关键动机是对象区域和内在关系对于基于知识的 VQA 很重要。我们在标准 OK-VQA 数据集上进行了广泛的实验，并实现了新的最先进的性能，即 58.0% 的准确率，大大超过了之前最先进的方法 (+3.6%)。我们还进行了详细的分析，并展示了基于知识的 VQA 的不同框架组件中区域信息的必要性。代码可在 https://github.com/yzleroy/REVIVE 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于区域视觉表示的知识型视觉问答方法REVIVE，通过更有效地利用图像中的区域信息来提升问答性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识型视觉问答方法在视觉特征提取时忽视了物体区域间的关系，且未充分利用视觉特征进行回答，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 提出REVIVE方法，在知识检索和回答模型中均显式利用物体区域信息，强调区域间关系的重要性。
AI.result: 在OK-VQA数据集上达到58.0%的准确率，较之前最佳方法提升3.6%，取得新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 区域视觉表示对知识型视觉问答至关重要，显式建模区域关系能显著提升模型性能。

search_text: REVIVE: Regional Visual Representation Matters in Knowledge-Based Visual Question Answering REVIVE：区域视觉表示在基于知识的视觉问答中很重要 This paper revisits visual representation in knowledge-based visual question answering (VQA) and demonstrates that using regional information in a better way can significantly improve the performance. While visual representation is extensively studied in traditional VQA, it is under-explored in knowledge-based VQA even though these two tasks share the common spirit, i.e., rely on visual input to answer the question. Specifically, we observe that in most state-of-the-art knowledge-based VQA methods: 1) visual features are extracted either from the whole image or in a sliding window manner for retrieving knowledge, and the important relationship within/among object regions is neglected; 2) visual features are not well utilized in the final answering model, which is counter-intuitive to some extent. Based on these observations, we propose a new knowledge-based VQA method REVIVE, which tries to utilize the explicit information of object regions not only in the knowledge retrieval stage but also in the answering model. The key motivation is that object regions and inherent relationship are important for knowledge-based VQA. We perform extensive experiments on the standard OK-VQA dataset and achieve new state-of-the-art performance, i.e., 58.0% accuracy, surpassing previous state-of-the-art method by a large margin (+3.6%). We also conduct detailed analysis and show the necessity of regional information in different framework components for knowledge-based VQA. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/yzleroy/REVIVE. 本文重新审视基于知识的视觉问答（VQA）中的视觉表示，并证明以更好的方式使用区域信息可以显着提高性能。虽然视觉表示在传统的 VQA 中得到了广泛的研究，但在基于知识的 VQA 中却没有得到充分的探索，尽管这两个任务有着共同的精神，即依赖视觉输入来回答问题。具体来说，我们观察到，在大多数最先进的基于知识的 VQA 方法中：1）从整个图像或以滑动窗口的方式提取视觉特征来检索知识，并且忽略了对象区域内/之间的重要关系； 2）最终的回答模型没有很好地利用视觉特征，这在一定程度上是反直觉的。基于这些观察，我们提出了一种新的基于知识的 VQA 方法 REVIVE，该方法尝试不仅在知识检索阶段而且在回答模型中利用对象区域的显式信息。关键动机是对象区域和内在关系对于基于知识的 VQA 很重要。我们在标准 OK-VQA 数据集上进行了广泛的实验，并实现了新的最先进的性能，即 58.0% 的准确率，大大超过了之前最先进的方法 (+3.6%)。我们还进行了详细的分析，并展示了基于知识的 VQA 的不同框架组件中区域信息的必要性。代码可在 https://github.com/yzleroy/REVIVE 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种基于区域视觉表示的知识型视觉问答方法REVIVE，通过更有效地利用图像中的区域信息来提升问答性能。 Yuanze Lin,Yujia Xie,Dongdong Chen,Yichong Xu,Chenguang Zhu,Lu Yuan cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Yanyu Li,Pu Zhao,Geng Yuan,Xue Lin,Yanzhi Wang,Xin Chen
title: Pruning-as-Search: Efficient Neural Architecture Search via Channel Pruning and Structural Reparameterization
title_zh: 修剪即搜索：通过通道修剪和结构重新参数化进行高效的神经架构搜索
abstract: Neural architecture search (NAS) and network pruning are widely studied efficient AI techniques, but not yet perfect. NAS performs exhaustive candidate architecture search, incurring tremendous search cost. Though (structured) pruning can simply shrink model dimension, it remains unclear how to decide the per-layer sparsity automatically and optimally. In this work, we revisit the problem of layer-width optimization and propose Pruning-as-Search (PaS), an end-to-end channel pruning method to search out desired sub-network automatically and efficiently. Specifically, we add a depth-wise binary convolution to learn pruning policies directly through gradient descent. By combining the structural reparameterization and PaS, we successfully searched out a new family of VGG-like and lightweight networks, which enable the flexibility of arbitrary width with respect to each layer instead of each stage. Experimental results show that our proposed architecture outperforms prior arts by around $1.0\%$ top-1 accuracy under similar inference speed on ImageNet-1000 classification task. Furthermore, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our width search on complex tasks including instance segmentation and image translation. Code and models are released.
summary: Neural architecture search (NAS) and network pruning are widely studied efficient AI techniques, but not yet perfect. NAS performs exhaustive candidate architecture search, incurring tremendous search cost. Though (structured) pruning can simply shrink model dimension, it remains unclear how to decide the per-layer sparsity automatically and optimally. In this work, we revisit the problem of layer-width optimization and propose Pruning-as-Search (PaS), an end-to-end channel pruning method to search out desired sub-network automatically and efficiently. Specifically, we add a depth-wise binary convolution to learn pruning policies directly through gradient descent. By combining the structural reparameterization and PaS, we successfully searched out a new family of VGG-like and lightweight networks, which enable the flexibility of arbitrary width with respect to each layer instead of each stage. Experimental results show that our proposed architecture outperforms prior arts by around $1.0\%$ top-1 accuracy under similar inference speed on ImageNet-1000 classification task. Furthermore, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our width search on complex tasks including instance segmentation and image translation. Code and models are released.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索（NAS）和网络剪枝是被广泛研究的高效人工智能技术，但尚未完善。 NAS执行详尽的候选架构搜索，导致巨大的搜索成本。尽管（结构化）剪枝可以简单地缩小模型维度，但仍不清楚如何自动且最佳地确定每层稀疏度。在这项工作中，我们重新审视层宽优化问题，并提出剪枝搜索（PaS），这是一种端到端的通道剪枝方法，可以自动高效地搜索所需的子网络。具体来说，我们添加了深度二元卷积来直接通过梯度下降来学习剪枝策略。通过将结构重参数化和 PaS 相结合，我们成功地找到了一个新的类似 VGG 的轻量级网络家族，它能够实现每一层而不是每一阶段的任意宽度的灵活性。实验结果表明，在 ImageNet-1000 分类任务上类似的推理速度下，我们提出的架构优于现有技术约 $1.0\%$ top-1 准确率。此外，我们还展示了宽度搜索在复杂任务（包括实例分割和图像翻译）上的有效性。代码和模型已发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Pruning-as-Search（PaS）的端到端通道剪枝方法，通过结合结构重参数化技术，自动高效地搜索出轻量级神经网络架构。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络架构搜索（NAS）计算成本高昂，而结构剪枝虽能压缩模型但缺乏自动确定每层稀疏度的优化方法，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 在深度可分离二值卷积中引入梯度下降学习剪枝策略，结合结构重参数化技术，实现对每层宽度的独立优化，生成灵活轻量的VGG类网络。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1000分类任务中，新架构在相似推理速度下top-1准确率提升约1.0%，并在实例分割和图像翻译等复杂任务中验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: PaS方法通过通道剪枝与结构重参数化结合，实现了高效网络架构搜索，在保持性能的同时提升模型轻量化水平，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Afrina Tabassum,Muntasir Wahed,Hoda Eldardiry,Ismini Lourentzou
title: Hard Negative Sampling Strategies for Contrastive Representation Learning
title_zh: 对比表示学习的硬负采样策略
abstract: One of the challenges in contrastive learning is the selection of appropriate \textit{hard negative} examples, in the absence of label information. Random sampling or importance sampling methods based on feature similarity often lead to sub-optimal performance. In this work, we introduce UnReMix, a hard negative sampling strategy that takes into account anchor similarity, model uncertainty and representativeness. Experimental results on several benchmarks show that UnReMix improves negative sample selection, and subsequently downstream performance when compared to state-of-the-art contrastive learning methods.
summary: One of the challenges in contrastive learning is the selection of appropriate \textit{hard negative} examples, in the absence of label information. Random sampling or importance sampling methods based on feature similarity often lead to sub-optimal performance. In this work, we introduce UnReMix, a hard negative sampling strategy that takes into account anchor similarity, model uncertainty and representativeness. Experimental results on several benchmarks show that UnReMix improves negative sample selection, and subsequently downstream performance when compared to state-of-the-art contrastive learning methods.
abstract_zh: 对比学习的挑战之一是在缺乏标签信息的情况下选择适当的 \textit{hard negative} 示例。基于特征相似性的随机采样或重要性采样方法通常会导致性能次优。在这项工作中，我们引入了 UnReMix，这是一种考虑了锚点相似性、模型不确定性和代表性的硬负采样策略。多个基准测试的实验结果表明，与最先进的对比学习方法相比，UnReMix 改进了负样本选择，进而提高了下游性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为UnReMix的难负样本采样策略，用于改进对比学习中的表示学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习中随机采样或基于特征相似性的重采样方法在选择难负样本时表现不佳，导致下游任务性能受限。
AI.method: UnReMix结合锚点相似性、模型不确定性及样本代表性三个维度，设计动态加权采样机制以筛选更具挑战性的负样本。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上验证表明，UnReMix显著优于现有对比学习方法，在负样本选择质量及下游任务性能上均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过综合考虑多维度指标，UnReMix有效解决了对比学习中难负样本筛选难题，为表示学习提供了更优的采样策略。

authors_text: Yanyu Li,Geng Yuan,Yang Wen,Ju Hu,Georgios Evangelidis,Sergey Tulyakov,Yanzhi Wang,Jian Ren
title: EfficientFormer: Vision Transformers at MobileNet Speed
title_zh: EfficientFormer：MobileNet 速度下的视觉转换器
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViT) have shown rapid progress in computer vision tasks, achieving promising results on various benchmarks. However, due to the massive number of parameters and model design, \textit{e.g.}, attention mechanism, ViT-based models are generally times slower than lightweight convolutional networks. Therefore, the deployment of ViT for real-time applications is particularly challenging, especially on resource-constrained hardware such as mobile devices. Recent efforts try to reduce the computation complexity of ViT through network architecture search or hybrid design with MobileNet block, yet the inference speed is still unsatisfactory. This leads to an important question: can transformers run as fast as MobileNet while obtaining high performance? To answer this, we first revisit the network architecture and operators used in ViT-based models and identify inefficient designs. Then we introduce a dimension-consistent pure transformer (without MobileNet blocks) as a design paradigm. Finally, we perform latency-driven slimming to get a series of final models dubbed EfficientFormer. Extensive experiments show the superiority of EfficientFormer in performance and speed on mobile devices. Our fastest model, EfficientFormer-L1, achieves $79.2\%$ top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K with only $1.6$ ms inference latency on iPhone 12 (compiled with CoreML), which runs as fast as MobileNetV2$\times 1.4$ ($1.6$ ms, $74.7\%$ top-1), and our largest model, EfficientFormer-L7, obtains $83.3\%$ accuracy with only $7.0$ ms latency. Our work proves that properly designed transformers can reach extremely low latency on mobile devices while maintaining high performance.
summary: Vision Transformers (ViT) have shown rapid progress in computer vision tasks, achieving promising results on various benchmarks. However, due to the massive number of parameters and model design, \textit{e.g.}, attention mechanism, ViT-based models are generally times slower than lightweight convolutional networks. Therefore, the deployment of ViT for real-time applications is particularly challenging, especially on resource-constrained hardware such as mobile devices. Recent efforts try to reduce the computation complexity of ViT through network architecture search or hybrid design with MobileNet block, yet the inference speed is still unsatisfactory. This leads to an important question: can transformers run as fast as MobileNet while obtaining high performance? To answer this, we first revisit the network architecture and operators used in ViT-based models and identify inefficient designs. Then we introduce a dimension-consistent pure transformer (without MobileNet blocks) as a design paradigm. Finally, we perform latency-driven slimming to get a series of final models dubbed EfficientFormer. Extensive experiments show the superiority of EfficientFormer in performance and speed on mobile devices. Our fastest model, EfficientFormer-L1, achieves $79.2\%$ top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K with only $1.6$ ms inference latency on iPhone 12 (compiled with CoreML), which runs as fast as MobileNetV2$\times 1.4$ ($1.6$ ms, $74.7\%$ top-1), and our largest model, EfficientFormer-L7, obtains $83.3\%$ accuracy with only $7.0$ ms latency. Our work proves that properly designed transformers can reach extremely low latency on mobile devices while maintaining high performance.
abstract_zh: Vision Transformers (ViT) 在计算机视觉任务方面取得了快速进展，在各种基准测试中取得了可喜的结果。然而，由于大量的参数和模型设计、注意力机制，基于 ViT 的模型通常比轻量级卷积网络慢数倍。因此，为实时应用程序部署ViT特别具有挑战性，特别是在移动设备等资源受限的硬件上。最近的努力试图通过网络架构搜索或与MobileNet块的混合设计来降低ViT的计算复杂度，但推理速度仍然不令人满意。这就引出了一个重要的问题：Transformer 能否像 MobileNet 一样运行得快，同时获得高性能？为了回答这个问题，我们首先重新审视基于 ViT 的模型中使用的网络架构和算子，并找出低效的设计。然后我们引入尺寸一致的纯变压器（没有 MobileNet 模块）作为设计范例。最后，我们执行延迟驱动的精简以获得一系列名为 EfficientFormer 的最终模型。大量的实验证明了 EfficientFormer 在移动设备上的性能和速度的优越性。我们最快的模型 EfficientFormer-L1 在 ImageNet-1K 上实现了 $79.2\%$ top-1 准确率，在 iPhone 12（使用 CoreML 编译）上的推理延迟仅为 $1.6$ ms，其运行速度与 MobileNetV2$\times 1.4$ 一样快（$1.6$ ms，$74.7\%$ top-1），而我们最大的模型 EfficientFormer-L7 获得准确度为 83.3\%$，延迟仅为 7.0$ 毫秒。我们的工作证明，正确设计的变压器可以在移动设备上实现极低的延迟，同时保持高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EfficientFormer，一种在保持高性能的同时达到MobileNet速度的视觉变换器模型。
AI.motivation: 视觉变换器（ViT）虽在计算机视觉任务中表现优异，但因参数量大和注意力机制导致推理速度慢，难以部署于移动设备等资源受限场景。
AI.method: 通过重新设计ViT的网络架构与操作符，消除冗余结构，提出纯变换器设计范式，并进行延迟驱动的模型瘦身，最终获得EfficientFormer系列模型。
AI.result: EfficientFormer-L1在ImageNet-1K上达到79.2%准确率，推理延迟仅1.6ms（与MobileNetV2×1.4相当）；L7模型准确率83.3%，延迟7.0ms。
AI.conclusion: 合理设计的视觉变换器可在移动设备上实现极低延迟与高性能，打破传统ViT与轻量卷积网络的性能-速度权衡困境。

search_text: EfficientFormer: Vision Transformers at MobileNet Speed EfficientFormer：MobileNet 速度下的视觉转换器 Vision Transformers (ViT) have shown rapid progress in computer vision tasks, achieving promising results on various benchmarks. However, due to the massive number of parameters and model design, \textit{e.g.}, attention mechanism, ViT-based models are generally times slower than lightweight convolutional networks. Therefore, the deployment of ViT for real-time applications is particularly challenging, especially on resource-constrained hardware such as mobile devices. Recent efforts try to reduce the computation complexity of ViT through network architecture search or hybrid design with MobileNet block, yet the inference speed is still unsatisfactory. This leads to an important question: can transformers run as fast as MobileNet while obtaining high performance? To answer this, we first revisit the network architecture and operators used in ViT-based models and identify inefficient designs. Then we introduce a dimension-consistent pure transformer (without MobileNet blocks) as a design paradigm. Finally, we perform latency-driven slimming to get a series of final models dubbed EfficientFormer. Extensive experiments show the superiority of EfficientFormer in performance and speed on mobile devices. Our fastest model, EfficientFormer-L1, achieves $79.2\%$ top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K with only $1.6$ ms inference latency on iPhone 12 (compiled with CoreML), which runs as fast as MobileNetV2$\times 1.4$ ($1.6$ ms, $74.7\%$ top-1), and our largest model, EfficientFormer-L7, obtains $83.3\%$ accuracy with only $7.0$ ms latency. Our work proves that properly designed transformers can reach extremely low latency on mobile devices while maintaining high performance. authors_text: Xizhe Zhang,Chunyu Pan,Weixiong Zhang
title: Control hubs of complex networks and a polynomial-time identification algorithm
title_zh: 复杂网络的控制中心和多项式时间识别算法
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures
comments: 5 pages, 2 figures
abstract: Unveiling the underlying control principles of complex networks is one of the ultimate goals of network science. We introduce a novel concept, control hub, to reveal a cornerstone of the control structure of a network. The control hubs of a network are the nodes that lie in the middle of a control path in every control scheme of the network. We present a theorem based on graph theory for identifying control hubs without computing all control schemes. We develop an algorithm to identify all control hubs in O(N0.5L) time complexity for a network of N nodes and L links.
summary: Unveiling the underlying control principles of complex networks is one of the ultimate goals of network science. We introduce a novel concept, control hub, to reveal a cornerstone of the control structure of a network. The control hubs of a network are the nodes that lie in the middle of a control path in every control scheme of the network. We present a theorem based on graph theory for identifying control hubs without computing all control schemes. We develop an algorithm to identify all control hubs in O(N0.5L) time complexity for a network of N nodes and L links.
abstract_zh: 揭示复杂网络的底层控制原理是网络科学的最终目标之一。我们引入了一个新颖的概念：控制中心，以揭示网络控制结构的基石。网络的控制中心是位于网络的每个控制方案中的控制路径中间的节点。我们提出了一个基于图论的定理，用于在不计算所有控制方案的情况下识别控制中心。我们开发了一种算法，可以在 O(N0.5L) 时间复杂度内识别 N 个节点和 L 个链路的网络的所有控制集线器。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多项式时间算法来识别复杂网络中的控制枢纽节点
AI.motivation: 揭示复杂网络的控制机制是网络科学的重要目标，但传统方法需计算所有控制方案，效率低下，需更高效方法
AI.method: 基于图论提出定理，无需计算所有控制方案，开发时间复杂度为O(N^0.5L)的算法
AI.result: 成功识别所有控制枢纽节点，算法在多项式时间内高效运行
AI.conclusion: 提出的新概念和算法为复杂网络控制结构分析提供了高效工具，推动相关研究

authors_text: Junyong Choi,Hyeon Cho,Seokhwa Cheung,Wonjun Hwang
title: ORC: Network Group-based Knowledge Distillation using Online Role Change
title_zh: ORC：使用在线角色变更的基于网络组的知识蒸馏
comment: Accepted at ICCV 2023; Supplementary material would be found at CVF Open Access
comments: Accepted at ICCV 2023; Supplementary material would be found at CVF Open Access
abstract: In knowledge distillation, since a single, omnipotent teacher network cannot solve all problems, multiple teacher-based knowledge distillations have been studied recently. However, sometimes their improvements are not as good as expected because some immature teachers may transfer the false knowledge to the student. In this paper, to overcome this limitation and take the efficacy of the multiple networks, we divide the multiple networks into teacher and student groups, respectively. That is, the student group is a set of immature networks that require learning the teacher's knowledge, while the teacher group consists of the selected networks that are capable of teaching successfully. We propose our online role change strategy where the top-ranked networks in the student group are able to promote to the teacher group at every iteration. After training the teacher group using the error samples of the student group to refine the teacher group's knowledge, we transfer the collaborative knowledge from the teacher group to the student group successfully. We verify the superiority of the proposed method on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet which achieves high performance. We further show the generality of our method with various backbone architectures such as ResNet, WRN, VGG, Mobilenet, and Shufflenet.
summary: In knowledge distillation, since a single, omnipotent teacher network cannot solve all problems, multiple teacher-based knowledge distillations have been studied recently. However, sometimes their improvements are not as good as expected because some immature teachers may transfer the false knowledge to the student. In this paper, to overcome this limitation and take the efficacy of the multiple networks, we divide the multiple networks into teacher and student groups, respectively. That is, the student group is a set of immature networks that require learning the teacher's knowledge, while the teacher group consists of the selected networks that are capable of teaching successfully. We propose our online role change strategy where the top-ranked networks in the student group are able to promote to the teacher group at every iteration. After training the teacher group using the error samples of the student group to refine the teacher group's knowledge, we transfer the collaborative knowledge from the teacher group to the student group successfully. We verify the superiority of the proposed method on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet which achieves high performance. We further show the generality of our method with various backbone architectures such as ResNet, WRN, VGG, Mobilenet, and Shufflenet.
abstract_zh: 在知识蒸馏中，由于单一的全能教师网络无法解决所有问题，因此最近研究了多种基于教师的知识蒸馏。然而，有时他们的进步并不如预期的那么好，因为一些不成熟的教师可能会将错误的知识传递给学生。在本文中，为了克服这一限制并发挥多个网络的功效，我们将多个网络分别分为教师组和学生组。也就是说，学生组是一组需要学习教师知识的不成熟网络的集合，而教师组是由选定的能够成功教学的网络组成的。我们提出了在线角色转变策略，其中学生组中排名靠前的网络能够在每次迭代中晋升为教师组。在使用学生组的错误样本对教师组进行训练以细化教师组的知识后，我们成功地将协作知识从教师组转移到学生组。我们在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 上验证了该方法的优越性，实现了高性能。我们进一步展示了我们的方法与各种骨干架构（例如 ResNet、WRN、VGG、Mobilenet 和 Shufflenet）的通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于网络分组的在线角色转换知识蒸馏方法，以提高模型性能。
AI.motivation: 在知识蒸馏中，单一全能教师网络无法解决所有问题，多个教师网络的知识蒸馏效果有时不理想，因为一些不成熟的教师可能会传递错误知识给学生。
AI.method: 将多个网络划分为教师组和学生组，学生组为需要学习教师知识的不成熟网络，教师组为能够成功教学的选定网络。提出在线角色转换策略，使学生组中排名靠前的网络在每次迭代中晋升为教师组。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和ImageNet数据集上验证了该方法的优越性，取得了高性能。并展示了该方法在不同主干架构（如ResNet、WRN、VGG、Mobilenet和Shufflenet）上的通用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过网络分组和在线角色转换策略，有效克服了知识蒸馏中不成熟教师传递错误知识的问题，提高了模型性能。

search_text: ORC: Network Group-based Knowledge Distillation using Online Role Change ORC：使用在线角色变更的基于网络组的知识蒸馏 In knowledge distillation, since a single, omnipotent teacher network cannot solve all problems, multiple teacher-based knowledge distillations have been studied recently. However, sometimes their improvements are not as good as expected because some immature teachers may transfer the false knowledge to the student. In this paper, to overcome this limitation and take the efficacy of the multiple networks, we divide the multiple networks into teacher and student groups, respectively. That is, the student group is a set of immature networks that require learning the teacher's knowledge, while the teacher group consists of the selected networks that are capable of teaching successfully. We propose our online role change strategy where the top-ranked networks in the student group are able to promote to the teacher group at every iteration. After training the teacher group using the error samples of the student group to refine the teacher group's knowledge, we transfer the collaborative knowledge from the teacher group to the student group successfully. We verify the superiority of the proposed method on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet which achieves high performance. We further show the generality of our method with various backbone architectures such as ResNet, WRN, VGG, Mobilenet, and Shufflenet. 在知识蒸馏中，由于单一的全能教师网络无法解决所有问题，因此最近研究了多种基于教师的知识蒸馏。然而，有时他们的进步并不如预期的那么好，因为一些不成熟的教师可能会将错误的知识传递给学生。在本文中，为了克服这一限制并发挥多个网络的功效，我们将多个网络分别分为教师组和学生组。也就是说，学生组是一组需要学习教师知识的不成熟网络的集合，而教师组是由选定的能够成功教学的网络组成的。我们提出了在线角色转变策略，其中学生组中排名靠前的网络能够在每次迭代中晋升为教师组。在使用学生组的错误样本对教师组进行训练以细化教师组的知识后，我们成功地将协作知识从教师组转移到学生组。我们在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 上验证了该方法的优越性，实现了高性能。我们进一步展示了我们的方法与各种骨干架构（例如 ResNet、WRN、VGG、Mobilenet 和 Shufflenet）的通用性。 本文提出了一种基于网络分组的在线角色转换知识蒸馏方法，以提高模型性能。 Junyong Choi,Hyeon Cho,Seokhwa Cheung,Wonjun Hwang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Clinton J. Wang,Polina Golland
title: Discretization Invariant Networks for Learning Maps between Neural Fields
title_zh: 用于学习神经场之间映射的离散化不变网络
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research 2023
comments: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research 2023
abstract: With the emergence of powerful representations of continuous data in the form of neural fields, there is a need for discretization invariant learning: an approach for learning maps between functions on continuous domains without being sensitive to how the function is sampled. We present a new framework for understanding and designing discretization invariant neural networks (DI-Nets), which generalizes many discrete networks such as convolutional neural networks as well as continuous networks such as neural operators. Our analysis establishes upper bounds on the deviation in model outputs under different finite discretizations, and highlights the central role of point set discrepancy in characterizing such bounds. This insight leads to the design of a family of neural networks driven by numerical integration via quasi-Monte Carlo sampling with discretizations of low discrepancy. We prove by construction that DI-Nets universally approximate a large class of maps between integrable function spaces, and show that discretization invariance also describes backpropagation through such models. Applied to neural fields, convolutional DI-Nets can learn to classify and segment visual data under various discretizations, and sometimes generalize to new types of discretizations at test time. Code: https://github.com/clintonjwang/DI-net.
summary: With the emergence of powerful representations of continuous data in the form of neural fields, there is a need for discretization invariant learning: an approach for learning maps between functions on continuous domains without being sensitive to how the function is sampled. We present a new framework for understanding and designing discretization invariant neural networks (DI-Nets), which generalizes many discrete networks such as convolutional neural networks as well as continuous networks such as neural operators. Our analysis establishes upper bounds on the deviation in model outputs under different finite discretizations, and highlights the central role of point set discrepancy in characterizing such bounds. This insight leads to the design of a family of neural networks driven by numerical integration via quasi-Monte Carlo sampling with discretizations of low discrepancy. We prove by construction that DI-Nets universally approximate a large class of maps between integrable function spaces, and show that discretization invariance also describes backpropagation through such models. Applied to neural fields, convolutional DI-Nets can learn to classify and segment visual data under various discretizations, and sometimes generalize to new types of discretizations at test time. Code: https://github.com/clintonjwang/DI-net.
abstract_zh: 随着神经场形式连续数据的强大表示的出现，需要离散化不变学习：一种学习连续域上函数之间映射的方法，而不对函数的采样方式敏感。我们提出了一个用于理解和设计离散不变神经网络（DI-Net）的新框架，它概括了许多离散网络（例如卷积神经网络）以及连续网络（例如神经算子）。我们的分析建立了不同有限离散化下模型输出偏差的上限，并强调了点集差异在表征此类边界时的核心作用。这种见解导致了一系列神经网络的设计，这些神经网络由通过准蒙特卡罗采样和低差异离散化的数值积分驱动。我们通过构造证明 DI-Net 普遍近似可积函数空间之间的一大类映射，并表明离散化不变性也描述了通过此类模型的反向传播。应用于神经领域，卷积 DI-Net 可以学习在各种离散化下对视觉数据进行分类和分割，有时在测试时可以推广到新类型的离散化。代码：https://github.com/clintonjwang/DI-net。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种离散化不变网络（DI-Nets），用于在神经场之间学习映射，使其不受函数采样方式的影响。
AI.motivation: 神经场等连续数据表示需要学习不受离散化采样影响的映射，现有方法对采样敏感，需设计离散化不变的学习框架。
AI.method: 通过准蒙特卡洛采样与数值积分构建离散化不变网络，结合点集差异性分析，证明其可统一逼近积分函数空间中的映射。
AI.result: DI-Nets在视觉分类与分割任务中实现跨不同离散化的泛化，且支持测试时新型离散化适应，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 离散化不变性为神经场学习提供了鲁棒框架，既涵盖卷积网络又扩展至连续算子，理论与应用均验证其有效性。

authors_text: Gabriel Spadon,Jose F. Rodrigues-Jr
title: From Cities to Series: Complex Networks and Deep Learning for Improved Spatial and Temporal Analytics*
title_zh: 从城市到系列：复杂网络和深度学习改进时空分析*
comment: This piece refers to an extended abstract of the Ph.D. thesis under the same name defended in the Graduate Program in Computer Science and Computational Mathematics (PPG-CCMC) of the Institute of Mathematics and Statistics (ICMC) from the University of Sao Paulo (USP) - Brazil on July 12, 2021. The authors here listed refer to the Ph.D. candidate and his advisor, respectively
comments: This piece refers to an extended abstract of the Ph.D. thesis under the same name defended in the Graduate Program in Computer Science and Computational Mathematics (PPG-CCMC) of the Institute of Mathematics and Statistics (ICMC) from the University of Sao Paulo (USP) - Brazil on July 12, 2021. The authors here listed refer to the Ph.D. candidate and his advisor, respectively
abstract: Graphs have often been used to answer questions about the interaction between real-world entities by taking advantage of their capacity to represent complex topologies. Complex networks are known to be graphs that capture such non-trivial topologies; they are able to represent human phenomena such as epidemic processes, the dynamics of populations, and the urbanization of cities. The investigation of complex networks has been extrapolated to many fields of science, with particular emphasis on computing techniques, including artificial intelligence. In such a case, the analysis of the interaction between entities of interest is transposed to the internal learning of algorithms, a paradigm whose investigation is able to expand the state of the art in Computer Science. By exploring this paradigm, this thesis puts together complex networks and machine learning techniques to improve the understanding of the human phenomena observed in pandemics, pendular migration, and street networks. Accordingly, we contribute with: (i) a new neural network architecture capable of modeling dynamic processes observed in spatial and temporal data with applications in epidemics propagation, weather forecasting, and patient monitoring in intensive care units; (ii) a machine-learning methodology for analyzing and predicting links in the scope of human mobility between all the cities of Brazil; and, (iii) techniques for identifying inconsistencies in the urban planning of cities while tracking the most influential vertices, with applications over Brazilian and worldwide cities. We obtained results sustained by sound evidence of advances to the state of the art in artificial intelligence, rigorous formalisms, and ample experimentation. Our findings rely upon real-world applications in a range of domains, demonstrating the applicability of our methodologies.

We obtained results sustained by sound evidence of advances to the state of the art in artificial intelligence, rigorous formalisms, and ample experimentation. Our findings rely upon real-world applications in a range of domains, demonstrating the applicability of our methodologies.
abstract_zh: 图经常被用来通过利用它们表示复杂拓扑的能力来回答有关现实世界实体之间交互的问题。众所周知，复杂网络是捕获此类非平凡拓扑的图；它们能够代表流行病过程、人口动态和城市化等人类现象。对复杂网络的研究已扩展到许多科学领域，特别强调计算技术，包括人工智能。在这种情况下，对感兴趣实体之间交互的分析被转移到算法的内部学习，这种范式的研究能够扩展计算机科学的最新技术。通过探索这一范式，本文将复杂的网络和机器学习技术结合在一起，以提高对流行病、摆动移民和街道网络中观察到的人类现象的理解。因此，我们做出了贡献：（i）一种新的神经网络架构，能够对空间和时间数据中观察到的动态过程进行建模，并应用于流行病传播、天气预报和重症监护病房的患者监测； (ii) 一种机器学习方法，用于分析和预测巴西所有城市之间人员流动范围内的联系； (iii) 在跟踪最有影响力的顶点的同时识别城市规划不一致的技术，适用于巴西和世界各地的城市。我们取得的成果是由人工智能最先进技术进步的可靠证据、严格的形式主义和充分的实验所支撑的。我们的研究结果依赖于一系列领域的实际应用，证明了我们方法的适用性。

AI.tldr: 该论文结合复杂网络与深度学习技术，提升对城市空间和时间数据的分析能力，应用于疫情传播、人口迁移和街道网络等领域。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的复杂现象（如疫情、人口流动）需要更高效的时空分析方法，传统模型难以捕捉动态交互关系，亟需融合复杂网络与机器学习的创新方案。
AI.method: 提出动态神经网络架构建模时空数据，开发基于机器学习的城市间人口流动预测方法，并设计城市规划不一致性检测技术，结合巴西及全球城市案例验证。
AI.result: 新架构在疫情预测、天气预报和重症监护中表现优异；预测方法准确揭示巴西城市间人口迁移规律；技术有效识别城市规划缺陷并定位关键节点。
AI.conclusion: 通过复杂网络与深度学习的融合，显著推进人工智能在时空分析领域的前沿技术，方法具备跨领域实际应用价值。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过复杂网络与深度学习的融合，显著推进人工智能在时空分析领域的前沿技术，方法具备跨领域实际应用价值。

search_text: From Cities to Series: Complex Networks and Deep Learning for Improved Spatial and Temporal Analytics* 从城市到系列：复杂网络和深度学习改进时空分析* Graphs have often been used to answer questions about the interaction between real-world entities by taking advantage of their capacity to represent complex topologies. Complex networks are known to be graphs that capture such non-trivial topologies; they are able to represent human phenomena such as epidemic processes, the dynamics of populations, and the urbanization of cities. The investigation of complex networks has been extrapolated to many fields of science, with particular emphasis on computing techniques, including artificial intelligence. In such a case, the analysis of the interaction between entities of interest is transposed to the internal learning of algorithms, a paradigm whose investigation is able to expand the state of the art in Computer Science. By exploring this paradigm, this thesis puts together complex networks and machine learning techniques to improve the understanding of the human phenomena observed in pandemics, pendular migration, and street networks. Accordingly, we contribute with: (i) a new neural network architecture capable of modeling dynamic processes observed in spatial and temporal data with applications in epidemics propagation, weather forecasting, and patient monitoring in intensive care units; (ii) a machine-learning methodology for analyzing and predicting links in the scope of human mobility between all the cities of Brazil; and, (iii) techniques for identifying inconsistencies in the urban planning of cities while tracking the most influential vertices, with applications over Brazilian and worldwide cities. We obtained results sustained by sound evidence of advances to the state of the art in artificial intelligence, rigorous formalisms, and ample experimentation. Our findings rely upon real-world applications in a range of domains, demonstrating the applicability of our methodologies. 图经常被用来通过利用它们表示复杂拓扑的能力来回答有关现实世界实体之间交互的问题。众所周知，复杂网络是捕获此类非平凡拓扑的图；它们能够代表流行病过程、人口动态和城市化等人类现象。对复杂网络的研究已扩展到许多科学领域，特别强调计算技术，包括人工智能。在这种情况下，对感兴趣实体之间交互的分析被转移到算法的内部学习，这种范式的研究能够扩展计算机科学的最新技术。通过探索这一范式，本文将复杂的网络和机器学习技术结合在一起，以提高对流行病、摆动移民和街道网络中观察到的人类现象的理解。因此，我们做出了贡献：（i）一种新的神经网络架构，能够对空间和时间数据中观察到的动态过程进行建模，并应用于流行病传播、天气预报和重症监护病房的患者监测； (ii) 一种机器学习方法，用于分析和预测巴西所有城市之间人员流动范围内的联系； (iii) 在跟踪最有影响力的顶点的同时识别城市规划不一致的技术，适用于巴西和世界各地的城市。我们取得的成果是由人工智能最先进技术进步的可靠证据、严格的形式主义和充分的实验所支撑的。我们的研究结果依赖于一系列领域的实际应用，证明了我们方法的适用性。 该论文结合复杂网络与深度学习技术，提升对城市空间和时间数据的分析能力，应用于疫情传播、人口迁移和街道网络等领域。 Gabriel Spadon,Jose F. Rodrigues-Jr cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE

authors_text: Hila Chefer,Idan Schwartz,Lior Wolf
title: Optimizing Relevance Maps of Vision Transformers Improves Robustness
title_zh: 优化视觉变换器的相关性图提高鲁棒性
abstract: It has been observed that visual classification models often rely mostly on the image background, neglecting the foreground, which hurts their robustness to distribution changes. To alleviate this shortcoming, we propose to monitor the model's relevancy signal and manipulate it such that the model is focused on the foreground object. This is done as a finetuning step, involving relatively few samples consisting of pairs of images and their associated foreground masks. Specifically, we encourage the model's relevancy map (i) to assign lower relevance to background regions, (ii) to consider as much information as possible from the foreground, and (iii) we encourage the decisions to have high confidence. When applied to Vision Transformer (ViT) models, a marked improvement in robustness to domain shifts is observed. Moreover, the foreground masks can be obtained automatically, from a self-supervised variant of the ViT model itself; therefore no additional supervision is required.
summary: It has been observed that visual classification models often rely mostly on the image background, neglecting the foreground, which hurts their robustness to distribution changes. To alleviate this shortcoming, we propose to monitor the model's relevancy signal and manipulate it such that the model is focused on the foreground object. This is done as a finetuning step, involving relatively few samples consisting of pairs of images and their associated foreground masks. Specifically, we encourage the model's relevancy map (i) to assign lower relevance to background regions, (ii) to consider as much information as possible from the foreground, and (iii) we encourage the decisions to have high confidence. When applied to Vision Transformer (ViT) models, a marked improvement in robustness to domain shifts is observed. Moreover, the foreground masks can be obtained automatically, from a self-supervised variant of the ViT model itself; therefore no additional supervision is required.
abstract_zh: 据观察，视觉分类模型通常主要依赖于图像背景，而忽略前景，这损害了它们对分布变化的鲁棒性。为了缓解这个缺点，我们建议监视模型的相关性信号并对其进行操作，以使模型专注于前景对象。这是作为微调步骤完成的，涉及相对较少的由图像对及其相关前景蒙版组成的样本。具体来说，我们鼓励模型的相关性图（i）为背景区域分配较低的相关性，（ii）考虑来自前景的尽可能多的信息，以及（iii）我们鼓励决策具有高置信度。当应用于 Vision Transformer (ViT) 模型时，可以观察到域转换的鲁棒性显着提高。此外，前景蒙版可以从 ViT 模型本身的自我监督变体中自动获得；因此不需要额外的监督。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过优化视觉Transformer（ViT）的相关性图，使其更关注图像前景以提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉分类模型过度依赖背景信息，导致在分布变化时鲁棒性不足，需通过调整相关性图增强前景关注。
AI.method: 在微调阶段使用少量带前景掩码的样本，优化相关性图以降低背景相关性、充分利用前景信息并提高决策置信度，且通过自监督ViT生成掩码无需额外标注。
AI.result: ViT模型在领域迁移任务中鲁棒性显著提升，且无需人工标注前景掩码。
AI.conclusion: 优化相关性图能有效提升视觉模型鲁棒性，自动获取前景信息的方法具有实用价值。

authors_text: Ming Tao,Bing-Kun Bao,Hao Tang,Fei Wu,Longhui Wei,Qi Tian
title: DE-Net: Dynamic Text-guided Image Editing Adversarial Networks
title_zh: DE-Net：动态文本引导图像编辑对抗网络
abstract: Text-guided image editing models have shown remarkable results. However, there remain two problems. First, they employ fixed manipulation modules for various editing requirements (e.g., color changing, texture changing, content adding and removing), which results in over-editing or insufficient editing. Second, they do not clearly distinguish between text-required and text-irrelevant parts, which leads to inaccurate editing. To solve these limitations, we propose: (i) a Dynamic Editing Block (DEBlock) which composes different editing modules dynamically for various editing requirements. (ii) a Composition Predictor (Comp-Pred) which predicts the composition weights for DEBlock according to the inference on target texts and source images. (iii) a Dynamic text-adaptive Convolution Block (DCBlock) which queries source image features to distinguish text-required parts and text-irrelevant parts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our DE-Net achieves excellent performance and manipulates source images more correctly and accurately. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/tobran/DE-Net}.
summary: Text-guided image editing models have shown remarkable results. However, there remain two problems. First, they employ fixed manipulation modules for various editing requirements (e.g., color changing, texture changing, content adding and removing), which results in over-editing or insufficient editing. Second, they do not clearly distinguish between text-required and text-irrelevant parts, which leads to inaccurate editing. To solve these limitations, we propose: (i) a Dynamic Editing Block (DEBlock) which composes different editing modules dynamically for various editing requirements. (ii) a Composition Predictor (Comp-Pred) which predicts the composition weights for DEBlock according to the inference on target texts and source images. (iii) a Dynamic text-adaptive Convolution Block (DCBlock) which queries source image features to distinguish text-required parts and text-irrelevant parts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our DE-Net achieves excellent performance and manipulates source images more correctly and accurately. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/tobran/DE-Net}.
abstract_zh: 文本引导的图像编辑模型已经显示出显着的效果。然而，仍然存在两个问题。首先，他们采用固定的操作模块来满足各种编辑需求（例如，颜色更改、纹理更改、内容添加和删除），这导致过度编辑或编辑不足。其次，它们没有明确区分文本所需的部分和与文本无关的部分，这导致编辑不准确。为了解决这些限制，我们提出：（i）动态编辑块（DEBlock），它动态地组成不同的编辑模块以满足不同的编辑要求。 (ii) 构图预测器（Comp-Pred），根据对目标文本和源图像的推断来预测 DEBlock 的构图权重。 （iii）动态文本自适应卷积块（DCBlock），查询源图像特征以区分文本所需部分和文本不相关部分。大量的实验表明，我们的 DE-Net 具有出色的性能，并且可以更正确、更准确地处理源图像。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/tobran/DE-Net} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DE-Net动态文本引导图像编辑对抗网络，旨在解决现有文本引导图像编辑模型在编辑准确性和区分文本相关区域方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有文本引导图像编辑模型存在固定操作模块导致编辑过度或不足，且无法明确区分文本相关与无关区域，造成编辑不准确的问题。
AI.method: 提出动态编辑块（DEBlock）根据需求组合不同编辑模块，组合预测器（Comp-Pred）根据文本和图像预测权重，以及动态文本自适应卷积块（DCBlock）区分文本相关区域。
AI.result: 实验表明DE-Net在编辑准确性与正确性上表现优异，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: DE-Net通过动态模块组合与区域区分机制，有效解决了文本引导图像编辑中的关键问题，实现了更精确的图像编辑效果。

First, they employ fixed manipulation modules for various editing requirements (e.g., color changing, texture changing, content adding and removing), which results in over-editing or insufficient editing. Second, they do not clearly distinguish between text-required and text-irrelevant parts, which leads to inaccurate editing. (iii) a Dynamic text-adaptive Convolution Block (DCBlock) which queries source image features to distinguish text-required parts and text-irrelevant parts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our DE-Net achieves excellent performance and manipulates source images more correctly and accurately. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/tobran/DE-Net}. 文本引导的图像编辑模型已经显示出显着的效果。然而，仍然存在两个问题。首先，他们采用固定的操作模块来满足各种编辑需求（例如，颜色更改、纹理更改、内容添加和删除），这导致过度编辑或编辑不足。其次，它们没有明确区分文本所需的部分和与文本无关的部分，这导致编辑不准确。为了解决这些限制，我们提出：（i）动态编辑块（DEBlock），它动态地组成不同的编辑模块以满足不同的编辑要求。 (ii) 构图预测器（Comp-Pred），根据对目标文本和源图像的推断来预测 DEBlock 的构图权重。 （iii）动态文本自适应卷积块（DCBlock），查询源图像特征以区分文本所需部分和文本不相关部分。大量的实验表明，我们的 DE-Net 具有出色的性能，并且可以更正确、更准确地处理源图像。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/tobran/DE-Net} 获取。 本文提出DE-Net动态文本引导图像编辑对抗网络，旨在解决现有文本引导图像编辑模型在编辑准确性和区分文本相关区域方面的不足。 Ming Tao,Bing-Kun Bao,Hao Tang,Fei Wu,Longhui Wei,Qi Tian cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Ruoyi Du,Wenqing Yu,Heqing Wang,Dongliang Chang,Ting-En Lin,Yongbin Li,Zhanyu Ma
title: Multi-View Active Fine-Grained Recognition
title_zh: 多视角主动细粒度识别
abstract: As fine-grained visual classification (FGVC) being developed for decades, great works related have exposed a key direction -- finding discriminative local regions and revealing subtle differences. However, unlike identifying visual contents within static images, for recognizing objects in the real physical world, discriminative information is not only present within seen local regions but also hides in other unseen perspectives. In other words, in addition to focusing on the distinguishable part from the whole, for efficient and accurate recognition, it is required to infer the key perspective with a few glances, e.g., people may recognize a "Benz AMG GT" with a glance of its front and then know that taking a look at its exhaust pipe can help to tell which year's model it is. In this paper, back to reality, we put forward the problem of active fine-grained recognition (AFGR) and complete this study in three steps: (i) a hierarchical, multi-view, fine-grained vehicle dataset is collected as the testbed, (ii) a simple experiment is designed to verify that different perspectives contribute differently for FGVC and different categories own different discriminative perspective, (iii) a policy-gradient-based framework is adopted to achieve efficient recognition with active view selection. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method delivers a better performance-efficient trade-off than previous FGVC methods and advanced neural networks.
summary: As fine-grained visual classification (FGVC) being developed for decades, great works related have exposed a key direction -- finding discriminative local regions and revealing subtle differences. However, unlike identifying visual contents within static images, for recognizing objects in the real physical world, discriminative information is not only present within seen local regions but also hides in other unseen perspectives. In other words, in addition to focusing on the distinguishable part from the whole, for efficient and accurate recognition, it is required to infer the key perspective with a few glances, e.g., people may recognize a "Benz AMG GT" with a glance of its front and then know that taking a look at its exhaust pipe can help to tell which year's model it is. In this paper, back to reality, we put forward the problem of active fine-grained recognition (AFGR) and complete this study in three steps: (i) a hierarchical, multi-view, fine-grained vehicle dataset is collected as the testbed, (ii) a simple experiment is designed to verify that different perspectives contribute differently for FGVC and different categories own different discriminative perspective, (iii) a policy-gradient-based framework is adopted to achieve efficient recognition with active view selection. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method delivers a better performance-efficient trade-off than previous FGVC methods and advanced neural networks.
abstract_zh: 随着细粒度视觉分类（FGVC）的发展数十年，相关的伟大工作揭示了一个关键方向——寻找有区别的局部区域并揭示细微的差异。然而，与识别静态图像中的视觉内容不同，对于识别现实物理世界中的对象，区分信息不仅存在于可见的局部区域内，而且还隐藏在其他不可见的视角中。换句话说，除了注重整体的区别之外，为了高​​效、准确的识别，还需要通过几眼就能推断出关键视角，例如，人们一眼就能认出一辆“奔驰AMG GT”，然后看一眼排气管就可以知道它是哪一年的车型。在本文中，回到现实，我们提出了主动细粒度识别（AFGR）问题，并分三个步骤完成了这项研究：（i）收集分层、多视图、细粒度的车辆数据集作为测试平台，（ii）设计一个简单的实验来验证不同视角对FGVC的贡献不同以及不同类别拥有不同的判别视角，（iii）采用基于策略梯度的框架通过主动视图选择实现高效识别。综合实验表明，与之前的 FGVC 方法和高级神经网络相比，所提出的方法提供了更好的性能效率权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出主动细粒度识别（AFGR）问题，通过多视角数据和主动视角选择策略提升细粒度视觉分类的效率与准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有细粒度识别方法仅关注已见局部特征，忽视了现实场景中不同视角可能包含关键判别信息的特性，导致识别效率与准确率不足。
AI.method: 构建多视角细粒度车辆数据集，设计视角贡献度实验，采用基于策略梯度的框架实现主动视角选择与识别优化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在性能与效率的权衡上优于传统细粒度分类方法及先进神经网络模型。
AI.conclusion: 主动视角选择策略能有效挖掘多视角信息，为现实场景中的细粒度识别提供更高效解决方案。

authors_text: Florian Kurpicz
title: Engineering Compact Data Structures for Rank and Select Queries on Bit Vectors
title_zh: 为位向量上的排序和选择查询设计紧凑的数据结构
abstract: Bit vectors are fundamental building blocks of many succinct data structures. They can be used to represent graphs, are an important part of many text indices in the form of the wavelet tree, and can be used to encode ordered sequences of integers as Elias-Fano codes. To do so, two queries have to be answered: namely rank and select queries. Given a position in the bit vector, a rank query returns the number of 1-bits before that position. A select query, given a parameter $j$, returns the position of the $j$-th 1-bit. On a length-n bit vector, both queries can be answered in $O(1)$ time and require $o(n)$ bits of additional space. In practice, the smallest (uncompressed) rank and select data structure cs-poppy has a space overhead of $\approx$ 3.51% [Zhou et al., SEA 13]. In this paper, we present an improved rank and select data structure that has the same space overhead but can answer queries up to 8% (rank) and 16.5% (select) faster compared with cs-poppy.
summary: Bit vectors are fundamental building blocks of many succinct data structures. They can be used to represent graphs, are an important part of many text indices in the form of the wavelet tree, and can be used to encode ordered sequences of integers as Elias-Fano codes. To do so, two queries have to be answered: namely rank and select queries. Given a position in the bit vector, a rank query returns the number of 1-bits before that position. A select query, given a parameter $j$, returns the position of the $j$-th 1-bit. On a length-n bit vector, both queries can be answered in $O(1)$ time and require $o(n)$ bits of additional space. In practice, the smallest (uncompressed) rank and select data structure cs-poppy has a space overhead of $\approx$ 3.51% [Zhou et al., SEA 13]. In this paper, we present an improved rank and select data structure that has the same space overhead but can answer queries up to 8% (rank) and 16.5% (select) faster compared with cs-poppy.
abstract_zh: 位向量是许多简洁数据结构的基本构建块。它们可用于表示图，是小波树形式的许多文本索引的重要组成部分，并且可用于将整数的有序序列编码为 Elias-Fano 码。为此，必须回答两个查询：即排名查询和选择查询。给定位向量中的位置，排名查询返回该位置之前的 1 位的数量。给定参数 $j$ 的选择查询返回第 $j$ 个 1 位的位置。在长度为 n 位向量上，两个查询都可以在 $O(1)$ 时间内得到答复，并且需要 $o(n)$ 位的额外空间。实际上，最小的（未压缩的）排序和选择数据结构 cs-poppy 的空间开销为 $\approx$ 3.51% [Zhou et al., SEA 13]。在本文中，我们提出了一种改进的排名和选择数据结构，与 cs-poppy 相比，它具有相同的空间开销，但应答查询的速度提高了 8%（排名）和 16.5%（选择）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的紧凑型数据结构，用于在位向量上高效执行rank和select查询。
AI.motivation: 现有的rank和select数据结构（如cs-poppy）虽然空间开销较低，但查询速度仍有提升空间，尤其在处理大规模数据时性能瓶颈显著。
AI.method: 设计了一种新型数据结构，在保持与cs-poppy相同空间开销（约3.51%）的基础上，通过优化内部存储布局和查询算法，提升查询效率。
AI.result: 相比cs-poppy，新结构将rank查询速度提升8%，select查询速度提升16.5%，且空间复杂度仍为$o(n)$。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在不增加空间成本的前提下显著提升了位向量查询性能，适用于需要高效处理大规模压缩数据的场景。

authors_text: H. P. L. Arjuna Madanayake,R. J. Cintra,V. S. Dimitrov,L. Bruton
title: Block-Parallel Systolic-Array Architecture for 2-D NTT-based Fragile Watermark Embedding
title_zh: 用于基于 NTT 的二维脆弱水印嵌入的块并行脉动阵列架构
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures
comments: 11 pages, 4 figures
abstract: Number-theoretic transforms (NTTs) have been applied in the fragile watermarking of digital images. A block-parallel systolic-array architecture is proposed for watermarking based on the 2-D special Hartley NTT (HNTT). The proposed core employs two 2-D special HNTT hardware cores, each using digital arithmetic over $\mathrm{GF}(3)$, and processes $4\times4$ blocks of pixels in parallel every clock cycle. Prototypes are operational on a Xilinx Sx35-10ff668 FPGA device. The maximum estimated throughput of the FPGA circuit is 100 million $4\times4$ HNTT fragile watermarked blocks per second, when clocked at 100 MHz. Potential applications exist in high-traffic back-end servers dealing with large amounts of protected digital images requiring authentication, in remote-sensing for high-security surveillance applications, in real-time video processing of information of a sensitive nature or matters of national security, in video/photographic content management of corporate clients, in authenticating multimedia for the entertainment industry, in the authentication of electronic evidence material, and in real-time news streaming.
summary: Number-theoretic transforms (NTTs) have been applied in the fragile watermarking of digital images. A block-parallel systolic-array architecture is proposed for watermarking based on the 2-D special Hartley NTT (HNTT). The proposed core employs two 2-D special HNTT hardware cores, each using digital arithmetic over $\mathrm{GF}(3)$, and processes $4\times4$ blocks of pixels in parallel every clock cycle. Prototypes are operational on a Xilinx Sx35-10ff668 FPGA device. The maximum estimated throughput of the FPGA circuit is 100 million $4\times4$ HNTT fragile watermarked blocks per second, when clocked at 100 MHz. Potential applications exist in high-traffic back-end servers dealing with large amounts of protected digital images requiring authentication, in remote-sensing for high-security surveillance applications, in real-time video processing of information of a sensitive nature or matters of national security, in video/photographic content management of corporate clients, in authenticating multimedia for the entertainment industry, in the authentication of electronic evidence material, and in real-time news streaming.
abstract_zh: 数论变换（NTT）已应用于数字图像的脆弱水印。提出了一种基于二维特殊 Hartley NTT (HNTT) 的块并行脉动阵列架构用于水印。所提出的核心采用两个 2-D 特殊 HNTT 硬件核心，每个核心都使用 $\mathrm{GF}(3)$ 上的数字算术，并在每个时钟周期并行处理 $4\times4$ 像素块。原型可在 Xilinx Sx35-10ff668 FPGA 器件上运行。当时钟频率为 100 MHz 时，FPGA 电路的最大估计吞吐量为每秒 1 亿个 $4\times4$ HNTT 易碎水印块。潜在的应用存在于处理大量需要验证的受保护数字图像的高流量后端服务器、高安全性监控应用的遥感、敏感信息或国家安全问题的实时视频处理、企业客户的视频/摄影内容管理、娱乐行业的多媒体验证、电子证据材料的验证以及实时新闻流中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于二维特殊哈特利数论变换（HNTT）的块并行系综阵列架构，用于数字图像的脆弱水印嵌入。
AI.motivation: 脆弱水印技术需要高效且安全的算法以应对高流量服务器、遥感监控、实时视频处理等场景中的大规模数字图像认证需求。
AI.method: 设计包含两个基于GF(3)域运算的二维HNTT硬件核心，采用4×4像素块并行处理架构，并在Xilinx Sx35-10ff668 FPGA上实现原型。
AI.result: FPGA电路在100MHz时钟频率下实现每秒100百万个4×4 HNTT脆弱水印块的处理吞吐量。
AI.conclusion: 该架构为高安全性和实时性要求的应用场景（如电子证据认证、实时新闻流媒体等）提供了高效的脆弱水印解决方案。

search_text: Block-Parallel Systolic-Array Architecture for 2-D NTT-based Fragile Watermark Embedding 用于基于 NTT 的二维脆弱水印嵌入的块并行脉动阵列架构 Number-theoretic transforms (NTTs) have been applied in the fragile watermarking of digital images. A block-parallel systolic-array architecture is proposed for watermarking based on the 2-D special Hartley NTT (HNTT). The proposed core employs two 2-D special HNTT hardware cores, each using digital arithmetic over $\mathrm{GF}(3)$, and processes $4\times4$ blocks of pixels in parallel every clock cycle. Prototypes are operational on a Xilinx Sx35-10ff668 FPGA device. The maximum estimated throughput of the FPGA circuit is 100 million $4\times4$ HNTT fragile watermarked blocks per second, when clocked at 100 MHz. Potential applications exist in high-traffic back-end servers dealing with large amounts of protected digital images requiring authentication, in remote-sensing for high-security surveillance applications, in real-time video processing of information of a sensitive nature or matters of national security, in video/photographic content management of corporate clients, in authenticating multimedia for the entertainment industry, in the authentication of electronic evidence material, and in real-time news streaming. 数论变换（NTT）已应用于数字图像的脆弱水印。提出了一种基于二维特殊 Hartley NTT (HNTT) 的块并行脉动阵列架构用于水印。所提出的核心采用两个 2-D 特殊 HNTT 硬件核心，每个核心都使用 $\mathrm{GF}(3)$ 上的数字算术，并在每个时钟周期并行处理 $4\times4$ 像素块。原型可在 Xilinx Sx35-10ff668 FPGA 器件上运行。当时钟频率为 100 MHz 时，FPGA 电路的最大估计吞吐量为每秒 1 亿个 $4\times4$ HNTT 易碎水印块。潜在的应用存在于处理大量需要验证的受保护数字图像的高流量后端服务器、高安全性监控应用的遥感、敏感信息或国家安全问题的实时视频处理、企业客户的视频/摄影内容管理、娱乐行业的多媒体验证、电子证据材料的验证以及实时新闻流中。 本文提出了一种基于二维特殊哈特利数论变换（HNTT）的块并行系综阵列架构，用于数字图像的脆弱水印嵌入。 H.
