authors_text: Jun Li,Junyu Chen,Yucheng Tang,Ce Wang,Bennett A. Landman,S. Kevin Zhou
title: Transforming medical imaging with Transformers? A comparative review of key properties, current progresses, and future perspectives
title_zh: 用变形金刚改变医学成像？对关键特性、当前进展和未来前景的比较回顾
abstract: Transformer, the latest technological advance of deep learning, has gained prevalence in natural language processing or computer vision. Since medical imaging bear some resemblance to computer vision, it is natural to inquire about the status quo of Transformers in medical imaging and ask the question: can the Transformer models transform medical imaging? In this paper, we attempt to make a response to the inquiry. After a brief introduction of the fundamentals of Transformers, especially in comparison with convolutional neural networks (CNNs), and highlighting key defining properties that characterize the Transformers, we offer a comprehensive review of the state-of-the-art Transformer-based approaches for medical imaging and exhibit current research progresses made in the areas of medical image segmentation, recognition, detection, registration, reconstruction, enhancement, etc. In particular, what distinguishes our review lies in its organization based on the Transformer's key defining properties, which are mostly derived from comparing the Transformer and CNN, and its type of architecture, which specifies the manner in which the Transformer and CNN are combined, all helping the readers to best understand the rationale behind the reviewed approaches. We conclude with discussions of future perspectives.
summary: Transformer, the latest technological advance of deep learning, has gained prevalence in natural language processing or computer vision. Since medical imaging bear some resemblance to computer vision, it is natural to inquire about the status quo of Transformers in medical imaging and ask the question: can the Transformer models transform medical imaging? In this paper, we attempt to make a response to the inquiry. After a brief introduction of the fundamentals of Transformers, especially in comparison with convolutional neural networks (CNNs), and highlighting key defining properties that characterize the Transformers, we offer a comprehensive review of the state-of-the-art Transformer-based approaches for medical imaging and exhibit current research progresses made in the areas of medical image segmentation, recognition, detection, registration, reconstruction, enhancement, etc. In particular, what distinguishes our review lies in its organization based on the Transformer's key defining properties, which are mostly derived from comparing the Transformer and CNN, and its type of architecture, which specifies the manner in which the Transformer and CNN are combined, all helping the readers to best understand the rationale behind the reviewed approaches. We conclude with discussions of future perspectives.
abstract_zh: Transformer 是深度学习的最新技术进步，已在自然语言处理或计算机视觉领域得到普及。由于医学成像与计算机视觉有一些相似之处，因此很自然地要了解Transformer在医学成像中的现状，并提出这样的问题：Transformer模型能否改变医学成像？在本文中，我们试图对这一询问做出回应。在简要介绍 Transformer 的基本原理，特别是与卷积神经网络 (CNN) 进行比较，并强调 Transformer 的关键定义属性之后，我们对最先进的基于 Transformer 的医学成像方法进行了全面的回顾，并展示了当前在医学图像分割、识别、检测、配准、重建、增强等领域取得的研究进展。特别是，我们的回顾的不同之处在于其基于 Transformer 的关键定义属性的组织，这些属性是主要来自对 Transformer 和 CNN 的比较，以及它的架构类型，它指定了 Transformer 和 CNN 的组合方式，所有这些都有助于读者最好地理解所审查方法背后的基本原理。我们最后讨论了未来的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文系统回顾了Transformer在医学影像领域的应用现状，比较其与卷积神经网络的特性，并探讨其未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: Transformer在计算机视觉领域取得成功，而医学影像与计算机视觉存在相似性，因此有必要评估Transformer是否能推动医学影像技术进步。
AI.method: 通过对比Transformer与CNN的核心特性，按架构类型分类综述现有医学影像任务中的Transformer应用，并分析其技术特点。
AI.result: 总结了Transformer在医学图像分割、识别、检测等任务中的最新进展，并展示了不同架构设计对性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: Transformer为医学影像分析提供了新思路，但需进一步解决数据效率、可解释性等问题，未来研究应关注跨模态融合与轻量化部署。

authors_text: Cédric Colas,Tristan Karch,Clément Moulin-Frier,Pierre-Yves Oudeyer
title: Language and Culture Internalisation for Human-Like Autotelic AI
title_zh: 类人自动人工智能的语言和文化内化
comment: ef:Nature Machine Intelligence 4, 1068-1076 (2022)
comments: ef:Nature Machine Intelligence 4, 1068-1076 (2022)
abstract: Building autonomous agents able to grow open-ended repertoires of skills across their lives is a fundamental goal of artificial intelligence (AI). A promising developmental approach recommends the design of intrinsically motivated agents that learn new skills by generating and pursuing their own goals - autotelic agents. But despite recent progress, existing algorithms still show serious limitations in terms of goal diversity, exploration, generalisation or skill composition. This perspective calls for the immersion of autotelic agents into rich socio-cultural worlds, an immensely important attribute of our environment that shapes human cognition but is mostly omitted in modern AI. Inspired by the seminal work of Vygotsky, we propose Vygotskian autotelic agents - agents able to internalise their interactions with others and turn them into cognitive tools. We focus on language and show how its structure and informational content may support the development of new cognitive functions in artificial agents as it does in humans. We justify the approach by uncovering several examples of new artificial cognitive functions emerging from interactions between language and embodiment in recent works at the intersection of deep reinforcement learning and natural language processing. Looking forward, we highlight future opportunities and challenges for Vygotskian Autotelic AI research, including the use of language models as cultural models supporting artificial cognitive development.
summary: Building autonomous agents able to grow open-ended repertoires of skills across their lives is a fundamental goal of artificial intelligence (AI). A promising developmental approach recommends the design of intrinsically motivated agents that learn new skills by generating and pursuing their own goals - autotelic agents. But despite recent progress, existing algorithms still show serious limitations in terms of goal diversity, exploration, generalisation or skill composition. This perspective calls for the immersion of autotelic agents into rich socio-cultural worlds, an immensely important attribute of our environment that shapes human cognition but is mostly omitted in modern AI. Inspired by the seminal work of Vygotsky, we propose Vygotskian autotelic agents - agents able to internalise their interactions with others and turn them into cognitive tools. We focus on language and show how its structure and informational content may support the development of new cognitive functions in artificial agents as it does in humans. We justify the approach by uncovering several examples of new artificial cognitive functions emerging from interactions between language and embodiment in recent works at the intersection of deep reinforcement learning and natural language processing. Looking forward, we highlight future opportunities and challenges for Vygotskian Autotelic AI research, including the use of language models as cultural models supporting artificial cognitive development.
abstract_zh: 构建能够在一生中发展开放式技能的自主代理是人工智能 (AI) 的基本目标。一种有前途的发展方法建议设计内在动机的智能体，通过生成和追求自己的目标来学习新技能——自动实现智能体。但尽管最近取得了进展，现有算法在目标多样性、探索、泛化或技能构成方面仍然表现出严重的局限性。这种观点要求自动主体沉浸到丰富的社会文化世界中，这是我们环境的一个极其重要的属性，它塑造了人类的认知，但在现代人工智能中大多被忽略了。受维果茨基开创性工作的启发，我们提出了维果茨基自动行为主体——能够内化与他人的互动并将其转化为认知工具的主体。我们专注于语言，并展示其结构和信息内容如何支持人工智能体中新认知功能的发展，就像人类一样。我们通过在深度强化学习和自然语言处理交叉领域的最新研究中发现了语言和具体化之间的相互作用中出现的新人工认知功能的几个例子来证明该方法的合理性。展望未来，我们强调了 Vygotskian Autotelic 人工智能研究的未来机遇和挑战，包括使用语言模型作为支持人工认知发展的文化模型。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过引入语言和文化内化机制，解决现有自足型智能体在目标多样性、探索能力及技能泛化方面的不足，提出基于维果茨基理论的自足型智能体框架。
AI.motivation: 当前自足型智能体算法在目标生成、探索效率和技能组合上存在局限，而人类认知受社会文化环境深刻影响。需借鉴维果茨基理论，通过语言和文化工具促进智能体认知发展。
AI.method: 聚焦语言结构与信息内容，结合深度强化学习与自然语言处理，分析语言与具身性交互如何催生新型认知功能，并提出将语言模型作为文化模型支持人工智能认知发展的方法。
AI.result: 发现近期研究中语言与具身性交互产生的新型认知功能案例，验证了语言内化机制对智能体发展的支持作用，为后续研究提供理论依据。
AI.conclusion: 未来需进一步探索语言模型作为文化载体在自足型AI中的应用，解决跨模态学习、文化工具内化等挑战，推动更具人类认知特性的智能体发展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文旨在通过引入语言和文化内化机制，解决现有自足型智能体在目标多样性、探索能力及技能泛化方面的不足，提出基于维果茨基理论的自足型智能体框架。
ai_content.motivation: 当前自足型智能体算法在目标生成、探索效率和技能组合上存在局限，而人类认知受社会文化环境深刻影响。需借鉴维果茨基理论，通过语言和文化工具促进智能体认知发展。
ai_content.method: 聚焦语言结构与信息内容，结合深度强化学习与自然语言处理，分析语言与具身性交互如何催生新型认知功能，并提出将语言模型作为文化模型支持人工智能认知发展的方法。
ai_content.result: 发现近期研究中语言与具身性交互产生的新型认知功能案例，验证了语言内化机制对智能体发展的支持作用，为后续研究提供理论依据。
ai_content.conclusion: 未来需进一步探索语言模型作为文化载体在自足型AI中的应用，解决跨模态学习、文化工具内化等挑战，推动更具人类认知特性的智能体发展。

search_text: Language and Culture Internalisation for Human-Like Autotelic AI 类人自动人工智能的语言和文化内化 Building autonomous agents able to grow open-ended repertoires of skills across their lives is a fundamental goal of artificial intelligence (AI). A promising developmental approach recommends the design of intrinsically motivated agents that learn new skills by generating and pursuing their own goals - autotelic agents. But despite recent progress, existing algorithms still show serious limitations in terms of goal diversity, exploration, generalisation or skill composition. This perspective calls for the immersion of autotelic agents into rich socio-cultural worlds, an immensely important attribute of our environment that shapes human cognition but is mostly omitted in modern AI. Inspired by the seminal work of Vygotsky, we propose Vygotskian autotelic agents - agents able to internalise their interactions with others and turn them into cognitive tools. We focus on language and show how its structure and informational content may support the development of new cognitive functions in artificial agents as it does in humans. We justify the approach by uncovering several examples of new artificial cognitive functions emerging from interactions between language and embodiment in recent works at the intersection of deep reinforcement learning and natural language processing. Looking forward, we highlight future opportunities and challenges for Vygotskian Autotelic AI research, including the use of language models as cultural models supporting artificial cognitive development. 构建能够在一生中发展开放式技能的自主代理是人工智能 (AI) 的基本目标。一种有前途的发展方法建议设计内在动机的智能体，通过生成和追求自己的目标来学习新技能——自动实现智能体。但尽管最近取得了进展，现有算法在目标多样性、探索、泛化或技能构成方面仍然表现出严重的局限性。这种观点要求自动主体沉浸到丰富的社会文化世界中，这是我们环境的一个极其重要的属性，它塑造了人类的认知，但在现代人工智能中大多被忽略了。受维果茨基开创性工作的启发，我们提出了维果茨基自动行为主体——能够内化与他人的互动并将其转化为认知工具的主体。我们专注于语言，并展示其结构和信息内容如何支持人工智能体中新认知功能的发展，就像人类一样。我们通过在深度强化学习和自然语言处理交叉领域的最新研究中发现了语言和具体化之间的相互作用中出现的新人工认知功能的几个例子来证明该方法的合理性。展望未来，我们强调了 Vygotskian Autotelic 人工智能研究的未来机遇和挑战，包括使用语言模型作为支持人工认知发展的文化模型。 本文旨在通过引入语言和文化内化机制，解决现有自足型智能体在目标多样性、探索能力及技能泛化方面的不足，提出基于维果茨基理论的自足型智能体框架。 Cédric Colas,Tristan Karch,Clément Moulin-Frier,Pierre-Yves Oudeyer cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Hangbo Bao,Wenhui Wang,Li Dong,Furu Wei
title: VL-BEiT: Generative Vision-Language Pretraining
title_zh: VL-BEiT：生成视觉语言预训练
abstract: We introduce a vision-language foundation model called VL-BEiT, which is a bidirectional multimodal Transformer learned by generative pretraining. Our minimalist solution conducts masked prediction on both monomodal and multimodal data with a shared Transformer. Specifically, we perform masked vision-language modeling on image-text pairs, masked language modeling on texts, and masked image modeling on images. VL-BEiT is learned from scratch with one unified pretraining task, one shared backbone, and one-stage training. Our method is conceptually simple and empirically effective. Experimental results show that VL-BEiT obtains strong results on various vision-language benchmarks, such as visual question answering, visual reasoning, and image-text retrieval. Moreover, our method learns transferable visual features, achieving competitive performance on image classification, and semantic segmentation.
summary: We introduce a vision-language foundation model called VL-BEiT, which is a bidirectional multimodal Transformer learned by generative pretraining. Our minimalist solution conducts masked prediction on both monomodal and multimodal data with a shared Transformer. Specifically, we perform masked vision-language modeling on image-text pairs, masked language modeling on texts, and masked image modeling on images. VL-BEiT is learned from scratch with one unified pretraining task, one shared backbone, and one-stage training. Our method is conceptually simple and empirically effective. Experimental results show that VL-BEiT obtains strong results on various vision-language benchmarks, such as visual question answering, visual reasoning, and image-text retrieval. Moreover, our method learns transferable visual features, achieving competitive performance on image classification, and semantic segmentation.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种称为 VL-BEiT 的视觉语言基础模型，它是通过生成预训练学习的双向多模态 Transformer。我们的极简解决方案使用共享 Transformer 对单模态和多模态数据进行屏蔽预测。具体来说，我们对图像文本对进行屏蔽视觉语言建模，对文本进行屏蔽语言建模，对图像进行屏蔽图像建模。 VL-BEiT 是从头开始学习的，具有一个统一的预训练任务、一个共享骨干网络和一阶段训练。我们的方法在概念上简单且在经验上有效。实验结果表明，VL-BEiT 在视觉问答、视觉推理和图像文本检索等各种视觉语言基准测试中取得了优异的结果。此外，我们的方法学习可转移的视觉特征，在图像分类和语义分割方面实现了有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的视觉-语言预训练模型VL-BEiT，通过生成式任务学习多模态表示。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型通常依赖复杂架构或多阶段训练，本文旨在提供一个简单有效的统一解决方案。
AI.method: 采用共享Transformer架构，通过掩码视觉-语言建模、掩码语言建模和掩码图像建模三类任务进行联合训练。
AI.result: 在视觉问答、图像-文本检索等基准测试中取得优异性能，且视觉特征可迁移至图像分类和语义分割任务。
AI.conclusion: 统一预训练任务设计有效提升了多模态表征能力，为视觉-语言任务提供了通用基础模型。

authors_text: Kuniaki Saito,Kihyuk Sohn,Xiang Zhang,Chun-Liang Li,Chen-Yu Lee,Kate Saenko,Tomas Pfister
title: Prefix Conditioning Unifies Language and Label Supervision
title_zh: 前缀调节统一了语言和标签监督
comment: CVPR2023
comments: CVPR2023
abstract: Image-classification datasets have been used to pretrain image recognition models. Recently, web-scale image-caption datasets have emerged as a source of powerful pretraining alternative. Image-caption datasets are more ``open-domain'', containing a wider variety of scene types and vocabulary words than traditional classification datasets, and models trained on these datasets have demonstrated strong performance on few- and zero-shot recognition tasks. When naively unifying image-classification and -caption dataset, we show that such dataset biases negatively affect pre-training by reducing the generalizability of learned representations and thus jeopardizing zero-shot performance since the unification can tailor the model for the classification dataset, making it vulnerable to the distribution shift from the dataset. In this work, we address the problem by disentangling the dataset bias using prefix tokens that inform a language encoder of the type of the input dataset (e.g., image-classification or caption) at training time. This approach allows the language encoder to share the knowledge from two datasets as well as switch the mode of feature extraction, i.e., image-classification dataset or image-caption dataset tailored mode, where we use image-caption mode in the zero-shot evaluation. Our method is generic and can be easily integrated into existing VL pre-training objectives such as CLIP or UniCL. In experiments, we show that this simple technique improves the performance in zero-shot image recognition accuracy and robustness to the image-level distribution shift.
summary: Image-classification datasets have been used to pretrain image recognition models. Recently, web-scale image-caption datasets have emerged as a source of powerful pretraining alternative. Image-caption datasets are more ``open-domain'', containing a wider variety of scene types and vocabulary words than traditional classification datasets, and models trained on these datasets have demonstrated strong performance on few- and zero-shot recognition tasks. When naively unifying image-classification and -caption dataset, we show that such dataset biases negatively affect pre-training by reducing the generalizability of learned representations and thus jeopardizing zero-shot performance since the unification can tailor the model for the classification dataset, making it vulnerable to the distribution shift from the dataset. In this work, we address the problem by disentangling the dataset bias using prefix tokens that inform a language encoder of the type of the input dataset (e.g., image-classification or caption) at training time. This approach allows the language encoder to share the knowledge from two datasets as well as switch the mode of feature extraction, i.e., image-classification dataset or image-caption dataset tailored mode, where we use image-caption mode in the zero-shot evaluation. Our method is generic and can be easily integrated into existing VL pre-training objectives such as CLIP or UniCL. In experiments, we show that this simple technique improves the performance in zero-shot image recognition accuracy and robustness to the image-level distribution shift.
abstract_zh: 图像分类数据集已用于预训练图像识别模型。最近，网络规模的图像字幕数据集已成为强大的预训练替代方案的来源。图像字幕数据集比传统分类数据集更加“开放域”，包含更广泛的场景类型和词汇，并且在这些数据集上训练的模型在少样本和零样本识别任务中表现出了强大的性能。当天真的统一图像分类和标题数据集时，我们发现这种数据集偏差会降低学习表示的泛化性，从而对预训练产生负面影响，从而危及零样本性能，因为统一可以为分类数据集定制模型，使其容易受到数据集分布变化的影响。在这项工作中，我们通过使用前缀标记解开数据集偏差来解决这个问题，这些前缀标记在训练时告知语言编码器输入数据集的类型（例如图像分类或标题）。这种方法允许语言编码器共享两个数据集的知识，并切换特征提取模式，即图像分类数据集或图像标题数据集定制模式，其中我们在零样本评估中使用图像标题模式。我们的方法是通用的，可以轻松集成到现有的 VL 预训练目标中，例如 CLIP 或 UniCL。在实验中，我们表明这种简单的技术提高了零样本图像识别精度和对图像级分布偏移的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过前缀标记分离数据集偏差，统一语言和标签监督，提升视觉-语言预训练模型的零样本识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统图像分类数据集与开放域图像-文本数据集直接融合会导致模型偏向分类任务，降低零样本场景下的泛化能力。
AI.method: 在训练时引入前缀标记告知语言编码器输入数据集类型（分类或文本），使模型能动态切换特征提取模式，分离数据集偏差。
AI.result: 该方法在零样本图像识别任务中提升准确率，并增强对图像分布偏移的鲁棒性，且可无缝集成到CLIP等现有预训练框架。
AI.conclusion: 前缀条件化机制有效解耦了多数据集偏差，为统一语言与标签监督提供了通用解决方案。

Recently, web-scale image-caption datasets have emerged as a source of powerful pretraining alternative. Image-caption datasets are more ``open-domain'', containing a wider variety of scene types and vocabulary words than traditional classification datasets, and models trained on these datasets have demonstrated strong performance on few- and zero-shot recognition tasks. When naively unifying image-classification and -caption dataset, we show that such dataset biases negatively affect pre-training by reducing the generalizability of learned representations and thus jeopardizing zero-shot performance since the unification can tailor the model for the classification dataset, making it vulnerable to the distribution shift from the dataset. In this work, we address the problem by disentangling the dataset bias using prefix tokens that inform a language encoder of the type of the input dataset (e.g., image-classification or caption) at training time. This approach allows the language encoder to share the knowledge from two datasets as well as switch the mode of feature extraction, i.e., image-classification dataset or image-caption dataset tailored mode, where we use image-caption mode in the zero-shot evaluation. Our method is generic and can be easily integrated into existing VL pre-training objectives such as CLIP or UniCL. In experiments, we show that this simple technique improves the performance in zero-shot image recognition accuracy and robustness to the image-level distribution shift. 图像分类数据集已用于预训练图像识别模型。最近，网络规模的图像字幕数据集已成为强大的预训练替代方案的来源。图像字幕数据集比传统分类数据集更加“开放域”，包含更广泛的场景类型和词汇，并且在这些数据集上训练的模型在少样本和零样本识别任务中表现出了强大的性能。当天真的统一图像分类和标题数据集时，我们发现这种数据集偏差会降低学习表示的泛化性，从而对预训练产生负面影响，从而危及零样本性能，因为统一可以为分类数据集定制模型，使其容易受到数据集分布变化的影响。在这项工作中，我们通过使用前缀标记解开数据集偏差来解决这个问题，这些前缀标记在训练时告知语言编码器输入数据集的类型（例如图像分类或标题）。这种方法允许语言编码器共享两个数据集的知识，并切换特征提取模式，即图像分类数据集或图像标题数据集定制模式，其中我们在零样本评估中使用图像标题模式。我们的方法是通用的，可以轻松集成到现有的 VL 预训练目标中，例如 CLIP 或 UniCL。在实验中，我们表明这种简单的技术提高了零样本图像识别精度和对图像级分布偏移的鲁棒性。 本文提出通过前缀标记分离数据集偏差，统一语言和标签监督，提升视觉-语言预训练模型的零样本识别性能。 Kuniaki Saito,Kihyuk Sohn,Xiang Zhang,Chun-Liang Li,Chen-Yu Lee,Kate Saenko,Tomas Pfister cs.CV

authors_text: Tamoor Aziz,Chalie Charoenlarpnopparut,Srijidtra Mahapakulchai
title: Comparing Conventional and Deep Feature Models for Classifying Fundus Photography of Hemorrhages
title_zh: 比较传统和深度特征模型对眼底摄影出血的分类
abstract: Diabetic retinopathy is an eye-related pathology creating abnormalities and causing visual impairment, proper treatment of which requires identifying irregularities. This research uses a hemorrhage detection method and compares classification of conventional and deep features. Especially, method identifies hemorrhage connected with blood vessels or reside at retinal border and reported challenging. Initially, adaptive brightness adjustment and contrast enhancement rectify degraded images. Prospective locations of hemorrhages are estimated by a Gaussian matched filter, entropy thresholding, and morphological operation. Hemorrhages are segmented by a novel technique based on regional variance of intensities. Features are then extracted by conventional methods and deep models for training support vector machines, and results evaluated. Evaluation metrics for each model are promising, but findings suggest that comparatively, deep models are more effective than conventional features.
summary: Diabetic retinopathy is an eye-related pathology creating abnormalities and causing visual impairment, proper treatment of which requires identifying irregularities. This research uses a hemorrhage detection method and compares classification of conventional and deep features. Especially, method identifies hemorrhage connected with blood vessels or reside at retinal border and reported challenging. Initially, adaptive brightness adjustment and contrast enhancement rectify degraded images. Prospective locations of hemorrhages are estimated by a Gaussian matched filter, entropy thresholding, and morphological operation. Hemorrhages are segmented by a novel technique based on regional variance of intensities. Features are then extracted by conventional methods and deep models for training support vector machines, and results evaluated. Evaluation metrics for each model are promising, but findings suggest that comparatively, deep models are more effective than conventional features.
abstract_zh: 糖尿病视网膜病变是一种与眼睛相关的病变，会造成异常并导致视力障碍，正确治疗需要识别异常情况。本研究采用出血检测方法，并比较了常规特征和深层特征的分类。特别是，识别与血管有关或位于视网膜边缘的出血的方法据报告具有挑战性。最初，自适应亮度调整和对比度增强可纠正退化的图像。通过高斯匹配滤波器、熵阈值处理和形态学运算来估计出血的预期位置。通过基于区域强度差异的新技术对出血进行分割。然后通过传统方法和深度模型提取特征来训练支持向量机，并对结果进行评估。每个模型的评估指标都很有前景，但研究结果表明，相比之下，深度模型比传统特征更有效。

AI.tldr: 比较传统与深度特征模型在视网膜出血分类中的效果
AI.motivation: 糖尿病视网膜病变需准确检测出血以确保治疗，传统方法在复杂区域效果有限，需比较不同模型性能
AI.method: 采用亮度调整、对比度增强、高斯滤波、熵阈值和形态学操作定位出血，用区域方差分割，并提取传统和深度特征训练SVM
AI.result: 评估显示深度模型比传统特征在分类准确率上更优
AI.conclusion: 深度学习模型在视网膜出血分类中优于传统方法，可能提升临床诊断效率

authors_text: Qin Yang,Ramviyas Parasuraman
title: Game-theoretic Utility Tree for Multi-Robot Cooperative Pursuit Strategy
title_zh: 多机器人协作追踪策略的博弈论效用树
abstract: Underlying relationships among multiagent systems (MAS) in hazardous scenarios can be represented as game-theoretic models. In adversarial environments, the adversaries can be intentional or unintentional based on their needs and motivations. Agents will adopt suitable decision-making strategies to maximize their current needs and minimize their expected costs. This paper proposes and extends the new hierarchical network-based model, termed Game-theoretic Utility Tree (GUT), to arrive at a cooperative pursuit strategy to catch an evader in the Pursuit-Evasion game domain. We verify and demonstrate the performance of the proposed method using the Robotarium platform compared to the conventional constant bearing (CB) and pure pursuit (PP) strategies. The experiments demonstrated the effectiveness of the GUT, and the performances validated that the GUT could effectively organize cooperation strategies, helping the group with fewer advantages achieve higher performance.
summary: Underlying relationships among multiagent systems (MAS) in hazardous scenarios can be represented as game-theoretic models. In adversarial environments, the adversaries can be intentional or unintentional based on their needs and motivations. Agents will adopt suitable decision-making strategies to maximize their current needs and minimize their expected costs. This paper proposes and extends the new hierarchical network-based model, termed Game-theoretic Utility Tree (GUT), to arrive at a cooperative pursuit strategy to catch an evader in the Pursuit-Evasion game domain. We verify and demonstrate the performance of the proposed method using the Robotarium platform compared to the conventional constant bearing (CB) and pure pursuit (PP) strategies. The experiments demonstrated the effectiveness of the GUT, and the performances validated that the GUT could effectively organize cooperation strategies, helping the group with fewer advantages achieve higher performance.
abstract_zh: 危险场景中多智能体系统 (MAS) 之间的潜在关系可以表示为博弈论模型。在对抗性环境中，对手可能会根据自己的需求和动机有意或无意。代理商将采取合适的决策策略来最大化当前需求并最小化预期成本。本文提出并扩展了新的基于分层网络的模型，称为博弈论效用树（GUT），以达成一种合作追击策略，以在追击-逃避博弈领域中捕获逃避者。与传统的恒定方位（CB）和纯追踪（PP）策略相比，我们使用 Robotarium 平台验证并展示了所提出方法的性能。实验证明了GUT的有效性，性能验证了GUT可以有效组织合作策略，帮助优势较少的群体获得更高的绩效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于博弈论的效用树模型（GUT），用于多机器人协作追捕策略，以在对抗环境中提升协作效率。
AI.motivation: 传统追捕策略（如CB、PP）在对抗性环境中难以有效组织协作，需通过博弈论模型优化多机器人决策以应对有意或无意的对手。
AI.method: 构建分层网络模型GUT，通过博弈论分析代理决策，生成协作追捕策略，并在Robotarium平台进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明GUT能有效组织协作策略，使资源较少的机器人团队在追捕任务中表现优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: GUT模型验证了博弈论在多机器人协作中的有效性，为对抗环境下的群体决策提供了新方法。

authors_text: Diane Oyen,Michal Kucer,Nick Hengartner,Har Simrat Singh
title: Robustness to Label Noise Depends on the Shape of the Noise Distribution in Feature Space
title_zh: 标记噪声的鲁棒性取决于特征空间中噪声分布的形状
abstract: Machine learning classifiers have been demonstrated, both empirically and theoretically, to be robust to label noise under certain conditions -- notably the typical assumption is that label noise is independent of the features given the class label. We provide a theoretical framework that generalizes beyond this typical assumption by modeling label noise as a distribution over feature space. We show that both the scale and the shape of the noise distribution influence the posterior likelihood; and the shape of the noise distribution has a stronger impact on classification performance if the noise is concentrated in feature space where the decision boundary can be moved. For the special case of uniform label noise (independent of features and the class label), we show that the Bayes optimal classifier for $c$ classes is robust to label noise until the ratio of noisy samples goes above $\frac{c-1}{c}$ (e.g. 90% for 10 classes), which we call the tipping point. However, for the special case of class-dependent label noise (independent of features given the class label), the tipping point can be as low as 50%. Most importantly, we show that when the noise distribution targets decision boundaries (label noise is directly dependent on feature space), classification robustness can drop off even at a small scale of noise. Even when evaluating recent label-noise mitigation methods we see reduced accuracy when label noise is dependent on features. These findings explain why machine learning often handles label noise well if the noise distribution is uniform in feature-space; yet it also points to the difficulty of overcoming label noise when it is concentrated in a region of feature space where a decision boundary can move.
summary: Machine learning classifiers have been demonstrated, both empirically and theoretically, to be robust to label noise under certain conditions -- notably the typical assumption is that label noise is independent of the features given the class label. We provide a theoretical framework that generalizes beyond this typical assumption by modeling label noise as a distribution over feature space. We show that both the scale and the shape of the noise distribution influence the posterior likelihood; and the shape of the noise distribution has a stronger impact on classification performance if the noise is concentrated in feature space where the decision boundary can be moved. For the special case of uniform label noise (independent of features and the class label), we show that the Bayes optimal classifier for $c$ classes is robust to label noise until the ratio of noisy samples goes above $\frac{c-1}{c}$ (e.g. 90% for 10 classes), which we call the tipping point. However, for the special case of class-dependent label noise (independent of features given the class label), the tipping point can be as low as 50%. Most importantly, we show that when the noise distribution targets decision boundaries (label noise is directly dependent on feature space), classification robustness can drop off even at a small scale of noise. Even when evaluating recent label-noise mitigation methods we see reduced accuracy when label noise is dependent on features. These findings explain why machine learning often handles label noise well if the noise distribution is uniform in feature-space; yet it also points to the difficulty of overcoming label noise when it is concentrated in a region of feature space where a decision boundary can move.
abstract_zh: 机器学习分类器已被证明，在经验和理论上，在某些条件下对标签噪声具有鲁棒性——值得注意的是，典型的假设是标签噪声独立于给定类标签的特征。我们提供了一个理论框架，通过将标签噪声建模为特征空间上的分布，该框架超越了这一典型假设。我们证明噪声分布的规模和形状都会影响后验似然；如果噪声集中在决策边界可以移动的特征空间中，则噪声分布的形状对分类性能的影响更大。对于统一标签噪声的特殊情况（独立于特征和类标签），我们表明 $c$ 类的贝叶斯最优分类器对于标签噪声具有鲁棒性，直到噪声样本的比例高于 $\frac{c-1}{c}$ （例如 10 个类为 90%），我们将其称为临界点。然而，对于类相关标签噪声的特殊情况（与给定类标签的特征无关），临界点可以低至 50%。最重要的是，我们表明，当噪声分布针对决策边界时（标签噪声直接依赖于特征空间），即使噪声规模很小，分类鲁棒性也会下降。即使在评估最近的标签噪声缓解方法时，我们也会发现当标签噪声依赖于特征时，准确性会降低。这些发现解释了为什么如果噪声分布在特征空间中是均匀的，机器学习通常可以很好地处理标签噪声。然而，它也指出了当标签噪声集中在决策边界可以移动的特征空间区域时克服标签噪声的困难。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了标签噪声的鲁棒性如何依赖于特征空间中噪声分布的形状，突破了传统假设。
AI.motivation: 传统理论假设标签噪声与特征独立，但实际噪声分布可能影响分类性能，需更全面的分析框架。
AI.method: 将标签噪声建模为特征空间分布，分析噪声尺度与形状对后验概率的影响，并通过理论推导与实验验证不同噪声场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 均匀噪声鲁棒性阈值较高（如10类达90%），类别相关噪声阈值低至50%，而针对决策边界的噪声即使少量也会显著降低准确率。
AI.conclusion: 模型对均匀噪声鲁棒，但难以应对集中于决策边界的噪声，揭示了现有去噪方法在特征相关噪声下的局限性。

search_text: Robustness to Label Noise Depends on the Shape of the Noise Distribution in Feature Space 标记噪声的鲁棒性取决于特征空间中噪声分布的形状 Machine learning classifiers have been demonstrated, both empirically and theoretically, to be robust to label noise under certain conditions -- notably the typical assumption is that label noise is independent of the features given the class label. We provide a theoretical framework that generalizes beyond this typical assumption by modeling label noise as a distribution over feature space. We show that both the scale and the shape of the noise distribution influence the posterior likelihood; and the shape of the noise distribution has a stronger impact on classification performance if the noise is concentrated in feature space where the decision boundary can be moved. For the special case of uniform label noise (independent of features and the class label), we show that the Bayes optimal classifier for $c$ classes is robust to label noise until the ratio of noisy samples goes above $\frac{c-1}{c}$ (e.g. 90% for 10 classes), which we call the tipping point. However, for the special case of class-dependent label noise (independent of features given the class label), the tipping point can be as low as 50%. Most importantly, we show that when the noise distribution targets decision boundaries (label noise is directly dependent on feature space), classification robustness can drop off even at a small scale of noise. Even when evaluating recent label-noise mitigation methods we see reduced accuracy when label noise is dependent on features. These findings explain why machine learning often handles label noise well if the noise distribution is uniform in feature-space; yet it also points to the difficulty of overcoming label noise when it is concentrated in a region of feature space where a decision boundary can move. 机器学习分类器已被证明，在经验和理论上，在某些条件下对标签噪声具有鲁棒性——值得注意的是，典型的假设是标签噪声独立于给定类标签的特征。我们提供了一个理论框架，通过将标签噪声建模为特征空间上的分布，该框架超越了这一典型假设。我们证明噪声分布的规模和形状都会影响后验似然；如果噪声集中在决策边界可以移动的特征空间中，则噪声分布的形状对分类性能的影响更大。对于统一标签噪声的特殊情况（独立于特征和类标签），我们表明 $c$ 类的贝叶斯最优分类器对于标签噪声具有鲁棒性，直到噪声样本的比例高于 $\frac{c-1}{c}$ （例如 10 个类为 90%），我们将其称为临界点。然而，对于类相关标签噪声的特殊情况（与给定类标签的特征无关），临界点可以低至 50%。最重要的是，我们表明，当噪声分布针对决策边界时（标签噪声直接依赖于特征空间），即使噪声规模很小，分类鲁棒性也会下降。即使在评估最近的标签噪声缓解方法时，我们也会发现当标签噪声依赖于特征时，准确性会降低。这些发现解释了为什么如果噪声分布在特征空间中是均匀的，机器学习通常可以很好地处理标签噪声。然而，它也指出了当标签噪声集中在决策边界可以移动的特征空间区域时克服标签噪声的困难。 该论文研究了标签噪声的鲁棒性如何依赖于特征空间中噪声分布的形状，突破了传统假设。 Diane Oyen,Michal Kucer,Nick Hengartner,Har Simrat Singh cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Francesco Foscarin,Emmanouil Karystinaios,Silvan David Peter,Carlos Cancino-Chacón,Maarten Grachten,Gerhard Widmer
title: The match file format: Encoding Alignments between Scores and Performances
title_zh: 比赛文件格式：分数和表现之间的编码对齐
comment: ef:Proceedings of the Music Encoding Conference (MEC), 2022, Halifax, Canada
comments: ef:Proceedings of the Music Encoding Conference (MEC), 2022, Halifax, Canada
abstract: This paper presents the specifications of match: a file format that extends a MIDI human performance with note-, beat-, and downbeat-level alignments to a corresponding musical score. This enables advanced analyses of the performance that are relevant for various tasks, such as expressive performance modeling, score following, music transcription, and performer classification. The match file includes a set of score-related descriptors that makes it usable also as a bare-bones score representation. For applications that require the use of structural score elements (e.g., voices, parts, beams, slurs), the match file can be easily combined with the symbolic score. To support the practical application of our work, we release a corrected and upgraded version of the Vienna4x22 dataset of scores and performances aligned with match files.
summary: This paper presents the specifications of match: a file format that extends a MIDI human performance with note-, beat-, and downbeat-level alignments to a corresponding musical score. This enables advanced analyses of the performance that are relevant for various tasks, such as expressive performance modeling, score following, music transcription, and performer classification. The match file includes a set of score-related descriptors that makes it usable also as a bare-bones score representation. For applications that require the use of structural score elements (e.g., voices, parts, beams, slurs), the match file can be easily combined with the symbolic score. To support the practical application of our work, we release a corrected and upgraded version of the Vienna4x22 dataset of scores and performances aligned with match files.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了匹配的规范：一种文件格式，它通过音符、节拍和强拍级别的对齐来扩展 MIDI 人类演奏到相应的乐谱。这使得能够对与各种任务相关的表演进行高级分析，例如表达表演建模、乐谱跟踪、音乐转录和表演者分类。匹配文件包含一组与分数相关的描述符，使其也可用作基本分数表示形式。对于需要使用结构乐谱元素（例如，声音、声部、连线、连线）的应用程序，可以轻松地将匹配文件与符号乐谱结合起来。为了支持我们工作的实际应用，我们发布了 Vienna4x22 数据集的修正和升级版本，其中包含与比赛文件一致的分数和表现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为match的文件格式，用于在MIDI表演数据中添加音符、节拍和强拍级别的乐谱对齐信息，以支持更精确的音乐分析任务。
AI.motivation: 现有格式难以满足对表演与乐谱进行细粒度对齐的需求，而这种对齐对于表现力建模、乐谱跟随等任务至关重要。
AI.method: 设计包含乐谱描述符的match文件格式，并将其与符号乐谱结合；同时发布修正后的Vienna4x22数据集以验证格式实用性。
AI.result: 成功开发了match文件格式并发布了改进数据集，为表演分析和乐谱处理提供了标准化的对齐方案。
AI.conclusion: match格式有效支持了多种音乐分析任务，其配套数据集为后续研究提供了可靠基础，未来可进一步扩展格式功能。

authors_text: Ali Maleky,Shayan Kousha,Michael S. Brown,Marcus A. Brubaker
title: Noise2NoiseFlow: Realistic Camera Noise Modeling without Clean Images
title_zh: Noise2Noise Flow：没有清晰图像的真实相机噪声建模
comment: CVPR 2022
comments: CVPR 2022
abstract: Image noise modeling is a long-standing problem with many applications in computer vision. Early attempts that propose simple models, such as signal-independent additive white Gaussian noise or the heteroscedastic Gaussian noise model (a.k.a., camera noise level function) are not sufficient to learn the complex behavior of the camera sensor noise. Recently, more complex learning-based models have been proposed that yield better results in noise synthesis and downstream tasks, such as denoising. However, their dependence on supervised data (i.e., paired clean images) is a limiting factor given the challenges in producing ground-truth images. This paper proposes a framework for training a noise model and a denoiser simultaneously while relying only on pairs of noisy images rather than noisy/clean paired image data. We apply this framework to the training of the Noise Flow architecture. The noise synthesis and density estimation results show that our framework outperforms previous signal-processing-based noise models and is on par with its supervised counterpart. The trained denoiser is also shown to significantly improve upon both supervised and weakly supervised baseline denoising approaches. The results indicate that the joint training of a denoiser and a noise model yields significant improvements in the denoiser.
summary: Image noise modeling is a long-standing problem with many applications in computer vision. Early attempts that propose simple models, such as signal-independent additive white Gaussian noise or the heteroscedastic Gaussian noise model (a.k.a., camera noise level function) are not sufficient to learn the complex behavior of the camera sensor noise. Recently, more complex learning-based models have been proposed that yield better results in noise synthesis and downstream tasks, such as denoising. However, their dependence on supervised data (i.e., paired clean images) is a limiting factor given the challenges in producing ground-truth images. This paper proposes a framework for training a noise model and a denoiser simultaneously while relying only on pairs of noisy images rather than noisy/clean paired image data. We apply this framework to the training of the Noise Flow architecture. The noise synthesis and density estimation results show that our framework outperforms previous signal-processing-based noise models and is on par with its supervised counterpart. The trained denoiser is also shown to significantly improve upon both supervised and weakly supervised baseline denoising approaches. The results indicate that the joint training of a denoiser and a noise model yields significant improvements in the denoiser.
abstract_zh: 图像噪声建模是计算机视觉许多应用中长期存在的问题。提出简单模型的早期尝试，例如信号无关的加性高斯白噪声或异方差高斯噪声模型（又名相机噪声水平函数）不足以了解相机传感器噪声的复杂行为。最近，人们提出了更复杂的基于学习的模型，可以在噪声合成和去噪等下游任务中产生更好的结果。然而，考虑到生成真实图像的挑战，它们对监督数据（即配对的干净图像）的依赖是一个限制因素。本文提出了一种同时训练噪声模型和降噪器的框架，同时仅依赖于噪声图像对而不是噪声/干净的成对图像数据。我们将该框架应用于噪声流架构的训练。噪声合成和密度估计结果表明，我们的框架优于以前基于信号处理的噪声模型，并且与其监督模型相当。经过训练的降噪器还显示出对监督和弱监督基线降噪方法的显着改进。结果表明，降噪器和噪声模型的联合训练对降噪器产生了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需干净图像即可同时训练噪声模型和去噪器的框架，并应用于Noise Flow架构以提升相机噪声建模与去噪效果。
AI.motivation: 传统噪声模型依赖难以获取的干净图像进行监督学习，而现有弱监督方法在噪声合成和去噪任务中表现不足。
AI.method: 通过仅使用噪声图像对（而非干净图像）联合训练噪声生成模型与去噪器，利用Noise Flow架构实现端到端优化。
AI.result: 噪声合成与密度估计优于传统信号处理模型，去噪效果达到监督方法水平，显著超越弱监督基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 联合训练噪声模型与去噪器可有效提升去噪性能，无需依赖干净图像即可实现高质量噪声建模。

result: 噪声合成与密度估计优于传统信号处理模型，去噪效果达到监督方法水平，显著超越弱监督基线方法。
conclusion: 联合训练噪声模型与去噪器可有效提升去噪性能，无需依赖干净图像即可实现高质量噪声建模。
search_text: Noise2NoiseFlow: Realistic Camera Noise Modeling without Clean Images Noise2Noise Flow：没有清晰图像的真实相机噪声建模 Image noise modeling is a long-standing problem with many applications in computer vision. Early attempts that propose simple models, such as signal-independent additive white Gaussian noise or the heteroscedastic Gaussian noise model (a.k.a., camera noise level function) are not sufficient to learn the complex behavior of the camera sensor noise. Recently, more complex learning-based models have been proposed that yield better results in noise synthesis and downstream tasks, such as denoising. However, their dependence on supervised data (i.e., paired clean images) is a limiting factor given the challenges in producing ground-truth images. This paper proposes a framework for training a noise model and a denoiser simultaneously while relying only on pairs of noisy images rather than noisy/clean paired image data. We apply this framework to the training of the Noise Flow architecture. The noise synthesis and density estimation results show that our framework outperforms previous signal-processing-based noise models and is on par with its supervised counterpart. The trained denoiser is also shown to significantly improve upon both supervised and weakly supervised baseline denoising approaches. The results indicate that the joint training of a denoiser and a noise model yields significant improvements in the denoiser. 图像噪声建模是计算机视觉许多应用中长期存在的问题。提出简单模型的早期尝试，例如信号无关的加性高斯白噪声或异方差高斯噪声模型（又名相机噪声水平函数）不足以了解相机传感器噪声的复杂行为。最近，人们提出了更复杂的基于学习的模型，可以在噪声合成和去噪等下游任务中产生更好的结果。然而，考虑到生成真实图像的挑战，它们对监督数据（即配对的干净图像）的依赖是一个限制因素。本文提出了一种同时训练噪声模型和降噪器的框架，同时仅依赖于噪声图像对而不是噪声/干净的成对图像数据。我们将该框架应用于噪声流架构的训练。噪声合成和密度估计结果表明，我们的框架优于以前基于信号处理的噪声模型，并且与其监督模型相当。经过训练的降噪器还显示出对监督和弱监督基线降噪方法的显着改进。结果表明，降噪器和噪声模型的联合训练对降噪器产生了显着的改进。 本文提出了一种无需干净图像即可同时训练噪声模型和去噪器的框架，并应用于Noise Flow架构以提升相机噪声建模与去噪效果。 Ali Maleky,Shayan Kousha,Michael S. Brown,Marcus A. Brubaker eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Wei Guo,Benedetta Tondi,Mauro Barni
title: A temporal chrominance trigger for clean-label backdoor attack against anti-spoof rebroadcast detection
title_zh: 针对反欺骗重播检测的清洁标签后门攻击的时间色度触发器
abstract: We propose a stealthy clean-label video backdoor attack against Deep Learning (DL)-based models aiming at detecting a particular class of spoofing attacks, namely video rebroadcast attacks. The injected backdoor does not affect spoofing detection in normal conditions, but induces a misclassification in the presence of a specific triggering signal. The proposed backdoor relies on a temporal trigger altering the average chrominance of the video sequence. The backdoor signal is designed by taking into account the peculiarities of the Human Visual System (HVS) to reduce the visibility of the trigger, thus increasing the stealthiness of the backdoor. To force the network to look at the presence of the trigger in the challenging clean-label scenario, we choose the poisoned samples used for the injection of the backdoor following a so-called Outlier Poisoning Strategy (OPS). According to OPS, the triggering signal is inserted in the training samples that the network finds more difficult to classify. The effectiveness of the proposed backdoor attack and its generality are validated experimentally on different datasets and anti-spoofing rebroadcast detection architectures.
summary: We propose a stealthy clean-label video backdoor attack against Deep Learning (DL)-based models aiming at detecting a particular class of spoofing attacks, namely video rebroadcast attacks. The injected backdoor does not affect spoofing detection in normal conditions, but induces a misclassification in the presence of a specific triggering signal. The proposed backdoor relies on a temporal trigger altering the average chrominance of the video sequence. The backdoor signal is designed by taking into account the peculiarities of the Human Visual System (HVS) to reduce the visibility of the trigger, thus increasing the stealthiness of the backdoor. To force the network to look at the presence of the trigger in the challenging clean-label scenario, we choose the poisoned samples used for the injection of the backdoor following a so-called Outlier Poisoning Strategy (OPS). According to OPS, the triggering signal is inserted in the training samples that the network finds more difficult to classify. The effectiveness of the proposed backdoor attack and its generality are validated experimentally on different datasets and anti-spoofing rebroadcast detection architectures.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种针对基于深度学习（DL）的模型的隐形清洁标签视频后门攻击，旨在检测特定类别的欺骗攻击，即视频转播攻击。注入的后门在正常情况下不会影响欺骗检测，但在存在特定触发信号的情况下会导致错误分类。所提出的后门依赖于改变视频序列的平均色度的时间触发器。后门信号的设计考虑了人类视觉系统（HVS）的特殊性，以降低触发的可见性，从而增加后门的隐秘性。为了迫使网络在具有挑战性的清洁标签场景中查看触发器的存在，我们按照所谓的异常值中毒策略（OPS）选择用于注入后门的中毒样本。根据OPS，触发信号被插入到网络发现更难以分类的训练样本中。所提出的后门攻击的有效性及其通用性在不同的数据集和反欺骗重播检测架构上进行了实验验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对反欺骗重播检测系统的隐蔽干净标签后门攻击方法，利用时间色度触发器实现特定条件下的误分类。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的反欺骗重播检测系统存在安全漏洞，需研究隐蔽性更强的攻击手段以揭示其潜在风险。
AI.method: 设计基于时间色度变化的不可见触发器，结合人眼视觉特性降低可见性，并采用异常中毒策略选择难分类样本注入后门。
AI.result: 实验验证该攻击在多个数据集和检测架构上均能有效诱导误分类，且保持高隐蔽性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了反欺骗重播检测系统对隐蔽后门攻击的脆弱性，需加强鲁棒性设计以应对此类威胁。

authors_text: Donghui Li,Jia Liu,Fang Liu,Wenhua Zhang,Andi Zhang,Wenfei Gao,Jiao Shi
title: A Dual-fusion Semantic Segmentation Framework With GAN For SAR Images
title_zh: 用于 SAR 图像的 GAN 双融合语义分割框架
comment: 4 pages,4 figures, 2022 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium
comments: 4 pages,4 figures, 2022 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium
abstract: Deep learning based semantic segmentation is one of the popular methods in remote sensing image segmentation. In this paper, a network based on the widely used encoderdecoder architecture is proposed to accomplish the synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images segmentation. With the better representation capability of optical images, we propose to enrich SAR images with generated optical images via the generative adversative network (GAN) trained by numerous SAR and optical images. These optical images can be used as expansions of original SAR images, thus ensuring robust result of segmentation. Then the optical images generated by the GAN are stitched together with the corresponding real images. An attention module following the stitched data is used to strengthen the representation of the objects. Experiments indicate that our method is efficient compared to other commonly used methods
summary: Deep learning based semantic segmentation is one of the popular methods in remote sensing image segmentation. In this paper, a network based on the widely used encoderdecoder architecture is proposed to accomplish the synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images segmentation. With the better representation capability of optical images, we propose to enrich SAR images with generated optical images via the generative adversative network (GAN) trained by numerous SAR and optical images. These optical images can be used as expansions of original SAR images, thus ensuring robust result of segmentation. Then the optical images generated by the GAN are stitched together with the corresponding real images. An attention module following the stitched data is used to strengthen the representation of the objects. Experiments indicate that our method is efficient compared to other commonly used methods
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的语义分割是遥感图像分割中流行的方法之一。本文提出了一种基于广泛使用的编码器解码器架构的网络来完成合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像分割。由于光学图像具有更好的表示能力，我们建议通过由大量 SAR 和光学图像训练的生成对抗网络（GAN），用生成的光学图像来丰富 SAR 图像。这些光学图像可以用作原始SAR图像的扩展，从而确保分割结果的鲁棒性。然后将 GAN 生成的光学图像与相应的真实图像拼接在一起。缝合数据后面的注意模块用于加强对象的表示。实验表明，与其他常用方法相比，我们的方法是有效的

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合GAN的双融合语义分割框架，用于提升合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像的分割效果。
AI.motivation: SAR图像因缺乏纹理信息导致语义分割效果不佳，而光学图像具有更丰富的表征能力，需通过生成光学图像补充SAR数据以提高分割鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于编码器-解码器架构，利用GAN生成光学图像并与真实图像拼接，通过注意力模块增强关键区域表征。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在SAR图像分割任务中相比传统方法效率更高，分割结果更准确稳定。
AI.conclusion: 融合生成图像与注意力机制的双通道框架有效解决了SAR图像分割中的表征不足问题，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Yifei Wang,Qichao Ying,Zhenxing Qian,Sheng Li,Xinpeng Zhang
title: A DTCWT-SVD Based Video Watermarking resistant to frame rate conversion
title_zh: 基于DTCWT-SVD的抗帧率转换视频水印
abstract: Videos can be easily tampered, copied and redistributed by attackers for illegal and monetary usage. Such behaviors severely jeopardize the interest of content owners. Despite huge efforts made in digital video watermarking for copyright protection, typical distortions in video transmission including signal attacks, geometric attacks and temporal synchronization attacks can still easily erase the embedded signal. Among them, temporal synchronization attacks which include frame dropping, frame insertion and frame rate conversion is one of the most prevalent attacks. To address this issue, we present a new video watermarking based on joint Dual-Tree Cosine Wavelet Transformation (DTCWT) and Singular Value Decomposition (SVD), which is resistant to frame rate conversion. We first extract a set of candidate coefficient by applying SVD decomposition after DTCWT transform. Then, we simulate the watermark embedding by adjusting the shape of candidate coefficient. Finally, we perform group-level watermarking that includes moderate temporal redundancy to resist temporal desynchronization attacks. Extensive experimental results show that the proposed scheme is more resilient to temporal desynchronization attacks and performs better than the existing blind video watermarking schemes.
summary: Videos can be easily tampered, copied and redistributed by attackers for illegal and monetary usage. Such behaviors severely jeopardize the interest of content owners. Despite huge efforts made in digital video watermarking for copyright protection, typical distortions in video transmission including signal attacks, geometric attacks and temporal synchronization attacks can still easily erase the embedded signal. Among them, temporal synchronization attacks which include frame dropping, frame insertion and frame rate conversion is one of the most prevalent attacks. To address this issue, we present a new video watermarking based on joint Dual-Tree Cosine Wavelet Transformation (DTCWT) and Singular Value Decomposition (SVD), which is resistant to frame rate conversion. We first extract a set of candidate coefficient by applying SVD decomposition after DTCWT transform. Then, we simulate the watermark embedding by adjusting the shape of candidate coefficient. Finally, we perform group-level watermarking that includes moderate temporal redundancy to resist temporal desynchronization attacks. Extensive experimental results show that the proposed scheme is more resilient to temporal desynchronization attacks and performs better than the existing blind video watermarking schemes.
abstract_zh: 视频很容易被攻击者篡改、复制和重新分发，用于非法用途和金钱用途。此类行为严重损害了内容所有者的利益。尽管数字视频水印在版权保护方面做出了巨大努力，但视频传输中的典型失真，包括信号攻击、几何攻击和时间同步攻击，仍然可以轻松擦除嵌入的信号。其中，时间同步攻击（包括帧丢失、帧插入和帧速率转换）是最常见的攻击之一。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于联合双树余弦小波变换（DTCWT）和奇异值分解（SVD）的新视频水印，它可以抵抗帧速率转换。我们首先在 DTCWT 变换后应用 SVD 分解来提取一组候选系数。然后，我们通过调整候选系数的形状来模拟水印嵌入。最后，我们执行组级水印，其中包括适度的时间冗余以抵抗时间去同步攻击。大量的实验结果表明，所提出的方案对时间去同步攻击更具弹性，并且比现有的盲视频水印方案表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双树余弦小波变换（DTCWT）和奇异值分解（SVD）的视频水印算法，以抵抗帧率转换等时间同步攻击。
AI.motivation: 视频内容易受攻击者篡改和非法传播，现有数字水印技术难以有效抵御包括帧率转换在内的时序同步攻击，亟需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过DTCWT提取子带系数后应用SVD分解，选择候选系数调整其形状嵌入水印，并引入组级水印机制与适度时间冗余以增强抗时序失同步能力。
AI.result: 实验表明该方案在抵抗时间同步攻击方面优于现有盲水印算法，且对帧率转换具有更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 融合DTCWT与SVD的水印方法能有效应对帧率转换等时序攻击，为视频版权保护提供了更可靠的技术途径。

search_text: A DTCWT-SVD Based Video Watermarking resistant to frame rate conversion 基于DTCWT-SVD的抗帧率转换视频水印 Videos can be easily tampered, copied and redistributed by attackers for illegal and monetary usage. Such behaviors severely jeopardize the interest of content owners. Despite huge efforts made in digital video watermarking for copyright protection, typical distortions in video transmission including signal attacks, geometric attacks and temporal synchronization attacks can still easily erase the embedded signal. Among them, temporal synchronization attacks which include frame dropping, frame insertion and frame rate conversion is one of the most prevalent attacks. To address this issue, we present a new video watermarking based on joint Dual-Tree Cosine Wavelet Transformation (DTCWT) and Singular Value Decomposition (SVD), which is resistant to frame rate conversion. We first extract a set of candidate coefficient by applying SVD decomposition after DTCWT transform. Then, we simulate the watermark embedding by adjusting the shape of candidate coefficient. Finally, we perform group-level watermarking that includes moderate temporal redundancy to resist temporal desynchronization attacks. Extensive experimental results show that the proposed scheme is more resilient to temporal desynchronization attacks and performs better than the existing blind video watermarking schemes. 视频很容易被攻击者篡改、复制和重新分发，用于非法用途和金钱用途。此类行为严重损害了内容所有者的利益。尽管数字视频水印在版权保护方面做出了巨大努力，但视频传输中的典型失真，包括信号攻击、几何攻击和时间同步攻击，仍然可以轻松擦除嵌入的信号。其中，时间同步攻击（包括帧丢失、帧插入和帧速率转换）是最常见的攻击之一。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于联合双树余弦小波变换（DTCWT）和奇异值分解（SVD）的新视频水印，它可以抵抗帧速率转换。我们首先在 DTCWT 变换后应用 SVD 分解来提取一组候选系数。然后，我们通过调整候选系数的形状来模拟水印嵌入。最后，我们执行组级水印，其中包括适度的时间冗余以抵抗时间去同步攻击。大量的实验结果表明，所提出的方案对时间去同步攻击更具弹性，并且比现有的盲视频水印方案表现更好。 本文提出一种基于双树余弦小波变换（DTCWT）和奇异值分解（SVD）的视频水印算法，以抵抗帧率转换等时间同步攻击。 Yifei Wang,Qichao Ying,Zhenxing Qian,Sheng Li,Xinpeng Zhang cs.MM,cs.CV

authors_text: Md. Alamin Talukder,Md. Manowarul Islam,Md Ashraf Uddin,Arnisha Akhter,Khondokar Fida Hasan,Mohammad Ali Moni
title: Machine Learning-based Lung and Colon Cancer Detection using Deep Feature Extraction and Ensemble Learning
title_zh: 使用深度特征提取和集成学习进行基于机器学习的肺癌和结肠癌检测
comment: Accepted for publication in the Special Issue of Expert Systems with Applications (IF:6.954, Cite:12.70) How to Cite: Md. Alamin Talukder, Md. Manowarul Islam, Md Ashraf Uddin, Arnisha Akhter, Khondokar Fida Hasan, Mohammad Ali Moni. "Machine Learning-based Lung and Colon Cancer Detection using Deep Feature Extraction and Ensemble Learning", Expert Systems with Applications. 2022 Jun 1
comments: Accepted for publication in the Special Issue of Expert Systems with Applications (IF:6.954, Cite:12.70) How to Cite: Md. Alamin Talukder, Md. Manowarul Islam, Md Ashraf Uddin, Arnisha Akhter, Khondokar Fida Hasan, Mohammad Ali Moni. "Machine Learning-based Lung and Colon Cancer Detection using Deep Feature Extraction and Ensemble Learning", Expert Systems with Applications. 2022 Jun 1
abstract: Cancer is a fatal disease caused by a combination of genetic diseases and a variety of biochemical abnormalities. Lung and colon cancer have emerged as two of the leading causes of death and disability in humans. The histopathological detection of such malignancies is usually the most important component in determining the best course of action. Early detection of the ailment on either front considerably decreases the likelihood of mortality. Machine learning and deep learning techniques can be utilized to speed up such cancer detection, allowing researchers to study a large number of patients in a much shorter amount of time and at a lower cost. In this research work, we introduced a hybrid ensemble feature extraction model to efficiently identify lung and colon cancer. It integrates deep feature extraction and ensemble learning with high-performance filtering for cancer image datasets. The model is evaluated on histopathological (LC25000) lung and colon datasets. According to the study findings, our hybrid model can detect lung, colon, and (lung and colon) cancer with accuracy rates of 99.05%, 100%, and 99.30%, respectively. The study's findings show that our proposed strategy outperforms existing models significantly. Thus, these models could be applicable in clinics to support the doctor in the diagnosis of cancers.

abstract_zh: 癌症是一种由遗传性疾病和多种生化异常共同引起的致命疾病。肺癌和结肠癌已成为人类死亡和残疾的两个主要原因。此类恶性肿瘤的组织病理学检测通常是确定最佳治疗方案的最重要组成部分。及早发现任一方面的疾病都可以大大降低死亡的可能性。机器学习和深度学习技术可用于加速此类癌症检测，使研究人员能够在更短的时间内以更低的成本研究大量患者。在这项研究工作中，我们引入了混合集成特征提取模型来有效识别肺癌和结肠癌。它将深度特征提取和集成学习与癌症图像数据集的高性能过滤集成在一起。该模型在组织病理学 (LC25000) 肺和结肠数据集上进行评估。根据研究结果，我们的混合模型可以检测肺癌、结肠癌和（肺癌和结肠）癌，准确率分别为 99.05%、100% 和 99.30%。研究结果表明，我们提出的策略显着优于现有模型。因此，这些模型可以应用于临床，以支持医生诊断癌症。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度特征提取与集成学习的混合模型，用于高效检测肺癌和结肠癌。
AI.motivation: 肺癌和结肠癌是主要致死病因，早期检测可显著降低死亡率。传统方法效率低，需借助机器学习提升检测准确率与效率。
AI.method: 构建混合集成特征提取模型，整合深度学习特征提取、集成学习算法及高性能图像过滤技术，基于LC25000组织病理学数据集进行训练与验证。
AI.result: 模型在肺癌、结肠癌及联合检测中的准确率分别为99.05%、100%和99.30%，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该模型可有效辅助临床诊断，为癌症早期筛查提供可靠技术支撑。

Lung and colon cancer have emerged as two of the leading causes of death and disability in humans. The histopathological detection of such malignancies is usually the most important component in determining the best course of action. Early detection of the ailment on either front considerably decreases the likelihood of mortality. Machine learning and deep learning techniques can be utilized to speed up such cancer detection, allowing researchers to study a large number of patients in a much shorter amount of time and at a lower cost. In this research work, we introduced a hybrid ensemble feature extraction model to efficiently identify lung and colon cancer. It integrates deep feature extraction and ensemble learning with high-performance filtering for cancer image datasets. The model is evaluated on histopathological (LC25000) lung and colon datasets. According to the study findings, our hybrid model can detect lung, colon, and (lung and colon) cancer with accuracy rates of 99.05%, 100%, and 99.30%, respectively. The study's findings show that our proposed strategy outperforms existing models significantly. Thus, these models could be applicable in clinics to support the doctor in the diagnosis of cancers. 癌症是一种由遗传性疾病和多种生化异常共同引起的致命疾病。肺癌和结肠癌已成为人类死亡和残疾的两个主要原因。此类恶性肿瘤的组织病理学检测通常是确定最佳治疗方案的最重要组成部分。及早发现任一方面的疾病都可以大大降低死亡的可能性。机器学习和深度学习技术可用于加速此类癌症检测，使研究人员能够在更短的时间内以更低的成本研究大量患者。在这项研究工作中，我们引入了混合集成特征提取模型来有效识别肺癌和结肠癌。它将深度特征提取和集成学习与癌症图像数据集的高性能过滤集成在一起。该模型在组织病理学 (LC25000) 肺和结肠数据集上进行评估。根据研究结果，我们的混合模型可以检测肺癌、结肠癌和（肺癌和结肠）癌，准确率分别为 99.05%、100% 和 99.30%。研究结果表明，我们提出的策略显着优于现有模型。因此，这些模型可以应用于临床，以支持医生诊断癌症。 本文提出一种结合深度特征提取与集成学习的混合模型，用于高效检测肺癌和结肠癌。 Md. authors_text: Yaroslav Kivva,Ehsan Mokhtarian,Jalal Etesami,Negar Kiyavash
title: Revisiting the General Identifiability Problem
title_zh: 重新审视一般可识别性问题
comment: 22 pages, 4 figures, 2 Algorithms, UAI 2022
comments: 22 pages, 4 figures, 2 Algorithms, UAI 2022
abstract: We revisit the problem of general identifiability originally introduced in [Lee et al., 2019] for causal inference and note that it is necessary to add positivity assumption of observational distribution to the original definition of the problem. We show that without such an assumption the rules of do-calculus and consequently the proposed algorithm in [Lee et al., 2019] are not sound. Moreover, adding the assumption will cause the completeness proof in [Lee et al., 2019] to fail. Under positivity assumption, we present a new algorithm that is provably both sound and complete. A nice property of this new algorithm is that it establishes a connection between general identifiability and classical identifiability by Pearl [1995] through decomposing the general identifiability problem into a series of classical identifiability sub-problems.
summary: We revisit the problem of general identifiability originally introduced in [Lee et al., 2019] for causal inference and note that it is necessary to add positivity assumption of observational distribution to the original definition of the problem. We show that without such an assumption the rules of do-calculus and consequently the proposed algorithm in [Lee et al., 2019] are not sound. Moreover, adding the assumption will cause the completeness proof in [Lee et al., 2019] to fail. Under positivity assumption, we present a new algorithm that is provably both sound and complete. A nice property of this new algorithm is that it establishes a connection between general identifiability and classical identifiability by Pearl [1995] through decomposing the general identifiability problem into a series of classical identifiability sub-problems.
abstract_zh: 我们重新审视了[Lee et al., 2019]中最初为因果推理引入的一般可识别性问题，并指出有必要在问题的原始定义中添加观测分布的积极假设。我们证明，如果没有这样的假设，do-calculus 的规则以及 [Lee et al., 2019] 中提出的算法都是不健全的。此外，添加假设将导致[Lee et al., 2019]中的完整性证明失败。在积极性假设下，我们提出了一种新算法，该算法被证明是合理且完整的。这种新算法的一个很好的特性是，它通过将一般可识别性问题分解为一系列经典可识别性子问题，在 Pearl [1995] 中建立了一般可识别性和经典可识别性之间的联系。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视因果推断中的广义可识别性问题，提出需添加观察分布的正则性假设，并设计新的算法以解决原有方法的逻辑缺陷。
AI.motivation: 原有广义可识别性定义在无正则性假设时导致do-calculus规则失效，而添加该假设又破坏了完备性证明，需修正以确保算法正确性。
AI.method: 在正则性假设下提出新算法，通过将广义可识别性分解为多个经典可识别性子问题，建立两者间的联系。
AI.result: 新算法在正则性假设下被证明同时满足正确性与完备性，且实现了广义与经典可识别性框架的统一。
AI.conclusion: 修正后的框架解决了原有理论缺陷，为因果推断中的可识别性分析提供了更严谨的方法论基础。

ai_content.tldr: 本文重新审视因果推断中的广义可识别性问题，提出需添加观察分布的正则性假设，并设计新的算法以解决原有方法的逻辑缺陷。

search_text: Revisiting the General Identifiability Problem 重新审视一般可识别性问题 We revisit the problem of general identifiability originally introduced in [Lee et al., 2019] for causal inference and note that it is necessary to add positivity assumption of observational distribution to the original definition of the problem. We show that without such an assumption the rules of do-calculus and consequently the proposed algorithm in [Lee et al., 2019] are not sound. Moreover, adding the assumption will cause the completeness proof in [Lee et al., 2019] to fail. Under positivity assumption, we present a new algorithm that is provably both sound and complete. A nice property of this new algorithm is that it establishes a connection between general identifiability and classical identifiability by Pearl [1995] through decomposing the general identifiability problem into a series of classical identifiability sub-problems. 我们重新审视了[Lee et al., 2019]中最初为因果推理引入的一般可识别性问题，并指出有必要在问题的原始定义中添加观测分布的积极假设。我们证明，如果没有这样的假设，do-calculus 的规则以及 [Lee et al., 2019] 中提出的算法都是不健全的。此外，添加假设将导致[Lee et al., 2019]中的完整性证明失败。在积极性假设下，我们提出了一种新算法，该算法被证明是合理且完整的。这种新算法的一个很好的特性是，它通过将一般可识别性问题分解为一系列经典可识别性子问题，在 Pearl [1995] 中建立了一般可识别性和经典可识别性之间的联系。 本文重新审视因果推断中的广义可识别性问题，提出需添加观察分布的正则性假设，并设计新的算法以解决原有方法的逻辑缺陷。 Yaroslav Kivva,Ehsan Mokhtarian,Jalal Etesami,Negar Kiyavash cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Kevin Esslinger,Robert Platt,Christopher Amato
title: Deep Transformer Q-Networks for Partially Observable Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 用于部分可观察强化学习的深度 Transformer Q 网络
abstract: Real-world reinforcement learning tasks often involve some form of partial observability where the observations only give a partial or noisy view of the true state of the world. Such tasks typically require some form of memory, where the agent has access to multiple past observations, in order to perform well. One popular way to incorporate memory is by using a recurrent neural network to access the agent's history. However, recurrent neural networks in reinforcement learning are often fragile and difficult to train, susceptible to catastrophic forgetting and sometimes fail completely as a result. In this work, we propose Deep Transformer Q-Networks (DTQN), a novel architecture utilizing transformers and self-attention to encode an agent's history. DTQN is designed modularly, and we compare results against several modifications to our base model. Our experiments demonstrate the transformer can solve partially observable tasks faster and more stably than previous recurrent approaches.
summary: Real-world reinforcement learning tasks often involve some form of partial observability where the observations only give a partial or noisy view of the true state of the world. Such tasks typically require some form of memory, where the agent has access to multiple past observations, in order to perform well. One popular way to incorporate memory is by using a recurrent neural network to access the agent's history. However, recurrent neural networks in reinforcement learning are often fragile and difficult to train, susceptible to catastrophic forgetting and sometimes fail completely as a result. In this work, we propose Deep Transformer Q-Networks (DTQN), a novel architecture utilizing transformers and self-attention to encode an agent's history. DTQN is designed modularly, and we compare results against several modifications to our base model. Our experiments demonstrate the transformer can solve partially observable tasks faster and more stably than previous recurrent approaches.
abstract_zh: 现实世界的强化学习任务通常涉及某种形式的部分可观察性，其中观察仅给出世界真实状态的部分或嘈杂视图。此类任务通常需要某种形式的记忆，其中代理可以访问多个过去的观察结果，以便良好地执行。整合记忆的一种流行方法是使用循环神经网络来访问代理的历史记录。然而，强化学习中的循环神经网络通常很脆弱且难以训练，容易遭受灾难性遗忘，有时会因此完全失败。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Deep Transformer Q-Networks (DTQN)，这是一种利用 Transformer 和 self-attention 来编码代理历史的新颖架构。 DTQN 采用模块化设计，我们将结果与对基本模型的多次修改进行比较。我们的实验表明，与以前的循环方法相比，变压器可以更快、更稳定地解决部分可观察的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的深度Q网络（DTQN），用于解决部分可观测强化学习任务中的记忆需求问题。
AI.motivation: 传统循环神经网络在部分可观测任务中存在训练不稳定、灾难性遗忘等问题，需更有效的记忆机制来处理历史信息。
AI.method: 设计模块化的Deep Transformer Q-Networks架构，利用Transformer和自注意力机制编码代理历史，并对比多种模型变体。
AI.result: 实验表明，DTQN在部分可观测任务中相比传统循环方法收敛更快且稳定性更高。
AI.conclusion: Transformer架构能有效处理部分可观测强化学习中的历史信息，为该领域提供了更稳健的解决方案。

authors_text: Hsiang-Hsuan Liu,Jonathan Toole-Charignon
title: The Power of Amortized Recourse for Online Graph Problems
title_zh: 在线图问题的摊销追索权的威力
abstract: In this work, we study online graph problems with monotone-sum objectives. We propose a general two-fold greedy algorithm that references yardstick algorithms to achieve $t$-competitiveness while incurring at most $\frac{w_{\text{max}}\cdot(t+1)}{\min\{1, w_\text{min}\}\cdot(t-1)}$ amortized recourse, where $w_{\text{max}}$ and $w_{\text{min}}$ are the largest value and the smallest positive value that can be assigned to an element in the sum. We further show that the general algorithm can be improved for three classical graph problems by carefully choosing the referenced algorithm and tuning its detailed behavior. For Independent Set, we refine the analysis of our general algorithm and show that $t$-competitiveness can be achieved with $\frac{t}{t-1}$ amortized recourse. For Maximum Cardinality Matching, we limit our algorithm's greed to show that $t$-competitiveness can be achieved with $\frac{(2-t^*)}{(t^*-1)(3-t^*)}+\frac{t^*-1}{3-t^*}$ amortized recourse, where $t^*$ is the largest number such that $t^*= 1 +\frac{1}{j} \leq t$ for some integer $j$. For Vertex Cover, we show that our algorithm guarantees a competitive ratio strictly smaller than $2$ for any finite instance in polynomial time while incurring at most $3.33$ amortized recourse. We beat the almost unbreakable $2$-approximation in polynomial time by using the optimal solution as the reference without computing it. We remark that this online result can be used as an offline approximation result (without violating the unique games conjecture) to partially improve upon the constructive algorithm of Monien and Speckenmeyer.
summary: In this work, we study online graph problems with monotone-sum objectives. We propose a general two-fold greedy algorithm that references yardstick algorithms to achieve $t$-competitiveness while incurring at most $\frac{w_{\text{max}}\cdot(t+1)}{\min\{1, w_\text{min}\}\cdot(t-1)}$ amortized recourse, where $w_{\text{max}}$ and $w_{\text{min}}$ are the largest value and the smallest positive value that can be assigned to an element in the sum. We further show that the general algorithm can be improved for three classical graph problems by carefully choosing the referenced algorithm and tuning its detailed behavior. For Independent Set, we refine the analysis of our general algorithm and show that $t$-competitiveness can be achieved with $\frac{t}{t-1}$ amortized recourse. For Maximum Cardinality Matching, we limit our algorithm's greed to show that $t$-competitiveness can be achieved with $\frac{(2-t^*)}{(t^*-1)(3-t^*)}+\frac{t^*-1}{3-t^*}$ amortized recourse, where $t^*$ is the largest number such that $t^*= 1 +\frac{1}{j} \leq t$ for some integer $j$. For Vertex Cover, we show that our algorithm guarantees a competitive ratio strictly smaller than $2$ for any finite instance in polynomial time while incurring at most $3.33$ amortized recourse. We beat the almost unbreakable $2$-approximation in polynomial time by using the optimal solution as the reference without computing it. We remark that this online result can be used as an offline approximation result (without violating the unique games conjecture) to partially improve upon the constructive algorithm of Monien and Speckenmeyer.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究具有单调和目标的在线图问题。我们提出了一种通用的双重贪婪算法，该算法参考尺度算法来实现$t$-竞争力，同时最多产生$\frac{w_{\text{max}}\cdot(t+1)}{\min\{1, w_\text{min}\}\cdot(t-1)}$摊销追索权，其中$w_{\text{max}}$和$w_{\text{min}}$是最大值和最小正数可以分配给总和中的元素的值。我们进一步表明，通过仔细选择参考算法并调整其详细行为，可以针对三个经典图问题改进通用算法。对于独立集，我们改进了通用算法的分析，并表明可以通过 $\frac{t}{t-1}$ 摊销追索权来实现 $t$ 竞争力。对于最大基数匹配，我们限制算法的贪婪性，以表明 $t$ 竞争力可以通过 $\frac{(2-t^*)}{(t^*-1)(3-t^*)}+\frac{t^*-1}{3-t^*}$ 摊销追索权来实现，其中 $t^*$ 是最大数，使得 $t^*= 1 +\frac{1}{j} \leq t$ 对于某个整数$j$。对于顶点覆盖，我们表明我们的算法保证多项式时间内任何有限实例的竞争比严格小于 2 美元，同时最多产生 3.33 美元摊销追索权。通过使用最优解作为参考而不进行计算，我们在多项式时间内击败了几乎牢不可破的 2 美元近似值。我们指出，这个在线结果可以用作离线近似结果（不违反独特的博弈猜想），以部分改进 Monien 和 Speckenmeyer 的构造算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在线图问题的单调求和目标，提出一种两阶段贪心算法，通过参考基准算法实现竞争力与摊还回溯的平衡，并针对三个经典图问题进行优化。
AI.motivation: 在线图问题中，决策不可逆且需动态调整，传统算法难以兼顾竞争力与资源消耗。本文旨在设计高效算法，在保证性能的同时降低回溯成本。
AI.method: 提出通用两阶段贪心算法，结合基准算法实现t-竞争力，通过调整参数优化具体问题（如独立集、匹配、顶点覆盖）的回溯上界。
AI.result: 独立集实现t/(t-1)摊还回溯，匹配问题通过参数t*优化公式，顶点覆盖以3.33摊还回溯突破2-近似限制，并可转化为离线近似结果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过参考最优解提升在线算法性能，为在线与离线问题提供新思路，部分改进了构造性算法的局限性。

For Maximum Cardinality Matching, we limit our algorithm's greed to show that $t$-competitiveness can be achieved with $\frac{(2-t^*)}{(t^*-1)(3-t^*)}+\frac{t^*-1}{3-t^*}$ amortized recourse, where $t^*$ is the largest number such that $t^*= 1 +\frac{1}{j} \leq t$ for some integer $j$. For Vertex Cover, we show that our algorithm guarantees a competitive ratio strictly smaller than $2$ for any finite instance in polynomial time while incurring at most $3.33$ amortized recourse. We beat the almost unbreakable $2$-approximation in polynomial time by using the optimal solution as the reference without computing it. We remark that this online result can be used as an offline approximation result (without violating the unique games conjecture) to partially improve upon the constructive algorithm of Monien and Speckenmeyer. 在这项工作中，我们研究具有单调和目标的在线图问题。我们提出了一种通用的双重贪婪算法，该算法参考尺度算法来实现$t$-竞争力，同时最多产生$\frac{w_{\text{max}}\cdot(t+1)}{\min\{1, w_\text{min}\}\cdot(t-1)}$摊销追索权，其中$w_{\text{max}}$和$w_{\text{min}}$是最大值和最小正数可以分配给总和中的元素的值。我们进一步表明，通过仔细选择参考算法并调整其详细行为，可以针对三个经典图问题改进通用算法。对于独立集，我们改进了通用算法的分析，并表明可以通过 $\frac{t}{t-1}$ 摊销追索权来实现 $t$ 竞争力。对于最大基数匹配，我们限制算法的贪婪性，以表明 $t$ 竞争力可以通过 $\frac{(2-t^*)}{(t^*-1)(3-t^*)}+\frac{t^*-1}{3-t^*}$ 摊销追索权来实现，其中 $t^*$ 是最大数，使得 $t^*= 1 +\frac{1}{j} \leq t$ 对于某个整数$j$。对于顶点覆盖，我们表明我们的算法保证多项式时间内任何有限实例的竞争比严格小于 2 美元，同时最多产生 3.33 美元摊销追索权。通过使用最优解作为参考而不进行计算，我们在多项式时间内击败了几乎牢不可破的 2 美元近似值。我们指出，这个在线结果可以用作离线近似结果（不违反独特的博弈猜想），以部分改进 Monien 和 Speckenmeyer 的构造算法。 本文研究在线图问题的单调求和目标，提出一种两阶段贪心算法，通过参考基准算法实现竞争力与摊还回溯的平衡，并针对三个经典图问题进行优化。 Hsiang-Hsuan Liu,Jonathan Toole-Charignon cs.DS

authors_text: Carlos Cancino-Chacón,Silvan David Peter,Emmanouil Karystinaios,Francesco Foscarin,Maarten Grachten,Gerhard Widmer
title: Partitura: A Python Package for Symbolic Music Processing
title_zh: Partitura：用于符号音乐处理的 Python 包
comment: ef:Proceedings of the Music Encoding Conference (MEC), 2022, Halifax, Canada
comments: ef:Proceedings of the Music Encoding Conference (MEC), 2022, Halifax, Canada
abstract: Partitura is a lightweight Python package for handling symbolic musical information. It provides easy access to features commonly used in music information retrieval tasks, like note arrays (lists of timed pitched events) and 2D piano roll matrices, as well as other score elements such as time and key signatures, performance directives, and repeat structures. Partitura can load musical scores (in MEI, MusicXML, Kern, and MIDI formats), MIDI performances, and score-to-performance alignments. The package includes some tools for music analysis, such as automatic pitch spelling, key signature identification, and voice separation. Partitura is an open-source project and is available at https://github.com/CPJKU/partitura/.
summary: Partitura is a lightweight Python package for handling symbolic musical information. It provides easy access to features commonly used in music information retrieval tasks, like note arrays (lists of timed pitched events) and 2D piano roll matrices, as well as other score elements such as time and key signatures, performance directives, and repeat structures. Partitura can load musical scores (in MEI, MusicXML, Kern, and MIDI formats), MIDI performances, and score-to-performance alignments. The package includes some tools for music analysis, such as automatic pitch spelling, key signature identification, and voice separation. Partitura is an open-source project and is available at https://github.com/CPJKU/partitura/.
abstract_zh: Partitura 是一个轻量级的 Python 包，用于处理符号音乐信息。它可以轻松访问音乐信息检索任务中常用的功能，例如音符数组（定时音调事件列表）和 2D 钢琴卷帘矩阵，以及其他乐谱元素，例如时间和调号、演奏指令和重复结构。 Partitura 可以加载乐谱（MEI、MusicXML、Kern 和 MIDI 格式）、MIDI 演奏以及乐谱与演奏的对齐。该软件包包括一些用于音乐分析的工具，例如自动音高拼写、调号识别和语音分离。 Partitura 是一个开源项目，可从 https://github.com/CPJKU/partitura/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为Partitura的轻量级Python工具包，用于处理和分析符号音乐数据，支持多种音乐格式的加载与音乐信息检索任务。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐数据处理工具存在功能分散或复杂度高的问题，需一个统一、易用的工具来处理符号音乐信息并支持常见音乐分析任务。
AI.method: 开发支持MEI、MusicXML等格式的解析器，实现音符数组、钢琴卷帘矩阵等数据结构，并集成自动音高拼写、调号识别等分析工具。
AI.result: 成功构建了开源工具包，提供音乐数据加载、结构化表示及基础分析功能，适用于音乐信息检索与符号音乐处理场景。
AI.conclusion: Partitura为音乐研究和应用提供了高效、易用的符号音乐处理工具，可促进音乐数据分析任务的实现与创新。

authors_text: Birgit Pfitzmann,Christoph Auer,Michele Dolfi,Ahmed S Nassar,Peter W J Staar
title: DocLayNet: A Large Human-Annotated Dataset for Document-Layout Analysis
title_zh: DocLayNet：用于文档布局分析的大型人工注释数据集
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures, 5 tables. Accepted paper at SIGKDD 2022 conference
comments: 9 pages, 6 figures, 5 tables. Accepted paper at SIGKDD 2022 conference
abstract: Accurate document layout analysis is a key requirement for high-quality PDF document conversion. With the recent availability of public, large ground-truth datasets such as PubLayNet and DocBank, deep-learning models have proven to be very effective at layout detection and segmentation. While these datasets are of adequate size to train such models, they severely lack in layout variability since they are sourced from scientific article repositories such as PubMed and arXiv only. Consequently, the accuracy of the layout segmentation drops significantly when these models are applied on more challenging and diverse layouts. In this paper, we present \textit{DocLayNet}, a new, publicly available, document-layout annotation dataset in COCO format. It contains 80863 manually annotated pages from diverse data sources to represent a wide variability in layouts. For each PDF page, the layout annotations provide labelled bounding-boxes with a choice of 11 distinct classes. DocLayNet also provides a subset of double- and triple-annotated pages to determine the inter-annotator agreement. In multiple experiments, we provide baseline accuracy scores (in mAP) for a set of popular object detection models. We also demonstrate that these models fall approximately 10\% behind the inter-annotator agreement. Furthermore, we provide evidence that DocLayNet is of sufficient size. Lastly, we compare models trained on PubLayNet, DocBank and DocLayNet, showing that layout predictions of the DocLayNet-trained models are more robust and thus the preferred choice for general-purpose document-layout analysis.

With the recent availability of public, large ground-truth datasets such as PubLayNet and DocBank, deep-learning models have proven to be very effective at layout detection and segmentation. While these datasets are of adequate size to train such models, they severely lack in layout variability since they are sourced from scientific article repositories such as PubMed and arXiv only. Consequently, the accuracy of the layout segmentation drops significantly when these models are applied on more challenging and diverse layouts. In this paper, we present \textit{DocLayNet}, a new, publicly available, document-layout annotation dataset in COCO format. It contains 80863 manually annotated pages from diverse data sources to represent a wide variability in layouts. For each PDF page, the layout annotations provide labelled bounding-boxes with a choice of 11 distinct classes. DocLayNet also provides a subset of double- and triple-annotated pages to determine the inter-annotator agreement. In multiple experiments, we provide baseline accuracy scores (in mAP) for a set of popular object detection models. We also demonstrate that these models fall approximately 10\% behind the inter-annotator agreement. Furthermore, we provide evidence that DocLayNet is of sufficient size. Lastly, we compare models trained on PubLayNet, DocBank and DocLayNet, showing that layout predictions of the DocLayNet-trained models are more robust and thus the preferred choice for general-purpose document-layout analysis.
abstract_zh: 准确的文档布局分析是高质量 PDF 文档转换的关键要求。随着最近公开的大型真实数据集（例如 PubLayNet 和 DocBank）的出现，深度学习模型已被证明在布局检测和分割方面非常有效。虽然这些数据集的大小足以训练此类模型，但它们严重缺乏布局可变性，因为它们仅源自 PubMed 和 arXiv 等科学文章存储库。因此，当这些模型应用于更具挑战性和多样化的布局时，布局分割的准确性会显着下降。在本文中，我们提出了 \textit{DocLayNet}，一个新的、公开可用的 COCO 格式的文档布局注释数据集。它包含来自不同数据源的 80863 个手动注释页面，以表示布局的广泛变化。对于每个 PDF 页面，布局注释提供带有 11 个不同类别选择的标记边界框。 DocLayNet 还提供双注释页面和三注释页面的子集来确定注释者间的协议。在多个实验中，我们为一组流行的对象检测模型提供了基线准确度分数（以 mAP 为单位）。我们还证明这些模型比注释者间的一致性落后大约 10%。此外，我们提供证据表明 DocLayNet 具有足够的规模。最后，我们比较了在 PubLayNet、DocBank 和 DocLayNet 上训练的模型，表明 DocLayNet 训练的模型的布局预测更加稳健，因此是通用文档布局分析的首选。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DocLayNet，一个包含80863个手动标注页面的大型文档布局分析数据集，旨在解决现有数据集布局多样性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集（如PubLayNet和DocBank）因仅来源于科学论文库，导致布局多样性不足，模型在复杂布局上的分割准确性显著下降。
AI.method: 构建涵盖多源数据的DocLayNet数据集，包含11类布局标注及双/三重标注页面以评估标注一致性，并在多个目标检测模型上进行基线测试。
AI.result: 实验显示主流模型在DocLayNet上的mAP表现比标注者一致性低约10%，且DocLayNet训练的模型在鲁棒性上优于其他数据集训练的模型。
AI.conclusion: DocLayNet因布局多样性高且规模充足，成为通用文档布局分析的首选数据集。
