authors_text: Ziyan Chen,Jiazhen Liu,Changwen Cao,Changlong Jin,Hakil Kim
title: FV-UPatches: Enhancing Universality in Finger Vein Recognition
title_zh: FV-UPatches：增强指静脉识别的通用性
abstract: Many deep learning-based models have been introduced in finger vein recognition in recent years. These solutions, however, suffer from data dependency and are difficult to achieve model generalization. To address this problem, we are inspired by the idea of domain adaptation and propose a universal learning-based framework, which achieves generalization while training with limited data. To reduce differences between data distributions, a compressed U-Net is introduced as a domain mapper to map the raw region of interest image onto a target domain. The concentrated target domain is a unified feature space for the subsequent matching, in which a local descriptor model SOSNet is employed to embed patches into descriptors measuring the similarity of matching pairs. In the proposed framework, the domain mapper is an approximation to a specific extraction function thus the training is only a one-time effort with limited data. Moreover, the local descriptor model can be trained to be representative enough based on a public dataset of non-finger-vein images. The whole pipeline enables the framework to be well generalized, making it possible to enhance universality and helps to reduce costs of data collection, tuning and retraining. The comparable experimental results to state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in five public datasets prove the effectiveness of the proposed framework. Furthermore, the framework shows application potential in other vein-based biometric recognition as well.
summary: Many deep learning-based models have been introduced in finger vein recognition in recent years. These solutions, however, suffer from data dependency and are difficult to achieve model generalization. To address this problem, we are inspired by the idea of domain adaptation and propose a universal learning-based framework, which achieves generalization while training with limited data. To reduce differences between data distributions, a compressed U-Net is introduced as a domain mapper to map the raw region of interest image onto a target domain. The concentrated target domain is a unified feature space for the subsequent matching, in which a local descriptor model SOSNet is employed to embed patches into descriptors measuring the similarity of matching pairs. In the proposed framework, the domain mapper is an approximation to a specific extraction function thus the training is only a one-time effort with limited data. Moreover, the local descriptor model can be trained to be representative enough based on a public dataset of non-finger-vein images. The whole pipeline enables the framework to be well generalized, making it possible to enhance universality and helps to reduce costs of data collection, tuning and retraining. The comparable experimental results to state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in five public datasets prove the effectiveness of the proposed framework. Furthermore, the framework shows application potential in other vein-based biometric recognition as well.
abstract_zh: 近年来，许多基于深度学习的模型被引入指静脉识别领域。然而，这些解决方案存在数据依赖性，并且难以实现模型泛化。为了解决这个问题，我们受到领域适应思想的启发，提出了一种基于通用学习的框架，该框架在使用有限数据进行训练的同时实现了泛化。为了减少数据分布之间的差异，引入压缩的 U-Net 作为域映射器，将原始感兴趣区域图像映射到目标域。集中目标域是后续匹配的统一特征空间，其中采用局部描述符模型SOSNet将补丁嵌入到衡量匹配对相似度的描述符中。在所提出的框架中，域映射器是特定提取函数的近似，因此训练只是有限数据的一次性工作。此外，可以基于非指静脉图像的公共数据集来训练局部描述符模型以使其具有足够的代表性。整个管道使框架具有良好的通用性，从而可以增强通用性，并有助于降低数据收集、调优和再训练的成本。在五个公共数据集中与最先进（SOTA）性能相当的实验结果证明了所提出框架的有效性。此外，该框架还显示出在其他基于静脉的生物特征识别中的应用潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于领域自适应的通用学习框架FV-UPatches，旨在提升指纹静脉识别在有限数据下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型依赖特定数据集，难以实现跨域泛化，且数据采集和再训练成本高昂。
AI.method: 引入压缩U-Net作为领域映射器对齐数据分布，并设计局部描述子模型SOSNet在统一特征空间中进行匹配，通过公共非静脉图像数据集预训练提升模型表征能力。
AI.result: 在五个公开数据集上达到与最先进方法相当的性能，验证了框架有效性，并展现出在其他静脉生物特征识别中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过领域自适应和通用特征学习显著提升了指纹静脉识别的泛化能力，降低了数据依赖性和开发成本。

search_text: FV-UPatches: Enhancing Universality in Finger Vein Recognition FV-UPatches：增强指静脉识别的通用性 Many deep learning-based models have been introduced in finger vein recognition in recent years. These solutions, however, suffer from data dependency and are difficult to achieve model generalization. To address this problem, we are inspired by the idea of domain adaptation and propose a universal learning-based framework, which achieves generalization while training with limited data. To reduce differences between data distributions, a compressed U-Net is introduced as a domain mapper to map the raw region of interest image onto a target domain. The concentrated target domain is a unified feature space for the subsequent matching, in which a local descriptor model SOSNet is employed to embed patches into descriptors measuring the similarity of matching pairs. In the proposed framework, the domain mapper is an approximation to a specific extraction function thus the training is only a one-time effort with limited data. Moreover, the local descriptor model can be trained to be representative enough based on a public dataset of non-finger-vein images. The whole pipeline enables the framework to be well generalized, making it possible to enhance universality and helps to reduce costs of data collection, tuning and retraining. The comparable experimental results to state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in five public datasets prove the effectiveness of the proposed framework. authors_text: Bowen Xu,Quansheng Ren
title: Artificial Open World for Evaluating AGI: a Conceptual Design
title_zh: 用于评估 AGI 的人工开放世界：概念设计
abstract: How to evaluate Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) is a critical problem that is discussed and unsolved for a long period. In the research of narrow AI, this seems not a severe problem, since researchers in that field focus on some specific problems as well as one or some aspects of cognition, and the criteria for evaluation are explicitly defined. By contrast, an AGI agent should solve problems that are never-encountered by both agents and developers. However, once a developer tests and debugs the agent with a problem, the never-encountered problem becomes the encountered problem, as a result, the problem is solved by the developers to some extent, exploiting their experience, rather than the agents. This conflict, as we call the trap of developers' experience, leads to that this kind of problems is probably hard to become an acknowledged criterion. In this paper, we propose an evaluation method named Artificial Open World, aiming to jump out of the trap. The intuition is that most of the experience in the actual world should not be necessary to be applied to the artificial world, and the world should be open in some sense, such that developers are unable to perceive the world and solve problems by themselves before testing, though after that they are allowed to check all the data. The world is generated in a similar way as the actual world, and a general form of problems is proposed. A metric is proposed aiming to quantify the progress of research. This paper describes the conceptual design of the Artificial Open World, though the formalization and the implementation are left to the future.
summary: How to evaluate Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) is a critical problem that is discussed and unsolved for a long period. In the research of narrow AI, this seems not a severe problem, since researchers in that field focus on some specific problems as well as one or some aspects of cognition, and the criteria for evaluation are explicitly defined. By contrast, an AGI agent should solve problems that are never-encountered by both agents and developers. However, once a developer tests and debugs the agent with a problem, the never-encountered problem becomes the encountered problem, as a result, the problem is solved by the developers to some extent, exploiting their experience, rather than the agents. This conflict, as we call the trap of developers' experience, leads to that this kind of problems is probably hard to become an acknowledged criterion. In this paper, we propose an evaluation method named Artificial Open World, aiming to jump out of the trap. The intuition is that most of the experience in the actual world should not be necessary to be applied to the artificial world, and the world should be open in some sense, such that developers are unable to perceive the world and solve problems by themselves before testing, though after that they are allowed to check all the data. The world is generated in a similar way as the actual world, and a general form of problems is proposed. A metric is proposed aiming to quantify the progress of research. This paper describes the conceptual design of the Artificial Open World, though the formalization and the implementation are left to the future.
abstract_zh: 如何评价通用人工智能（AGI）是一个长期被讨论和解决的关键问题。在狭义人工智能的研究中，这似乎不是一个严重的问题，因为该领域的研究人员关注的是一些具体问题以及认知的一个或某些方面，并且评估标准是明确定义的。相比之下，AGI 代理应该解决代理和开发人员从未遇到过的问题。然而，一旦开发人员测试和调试有问题的代理，从未遇到过的问题就变成了遇到的问题，结果，问题在某种程度上是由开发人员利用他们的经验而不是代理来解决的。这种冲突，也就是我们所说的开发者经验陷阱，导致这类问题很可能很难成为公认的标准。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为“人工开放世界”的评估方法，旨在跳出陷阱。直觉是，现实世界中的大部分经验不应该应用到人工世界中，世界在某种意义上应该是开放的，这样开发人员在测试之前无法感知世界并自行解决问题，尽管测试之后他们可以检查所有数据。世界的生成方式与现实世界类似，并提出了问题的一般形式。提出了一个旨在量化研究进展的指标。本文描述了人工开放世界的概念设计，但形式化和实施留待未来。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'人工开放世界'的概念性方法，旨在解决评估人工通用智能（AGI）时开发者经验干扰的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统AGI评估面临开发者经验干预的困境，即开发者可能利用自身经验解决问题而非依赖智能体能力，导致评估标准难以客观化。
AI.method: 通过构建与现实世界相似但开发者无法预知的开放环境，设计通用问题框架并提出量化研究进展的指标，确保开发者仅能在测试后验证数据。
AI.result: 完成了人工开放世界的概念设计，包括世界生成方式、问题形式化表示及评估指标体系，但未进行形式化定义和实际实现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为AGI评估提供了新思路，通过隔离开发者经验影响，使评估更聚焦于智能体的真实能力，后续需推进形式化和工程实现。

authors_text: Fei Wu,Qingzhong Wang,Jian Bian,Haoyi Xiong,Ning Ding,Feixiang Lu,Jun Cheng,Dejing Dou
title: A Survey on Video Action Recognition in Sports: Datasets, Methods and Applications
title_zh: 体育视频动作识别综述：数据集、方法和应用
comment: 26 pages. The toolbox is available at https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleVideo
comments: 26 pages. The toolbox is available at https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleVideo
abstract: To understand human behaviors, action recognition based on videos is a common approach. Compared with image-based action recognition, videos provide much more information. Reducing the ambiguity of actions and in the last decade, many works focused on datasets, novel models and learning approaches have improved video action recognition to a higher level. However, there are challenges and unsolved problems, in particular in sports analytics where data collection and labeling are more sophisticated, requiring sport professionals to annotate data. In addition, the actions could be extremely fast and it becomes difficult to recognize them. Moreover, in team sports like football and basketball, one action could involve multiple players, and to correctly recognize them, we need to analyse all players, which is relatively complicated. In this paper, we present a survey on video action recognition for sports analytics. We introduce more than ten types of sports, including team sports, such as football, basketball, volleyball, hockey and individual sports, such as figure skating, gymnastics, table tennis, tennis, diving and badminton. Then we compare numerous existing frameworks for sports analysis to present status quo of video action recognition in both team sports and individual sports. Finally, we discuss the challenges and unsolved problems in this area and to facilitate sports analytics, we develop a toolbox using PaddlePaddle, which supports football, basketball, table tennis and figure skating action recognition.

In addition, the actions could be extremely fast and it becomes difficult to recognize them. In this paper, we present a survey on video action recognition for sports analytics. Then we compare numerous existing frameworks for sports analysis to present status quo of video action recognition in both team sports and individual sports. Finally, we discuss the challenges and unsolved problems in this area and to facilitate sports analytics, we develop a toolbox using PaddlePaddle, which supports football, basketball, table tennis and figure skating action recognition.
abstract_zh: 为了理解人类行为，基于视频的动作识别是一种常见的方法。与基于图像的动作识别相比，视频提供了更多的信息。减少动作的模糊性，在过去的十年中，许多专注于数据集、新颖模型和学习方法的工作将视频动作识别提高到了更高的水平。然而，仍然存在挑战和未解决的问题，特别是在体育分析中，数据收集和标签更加复杂，需要体育专业人士对数据进行注释。此外，这些动作可能非常快，并且很难识别它们。而且，在足球、篮球等团队运动中，一个动作可能涉及多名球员，要正确识别，需要对所有球员进行分析，相对复杂。在本文中，我们提出了一项针对体育分析的视频动作识别的调查。我们介绍十余种运动项目，包括足球、篮球、排球、曲棍球等团队运动和花样滑冰、体操、乒乓球、网球、跳水、羽毛球等个人运动。然后，我们比较了众多现有的运动分析框架，以介绍团队运动和个人运动中视频动作识别的现状。最后，我们讨论了该领域的挑战和未解决的问题，并为了促进运动分析，我们使用 PaddlePaddle 开发了一个工具箱，支持足球、篮球、乒乓球和花样滑冰动作识别。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了体育领域视频动作识别的研究现状，涵盖数据集、方法及应用，并开发了支持多种体育动作识别的工具箱。
AI.motivation: 体育分析中动作识别面临数据标注复杂、动作速度快及多人参与等挑战，需系统总结现有方法并提供实用工具以推动研究进展。
AI.method: 通过调研十余种体育项目，对比分析现有视频动作识别框架，并基于PaddlePaddle开发支持足球、篮球等运动的识别工具箱。
AI.result: 总结了团队与个人体育动作识别的技术现状，明确了研究难点，并提供了可直接应用的开源工具箱。
AI.conclusion: 尽管视频动作识别在体育领域取得进展，但动态场景复杂性、标注成本及实时性仍是待解决的关键问题。

search_text: A Survey on Video Action Recognition in Sports: Datasets, Methods and Applications 体育视频动作识别综述：数据集、方法和应用 To understand human behaviors, action recognition based on videos is a common approach. Compared with image-based action recognition, videos provide much more information. Reducing the ambiguity of actions and in the last decade, many works focused on datasets, novel models and learning approaches have improved video action recognition to a higher level. However, there are challenges and unsolved problems, in particular in sports analytics where data collection and labeling are more sophisticated, requiring sport professionals to annotate data. In addition, the actions could be extremely fast and it becomes difficult to recognize them. Moreover, in team sports like football and basketball, one action could involve multiple players, and to correctly recognize them, we need to analyse all players, which is relatively complicated. In this paper, we present a survey on video action recognition for sports analytics. We introduce more than ten types of sports, including team sports, such as football, basketball, volleyball, hockey and individual sports, such as figure skating, gymnastics, table tennis, tennis, diving and badminton. Then we compare numerous existing frameworks for sports analysis to present status quo of video action recognition in both team sports and individual sports. Finally, we discuss the challenges and unsolved problems in this area and to facilitate sports analytics, we develop a toolbox using PaddlePaddle, which supports football, basketball, table tennis and figure skating action recognition. 为了理解人类行为，基于视频的动作识别是一种常见的方法。与基于图像的动作识别相比，视频提供了更多的信息。减少动作的模糊性，在过去的十年中，许多专注于数据集、新颖模型和学习方法的工作将视频动作识别提高到了更高的水平。然而，仍然存在挑战和未解决的问题，特别是在体育分析中，数据收集和标签更加复杂，需要体育专业人士对数据进行注释。此外，这些动作可能非常快，并且很难识别它们。而且，在足球、篮球等团队运动中，一个动作可能涉及多名球员，要正确识别，需要对所有球员进行分析，相对复杂。在本文中，我们提出了一项针对体育分析的视频动作识别的调查。我们介绍十余种运动项目，包括足球、篮球、排球、曲棍球等团队运动和花样滑冰、体操、乒乓球、网球、跳水、羽毛球等个人运动。然后，我们比较了众多现有的运动分析框架，以介绍团队运动和个人运动中视频动作识别的现状。最后，我们讨论了该领域的挑战和未解决的问题，并为了促进运动分析，我们使用 PaddlePaddle 开发了一个工具箱，支持足球、篮球、乒乓球和花样滑冰动作识别。 本文综述了体育领域视频动作识别的研究现状，涵盖数据集、方法及应用，并开发了支持多种体育动作识别的工具箱。 Fei Wu,Qingzhong Wang,Jian Bian,Haoyi Xiong,Ning Ding,Feixiang Lu,Jun Cheng,Dejing Dou cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.MM

authors_text: Chengyin Hu,Yilong Wang,Kalibinuer Tiliwalidi,Wen Li
title: Adversarial Laser Spot: Robust and Covert Physical-World Attack to DNNs
title_zh: 对抗性激光点：对 DNN 的稳健且隐蔽的物理世界攻击
abstract: Most existing deep neural networks (DNNs) are easily disturbed by slight noise. However, there are few researches on physical attacks by deploying lighting equipment. The light-based physical attacks has excellent covertness, which brings great security risks to many vision-based applications (such as self-driving). Therefore, we propose a light-based physical attack, called adversarial laser spot (AdvLS), which optimizes the physical parameters of laser spots through genetic algorithm to perform physical attacks. It realizes robust and covert physical attack by using low-cost laser equipment. As far as we know, AdvLS is the first light-based physical attack that perform physical attacks in the daytime. A large number of experiments in the digital and physical environments show that AdvLS has excellent robustness and covertness. In addition, through in-depth analysis of the experimental data, we find that the adversarial perturbations generated by AdvLS have superior adversarial attack migration. The experimental results show that AdvLS impose serious interference to advanced DNNs, we call for the attention of the proposed AdvLS. The code of AdvLS is available at: https://github.com/ChengYinHu/AdvLS
summary: Most existing deep neural networks (DNNs) are easily disturbed by slight noise. However, there are few researches on physical attacks by deploying lighting equipment. The light-based physical attacks has excellent covertness, which brings great security risks to many vision-based applications (such as self-driving). Therefore, we propose a light-based physical attack, called adversarial laser spot (AdvLS), which optimizes the physical parameters of laser spots through genetic algorithm to perform physical attacks. It realizes robust and covert physical attack by using low-cost laser equipment. As far as we know, AdvLS is the first light-based physical attack that perform physical attacks in the daytime. A large number of experiments in the digital and physical environments show that AdvLS has excellent robustness and covertness. In addition, through in-depth analysis of the experimental data, we find that the adversarial perturbations generated by AdvLS have superior adversarial attack migration. The experimental results show that AdvLS impose serious interference to advanced DNNs, we call for the attention of the proposed AdvLS. The code of AdvLS is available at: https://github.com/ChengYinHu/AdvLS
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的深度神经网络（DNN）很容易受到轻微噪声的干扰。然而，针对部署照明设备进行物理攻击的研究却很少。基于光的物理攻击具有极好的隐蔽性，这给许多基于视觉的应用（例如自动驾驶）带来了巨大的安全风险。因此，我们提出了一种基于光的物理攻击，称为对抗性激光光斑（AdvLS），它通过遗传算法优化激光光斑的物理参数来执行物理攻击。它利用低成本的激光设备实现稳健、隐蔽的物理攻击。据我们所知，AdvLS是第一个在白天进行物理攻击的基于光的物理攻击。数字和物理环境中的大量实验表明，AdvLS具有优异的鲁棒性和隐蔽性。此外，通过对实验数据的深入分析，我们发现AdvLS产生的对抗性扰动具有优越的对抗性攻击迁移能力。实验结果表明AdvLS对先进的DNNs造成严重干扰，我们呼吁人们关注所提出的AdvLS。 AdvLS的代码可以在：https://github.com/ChengYinHu/AdvLS

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于激光的物理世界对抗攻击方法AdvLS，通过优化激光参数实现对深度神经网络的隐蔽且鲁棒的攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对利用照明设备实施物理攻击的探索，而基于光照的攻击具有高隐蔽性，可能对自动驾驶等视觉应用造成重大安全威胁。
AI.method: 采用遗传算法优化激光光斑的物理参数，利用低成本激光设备在白天实施物理攻击。
AI.result: 实验表明AdvLS在数字和物理环境中均具有优异的鲁棒性和隐蔽性，且对抗扰动具有迁移性，能严重干扰先进DNN。
AI.conclusion: AdvLS是首个白天工作的基于光照的物理攻击方法，其有效性凸显了物理世界对抗攻击的研究必要性。

Therefore, we propose a light-based physical attack, called adversarial laser spot (AdvLS), which optimizes the physical parameters of laser spots through genetic algorithm to perform physical attacks. It realizes robust and covert physical attack by using low-cost laser equipment. As far as we know, AdvLS is the first light-based physical attack that perform physical attacks in the daytime. authors_text: Lianli Gao,Pengpeng Zeng,Jingkuan Song,Yuan-Fang Li,Wu Liu,Tao Mei,Heng Tao Shen
title: Structured Two-stream Attention Network for Video Question Answering
title_zh: 用于视频问答的结构化双流注意力网络
abstract: To date, visual question answering (VQA) (i.e., image QA and video QA) is still a holy grail in vision and language understanding, especially for video QA. Compared with image QA that focuses primarily on understanding the associations between image region-level details and corresponding questions, video QA requires a model to jointly reason across both spatial and long-range temporal structures of a video as well as text to provide an accurate answer. In this paper, we specifically tackle the problem of video QA by proposing a Structured Two-stream Attention network, namely STA, to answer a free-form or open-ended natural language question about the content of a given video. First, we infer rich long-range temporal structures in videos using our structured segment component and encode text features. Then, our structured two-stream attention component simultaneously localizes important visual instance, reduces the influence of background video and focuses on the relevant text. Finally, the structured two-stream fusion component incorporates different segments of query and video aware context representation and infers the answers. Experiments on the large-scale video QA dataset \textit{TGIF-QA} show that our proposed method significantly surpasses the best counterpart (i.e., with one representation for the video input) by 13.0%, 13.5%, 11.0% and 0.3 for Action, Trans., TrameQA and Count tasks. It also outperforms the best competitor (i.e., with two representations) on the Action, Trans., TrameQA tasks by 4.1%, 4.7%, and 5.1%.
summary: To date, visual question answering (VQA) (i.e., image QA and video QA) is still a holy grail in vision and language understanding, especially for video QA. Compared with image QA that focuses primarily on understanding the associations between image region-level details and corresponding questions, video QA requires a model to jointly reason across both spatial and long-range temporal structures of a video as well as text to provide an accurate answer. In this paper, we specifically tackle the problem of video QA by proposing a Structured Two-stream Attention network, namely STA, to answer a free-form or open-ended natural language question about the content of a given video. First, we infer rich long-range temporal structures in videos using our structured segment component and encode text features. Then, our structured two-stream attention component simultaneously localizes important visual instance, reduces the influence of background video and focuses on the relevant text. Finally, the structured two-stream fusion component incorporates different segments of query and video aware context representation and infers the answers. Experiments on the large-scale video QA dataset \textit{TGIF-QA} show that our proposed method significantly surpasses the best counterpart (i.e., with one representation for the video input) by 13.0%, 13.5%, 11.0% and 0.3 for Action, Trans., TrameQA and Count tasks. It also outperforms the best competitor (i.e., with two representations) on the Action, Trans., TrameQA tasks by 4.1%, 4.7%, and 5.1%.
abstract_zh: 迄今为止，视觉问答（VQA）（即图像 QA 和视频 QA）仍然是视觉和语言理解领域的圣杯，尤其是视频 QA。与主要侧重于理解图像区域级细节和相应问题之间的关联的图像 QA 相比，视频 QA 需要一个模型来联合推理视频和文本的空间和远程时间结构，以提供准确的答案。在本文中，我们通过提出一种结构化双流注意力网络（即 STA）来专门解决视频 QA 问题，以回答有关给定视频内容的自由形式或开放式自然语言问题。首先，我们使用结构化片段组件推断视频中丰富的远程时间结构并对文本特征进行编码。然后，我们的结构化双流注意力组件同时定位重要的视觉实例，减少背景视频的影响并关注相关文本。最后，结构化的双流融合组件合并了不同的查询片段和视频感知上下文表示并推断答案。在大规模视频 QA 数据集 \textit{TGIF-QA} 上的实验表明，对于 Action、Trans.、TrameQA 和 Count 任务，我们提出的方法显着超过最佳对应方法（即，视频输入的一种表示）13.0%、13.5%、11.0% 和 0.3。它还在 Action、Trans.、TrameQA 任务上比最好的竞争对手（即有两个表示）高出 4.1%、4.7% 和 5.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结构化双流注意力网络（STA），用于解决视频问答任务，通过联合推理视频的时空结构和文本信息来回答开放性问题。
AI.motivation: 视频问答（Video QA）相较于图像问答更复杂，需同时处理视频的长期时序结构和空间信息，而现有方法难以有效融合多模态信息并捕捉长距离依赖关系。
AI.method: STA网络包含三个核心组件：1）结构化分段模块提取视频长期时序特征；2）双流注意力模块定位关键视觉内容并过滤背景干扰；3）双流融合模块整合视频与文本上下文表示生成答案。
AI.result: 在TGIF-QA数据集上，STA在Action、Trans、TrameQA和Count任务中分别超越单表示方法13.0%、13.5%、11.0%和0.3%，在双表示方法对比中提升4.1%、4.7%和5.1%。
AI.conclusion: 结构化双流注意力机制能有效建模视频的时空关联性，通过分段融合策略显著提升视频问答性能，为多模态联合推理提供新思路。

search_text: Structured Two-stream Attention Network for Video Question Answering 用于视频问答的结构化双流注意力网络 To date, visual question answering (VQA) (i.e., image QA and video QA) is still a holy grail in vision and language understanding, especially for video QA. Compared with image QA that focuses primarily on understanding the associations between image region-level details and corresponding questions, video QA requires a model to jointly reason across both spatial and long-range temporal structures of a video as well as text to provide an accurate answer. In this paper, we specifically tackle the problem of video QA by proposing a Structured Two-stream Attention network, namely STA, to answer a free-form or open-ended natural language question about the content of a given video. First, we infer rich long-range temporal structures in videos using our structured segment component and encode text features. Then, our structured two-stream attention component simultaneously localizes important visual instance, reduces the influence of background video and focuses on the relevant text. Finally, the structured two-stream fusion component incorporates different segments of query and video aware context representation and infers the answers. Experiments on the large-scale video QA dataset \textit{TGIF-QA} show that our proposed method significantly surpasses the best counterpart (i.e., with one representation for the video input) by 13.0%, 13.5%, 11.0% and 0.3 for Action, Trans., TrameQA and Count tasks. It also outperforms the best competitor (i.e., with two representations) on the Action, Trans., TrameQA tasks by 4.1%, 4.7%, and 5.1%. 迄今为止，视觉问答（VQA）（即图像 QA 和视频 QA）仍然是视觉和语言理解领域的圣杯，尤其是视频 QA。与主要侧重于理解图像区域级细节和相应问题之间的关联的图像 QA 相比，视频 QA 需要一个模型来联合推理视频和文本的空间和远程时间结构，以提供准确的答案。在本文中，我们通过提出一种结构化双流注意力网络（即 STA）来专门解决视频 QA 问题，以回答有关给定视频内容的自由形式或开放式自然语言问题。首先，我们使用结构化片段组件推断视频中丰富的远程时间结构并对文本特征进行编码。然后，我们的结构化双流注意力组件同时定位重要的视觉实例，减少背景视频的影响并关注相关文本。最后，结构化的双流融合组件合并了不同的查询片段和视频感知上下文表示并推断答案。在大规模视频 QA 数据集 \textit{TGIF-QA} 上的实验表明，对于 Action、Trans.、TrameQA 和 Count 任务，我们提出的方法显着超过最佳对应方法（即，视频输入的一种表示）13.0%、13.5%、11.0% 和 0.3。它还在 Action、Trans.、TrameQA 任务上比最好的竞争对手（即有两个表示）高出 4.1%、4.7% 和 5.1%。 本文提出一种结构化双流注意力网络（STA），用于解决视频问答任务，通过联合推理视频的时空结构和文本信息来回答开放性问题。 Lianli Gao,Pengpeng Zeng,Jingkuan Song,Yuan-Fang Li,Wu Liu,Tao Mei,Heng Tao Shen cs.CV

authors_text: Chengliang Dai,Shuo Wang,Yuanhan Mo,Elsa Angelini,Yike Guo,Wenjia Bai
title: Suggestive Annotation of Brain MR Images with Gradient-guided Sampling
title_zh: 使用梯度引导采样对大脑 MR 图像进行暗示性注释
comment: Manuscript accepted by MedIA
comments: Manuscript accepted by MedIA
abstract: Machine learning has been widely adopted for medical image analysis in recent years given its promising performance in image segmentation and classification tasks. The success of machine learning, in particular supervised learning, depends on the availability of manually annotated datasets. For medical imaging applications, such annotated datasets are not easy to acquire, it takes a substantial amount of time and resource to curate an annotated medical image set. In this paper, we propose an efficient annotation framework for brain MR images that can suggest informative sample images for human experts to annotate. We evaluate the framework on two different brain image analysis tasks, namely brain tumour segmentation and whole brain segmentation. Experiments show that for brain tumour segmentation task on the BraTS 2019 dataset, training a segmentation model with only 7% suggestively annotated image samples can achieve a performance comparable to that of training on the full dataset. For whole brain segmentation on the MALC dataset, training with 42% suggestively annotated image samples can achieve a comparable performance to training on the full dataset. The proposed framework demonstrates a promising way to save manual annotation cost and improve data efficiency in medical imaging applications.
summary: Machine learning has been widely adopted for medical image analysis in recent years given its promising performance in image segmentation and classification tasks. The success of machine learning, in particular supervised learning, depends on the availability of manually annotated datasets. For medical imaging applications, such annotated datasets are not easy to acquire, it takes a substantial amount of time and resource to curate an annotated medical image set. In this paper, we propose an efficient annotation framework for brain MR images that can suggest informative sample images for human experts to annotate. We evaluate the framework on two different brain image analysis tasks, namely brain tumour segmentation and whole brain segmentation. Experiments show that for brain tumour segmentation task on the BraTS 2019 dataset, training a segmentation model with only 7% suggestively annotated image samples can achieve a performance comparable to that of training on the full dataset. For whole brain segmentation on the MALC dataset, training with 42% suggestively annotated image samples can achieve a comparable performance to training on the full dataset. The proposed framework demonstrates a promising way to save manual annotation cost and improve data efficiency in medical imaging applications.
abstract_zh: 近年来，机器学习因其在图像分割和分类任务中的良好表现而被广泛应用于医学图像分析。机器学习（特别是监督学习）的成功取决于手动注释数据集的可用性。对于医学成像应用，此类带注释的数据集并不容易获取，需要大量的时间和资源来管理带注释的医学图像集。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的大脑 MR 图像注释框架，可以为人类专家提供信息丰富的样本图像进行注释。我们在两种不同的脑图像分析任务（即脑肿瘤分割和全脑分割）上评估该框架。实验表明，对于 BraTS 2019 数据集上的脑肿瘤分割任务，仅使用 7% 暗示性注释图像样本训练分割模型即可获得与在完整数据集上训练相当的性能。对于 MALC 数据集上的全脑分割，使用 42% 的暗示性注释图像样本进行训练可以获得与完整数据集上的训练相当的性能。所提出的框架展示了一种在医学成像应用中节省手动注释成本并提高数据效率的有前途的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于梯度引导采样的高效脑部MRI图像标注框架，通过建议性标注减少人工标注需求。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分析依赖大量标注数据，但手动标注成本高且耗时，亟需提升数据利用效率的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用梯度引导采样策略，自动筛选信息量大的图像样本供专家标注，结合两个脑部分割任务验证框架有效性。
AI.result: 在BraTS 2019数据集上，仅需7%建议标注样本即可达到全数据集性能；在MALC数据集上42%标注样本亦可实现相近效果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架显著降低医学图像标注成本，为数据高效利用提供可行方案，具有重要临床应用价值。

authors_text: Tetsuro Morimura,Kazuhiro Ota,Kenshi Abe,Peinan Zhang
title: Policy Gradient Algorithms with Monte Carlo Tree Learning for Non-Markov Decision Processes
title_zh: 非马尔可夫决策过程的蒙特卡罗树学习策略梯度算法
comment: Accepted to Reinforcement Learning Conference (RLC) 2024
comments: Accepted to Reinforcement Learning Conference (RLC) 2024
abstract: Policy gradient (PG) is a reinforcement learning (RL) approach that optimizes a parameterized policy model for an expected return using gradient ascent. While PG can work well even in non-Markovian environments, it may encounter plateaus or peakiness issues. As another successful RL approach, algorithms based on Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS), which include AlphaZero, have obtained groundbreaking results, especially in the game-playing domain. They are also effective when applied to non-Markov decision processes. However, the standard MCTS is a method for decision-time planning, which differs from the online RL setting. In this work, we first introduce Monte Carlo Tree Learning (MCTL), an adaptation of MCTS for online RL setups. We then explore a combined policy approach of PG and MCTL to leverage their strengths. We derive conditions for asymptotic convergence with the results of a two-timescale stochastic approximation and propose an algorithm that satisfies these conditions and converges to a reasonable solution. Our numerical experiments validate the effectiveness of the proposed methods.
summary: Policy gradient (PG) is a reinforcement learning (RL) approach that optimizes a parameterized policy model for an expected return using gradient ascent. While PG can work well even in non-Markovian environments, it may encounter plateaus or peakiness issues. As another successful RL approach, algorithms based on Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS), which include AlphaZero, have obtained groundbreaking results, especially in the game-playing domain. They are also effective when applied to non-Markov decision processes. However, the standard MCTS is a method for decision-time planning, which differs from the online RL setting. In this work, we first introduce Monte Carlo Tree Learning (MCTL), an adaptation of MCTS for online RL setups. We then explore a combined policy approach of PG and MCTL to leverage their strengths. We derive conditions for asymptotic convergence with the results of a two-timescale stochastic approximation and propose an algorithm that satisfies these conditions and converges to a reasonable solution. Our numerical experiments validate the effectiveness of the proposed methods.
abstract_zh: 策略梯度（PG）是一种强化学习（RL）方法，它使用梯度上升来优化参数化策略模型以获得预期回报。虽然 PG 即使在非马尔可夫环境中也可以很好地工作，但它可能会遇到平台或峰值问题。作为另一种成功的强化学习方法，基于蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）的算法（包括 AlphaZero）已经取得了突破性的成果，特别是在游戏领域。当应用于非马尔可夫决策过程时它们也很有效。然而，标准 MCTS 是一种决策时间规划方法，与在线 RL 设置不同。在这项工作中，我们首先介绍蒙特卡罗树学习（MCTL），它是 MCTS 的一种针对在线强化学习设置的改编。然后，我们探索 PG 和 MCTL 的联合政策方法，以发挥各自的优势。我们利用两时间尺度随机近似的结果推导了渐近收敛的条件，并提出了一种满足这些条件并收敛到合理解的算法。我们的数值实验验证了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）适应到在线强化学习环境，结合策略梯度（PG）算法解决非马尔可夫决策过程中的优化问题。
AI.motivation: 策略梯度在非马尔可夫环境中易出现收敛困难，而MCTS虽在游戏领域表现优异但不适用于在线RL设置，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 提出蒙特卡洛树学习（MCTL）适配在线RL，结合PG与MCTL并基于两阶段随机逼近理论推导收敛条件，设计满足条件的算法。
AI.result: 数值实验验证了所提方法在非马尔可夫决策问题中的有效性，算法收敛至合理解。
AI.conclusion: 通过MCTL与PG的结合，有效解决了非马尔可夫环境下的策略优化问题，理论分析与实验均证实方法可行性。

search_text: Policy Gradient Algorithms with Monte Carlo Tree Learning for Non-Markov Decision Processes 非马尔可夫决策过程的蒙特卡罗树学习策略梯度算法 Policy gradient (PG) is a reinforcement learning (RL) approach that optimizes a parameterized policy model for an expected return using gradient ascent. While PG can work well even in non-Markovian environments, it may encounter plateaus or peakiness issues. As another successful RL approach, algorithms based on Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS), which include AlphaZero, have obtained groundbreaking results, especially in the game-playing domain. They are also effective when applied to non-Markov decision processes. However, the standard MCTS is a method for decision-time planning, which differs from the online RL setting. In this work, we first introduce Monte Carlo Tree Learning (MCTL), an adaptation of MCTS for online RL setups. We then explore a combined policy approach of PG and MCTL to leverage their strengths. We derive conditions for asymptotic convergence with the results of a two-timescale stochastic approximation and propose an algorithm that satisfies these conditions and converges to a reasonable solution. Our numerical experiments validate the effectiveness of the proposed methods. 策略梯度（PG）是一种强化学习（RL）方法，它使用梯度上升来优化参数化策略模型以获得预期回报。虽然 PG 即使在非马尔可夫环境中也可以很好地工作，但它可能会遇到平台或峰值问题。作为另一种成功的强化学习方法，基于蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）的算法（包括 AlphaZero）已经取得了突破性的成果，特别是在游戏领域。当应用于非马尔可夫决策过程时它们也很有效。然而，标准 MCTS 是一种决策时间规划方法，与在线 RL 设置不同。在这项工作中，我们首先介绍蒙特卡罗树学习（MCTL），它是 MCTS 的一种针对在线强化学习设置的改编。然后，我们探索 PG 和 MCTL 的联合政策方法，以发挥各自的优势。我们利用两时间尺度随机近似的结果推导了渐近收敛的条件，并提出了一种满足这些条件并收敛到合理解的算法。我们的数值实验验证了所提出方法的有效性。 本文提出将蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）适应到在线强化学习环境，结合策略梯度（PG）算法解决非马尔可夫决策过程中的优化问题。 Tetsuro Morimura,Kazuhiro Ota,Kenshi Abe,Peinan Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Weide Liu,Zhonghua Wu,Yiming Wang,Henghui Ding,Fayao Liu,Jie Lin,Guosheng Lin
title: Long-tailed Recognition by Learning from Latent Categories
title_zh: 通过学习潜在类别进行长尾识别
abstract: In this work, we address the challenging task of long-tailed image recognition. Previous long-tailed recognition methods commonly focus on the data augmentation or re-balancing strategy of the tail classes to give more attention to tail classes during the model training. However, due to the limited training images for tail classes, the diversity of tail class images is still restricted, which results in poor feature representations. In this work, we hypothesize that common latent features among the head and tail classes can be used to give better feature representation. Motivated by this, we introduce a Latent Categories based long-tail Recognition (LCReg) method. Specifically, we propose to learn a set of class-agnostic latent features shared among the head and tail classes. Then, we implicitly enrich the training sample diversity via applying semantic data augmentation to the latent features. Extensive experiments on five long-tailed image recognition datasets demonstrate that our proposed LCReg is able to significantly outperform previous methods and achieve state-of-the-art results.
summary: In this work, we address the challenging task of long-tailed image recognition. Previous long-tailed recognition methods commonly focus on the data augmentation or re-balancing strategy of the tail classes to give more attention to tail classes during the model training. However, due to the limited training images for tail classes, the diversity of tail class images is still restricted, which results in poor feature representations. In this work, we hypothesize that common latent features among the head and tail classes can be used to give better feature representation. Motivated by this, we introduce a Latent Categories based long-tail Recognition (LCReg) method. Specifically, we propose to learn a set of class-agnostic latent features shared among the head and tail classes. Then, we implicitly enrich the training sample diversity via applying semantic data augmentation to the latent features. Extensive experiments on five long-tailed image recognition datasets demonstrate that our proposed LCReg is able to significantly outperform previous methods and achieve state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们解决了长尾图像识别的挑战性任务。以前的长尾识别方法通常侧重于尾类的数据增强或重新平衡策略，以在模型训练期间更多地关注尾类。然而，由于尾部类的训练图像有限，尾部类图像的多样性仍然受到限制，导致特征表示较差。在这项工作中，我们假设头类和尾类之间的共同潜在特征可用于提供更好的特征表示。受此启发，我们引入了基于潜在类别的长尾识别（LCReg）方法。具体来说，我们建议学习一组在头类和尾类之间共享的与类无关的潜在特征。然后，我们通过将语义数据增强应用于潜在特征来隐式丰富训练样本的多样性。对五个长尾图像识别数据集的大量实验表明，我们提出的 LCReg 能够显着优于以前的方法并取得最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于潜在类别的长尾图像识别方法，通过学习头部和尾部类别共享的潜在特征来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有长尾识别方法因尾部类别样本有限，难以提升其特征多样性，导致表示效果不佳。作者认为头部与尾部类别存在共性潜在特征，可借此优化表示。
AI.method: 提出LCReg方法，学习类无关的潜在特征并应用语义数据增强，通过隐式扩展尾部类别样本的多样性。
AI.result: 在五个长尾图像数据集上显著优于现有方法，达到当时最先进的识别效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过挖掘类别间潜在特征并结合语义增强，有效解决了长尾识别中尾部类别特征不足的问题。

authors_text: Tsung-Ming Tai,Giuseppe Fiameni,Cheng-Kuang Lee,Simon See,Oswald Lanz
title: Unified Recurrence Modeling for Video Action Anticipation
title_zh: 视频动作预测的统一循环建模
abstract: Forecasting future events based on evidence of current conditions is an innate skill of human beings, and key for predicting the outcome of any decision making. In artificial vision for example, we would like to predict the next human action before it happens, without observing the future video frames associated to it. Computer vision models for action anticipation are expected to collect the subtle evidence in the preamble of the target actions. In prior studies recurrence modeling often leads to better performance, the strong temporal inference is assumed to be a key element for reasonable prediction. To this end, we propose a unified recurrence modeling for video action anticipation via message passing framework. The information flow in space-time can be described by the interaction between vertices and edges, and the changes of vertices for each incoming frame reflects the underlying dynamics. Our model leverages self-attention as the building blocks for each of the message passing functions. In addition, we introduce different edge learning strategies that can be end-to-end optimized to gain better flexibility for the connectivity between vertices. Our experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms previous works on the large-scale EPIC-Kitchen dataset.
summary: Forecasting future events based on evidence of current conditions is an innate skill of human beings, and key for predicting the outcome of any decision making. In artificial vision for example, we would like to predict the next human action before it happens, without observing the future video frames associated to it. Computer vision models for action anticipation are expected to collect the subtle evidence in the preamble of the target actions. In prior studies recurrence modeling often leads to better performance, the strong temporal inference is assumed to be a key element for reasonable prediction. To this end, we propose a unified recurrence modeling for video action anticipation via message passing framework. The information flow in space-time can be described by the interaction between vertices and edges, and the changes of vertices for each incoming frame reflects the underlying dynamics. Our model leverages self-attention as the building blocks for each of the message passing functions. In addition, we introduce different edge learning strategies that can be end-to-end optimized to gain better flexibility for the connectivity between vertices. Our experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms previous works on the large-scale EPIC-Kitchen dataset.
abstract_zh: 根据当前状况的证据预测未来事件是人类与生俱来的技能，也是预测任何决策结果的关键。例如，在人工视觉中，我们希望在下一个人类动作发生之前预测它，而不观察与之相关的未来视频帧。用于动作预期的计算机视觉模型有望收集目标动作前言中的微妙证据。在先前的研究中，递归建模通常会带来更好的性能，强时间推理被认为是合理预测的关键要素。为此，我们提出了通过消息传递框架进行视频动作预期的统一循环建模。时空中的信息流可以通过顶点和边之间的相互作用来描述，每个传入帧的顶点的变化反映了底层的动态。我们的模型利用自注意力作为每个消息传递函数的构建块。此外，我们引入了不同的边缘学习策略，可以进行端到端优化，以获得顶点之间连接的更好灵活性。我们的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法优于之前在大规模 EPIC-Kitchen 数据集上的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的递归建模方法，用于视频动作预判，通过消息传递框架捕捉时空信息流。
AI.motivation: 人类能基于当前信息预测未来事件，而现有计算机视觉模型需在未观察到未来帧的情况下预判动作，递归建模的时序推理能力是关键。
AI.method: 基于消息传递框架，利用自注意力机制构建时空信息交互，并引入端到端优化的边学习策略增强顶点连接灵活性。
AI.result: 在EPIC-Kitchen数据集上，所提方法优于现有工作，验证了统一递归建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一的递归建模和灵活的边学习策略，本文为视频动作预判提供了更高效的时空动态建模方案。

Our experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms previous works on the large-scale EPIC-Kitchen dataset. 根据当前状况的证据预测未来事件是人类与生俱来的技能，也是预测任何决策结果的关键。例如，在人工视觉中，我们希望在下一个人类动作发生之前预测它，而不观察与之相关的未来视频帧。用于动作预期的计算机视觉模型有望收集目标动作前言中的微妙证据。在先前的研究中，递归建模通常会带来更好的性能，强时间推理被认为是合理预测的关键要素。为此，我们提出了通过消息传递框架进行视频动作预期的统一循环建模。时空中的信息流可以通过顶点和边之间的相互作用来描述，每个传入帧的顶点的变化反映了底层的动态。我们的模型利用自注意力作为每个消息传递函数的构建块。此外，我们引入了不同的边缘学习策略，可以进行端到端优化，以获得顶点之间连接的更好灵活性。我们的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法优于之前在大规模 EPIC-Kitchen 数据集上的工作。 本文提出一种统一的递归建模方法，用于视频动作预判，通过消息传递框架捕捉时空信息流。 Tsung-Ming Tai,Giuseppe Fiameni,Cheng-Kuang Lee,Simon See,Oswald Lanz cs.CV

authors_text: Ralph Abboud,Radoslav Dimitrov,İsmail İlkan Ceylan
title: Shortest Path Networks for Graph Property Prediction
title_zh: 用于图属性预测的最短路径网络
comment: Accepted as a spotlight paper at the first Learning on Graphs (LoG) conference. Code available at: https://github.com/radoslav11/SP-MPNN. This version includes further improved QM9 results following a bug fix
comments: Accepted as a spotlight paper at the first Learning on Graphs (LoG) conference. Code available at: https://github.com/radoslav11/SP-MPNN. This version includes further improved QM9 results following a bug fix
abstract: Most graph neural network models rely on a particular message passing paradigm, where the idea is to iteratively propagate node representations of a graph to each node in the direct neighborhood. While very prominent, this paradigm leads to information propagation bottlenecks, as information is repeatedly compressed at intermediary node representations, which causes loss of information, making it practically impossible to gather meaningful signals from distant nodes. To address this, we propose shortest path message passing neural networks, where the node representations of a graph are propagated to each node in the shortest path neighborhoods. In this setting, nodes can directly communicate between each other even if they are not neighbors, breaking the information bottleneck and hence leading to more adequately learned representations. Our framework generalizes message passing neural networks, resulting in a class of more expressive models, including some recent state-of-the-art models. We verify the capacity of a basic model of this framework on dedicated synthetic experiments, and on real-world graph classification and regression benchmarks, and obtain state-of-the art results.
summary: Most graph neural network models rely on a particular message passing paradigm, where the idea is to iteratively propagate node representations of a graph to each node in the direct neighborhood. While very prominent, this paradigm leads to information propagation bottlenecks, as information is repeatedly compressed at intermediary node representations, which causes loss of information, making it practically impossible to gather meaningful signals from distant nodes. To address this, we propose shortest path message passing neural networks, where the node representations of a graph are propagated to each node in the shortest path neighborhoods. In this setting, nodes can directly communicate between each other even if they are not neighbors, breaking the information bottleneck and hence leading to more adequately learned representations. Our framework generalizes message passing neural networks, resulting in a class of more expressive models, including some recent state-of-the-art models. We verify the capacity of a basic model of this framework on dedicated synthetic experiments, and on real-world graph classification and regression benchmarks, and obtain state-of-the art results.
abstract_zh: 大多数图神经网络模型依赖于特定的消息传递范例，其思想是将图的节点表示迭代地传播到直接邻域中的每个节点。虽然非常突出，但这种范式导致了信息传播瓶颈，因为信息在中间节点表示中被重复压缩，这导致信息丢失，使得实际上不可能从远程节点收集有意义的信号。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了最短路径消息传递神经网络，其中图的节点表示被传播到最短路径邻域中的每个节点。在这种情况下，即使节点不是邻居，节点也可以直接相互通信，打破信息瓶颈，从而获得更充分的学习表示。我们的框架概括了消息传递神经网络，从而产生了一类更具表现力的模型，包括一些最近最先进的模型。我们在专门的综合实验以及现实世界的图分类和回归基准上验证了该框架基本模型的能力，并获得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于最短路径消息传递的图神经网络框架，用于改进图属性预测任务中的信息传播问题。
AI.motivation: 传统图神经网络通过直接邻居传播信息，导致信息在中间节点被压缩丢失，难以捕捉远程节点间的依赖关系。
AI.method: 设计了一种沿最短路径传播节点表示的方法，使非直接邻居节点可直接通信，突破信息瓶颈并提升表示学习能力。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和真实世界图分类/回归任务中均取得当前最优性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过扩展消息传递范式，为图神经网络提供了更丰富的表达能力，有效解决了远程信息获取难题。

authors_text: Ali Karimi,Zahra Mousavi Kouzehkanan,Reshad Hosseini,Hadi Asheri
title: Introducing One Sided Margin Loss for Solving Classification Problems in Deep Networks
title_zh: 引入单侧边际损失来解决深度网络中的分类问题
abstract: This paper introduces a new loss function, OSM (One-Sided Margin), to solve maximum-margin classification problems effectively. Unlike the hinge loss, in OSM the margin is explicitly determined with corresponding hyperparameters and then the classification problem is solved. In experiments, we observe that using OSM loss leads to faster training speeds and better accuracies than binary and categorical cross-entropy in several commonly used deep models for classification and optical character recognition problems. OSM has consistently shown better classification accuracies over cross-entropy and hinge losses for small to large neural networks. it has also led to a more efficient training procedure. We achieved state-of-the-art accuracies for small networks on several benchmark datasets of CIFAR10(98.82\%), CIFAR100(91.56\%), Flowers(98.04\%), Stanford Cars(93.91\%) with considerable improvements over other loss functions. Moreover, the accuracies are rather better than cross-entropy and hinge loss for large networks. Therefore, we strongly believe that OSM is a powerful alternative to hinge and cross-entropy losses to train deep neural networks on classification tasks.
summary: This paper introduces a new loss function, OSM (One-Sided Margin), to solve maximum-margin classification problems effectively. Unlike the hinge loss, in OSM the margin is explicitly determined with corresponding hyperparameters and then the classification problem is solved. In experiments, we observe that using OSM loss leads to faster training speeds and better accuracies than binary and categorical cross-entropy in several commonly used deep models for classification and optical character recognition problems. OSM has consistently shown better classification accuracies over cross-entropy and hinge losses for small to large neural networks. it has also led to a more efficient training procedure. We achieved state-of-the-art accuracies for small networks on several benchmark datasets of CIFAR10(98.82\%), CIFAR100(91.56\%), Flowers(98.04\%), Stanford Cars(93.91\%) with considerable improvements over other loss functions. Moreover, the accuracies are rather better than cross-entropy and hinge loss for large networks. Therefore, we strongly believe that OSM is a powerful alternative to hinge and cross-entropy losses to train deep neural networks on classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 本文引入了一种新的损失函数 OSM（One-Sided Margin）来有效解决最大间隔分类问题。与铰链损失不同，在 OSM 中，边距是通过相应的超参数明确确定的，然后解决分类问题。在实验中，我们观察到，在分类和光学字符识别问题的几种常用深度模型中，使用 OSM 损失比二进制和分类交叉熵具有更快的训练速度和更好的准确性。对于小型到大型神经网络，OSM 始终表现出比交叉熵和铰链损失更好的分类精度。它还导致了更有效的培训程序。我们在 CIFAR10(98.82\%)、CIFAR100(91.56\%)、Flowers(98.04\%)、Stanford Cars(93.91\%) 的几个基准数据集上实现了小型网络最先进的精度，与其他损失函数相比有了相当大的改进。此外，对于大型网络，其准确性比交叉熵和铰链损失要好。因此，我们坚信 OSM 是铰链和交叉熵损失的强大替代方案，可用于训练分类任务的深度神经网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为OSM（单边边距）的新损失函数，用于解决深度网络中的分类问题。
AI.motivation: 传统损失函数如交叉熵和铰链损失在分类任务中存在训练速度慢、精度不足的问题，需通过显式控制边距来提升性能。
AI.method: 设计OSM损失函数，通过超参数显式确定边距，并在深度模型分类和光学字符识别任务中进行实验验证。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10、CIFAR100等数据集上，OSM在小网络和大网络中均取得优于交叉熵和铰链损失的准确率，且训练效率更高。
AI.conclusion: OSM是一种有效的替代传统损失函数的方法，可显著提升深度网络分类任务的准确率和训练效率。

authors_text: Ruslan Partsey,Erik Wijmans,Naoki Yokoyama,Oles Dobosevych,Dhruv Batra,Oleksandr Maksymets
title: Is Mapping Necessary for Realistic PointGoal Navigation?
title_zh: 现实的 PointGoal 导航是否需要映射？
comment: Corrected typos in the Abstract
comments: Corrected typos in the Abstract
abstract: Can an autonomous agent navigate in a new environment without building an explicit map? For the task of PointGoal navigation ('Go to $Δx$, $Δy$') under idealized settings (no RGB-D and actuation noise, perfect GPS+Compass), the answer is a clear 'yes' - map-less neural models composed of task-agnostic components (CNNs and RNNs) trained with large-scale reinforcement learning achieve 100% Success on a standard dataset (Gibson). However, for PointNav in a realistic setting (RGB-D and actuation noise, no GPS+Compass), this is an open question; one we tackle in this paper. The strongest published result for this task is 71.7% Success. First, we identify the main (perhaps, only) cause of the drop in performance: the absence of GPS+Compass. An agent with perfect GPS+Compass faced with RGB-D sensing and actuation noise achieves 99.8% Success (Gibson-v2 val). This suggests that (to paraphrase a meme) robust visual odometry is all we need for realistic PointNav; if we can achieve that, we can ignore the sensing and actuation noise. With that as our operating hypothesis, we scale the dataset and model size, and develop human-annotation-free data-augmentation techniques to train models for visual odometry. We advance the state of art on the Habitat Realistic PointNav Challenge from 71% to 94% Success (+23, 31% relative) and 53% to 74% SPL (+21, 40% relative). While our approach does not saturate or 'solve' this dataset, this strong improvement combined with promising zero-shot sim2real transfer (to a LoCoBot) provides evidence consistent with the hypothesis that explicit mapping may not be necessary for navigation, even in a realistic setting.

However, for PointNav in a realistic setting (RGB-D and actuation noise, no GPS+Compass), this is an open question; one we tackle in this paper. This suggests that (to paraphrase a meme) robust visual odometry is all we need for realistic PointNav; if we can achieve that, we can ignore the sensing and actuation noise. With that as our operating hypothesis, we scale the dataset and model size, and develop human-annotation-free data-augmentation techniques to train models for visual odometry. We advance the state of art on the Habitat Realistic PointNav Challenge from 71% to 94% Success (+23, 31% relative) and 53% to 74% SPL (+21, 40% relative). While our approach does not saturate or 'solve' this dataset, this strong improvement combined with promising zero-shot sim2real transfer (to a LoCoBot) provides evidence consistent with the hypothesis that explicit mapping may not be necessary for navigation, even in a realistic setting.
abstract_zh: 自主代理可以在不构建显式地图的情况下在新环境中导航吗？对于理想化设置（无 RGB-D 和驱动噪声，完美的 GPS+指南针）下的 PointGoal 导航任务（“转到 $Δx$，$Δy$”），答案是明确的“是”——由任务无关组件（CNN 和 RNN）组成的无地图神经模型，经过大规模强化学习训练，在标准数据集（Gibson）上取得了 100% 的成功。然而，对于现实环境中的 PointNav（RGB-D 和驱动噪声，无 GPS+指南针），这是一个悬而未决的问题；我们在本文中解决了这个问题。此任务的最强已发布结果是 71.7% 成功。首先，我们确定性能下降的主要原因（也许是唯一）：缺少 GPS+指南针。具有完美 GPS+罗盘的智能体在面对 RGB-D 传感和驱动噪声时取得了 99.8% 的成功率（Gibson-v2 val）。这表明（套用一个模因）强大的视觉里程计就是我们实现现实 PointNav 所需要的全部；如果我们能做到这一点，我们就可以忽略传感和驱动噪声。以此作为我们的操作假设，我们缩放数据集和模型大小，并开发无需人工注释的数据增强技术来训练视觉里程计模型。我们将 Habitat Realistic PointNav Challenge 的成功率从 71% 提高到 94%（+23，相对 31%），将 SPL 提高到 53% 到 74%（+21，相对 40%）。虽然我们的方法没有饱和或“解决”这个数据集，但这种强大的改进与有前途的零样本 sim2real 传输（到 LoCoBot）相结合，提供了与导航可能不需要显式映射的假设一致的证据，即使在现实环境中也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨在真实环境下进行点目标导航时是否需要显式地图，研究无地图的神经网络模型能否在存在RGB-D传感器噪声和执行噪声的情况下实现高成功率。
AI.motivation: 在理想条件下，无地图模型已能实现100%成功率，但在真实场景中因缺乏GPS和指南针，性能显著下降。本文旨在验证视觉里程计是否足以替代显式地图以实现真实点目标导航。
AI.method: 通过扩大数据集规模、增加模型参数量，并开发无需人工标注的数据增强技术，训练视觉里程计模型以应对传感器和执行噪声。
AI.result: 在Habitat真实点目标导航挑战赛中，成功率从71%提升至94%（+23），SPL从53%提升至74%（+21），并实现了零样本模拟到现实的迁移（LoCoBot）。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果支持假设：在真实环境下，通过增强的视觉里程计可实现高精度导航，无需显式地图。

search_text: Is Mapping Necessary for Realistic PointGoal Navigation? 现实的 PointGoal 导航是否需要映射？ Can an autonomous agent navigate in a new environment without building an explicit map? For the task of PointGoal navigation ('Go to $Δx$, $Δy$') under idealized settings (no RGB-D and actuation noise, perfect GPS+Compass), the answer is a clear 'yes' - map-less neural models composed of task-agnostic components (CNNs and RNNs) trained with large-scale reinforcement learning achieve 100% Success on a standard dataset (Gibson). However, for PointNav in a realistic setting (RGB-D and actuation noise, no GPS+Compass), this is an open question; one we tackle in this paper. The strongest published result for this task is 71.7% Success. First, we identify the main (perhaps, only) cause of the drop in performance: the absence of GPS+Compass. An agent with perfect GPS+Compass faced with RGB-D sensing and actuation noise achieves 99.8% Success (Gibson-v2 val). This suggests that (to paraphrase a meme) robust visual odometry is all we need for realistic PointNav; if we can achieve that, we can ignore the sensing and actuation noise. With that as our operating hypothesis, we scale the dataset and model size, and develop human-annotation-free data-augmentation techniques to train models for visual odometry. We advance the state of art on the Habitat Realistic PointNav Challenge from 71% to 94% Success (+23, 31% relative) and 53% to 74% SPL (+21, 40% relative). While our approach does not saturate or 'solve' this dataset, this strong improvement combined with promising zero-shot sim2real transfer (to a LoCoBot) provides evidence consistent with the hypothesis that explicit mapping may not be necessary for navigation, even in a realistic setting. 自主代理可以在不构建显式地图的情况下在新环境中导航吗？对于理想化设置（无 RGB-D 和驱动噪声，完美的 GPS+指南针）下的 PointGoal 导航任务（“转到 $Δx$，$Δy$”），答案是明确的“是”——由任务无关组件（CNN 和 RNN）组成的无地图神经模型，经过大规模强化学习训练，在标准数据集（Gibson）上取得了 100% 的成功。然而，对于现实环境中的 PointNav（RGB-D 和驱动噪声，无 GPS+指南针），这是一个悬而未决的问题；我们在本文中解决了这个问题。此任务的最强已发布结果是 71.7% 成功。首先，我们确定性能下降的主要原因（也许是唯一）：缺少 GPS+指南针。具有完美 GPS+罗盘的智能体在面对 RGB-D 传感和驱动噪声时取得了 99.8% 的成功率（Gibson-v2 val）。这表明（套用一个模因）强大的视觉里程计就是我们实现现实 PointNav 所需要的全部；如果我们能做到这一点，我们就可以忽略传感和驱动噪声。以此作为我们的操作假设，我们缩放数据集和模型大小，并开发无需人工注释的数据增强技术来训练视觉里程计模型。我们将 Habitat Realistic PointNav Challenge 的成功率从 71% 提高到 94%（+23，相对 31%），将 SPL 提高到 53% 到 74%（+21，相对 40%）。虽然我们的方法没有饱和或“解决”这个数据集，但这种强大的改进与有前途的零样本 sim2real 传输（到 LoCoBot）相结合，提供了与导航可能不需要显式映射的假设一致的证据，即使在现实环境中也是如此。 本文探讨在真实环境下进行点目标导航时是否需要显式地图，研究无地图的神经网络模型能否在存在RGB-D传感器噪声和执行噪声的情况下实现高成功率。 Ruslan Partsey,Erik Wijmans,Naoki Yokoyama,Oles Dobosevych,Dhruv Batra,Oleksandr Maksymets cs.CV

authors_text: Jinkyu Kim,Reza Mahjourian,Scott Ettinger,Mayank Bansal,Brandyn White,Ben Sapp,Dragomir Anguelov
title: StopNet: Scalable Trajectory and Occupancy Prediction for Urban Autonomous Driving
title_zh: StopNet：城市自动驾驶的可扩展轨迹和占用预测
comment: ef:IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2022
comments: ef:IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2022
abstract: We introduce a motion forecasting (behavior prediction) method that meets the latency requirements for autonomous driving in dense urban environments without sacrificing accuracy. A whole-scene sparse input representation allows StopNet to scale to predicting trajectories for hundreds of road agents with reliable latency. In addition to predicting trajectories, our scene encoder lends itself to predicting whole-scene probabilistic occupancy grids, a complementary output representation suitable for busy urban environments. Occupancy grids allow the AV to reason collectively about the behavior of groups of agents without processing their individual trajectories. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our sparse input representation and our model in terms of computation and accuracy over three datasets. We further show that co-training consistent trajectory and occupancy predictions improves upon state-of-the-art performance under standard metrics.
summary: We introduce a motion forecasting (behavior prediction) method that meets the latency requirements for autonomous driving in dense urban environments without sacrificing accuracy. A whole-scene sparse input representation allows StopNet to scale to predicting trajectories for hundreds of road agents with reliable latency. In addition to predicting trajectories, our scene encoder lends itself to predicting whole-scene probabilistic occupancy grids, a complementary output representation suitable for busy urban environments. Occupancy grids allow the AV to reason collectively about the behavior of groups of agents without processing their individual trajectories. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our sparse input representation and our model in terms of computation and accuracy over three datasets. We further show that co-training consistent trajectory and occupancy predictions improves upon state-of-the-art performance under standard metrics.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种运动预测（行为预测）方法，可以在不牺牲准确性的情况下满足密集城市环境中自动驾驶的延迟要求。全场景稀疏输入表示允许 StopNet 扩展以预测数百个具有可靠延迟的道路代理的轨迹。除了预测轨迹之外，我们的场景编码器还可以预测全场景概率占用网格，这是一种适合繁忙城市环境的补充输出表示。占用网格允许 AV 集体推理智能体组的行为，而无需处理它们各自的轨迹。我们在三个数据集上证明了稀疏输入表示和模型在计算和准确性方面的有效性。我们进一步表明，共同训练一致的轨迹和占用预测可以改善标准指标下的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出StopNet，一种适用于城市自动驾驶的可扩展轨迹和占用预测方法，兼顾低延迟与高精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在密集城市环境中难以同时满足实时性与预测精度需求，尤其在处理大量道路参与者时计算负担沉重。
AI.method: 采用稀疏场景输入表示，通过场景编码器联合预测轨迹与概率占用网格，利用协同训练提升模型一致性。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上验证了方法的计算效率与精度优势，联合预测方案在标准指标上超越现有最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: StopNet通过稀疏表示与双输出设计，为城市自动驾驶提供了高效且准确的群体行为推理框架。

authors_text: Johanna Jøsang,Ricardo Guimarães,Ana Ozaki
title: On the Effectiveness of Knowledge Graph Embeddings: a Rule Mining Approach
title_zh: 关于知识图嵌入的有效性：一种规则挖掘方法
comment: The paper has 24 pages, 3 figures, presented at the first International Workshop on Knowledge Representation for Hybrid Intelligence (KR4HI'22); added references, clarifications, and acknowledgements; fixed minor typos
comments: The paper has 24 pages, 3 figures, presented at the first International Workshop on Knowledge Representation for Hybrid Intelligence (KR4HI'22); added references, clarifications, and acknowledgements; fixed minor typos
abstract: We study the effectiveness of Knowledge Graph Embeddings (KGE) for knowledge graph (KG) completion with rule mining. More specifically, we mine rules from KGs before and after they have been completed by a KGE to compare possible differences in the rules extracted. We apply this method to classical KGEs approaches, in particular, TransE, DistMult and ComplEx. Our experiments indicate that there can be huge differences between the extracted rules, depending on the KGE approach for KG completion. In particular, after the TransE completion, several spurious rules were extracted.
summary: We study the effectiveness of Knowledge Graph Embeddings (KGE) for knowledge graph (KG) completion with rule mining. More specifically, we mine rules from KGs before and after they have been completed by a KGE to compare possible differences in the rules extracted. We apply this method to classical KGEs approaches, in particular, TransE, DistMult and ComplEx. Our experiments indicate that there can be huge differences between the extracted rules, depending on the KGE approach for KG completion. In particular, after the TransE completion, several spurious rules were extracted.
abstract_zh: 我们研究知识图嵌入（KGE）通过规则挖掘完成知识图（KG）的有效性。更具体地说，我们在 KGE 完成 KG 之前和之后从 KG 中挖掘规则，以比较提取的规则中可能存在的差异。我们将此方法应用于经典的 KGE 方法，特别是 TransE、DistMult 和 ComplEx。我们的实验表明，提取的规则之间可能存在巨大差异，具体取决于 KG 完成的 KGE 方法。特别是，在 TransE 完成后，提取了一些虚假规则。

AI.tldr: 本文通过规则挖掘方法评估知识图谱嵌入（KGE）在知识图谱补全中的有效性，比较不同KGE方法补全前后的规则差异。
AI.motivation: 现有KGE方法可能在补全知识图谱时引入错误，需通过规则挖掘验证其有效性并发现潜在问题。
AI.method: 在KGE补全前后的知识图谱中挖掘规则，对比TransE、DistMult和ComplEx等经典方法的规则差异。
AI.result: 实验表明不同KGE方法提取的规则差异显著，TransE补全后出现大量虚假规则。
AI.conclusion: KGE方法对规则的影响存在显著差异，TransE可能存在缺陷，需进一步研究改进。

search_text: On the Effectiveness of Knowledge Graph Embeddings: a Rule Mining Approach 关于知识图嵌入的有效性：一种规则挖掘方法 We study the effectiveness of Knowledge Graph Embeddings (KGE) for knowledge graph (KG) completion with rule mining. More specifically, we mine rules from KGs before and after they have been completed by a KGE to compare possible differences in the rules extracted. We apply this method to classical KGEs approaches, in particular, TransE, DistMult and ComplEx. Our experiments indicate that there can be huge differences between the extracted rules, depending on the KGE approach for KG completion. In particular, after the TransE completion, several spurious rules were extracted. 我们研究知识图嵌入（KGE）通过规则挖掘完成知识图（KG）的有效性。更具体地说，我们在 KGE 完成 KG 之前和之后从 KG 中挖掘规则，以比较提取的规则中可能存在的差异。我们将此方法应用于经典的 KGE 方法，特别是 TransE、DistMult 和 ComplEx。我们的实验表明，提取的规则之间可能存在巨大差异，具体取决于 KG 完成的 KGE 方法。特别是，在 TransE 完成后，提取了一些虚假规则。 本文通过规则挖掘方法评估知识图谱嵌入（KGE）在知识图谱补全中的有效性，比较不同KGE方法补全前后的规则差异。 Johanna Jøsang,Ricardo Guimarães,Ana Ozaki cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Wei Ye,Hao Tian,Qijun Chen
title: Multi-scale Wasserstein Shortest-path Graph Kernels for Graph Classification
title_zh: 用于图分类的多尺度 Wasserstein 最短路径图核
comment: 12 pages
comments: 12 pages
abstract: Graph kernels are conventional methods for computing graph similarities. However, the existing R-convolution graph kernels cannot resolve both of the two challenges: 1) Comparing graphs at multiple different scales, and 2) Considering the distributions of substructures when computing the kernel matrix. These two challenges limit their performances. To mitigate both of the two challenges, we propose a novel graph kernel called the Multi-scale Wasserstein Shortest-Path graph kernel (MWSP), at the heart of which is the multi-scale shortest-path node feature map, of which each element denotes the number of occurrences of the shortest path around a node. The shortest path is represented by the concatenation of all the labels of nodes in it. Since the shortest-path node feature map can only compare graphs at local scales, we incorporate into it the multiple different scales of the graph structure, which are captured by the truncated BFS trees of different depths rooted at each node in a graph. We use the Wasserstein distance to compute the similarity between the multi-scale shortest-path node feature maps of two graphs, considering the distributions of shortest paths. We empirically validate MWSP on various benchmark graph datasets and demonstrate that it achieves state-of-the-art performance on most datasets.

However, the existing R-convolution graph kernels cannot resolve both of the two challenges: 1) Comparing graphs at multiple different scales, and 2) Considering the distributions of substructures when computing the kernel matrix. These two challenges limit their performances. To mitigate both of the two challenges, we propose a novel graph kernel called the Multi-scale Wasserstein Shortest-Path graph kernel (MWSP), at the heart of which is the multi-scale shortest-path node feature map, of which each element denotes the number of occurrences of the shortest path around a node. The shortest path is represented by the concatenation of all the labels of nodes in it. Since the shortest-path node feature map can only compare graphs at local scales, we incorporate into it the multiple different scales of the graph structure, which are captured by the truncated BFS trees of different depths rooted at each node in a graph. We use the Wasserstein distance to compute the similarity between the multi-scale shortest-path node feature maps of two graphs, considering the distributions of shortest paths. We empirically validate MWSP on various benchmark graph datasets and demonstrate that it achieves state-of-the-art performance on most datasets.
abstract_zh: 图核是计算图相似度的传统方法。然而，现有的 R 卷积图核无法同时解决两个挑战：1）比较多个不同尺度的图，2）计算核矩阵时考虑子结构的分布。这两个挑战限制了他们的表现。为了缓解这两个挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的图内核，称为多尺度 Wasserstein 最短路径图内核（MWSP），其核心是多尺度最短路径节点特征图，其中每个元素表示节点周围最短路径的出现次数。最短路径由其中所有节点标签的串联表示。由于最短路径节点特征图只能比较局部尺度的图，因此我们将图结构的多个不同尺度纳入其中，这些图结构由以图中每个节点为根的不同深度的截断 BFS 树捕获。考虑到最短路径的分布，我们使用 Wasserstein 距离来计算两个图的多尺度最短路径节点特征图之间的相似度。我们在各种基准图数据集上凭经验验证 MWSP，并证明它在大多数数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MWSP的多尺度Wasserstein最短路径图核方法，用于解决图分类任务中多尺度比较和子结构分布建模的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有R-卷积图核无法同时处理多尺度图比较和子结构分布建模，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 构建多尺度最短路径节点特征图（结合不同深度的截断BFS树），通过Wasserstein距离计算两图特征图的分布相似度。
AI.result: 在多个基准图数据集上验证，MWSP在多数数据集上达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: MWSP通过多尺度特征建模和分布相似度计算有效提升了图分类性能，未来可探索更高效的计算方式。

authors_text: Wanli Liu,Chen Li,Ning Xu,Tao Jiang,Md Mamunur Rahaman,Hongzan Sun,Xiangchen Wu,Weiming Hu,Haoyuan Chen,Changhao Sun,Yudong Yao,Marcin Grzegorzek
title: CVM-Cervix: A Hybrid Cervical Pap-Smear Image Classification Framework Using CNN, Visual Transformer and Multilayer Perceptron
title_zh: CVM-Cervix：使用 CNN、视觉变换器和多层感知器的混合宫颈巴氏涂片图像分类框架
abstract: Cervical cancer is the seventh most common cancer among all the cancers worldwide and the fourth most common cancer among women. Cervical cytopathology image classification is an important method to diagnose cervical cancer. Manual screening of cytopathology images is time-consuming and error-prone. The emergence of the automatic computer-aided diagnosis system solves this problem. This paper proposes a framework called CVM-Cervix based on deep learning to perform cervical cell classification tasks. It can analyze pap slides quickly and accurately. CVM-Cervix first proposes a Convolutional Neural Network module and a Visual Transformer module for local and global feature extraction respectively, then a Multilayer Perceptron module is designed to fuse the local and global features for the final classification. Experimental results show the effectiveness and potential of the proposed CVM-Cervix in the field of cervical Pap smear image classification. In addition, according to the practical needs of clinical work, we perform a lightweight post-processing to compress the model.
summary: Cervical cancer is the seventh most common cancer among all the cancers worldwide and the fourth most common cancer among women. Cervical cytopathology image classification is an important method to diagnose cervical cancer. Manual screening of cytopathology images is time-consuming and error-prone. The emergence of the automatic computer-aided diagnosis system solves this problem. This paper proposes a framework called CVM-Cervix based on deep learning to perform cervical cell classification tasks. It can analyze pap slides quickly and accurately. CVM-Cervix first proposes a Convolutional Neural Network module and a Visual Transformer module for local and global feature extraction respectively, then a Multilayer Perceptron module is designed to fuse the local and global features for the final classification. Experimental results show the effectiveness and potential of the proposed CVM-Cervix in the field of cervical Pap smear image classification. In addition, according to the practical needs of clinical work, we perform a lightweight post-processing to compress the model.
abstract_zh: 宫颈癌是全球第七大常见癌症，也是女性第四大常见癌症。宫颈细胞病理学图像分类是诊断宫颈癌的重要方法。手动筛选细胞病理学图像既耗时又容易出错。自动计算机辅助诊断系统的出现解决了这个问题。本文提出了一种基于深度学习的名为 CVM-Cervix 的框架来执行宫颈细胞分类任务。它可以快速准确地分析巴氏切片。 CVM-Cervix首先提出了卷积神经网络模块和视觉变换器模块分别用于局部和全局特征提取，然后设计了多层感知器模块来融合局部和全局特征以进行最终分类。实验结果表明了所提出的 CVM-Cervix 在宫颈巴氏涂片图像分类领域的有效性和潜力。另外，根据临床工作的实际需要，我们对模型进行了轻量级的后处理来压缩。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）、视觉Transformer（ViT）和多层感知机（MLP）的混合框架CVM-Cervix，用于宫颈细胞涂片图像分类。
AI.motivation: 宫颈癌是全球女性高发癌症，传统人工筛查效率低且易出错，亟需自动化辅助诊断系统提升筛查准确性和效率。
AI.method: 框架分三阶段：CNN提取局部特征，ViT捕捉全局特征，MLP融合特征进行分类；后续通过轻量化处理压缩模型以适应临床需求。
AI.result: 实验验证了CVM-Cervix在宫颈细胞图像分类中的有效性，模型压缩后仍保持较高性能，满足实际应用需求。
AI.conclusion: CVM-Cervix通过多模块协同提升了分类精度，轻量化设计使其具备临床部署潜力，为宫颈癌筛查提供可靠技术方案。

authors_text: Shanshan Wang,Archontis Politis,Annamaria Mesaros,Tuomas Virtanen
title: Self-supervised Learning of Audio Representations from Audio-Visual Data using Spatial Alignment
title_zh: 使用空间对齐从视听数据中进行音频表示的自监督学习
abstract: Learning from audio-visual data offers many possibilities to express correspondence between the audio and visual content, similar to the human perception that relates aural and visual information. In this work, we present a method for self-supervised representation learning based on audio-visual spatial alignment (AVSA), a more sophisticated alignment task than the audio-visual correspondence (AVC). In addition to the correspondence, AVSA also learns from the spatial location of acoustic and visual content. Based on 360$^\text{o}$ video and Ambisonics audio, we propose selection of visual objects using object detection, and beamforming of the audio signal towards the detected objects, attempting to learn the spatial alignment between objects and the sound they produce. We investigate the use of spatial audio features to represent the audio input, and different audio formats: Ambisonics, mono, and stereo. Experimental results show a 10 $\%$ improvement on AVSA for the first order ambisonics intensity vector (FOA-IV) in comparison with log-mel spectrogram features; the addition of object-oriented crops also brings significant performance increases for the human action recognition downstream task. A number of audio-only downstream tasks are devised for testing the effectiveness of the learnt audio feature representation, obtaining performance comparable to state-of-the-art methods on acoustic scene classification from ambisonic and binaural audio.
summary: Learning from audio-visual data offers many possibilities to express correspondence between the audio and visual content, similar to the human perception that relates aural and visual information. In this work, we present a method for self-supervised representation learning based on audio-visual spatial alignment (AVSA), a more sophisticated alignment task than the audio-visual correspondence (AVC). In addition to the correspondence, AVSA also learns from the spatial location of acoustic and visual content. Based on 360$^\text{o}$ video and Ambisonics audio, we propose selection of visual objects using object detection, and beamforming of the audio signal towards the detected objects, attempting to learn the spatial alignment between objects and the sound they produce. We investigate the use of spatial audio features to represent the audio input, and different audio formats: Ambisonics, mono, and stereo. Experimental results show a 10 $\%$ improvement on AVSA for the first order ambisonics intensity vector (FOA-IV) in comparison with log-mel spectrogram features; the addition of object-oriented crops also brings significant performance increases for the human action recognition downstream task. A number of audio-only downstream tasks are devised for testing the effectiveness of the learnt audio feature representation, obtaining performance comparable to state-of-the-art methods on acoustic scene classification from ambisonic and binaural audio.
abstract_zh: 从视听数据中学习提供了表达音频和视觉内容之间的对应关系的多种可能性，类似于人类将听觉和视觉信息联系起来的感知。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于视听空间对齐（AVSA）的自监督表示学习方法，这是比视听对应（AVC）更复杂的对齐任务。除了对应关系之外，AVSA 还学习声音和视觉内容的空间位置。基于 360$^\text{o}$ 视频和 Ambisonics 音频，我们建议使用对象检测来选择视觉对象，并对检测到的对象进行音频信号的波束成形，尝试学习对象与其产生的声音之间的空间对齐。我们研究了使用空间音频特征来表示音频输入以及不同的音频格式：高保真度立体声响复制、单声道和立体声。实验结果表明，与 log-mel 频谱图特征相比，AVSA 对于一阶 Ambisonics 强度矢量 (FOA-IV) 提高了 10 $\%$；面向对象裁剪的添加还为人类行为识别下游任务带来了显着的性能提升。设计了许多纯音频下游任务来测试所学习的音频特征表示的有效性，获得与从环绕声和双耳音频进行声学场景分类的最先进方法相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于音频-视觉空间对齐（AVSA）的自监督学习方法，通过结合360度视频与Ambisonics音频，学习音频与视觉对象的空间对应关系以提升音频表示。
AI.motivation: 现有音频-视觉对应方法（AVC）仅关注音频与视觉内容的关联性，未充分考虑空间位置信息。本文旨在通过引入空间对齐任务，提升音频表示对空间信息的建模能力。
AI.method: 利用对象检测定位视觉对象，通过波束成形将音频信号对齐至检测到的对象；采用Ambisonics、单声道和立体声等不同音频格式，结合空间音频特征（如FOA-IV）进行表示学习，并设计下游任务验证效果。
AI.result: 在AVSA任务中，FOA-IV特征较对数梅尔频谱图提升10%；对象导向的裁剪显著提升人类动作识别性能；音频-only任务表现与最先进方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 空间对齐任务能有效增强音频表示的学习，所提方法在多种下游任务中均展现竞争力，证明了空间信息对音频表征的重要性。

search_text: Self-supervised Learning of Audio Representations from Audio-Visual Data using Spatial Alignment 使用空间对齐从视听数据中进行音频表示的自监督学习 Learning from audio-visual data offers many possibilities to express correspondence between the audio and visual content, similar to the human perception that relates aural and visual information. In this work, we present a method for self-supervised representation learning based on audio-visual spatial alignment (AVSA), a more sophisticated alignment task than the audio-visual correspondence (AVC). In addition to the correspondence, AVSA also learns from the spatial location of acoustic and visual content. Based on 360$^\text{o}$ video and Ambisonics audio, we propose selection of visual objects using object detection, and beamforming of the audio signal towards the detected objects, attempting to learn the spatial alignment between objects and the sound they produce. Experimental results show a 10 $\%$ improvement on AVSA for the first order ambisonics intensity vector (FOA-IV) in comparison with log-mel spectrogram features; the addition of object-oriented crops also brings significant performance increases for the human action recognition downstream task. A number of audio-only downstream tasks are devised for testing the effectiveness of the learnt audio feature representation, obtaining performance comparable to state-of-the-art methods on acoustic scene classification from ambisonic and binaural audio. 从视听数据中学习提供了表达音频和视觉内容之间的对应关系的多种可能性，类似于人类将听觉和视觉信息联系起来的感知。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于视听空间对齐（AVSA）的自监督表示学习方法，这是比视听对应（AVC）更复杂的对齐任务。除了对应关系之外，AVSA 还学习声音和视觉内容的空间位置。基于 360$^\text{o}$ 视频和 Ambisonics 音频，我们建议使用对象检测来选择视觉对象，并对检测到的对象进行音频信号的波束成形，尝试学习对象与其产生的声音之间的空间对齐。我们研究了使用空间音频特征来表示音频输入以及不同的音频格式：高保真度立体声响复制、单声道和立体声。实验结果表明，与 log-mel 频谱图特征相比，AVSA 对于一阶 Ambisonics 强度矢量 (FOA-IV) 提高了 10 $\%$；面向对象裁剪的添加还为人类行为识别下游任务带来了显着的性能提升。设计了许多纯音频下游任务来测试所学习的音频特征表示的有效性，获得与从环绕声和双耳音频进行声学场景分类的最先进方法相当的性能。 本文提出一种基于音频-视觉空间对齐（AVSA）的自监督学习方法，通过结合360度视频与Ambisonics音频，学习音频与视觉对象的空间对应关系以提升音频表示。 Shanshan Wang,Archontis Politis,Annamaria Mesaros,Tuomas Virtanen eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Juuso Eronen,Michal Ptaszynski,Fumito Masui,Masaki Arata,Gniewosz Leliwa,Michal Wroczynski
title: Transfer Language Selection for Zero-Shot Cross-Lingual Abusive Language Detection
title_zh: 用于零样本跨语言滥用语言检测的传输语言选择
comment: ef:Information Processing & Management, Volume 59, Issue 4, July 2022, paper ID: 102981
comments: ef:Information Processing & Management, Volume 59, Issue 4, July 2022, paper ID: 102981
abstract: We study the selection of transfer languages for automatic abusive language detection. Instead of preparing a dataset for every language, we demonstrate the effectiveness of cross-lingual transfer learning for zero-shot abusive language detection. This way we can use existing data from higher-resource languages to build better detection systems for low-resource languages. Our datasets are from seven different languages from three language families. We measure the distance between the languages using several language similarity measures, especially by quantifying the World Atlas of Language Structures. We show that there is a correlation between linguistic similarity and classifier performance. This discovery allows us to choose an optimal transfer language for zero shot abusive language detection.
summary: We study the selection of transfer languages for automatic abusive language detection. Instead of preparing a dataset for every language, we demonstrate the effectiveness of cross-lingual transfer learning for zero-shot abusive language detection. This way we can use existing data from higher-resource languages to build better detection systems for low-resource languages. Our datasets are from seven different languages from three language families. We measure the distance between the languages using several language similarity measures, especially by quantifying the World Atlas of Language Structures. We show that there is a correlation between linguistic similarity and classifier performance. This discovery allows us to choose an optimal transfer language for zero shot abusive language detection.
abstract_zh: 我们研究用于自动滥用语言检测的传输语言的选择。我们没有为每种语言准备数据集，而是展示了跨语言迁移学习在零样本滥用语言检测中的有效性。这样我们就可以使用来自较高资源语言的现有数据来为低资源语言构建更好的检测系统。我们的数据集来自三个语系的七种不同语言。我们使用多种语言相似性度量来测量语言之间的距离，特别是通过量化世界语言结构地图集。我们证明语言相似性和分类器性能之间存在相关性。这一发现使我们能够选择最佳的传输语言来进行零样本滥用语言检测。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在零样本跨语言辱骂语言检测中如何选择有效的迁移语言，以利用高资源语言数据提升低资源语言的检测效果。
AI.motivation: 为每种语言单独准备数据集成本高昂且不可行，尤其对于低资源语言，需通过迁移学习利用高资源语言数据构建检测系统。
AI.method: 基于多种语言相似性度量（如世界语言结构图谱量化），计算语言间距离并分析其与分类器性能的相关性，从而选择最优迁移语言。
AI.result: 发现语言相似性与分类器性能存在显著相关性，验证了通过相似性选择迁移语言的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过语言相似性指标选择迁移语言，可有效提升零样本跨语言辱骂检测的准确性和实用性。
