authors_text: Jianhong Han,Zhaoyi Wan,Zhe Liu,Jie Feng,Bingfeng Zhou
title: SparseDet: Towards End-to-End 3D Object Detection
title_zh: SparseDet：迈向端到端 3D 对象检测
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 17th International Joint Conference on Computer Vision, Imaging and Computer Graphics Theory and Applications - Volume 4: VISAPP, pp. 781- 792. Feb. 6-8, 2022
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 17th International Joint Conference on Computer Vision, Imaging and Computer Graphics Theory and Applications - Volume 4: VISAPP, pp. 781- 792. Feb. 6-8, 2022
abstract: In this paper, we propose SparseDet for end-to-end 3D object detection from point cloud. Existing works on 3D object detection rely on dense object candidates over all locations in a 3D or 2D grid following the mainstream methods for object detection in 2D images. However, this dense paradigm requires expertise in data to fulfill the gap between label and detection. As a new detection paradigm, SparseDet maintains a fixed set of learnable proposals to represent latent candidates and directly perform classification and localization for 3D objects through stacked transformers. It demonstrates that effective 3D object detection can be achieved with none of post-processing such as redundant removal and non-maximum suppression. With a properly designed network, SparseDet achieves highly competitive detection accuracy while running with a more efficient speed of 34.5 FPS. We believe this end-to-end paradigm of SparseDet will inspire new thinking on the sparsity of 3D object detection.
summary: In this paper, we propose SparseDet for end-to-end 3D object detection from point cloud. Existing works on 3D object detection rely on dense object candidates over all locations in a 3D or 2D grid following the mainstream methods for object detection in 2D images. However, this dense paradigm requires expertise in data to fulfill the gap between label and detection. As a new detection paradigm, SparseDet maintains a fixed set of learnable proposals to represent latent candidates and directly perform classification and localization for 3D objects through stacked transformers. It demonstrates that effective 3D object detection can be achieved with none of post-processing such as redundant removal and non-maximum suppression. With a properly designed network, SparseDet achieves highly competitive detection accuracy while running with a more efficient speed of 34.5 FPS. We believe this end-to-end paradigm of SparseDet will inspire new thinking on the sparsity of 3D object detection.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 SparseDet，用于点云的端到端 3D 对象检测。现有的 3D 对象检测工作依赖于 3D 或 2D 网格中所有位置的密集对象候选，遵循 2D 图像中对象检测的主流方法。然而，这种密集的范式需要数据方面的专业知识来填补标签和检测之间的差距。作为一种新的检测范例，SparseDet 维护了一组固定的可学习提案来表示潜在候选者，并通过堆叠变压器直接对 3D 对象执行分类和定位。它表明无需进行冗余去除和非极大值抑制等后处理即可实现有效的 3D 目标检测。通过正确设计的网络，SparseDet 实现了极具竞争力的检测精度，同时以 34.5 FPS 的更高效速度运行。我们相信 SparseDet 的这种端到端范例将激发关于 3D 对象检测稀疏性的新思维。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SparseDet，一种端到端的三维目标检测方法，直接从点云中检测三维物体，无需传统密集候选框和后处理步骤。
AI.motivation: 现有三维目标检测方法依赖密集的网格候选框，需复杂后处理（如非极大值抑制）来弥合标签与检测间的差距，导致效率低下且依赖数据专家知识。
AI.method: SparseDet通过固定可学习的候选框集合，结合堆叠Transformer直接进行分类和定位，完全跳过冗余移除和非极大值抑制等后处理步骤。
AI.result: 在合理设计网络结构下，SparseDet达到34.5 FPS的高效速度，同时保持高度竞争的检测精度。
AI.conclusion: SparseDet的端到端范式为三维目标检测的稀疏性提供了新思路，可能推动该领域方法的革新。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出SparseDet，一种端到端的三维目标检测方法，直接从点云中检测三维物体，无需传统密集候选框和后处理步骤。
ai_content.motivation: 现有三维目标检测方法依赖密集的网格候选框，需复杂后处理（如非极大值抑制）来弥合标签与检测间的差距，导致效率低下且依赖数据专家知识。
ai_content.method: SparseDet通过固定可学习的候选框集合，结合堆叠Transformer直接进行分类和定位，完全跳过冗余移除和非极大值抑制等后处理步骤。
ai_content.result: 在合理设计网络结构下，SparseDet达到34.5 FPS的高效速度，同时保持高度竞争的检测精度。
ai_content.conclusion: SparseDet的端到端范式为三维目标检测的稀疏性提供了新思路，可能推动该领域方法的革新。

search_text: SparseDet: Towards End-to-End 3D Object Detection SparseDet：迈向端到端 3D 对象检测 In this paper, we propose SparseDet for end-to-end 3D object detection from point cloud. Existing works on 3D object detection rely on dense object candidates over all locations in a 3D or 2D grid following the mainstream methods for object detection in 2D images. However, this dense paradigm requires expertise in data to fulfill the gap between label and detection. As a new detection paradigm, SparseDet maintains a fixed set of learnable proposals to represent latent candidates and directly perform classification and localization for 3D objects through stacked transformers. It demonstrates that effective 3D object detection can be achieved with none of post-processing such as redundant removal and non-maximum suppression. With a properly designed network, SparseDet achieves highly competitive detection accuracy while running with a more efficient speed of 34.5 FPS. We believe this end-to-end paradigm of SparseDet will inspire new thinking on the sparsity of 3D object detection. 在本文中，我们提出了 SparseDet，用于点云的端到端 3D 对象检测。现有的 3D 对象检测工作依赖于 3D 或 2D 网格中所有位置的密集对象候选，遵循 2D 图像中对象检测的主流方法。然而，这种密集的范式需要数据方面的专业知识来填补标签和检测之间的差距。作为一种新的检测范例，SparseDet 维护了一组固定的可学习提案来表示潜在候选者，并通过堆叠变压器直接对 3D 对象执行分类和定位。它表明无需进行冗余去除和非极大值抑制等后处理即可实现有效的 3D 目标检测。通过正确设计的网络，SparseDet 实现了极具竞争力的检测精度，同时以 34.5 FPS 的更高效速度运行。我们相信 SparseDet 的这种端到端范例将激发关于 3D 对象检测稀疏性的新思维。 本文提出SparseDet，一种端到端的三维目标检测方法，直接从点云中检测三维物体，无需传统密集候选框和后处理步骤。 Jianhong Han,Zhaoyi Wan,Zhe Liu,Jie Feng,Bingfeng Zhou cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Chang Liu,Zhen-Hua Ling,Ling-Hui Chen
title: Pronunciation Dictionary-Free Multilingual Speech Synthesis by Combining Unsupervised and Supervised Phonetic Representations
title_zh: 通过结合无监督和监督语音表示进行无发音词典的多语言语音合成
comment: Submitted to Interspeech 2022
comments: Submitted to Interspeech 2022
abstract: This paper proposes a multilingual speech synthesis method which combines unsupervised phonetic representations (UPR) and supervised phonetic representations (SPR) to avoid reliance on the pronunciation dictionaries of target languages. In this method, a pretrained wav2vec 2.0 model is adopted to extract UPRs and a language-independent automatic speech recognition (LI-ASR) model is built with a connectionist temporal classification (CTC) loss to extract segment-level SPRs from the audio data of target languages. Then, an acoustic model is designed, which first predicts UPRs and SPRs from texts separately and then combines the predicted UPRs and SPRs to generate mel-spectrograms. The results of our experiments on six languages show that the proposed method outperformed the methods that directly predicted mel-spectrograms from character or phoneme sequences and the ablated models that utilized only UPRs or SPRs.
summary: This paper proposes a multilingual speech synthesis method which combines unsupervised phonetic representations (UPR) and supervised phonetic representations (SPR) to avoid reliance on the pronunciation dictionaries of target languages. In this method, a pretrained wav2vec 2.0 model is adopted to extract UPRs and a language-independent automatic speech recognition (LI-ASR) model is built with a connectionist temporal classification (CTC) loss to extract segment-level SPRs from the audio data of target languages. Then, an acoustic model is designed, which first predicts UPRs and SPRs from texts separately and then combines the predicted UPRs and SPRs to generate mel-spectrograms. The results of our experiments on six languages show that the proposed method outperformed the methods that directly predicted mel-spectrograms from character or phoneme sequences and the ablated models that utilized only UPRs or SPRs.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种结合无监督语音表示（UPR）和有监督语音表示（SPR）的多语言语音合成方法，以避免对目标语言发音词典的依赖。该方法采用预训练的wav2vec 2.0模型来提取UPR，并利用连接主义时间分类（CTC）损失构建与语言无关的自动语音识别（LI-ASR）模型，以从目标语言的音频数据中提取片段级SPR。然后，设计了一个声学模型，该模型首先分别从文本中预测UPR和SPR，然后将预测的UPR和SPR结合起来生成梅尔声谱图。我们对六种语言的实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于直接从字符或音素序列预测梅尔谱图的方法以及仅利用 UPR 或 SPR 的消融模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需目标语言发音词典的多语言语音合成方法，通过结合无监督和监督的音素表示来生成语音。
AI.motivation: 传统多语言语音合成依赖目标语言的发音词典，而构建词典成本高且语言覆盖有限，因此需探索无需词典的替代方案。
AI.method: 采用预训练的wav2vec 2.0模型提取无监督音素表示（UPR），并构建语言无关的自动语音识别模型（LI-ASR）通过CTC损失提取监督音素表示（SPR），再设计声学模型融合两种表示生成梅尔频谱图。
AI.result: 在六种语言的实验中，该方法优于直接从字符或音素序列生成梅尔频谱图的方法，以及仅使用UPR或SPR的消融模型。
AI.conclusion: 结合无监督与监督音素表示能有效提升多语言语音合成质量，为无需发音词典的语音合成提供新思路。

authors_text: Dominik Drees,Florian Eilers,Ang Bian,Xiaoyi Jiang
title: A Bhattacharyya Coefficient-Based Framework for Noise Model-Aware Random Walker Image Segmentation
title_zh: 基于 Bhattacharyya 系数的噪声模型感知随机游走图像分割框架
comment: Dominik Drees and Florian Eilers contributed equally to this work
comments: Dominik Drees and Florian Eilers contributed equally to this work
abstract: One well established method of interactive image segmentation is the random walker algorithm. Considerable research on this family of segmentation methods has been continuously conducted in recent years with numerous applications. These methods are common in using a simple Gaussian weight function which depends on a parameter that strongly influences the segmentation performance. In this work we propose a general framework of deriving weight functions based on probabilistic modeling. This framework can be concretized to cope with virtually any well-defined noise model. It eliminates the critical parameter and thus avoids time-consuming parameter search. We derive the specific weight functions for common noise types and show their superior performance on synthetic data as well as different biomedical image data (MRI images from the NYU fastMRI dataset, larvae images acquired with the FIM technique). Our framework can also be used in multiple other applications, e.g., the graph cut algorithm and its extensions.
summary: One well established method of interactive image segmentation is the random walker algorithm. Considerable research on this family of segmentation methods has been continuously conducted in recent years with numerous applications. These methods are common in using a simple Gaussian weight function which depends on a parameter that strongly influences the segmentation performance. In this work we propose a general framework of deriving weight functions based on probabilistic modeling. This framework can be concretized to cope with virtually any well-defined noise model. It eliminates the critical parameter and thus avoids time-consuming parameter search. We derive the specific weight functions for common noise types and show their superior performance on synthetic data as well as different biomedical image data (MRI images from the NYU fastMRI dataset, larvae images acquired with the FIM technique). Our framework can also be used in multiple other applications, e.g., the graph cut algorithm and its extensions.
abstract_zh: 一种成熟的交互式图像分割方法是随机游走算法。近年来，人们不断对这一系列分割方法进行了大量的研究，并得到了广泛的应用。这些方法通常使用简单的高斯权重函数，该函数取决于强烈影响分割性能的参数。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个基于概率建模导出权重函数的通用框架。该框架可以具体化，以应对几乎任何定义明确的噪声模型。它消除了关键参数，从而避免了耗时的参数搜索。我们推导了常见噪声类型的特定权重函数，并展示了它们在合成数据以及不同生物医学图像数据（来自纽约大学 fastMRI 数据集的 MRI 图像、使用 FIM 技术获取的幼虫图像）上的卓越性能。我们的框架还可以用于多个其他应用程序，例如图割算法及其扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Bhattacharyya系数的框架，通过考虑噪声模型来改进随机游走图像分割算法中的权重函数设计。
AI.motivation: 传统随机游走分割方法依赖固定参数的高斯权重函数，参数选择对分割结果影响显著且需耗时调参，难以适应不同噪声环境。
AI.method: 构建基于概率建模的通用框架，利用Bhattacharyya系数推导适用于任意噪声模型的权重函数，消除关键参数并直接适配多种噪声类型。
AI.result: 在合成数据及生物医学图像（如NYU fastMRI数据集和FIM幼虫图像）中验证了方法有效性，分割性能优于传统方法，且框架可扩展至图割算法等场景。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过噪声感知的权重函数设计，提升了随机游走分割的鲁棒性与适应性，为其他分割算法提供了通用解决方案。

It eliminates the critical parameter and thus avoids time-consuming parameter search. We derive the specific weight functions for common noise types and show their superior performance on synthetic data as well as different biomedical image data (MRI images from the NYU fastMRI dataset, larvae images acquired with the FIM technique). Our framework can also be used in multiple other applications, e.g., the graph cut algorithm and its extensions. 一种成熟的交互式图像分割方法是随机游走算法。近年来，人们不断对这一系列分割方法进行了大量的研究，并得到了广泛的应用。这些方法通常使用简单的高斯权重函数，该函数取决于强烈影响分割性能的参数。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个基于概率建模导出权重函数的通用框架。该框架可以具体化，以应对几乎任何定义明确的噪声模型。它消除了关键参数，从而避免了耗时的参数搜索。我们推导了常见噪声类型的特定权重函数，并展示了它们在合成数据以及不同生物医学图像数据（来自纽约大学 fastMRI 数据集的 MRI 图像、使用 FIM 技术获取的幼虫图像）上的卓越性能。我们的框架还可以用于多个其他应用程序，例如图割算法及其扩展。 本文提出一种基于Bhattacharyya系数的框架，通过考虑噪声模型来改进随机游走图像分割算法中的权重函数设计。 Dominik Drees,Florian Eilers,Ang Bian,Xiaoyi Jiang cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Atoosa Kasirzadeh
title: Algorithmic Fairness and Structural Injustice: Insights from Feminist Political Philosophy
title_zh: 算法公平与结构不公正：女权主义政治哲学的见解
comment: This paper is accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 2022 AAAI/ACM Conference on AI, Ethics, and Society (AIES 22)
comments: This paper is accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 2022 AAAI/ACM Conference on AI, Ethics, and Society (AIES 22)
abstract: Data-driven predictive algorithms are widely used to automate and guide high-stake decision making such as bail and parole recommendation, medical resource distribution, and mortgage allocation. Nevertheless, harmful outcomes biased against vulnerable groups have been reported. The growing research field known as 'algorithmic fairness' aims to mitigate these harmful biases. Its primary methodology consists in proposing mathematical metrics to address the social harms resulting from an algorithm's biased outputs. The metrics are typically motivated by -- or substantively rooted in -- ideals of distributive justice, as formulated by political and legal philosophers. The perspectives of feminist political philosophers on social justice, by contrast, have been largely neglected. Some feminist philosophers have criticized the paradigm of distributive justice and have proposed corrective amendments to surmount its limitations. The present paper brings some key insights of feminist political philosophy to algorithmic fairness. The paper has three goals. First, I show that algorithmic fairness does not accommodate structural injustices in its current scope. Second, I defend the relevance of structural injustices -- as pioneered in the contemporary philosophical literature by Iris Marion Young -- to algorithmic fairness. Third, I take some steps in developing the paradigm of 'responsible algorithmic fairness' to correct for errors in the current scope and implementation of algorithmic fairness.
summary: Data-driven predictive algorithms are widely used to automate and guide high-stake decision making such as bail and parole recommendation, medical resource distribution, and mortgage allocation. Nevertheless, harmful outcomes biased against vulnerable groups have been reported. The growing research field known as 'algorithmic fairness' aims to mitigate these harmful biases. Its primary methodology consists in proposing mathematical metrics to address the social harms resulting from an algorithm's biased outputs. The metrics are typically motivated by -- or substantively rooted in -- ideals of distributive justice, as formulated by political and legal philosophers. The perspectives of feminist political philosophers on social justice, by contrast, have been largely neglected. Some feminist philosophers have criticized the paradigm of distributive justice and have proposed corrective amendments to surmount its limitations. The present paper brings some key insights of feminist political philosophy to algorithmic fairness. The paper has three goals. First, I show that algorithmic fairness does not accommodate structural injustices in its current scope. Second, I defend the relevance of structural injustices -- as pioneered in the contemporary philosophical literature by Iris Marion Young -- to algorithmic fairness. Third, I take some steps in developing the paradigm of 'responsible algorithmic fairness' to correct for errors in the current scope and implementation of algorithmic fairness.
abstract_zh: 数据驱动的预测算法广泛用于自动化和指导高风险决策，例如保释和假释建议、医疗资源分配和抵押贷款分配。然而，已有报道称，存在对弱势群体存在偏见的有害结果。被称为“算法公平”的不断发展的研究领域旨在减轻这些有害的偏见。其主要方法论在于提出数学指标来解决算法有偏差的输出所造成的社会危害。这些指标通常是由政治和法律哲学家提出的分配正义理想所激发或实质上植根于这一理想。相比之下，女权主义政治哲学家关于社会正义的观点在很大程度上被忽视了。一些女权主义哲学家批评了分配正义的范式，并提出了纠正性修正以克服其局限性。本文将女权主义政治哲学的一些关键见解引入算法公平性。该论文有三个目标。首先，我表明算法公平性并不能适应当前范围内的结构性不公正。其次，我捍卫结构性不公正（正如艾里斯·马里昂·杨（Iris Marion Young）在当代哲学文献中所开创的那样）与算法公平性的相关性。第三，我采取了一些步骤来开发“负责任的算法公平”范式，以纠正当前算法公平的范围和实施中的错误。

AI.tldr: 本文将女性主义政治哲学中的结构性不正义概念引入算法公平性领域，批判现有算法公平性框架的局限性，并提出修正方案。
AI.motivation: 现有算法公平性研究主要基于分配正义理论，忽视了女性主义哲学家对结构性不正义的批判，导致算法无法有效解决系统性歧视问题。
AI.method: 通过分析算法公平性理论的哲学基础，结合Iris Marion Young的结构性不正义理论，批判现有方法的不足并构建新的'负责任算法公平性'范式。
AI.result: 揭示算法公平性未涵盖结构性不正义，论证其必要性，并提出整合结构性视角的修正框架。
AI.conclusion: 算法公平性理论需突破分配正义范式，纳入结构性不正义分析，以实现更全面的公平性保障。

authors_text: Shingo Yashima,Teppei Suzuki,Kohta Ishikawa,Ikuro Sato,Rei Kawakami
title: Feature Space Particle Inference for Neural Network Ensembles
title_zh: 神经网络集成的特征空间粒子推理
comment: ICML2022
comments: ICML2022
abstract: Ensembles of deep neural networks demonstrate improved performance over single models. For enhancing the diversity of ensemble members while keeping their performance, particle-based inference methods offer a promising approach from a Bayesian perspective. However, the best way to apply these methods to neural networks is still unclear: seeking samples from the weight-space posterior suffers from inefficiency due to the over-parameterization issues, while seeking samples directly from the function-space posterior often results in serious underfitting. In this study, we propose optimizing particles in the feature space where the activation of a specific intermediate layer lies to address the above-mentioned difficulties. Our method encourages each member to capture distinct features, which is expected to improve ensemble prediction robustness. Extensive evaluation on real-world datasets shows that our model significantly outperforms the gold-standard Deep Ensembles on various metrics, including accuracy, calibration, and robustness. Code is available at https://github.com/DensoITLab/featurePI .
summary: Ensembles of deep neural networks demonstrate improved performance over single models. For enhancing the diversity of ensemble members while keeping their performance, particle-based inference methods offer a promising approach from a Bayesian perspective. However, the best way to apply these methods to neural networks is still unclear: seeking samples from the weight-space posterior suffers from inefficiency due to the over-parameterization issues, while seeking samples directly from the function-space posterior often results in serious underfitting. In this study, we propose optimizing particles in the feature space where the activation of a specific intermediate layer lies to address the above-mentioned difficulties. Our method encourages each member to capture distinct features, which is expected to improve ensemble prediction robustness. Extensive evaluation on real-world datasets shows that our model significantly outperforms the gold-standard Deep Ensembles on various metrics, including accuracy, calibration, and robustness. Code is available at https://github.com/DensoITLab/featurePI .
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络的集成表现出比单一模型更高的性能。为了增强集成成员的多样性，同时保持其性能，基于粒子的推理方法从贝叶斯的角度提供了一种有前途的方法。然而，将这些方法应用于神经网络的最佳方法仍不清楚：由于过度参数化问题，从权重空间后验中寻找样本效率低下，而直接从函数空间后验中寻找样本往往会导致严重的欠拟合。在本研究中，我们提出优化特定中间层激活所在的特征空间中的粒子来解决上述困难。我们的方法鼓励每个成员捕获不同的特征，这有望提高集成预测的鲁棒性。对现实世界数据集的广泛评估表明，我们的模型在各种指标上显着优于黄金标准深度集成，包括准确性、校准和鲁棒性。代码可在 https://github.com/DensoITLab/featurePI 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于特征空间粒子推断的神经网络集成方法，旨在提升模型多样性与预测鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络集成方法在权重空间采样效率低下，功能空间采样易导致欠拟合，难以平衡多样性与性能。
AI.method: 通过优化特定中间层的激活特征空间中的粒子分布，促使集成成员学习不同特征以增强多样性。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上显著优于标准Deep Ensembles方法，在准确率、校准性和鲁棒性等指标表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 特征空间粒子推断有效解决了集成学习中的多样性-性能矛盾，为神经网络集成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Hyungjin Chung,Byeongsu Sim,Dohoon Ryu,Jong Chul Ye
title: Improving Diffusion Models for Inverse Problems using Manifold Constraints
title_zh: 使用流形约束改进反问题的扩散模型
comment: NeurIPS 2022 camera-ready; 29 pages, 16 figures
comments: NeurIPS 2022 camera-ready; 29 pages, 16 figures
abstract: Recently, diffusion models have been used to solve various inverse problems in an unsupervised manner with appropriate modifications to the sampling process. However, the current solvers, which recursively apply a reverse diffusion step followed by a projection-based measurement consistency step, often produce suboptimal results. By studying the generative sampling path, here we show that current solvers throw the sample path off the data manifold, and hence the error accumulates. To address this, we propose an additional correction term inspired by the manifold constraint, which can be used synergistically with the previous solvers to make the iterations close to the manifold. The proposed manifold constraint is straightforward to implement within a few lines of code, yet boosts the performance by a surprisingly large margin. With extensive experiments, we show that our method is superior to the previous methods both theoretically and empirically, producing promising results in many applications such as image inpainting, colorization, and sparse-view computed tomography. Code available https://github.com/HJ-harry/MCG_diffusion
summary: Recently, diffusion models have been used to solve various inverse problems in an unsupervised manner with appropriate modifications to the sampling process. However, the current solvers, which recursively apply a reverse diffusion step followed by a projection-based measurement consistency step, often produce suboptimal results. By studying the generative sampling path, here we show that current solvers throw the sample path off the data manifold, and hence the error accumulates. To address this, we propose an additional correction term inspired by the manifold constraint, which can be used synergistically with the previous solvers to make the iterations close to the manifold. The proposed manifold constraint is straightforward to implement within a few lines of code, yet boosts the performance by a surprisingly large margin. With extensive experiments, we show that our method is superior to the previous methods both theoretically and empirically, producing promising results in many applications such as image inpainting, colorization, and sparse-view computed tomography. Code available https://github.com/HJ-harry/MCG_diffusion
abstract_zh: 最近，扩散模型已被用来以无监督的方式解决各种反问题，并对采样过程进行适当的修改。然而，当前的求解器递归地应用反向扩散步骤，然后是基于投影的测量一致性步骤，通常会产生次优结果。通过研究生成采样路径，我们在这里表明当前的求解器将样本路径从数据流形中剔除，因此误差累积。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个受流形约束启发的附加校正项，它可以与之前的求解器协同使用，以使迭代接近流形。所提出的流形约束很容易在几行代码内实现，但仍以惊人的大幅提升性能。通过大量的实验，我们表明我们的方法在理论上和经验上都优于以前的方法，在图像修复、着色和稀疏视图计算机断层扫描等许多应用中产生了有希望的结果。代码可用 https://github.com/HJ-harry/MCG_diffusion

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过引入流形约束改进扩散模型，以解决逆问题中的采样路径偏离数据流形导致的误差累积问题。
AI.motivation: 现有逆问题求解器在反向扩散采样后需进行投影操作，但该过程易使样本路径偏离数据流形，导致误差累积并影响重建质量。
AI.method: 在采样过程中增加基于流形约束的修正项，通过计算样本到流形的梯度方向进行局部校正，与原有求解器协同工作。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在图像修复、着色和稀疏CT重建等任务中显著优于现有方法，代码实现仅需少量行数修改。
AI.conclusion: 流形约束修正项为扩散模型逆问题求解提供了简单有效的改进方案，理论分析与实验结果均验证了其优越性。

search_text: Improving Diffusion Models for Inverse Problems using Manifold Constraints 使用流形约束改进反问题的扩散模型 Recently, diffusion models have been used to solve various inverse problems in an unsupervised manner with appropriate modifications to the sampling process. However, the current solvers, which recursively apply a reverse diffusion step followed by a projection-based measurement consistency step, often produce suboptimal results. By studying the generative sampling path, here we show that current solvers throw the sample path off the data manifold, and hence the error accumulates. To address this, we propose an additional correction term inspired by the manifold constraint, which can be used synergistically with the previous solvers to make the iterations close to the manifold. The proposed manifold constraint is straightforward to implement within a few lines of code, yet boosts the performance by a surprisingly large margin. With extensive experiments, we show that our method is superior to the previous methods both theoretically and empirically, producing promising results in many applications such as image inpainting, colorization, and sparse-view computed tomography. authors_text: Jana Lang,Martin Giese,Winfried Ilg,Sebastian Otte
title: Generating Sparse Counterfactual Explanations For Multivariate Time Series
title_zh: 为多元时间序列生成稀疏反事实解释
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures. Preprint. Under review; added appendix
comments: 13 pages, 7 figures. Preprint. Under review; added appendix
abstract: Since neural networks play an increasingly important role in critical sectors, explaining network predictions has become a key research topic. Counterfactual explanations can help to understand why classifier models decide for particular class assignments and, moreover, how the respective input samples would have to be modified such that the class prediction changes. Previous approaches mainly focus on image and tabular data. In this work we propose SPARCE, a generative adversarial network (GAN) architecture that generates SPARse Counterfactual Explanations for multivariate time series. Our approach provides a custom sparsity layer and regularizes the counterfactual loss function in terms of similarity, sparsity, and smoothness of trajectories. We evaluate our approach on real-world human motion datasets as well as a synthetic time series interpretability benchmark. Although we make significantly sparser modifications than other approaches, we achieve comparable or better performance on all metrics. Moreover, we demonstrate that our approach predominantly modifies salient time steps and features, leaving non-salient inputs untouched.
summary: Since neural networks play an increasingly important role in critical sectors, explaining network predictions has become a key research topic. Counterfactual explanations can help to understand why classifier models decide for particular class assignments and, moreover, how the respective input samples would have to be modified such that the class prediction changes. Previous approaches mainly focus on image and tabular data. In this work we propose SPARCE, a generative adversarial network (GAN) architecture that generates SPARse Counterfactual Explanations for multivariate time series. Our approach provides a custom sparsity layer and regularizes the counterfactual loss function in terms of similarity, sparsity, and smoothness of trajectories. We evaluate our approach on real-world human motion datasets as well as a synthetic time series interpretability benchmark. Although we make significantly sparser modifications than other approaches, we achieve comparable or better performance on all metrics. Moreover, we demonstrate that our approach predominantly modifies salient time steps and features, leaving non-salient inputs untouched.
abstract_zh: 由于神经网络在关键领域发挥着越来越重要的作用，解释网络预测已成为一个关键的研究课题。反事实解释可以帮助理解为什么分类器模型决定特定的类分配，此外，如何修改相应的输入样本以使类预测发生变化。以前的方法主要关注图像和表格数据。在这项工作中，我们提出了 SPARCE，一种生成对抗网络 (GAN) 架构，可为多元时间序列生成 SPARse 反事实解释。我们的方法提供了一个自定义稀疏层，并根据轨迹的相似性、稀疏性和平滑性对反事实损失函数进行正则化。我们在现实世界的人体运动数据集以及合成时间序列可解释性基准上评估我们的方法。尽管我们所做的修改比其他方法要少得多，但我们在所有指标上都实现了可比或更好的性能。此外，我们证明我们的方法主要修改显着的时间步骤和特征，而不影响非显着的输入。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SPARCE方法，生成针对多元时间序列的稀疏反事实解释，以解释神经网络预测结果并指导输入修改。
AI.motivation: 神经网络在关键领域应用广泛，但现有反事实解释方法多针对图像和表格数据，缺乏对多元时间序列的有效稀疏解释方案。
AI.method: 设计基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的SPARCE架构，包含自定义稀疏层及正则化损失函数，从相似性、稀疏性和轨迹平滑性三方面优化反事实生成。
AI.result: 在真实人类运动数据集和合成基准测试中，SPARCE生成的反事实解释显著更稀疏，且在性能指标上达到或超越现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SPARCE能有效生成聚焦关键时间步和特征的稀疏反事实解释，为多元时间序列模型提供可解释性支持。

authors_text: Martin Link,Max Schwarz,Sven Behnke
title: Predicting Physical Object Properties from Video
title_zh: 从视频预测物理对象属性
comment: accepted for International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2022
comments: accepted for International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2022
abstract: We present a novel approach to estimating physical properties of objects from video. Our approach consists of a physics engine and a correction estimator. Starting from the initial observed state, object behavior is simulated forward in time. Based on the simulated and observed behavior, the correction estimator then determines refined physical parameters for each object. The method can be iterated for increased precision. Our approach is generic, as it allows for the use of an arbitrary - not necessarily differentiable - physics engine and correction estimator. For the latter, we evaluate both gradient-free hyperparameter optimization and a deep convolutional neural network. We demonstrate faster and more robust convergence of the learned method in several simulated 2D scenarios focusing on bin situations.
summary: We present a novel approach to estimating physical properties of objects from video. Our approach consists of a physics engine and a correction estimator. Starting from the initial observed state, object behavior is simulated forward in time. Based on the simulated and observed behavior, the correction estimator then determines refined physical parameters for each object. The method can be iterated for increased precision. Our approach is generic, as it allows for the use of an arbitrary - not necessarily differentiable - physics engine and correction estimator. For the latter, we evaluate both gradient-free hyperparameter optimization and a deep convolutional neural network. We demonstrate faster and more robust convergence of the learned method in several simulated 2D scenarios focusing on bin situations.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种从视频中估计物体物理属性的新颖方法。我们的方法由物理引擎和校正估计器组成。从初始观察状态开始，及时模拟对象行为。根据模拟和观察到的行为，校正估计器确定每个对象的精确物理参数。可以迭代该方法以提高精度。我们的方法是通用的，因为它允许使用任意的（不一定是可微分的）物理引擎和校正估计器。对于后者，我们评估无梯度超参数优化和深度卷积神经网络。我们在几个重点关注 bin 情况的模拟 2D 场景中展示了学习方法更快、更稳健的收敛。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从视频中估计物体物理属性的新方法，结合物理引擎与校正估计器迭代优化参数。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以准确估计物体物理属性，且缺乏对任意物理引擎的通用性支持。
AI.method: 采用物理引擎模拟物体行为，通过校正估计器对比模拟与观测结果，利用梯度优化和卷积神经网络迭代修正参数。
AI.result: 在多个2D场景测试中，该方法展现出更快的收敛速度和更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为物理属性估计提供了通用框架，未来可扩展至更复杂场景与物理模型。

Our approach is generic, as it allows for the use of an arbitrary - not necessarily differentiable - physics engine and correction estimator. For the latter, we evaluate both gradient-free hyperparameter optimization and a deep convolutional neural network. We demonstrate faster and more robust convergence of the learned method in several simulated 2D scenarios focusing on bin situations. 我们提出了一种从视频中估计物体物理属性的新颖方法。我们的方法由物理引擎和校正估计器组成。从初始观察状态开始，及时模拟对象行为。根据模拟和观察到的行为，校正估计器确定每个对象的精确物理参数。可以迭代该方法以提高精度。我们的方法是通用的，因为它允许使用任意的（不一定是可微分的）物理引擎和校正估计器。对于后者，我们评估无梯度超参数优化和深度卷积神经网络。我们在几个重点关注 bin 情况的模拟 2D 场景中展示了学习方法更快、更稳健的收敛。 本文提出一种从视频中估计物体物理属性的新方法，结合物理引擎与校正估计器迭代优化参数。 Martin Link,Max Schwarz,Sven Behnke cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Xiangyuan Yang,Jie Lin,Hanlin Zhang,Xinyu Yang,Peng Zhao
title: FACM: Intermediate Layer Still Retain Effective Features against Adversarial Examples
title_zh: FACM：中间层仍然保留针对对抗样本的有效特征
abstract: In strong adversarial attacks against deep neural networks (DNN), the generated adversarial example will mislead the DNN-implemented classifier by destroying the output features of the last layer. To enhance the robustness of the classifier, in our paper, a \textbf{F}eature \textbf{A}nalysis and \textbf{C}onditional \textbf{M}atching prediction distribution (FACM) model is proposed to utilize the features of intermediate layers to correct the classification. Specifically, we first prove that the intermediate layers of the classifier can still retain effective features for the original category, which is defined as the correction property in our paper. According to this, we propose the FACM model consisting of \textbf{F}eature \textbf{A}nalysis (FA) correction module, \textbf{C}onditional \textbf{M}atching \textbf{P}rediction \textbf{D}istribution (CMPD) correction module and decision module. The FA correction module is the fully connected layers constructed with the output of the intermediate layers as the input to correct the classification of the classifier. The CMPD correction module is a conditional auto-encoder, which can not only use the output of intermediate layers as the condition to accelerate convergence but also mitigate the negative effect of adversarial example training with the Kullback-Leibler loss to match prediction distribution. Through the empirically verified diversity property, the correction modules can be implemented synergistically to reduce the adversarial subspace. Hence, the decision module is proposed to integrate the correction modules to enhance the DNN classifier's robustness. Specially, our model can be achieved by fine-tuning and can be combined with other model-specific defenses.

To enhance the robustness of the classifier, in our paper, a \textbf{F}eature \textbf{A}nalysis and \textbf{C}onditional \textbf{M}atching prediction distribution (FACM) model is proposed to utilize the features of intermediate layers to correct the classification. Specifically, we first prove that the intermediate layers of the classifier can still retain effective features for the original category, which is defined as the correction property in our paper. According to this, we propose the FACM model consisting of \textbf{F}eature \textbf{A}nalysis (FA) correction module, \textbf{C}onditional \textbf{M}atching \textbf{P}rediction \textbf{D}istribution (CMPD) correction module and decision module. The FA correction module is the fully connected layers constructed with the output of the intermediate layers as the input to correct the classification of the classifier. The CMPD correction module is a conditional auto-encoder, which can not only use the output of intermediate layers as the condition to accelerate convergence but also mitigate the negative effect of adversarial example training with the Kullback-Leibler loss to match prediction distribution. Through the empirically verified diversity property, the correction modules can be implemented synergistically to reduce the adversarial subspace. Hence, the decision module is proposed to integrate the correction modules to enhance the DNN classifier's robustness. Specially, our model can be achieved by fine-tuning and can be combined with other model-specific defenses.
abstract_zh: 在针对深度神经网络 (DNN) 的强对抗性攻击中，生成的对抗性示例将通过破坏最后一层的输出特征来误导 DNN 实现的分类器。为了增强分类器的鲁棒性，在我们的论文中，提出了\textbf{F}特征\textbf{A}分析和\textbf{C}条件\textbf{M}匹配预测分布（FACM）模型，以利用中间层的特征来纠正分类。具体来说，我们首先证明分类器的中间层仍然可以保留原始类别的有效特征，这在我们的论文中被定义为校正属性。据此，我们提出了由\textbf{F}特征\textbf{A}分析（FA）校正模块、\textbf{C}条件\textbf{M}匹配\textbf{P}预测\textbf{D}分布（CMPD）校正模块和决策模块组成的FACM模型。 FA校正模块是以中间层的输出作为输入构建的全连接层，用于校正分类器的分类。 CMPD校正模块是一个条件自动编码器，它不仅可以使用中间层的输出作为加速收敛的条件，还可以减轻使用Kullback-Leibler损失来匹配预测分布的对抗性示例训练的负面影响。通过经验验证的多样性特性，可以协同实现校正模块以减少对抗子空间。因此，提出决策模块来集成校正模块以增强DNN分类器的鲁棒性。特别地，我们的模型可以通过微调来实现，并且可以与其他特定于模型的防御相结合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FACM模型，利用深度神经网络中间层的有效特征来增强分类器对对抗样本的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击通过破坏最后一层输出特征误导分类器，而中间层仍保留原始类别有效特征，可作为修正依据。
AI.method: 设计FACM模型包含特征分析修正模块（FA）、条件匹配预测分布修正模块（CMPD）和决策模块，通过中间层特征修正分类并降低对抗子空间影响。
AI.result: 实验验证FACM能有效提升分类器鲁棒性，且可通过微调实现，兼容其他防御方法。
AI.conclusion: 中间层特征具有修正对抗样本的能力，FACM模型通过多模块协同显著增强DNN的抗攻击性能。

authors_text: Zuopeng Yang,Daqing Liu,Chaoyue Wang,Jie Yang,Dacheng Tao
title: Modeling Image Composition for Complex Scene Generation
title_zh: 复杂场景生成的图像合成建模
comment: CVPR 2022
comments: CVPR 2022
abstract: We present a method that achieves state-of-the-art results on challenging (few-shot) layout-to-image generation tasks by accurately modeling textures, structures and relationships contained in a complex scene. After compressing RGB images into patch tokens, we propose the Transformer with Focal Attention (TwFA) for exploring dependencies of object-to-object, object-to-patch and patch-to-patch. Compared to existing CNN-based and Transformer-based generation models that entangled modeling on pixel-level&patch-level and object-level&patch-level respectively, the proposed focal attention predicts the current patch token by only focusing on its highly-related tokens that specified by the spatial layout, thereby achieving disambiguation during training. Furthermore, the proposed TwFA largely increases the data efficiency during training, therefore we propose the first few-shot complex scene generation strategy based on the well-trained TwFA. Comprehensive experiments show the superiority of our method, which significantly increases both quantitative metrics and qualitative visual realism with respect to state-of-the-art CNN-based and transformer-based methods. Code is available at https://github.com/JohnDreamer/TwFA.
summary: We present a method that achieves state-of-the-art results on challenging (few-shot) layout-to-image generation tasks by accurately modeling textures, structures and relationships contained in a complex scene. After compressing RGB images into patch tokens, we propose the Transformer with Focal Attention (TwFA) for exploring dependencies of object-to-object, object-to-patch and patch-to-patch. Compared to existing CNN-based and Transformer-based generation models that entangled modeling on pixel-level&patch-level and object-level&patch-level respectively, the proposed focal attention predicts the current patch token by only focusing on its highly-related tokens that specified by the spatial layout, thereby achieving disambiguation during training. Furthermore, the proposed TwFA largely increases the data efficiency during training, therefore we propose the first few-shot complex scene generation strategy based on the well-trained TwFA. Comprehensive experiments show the superiority of our method, which significantly increases both quantitative metrics and qualitative visual realism with respect to state-of-the-art CNN-based and transformer-based methods. Code is available at https://github.com/JohnDreamer/TwFA.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种方法，通过对复杂场景中包含的纹理、结构和关系进行精确建模，在具有挑战性的（少量）布局到图像生成任务上实现最先进的结果。将 RGB 图像压缩为补丁标记后，我们提出了具有焦点注意力的 Transformer (TwFA)，用于探索对象到对象、对象到补丁和补丁到补丁的依赖关系。与现有的基于 CNN 和基于 Transformer 的生成模型分别在像素级和补丁级以及对象级和补丁级进行纠缠建模相比，所提出的焦点注意力通过仅关注由空间布局指定的高度相关的标记来预测当前补丁标记，从而在训练过程中实现消歧。此外，所提出的 TwFA 很大程度上提高了训练期间的数据效率，因此我们提出了第一个基于训练有素的 TwFA 的少镜头复杂场景生成策略。综合实验显示了我们的方法的优越性，相对于最先进的基于 CNN 和基于 Transformer 的方法，该方法显着提高了定量指标和定性视觉真实感。代码可在 https://github.com/JohnDreamer/TwFA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer with Focal Attention (TwFA) 的方法，用于复杂场景的布局到图像生成任务，在少量样本情况下实现高质量图像合成。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN和Transformer模型在像素级/补丁级与对象级/补丁级建模时存在纠缠问题，难以在少量样本下准确捕捉复杂场景中物体间的关系与纹理结构。
AI.method: 将RGB图像压缩为补丁标记，设计TwFA机制通过空间布局指定高度相关的标记进行注意力计算，实现对象间、对象与补丁间、补丁间的依赖关系建模。
AI.result: 在定量指标和视觉真实性上显著优于现有CNN和Transformer方法，首次实现基于TwFA的少样本复杂场景生成策略。
AI.conclusion: TwFA通过解耦多尺度建模与聚焦相关标记，有效提升了复杂场景生成的数据效率和生成质量，为少样本图像生成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xiangyuan Yang,Jie Lin,Hanlin Zhang,Xinyu Yang,Peng Zhao
title: Improving the Robustness and Generalization of Deep Neural Network with Confidence Threshold Reduction
title_zh: 通过降低置信阈值提高深度神经网络的鲁棒性和泛化性
comment: Under review
comments: Under review
abstract: Deep neural networks are easily attacked by imperceptible perturbation. Presently, adversarial training (AT) is the most effective method to enhance the robustness of the model against adversarial examples. However, because adversarial training solved a min-max value problem, in comparison with natural training, the robustness and generalization are contradictory, i.e., the robustness improvement of the model will decrease the generalization of the model. To address this issue, in this paper, a new concept, namely confidence threshold (CT), is introduced and the reducing of the confidence threshold, known as confidence threshold reduction (CTR), is proven to improve both the generalization and robustness of the model. Specifically, to reduce the CT for natural training (i.e., for natural training with CTR), we propose a mask-guided divergence loss function (MDL) consisting of a cross-entropy loss term and an orthogonal term. The empirical and theoretical analysis demonstrates that the MDL loss improves the robustness and generalization of the model simultaneously for natural training. However, the model robustness improvement of natural training with CTR is not comparable to that of adversarial training. Therefore, for adversarial training, we propose a standard deviation loss function (STD), which minimizes the difference in the probabilities of the wrong categories, to reduce the CT by being integrated into the loss function of adversarial training. The empirical and theoretical analysis demonstrates that the STD based loss function can further improve the robustness of the adversarially trained model on basis of guaranteeing the changeless or slight improvement of the natural accuracy.
summary: Deep neural networks are easily attacked by imperceptible perturbation. Presently, adversarial training (AT) is the most effective method to enhance the robustness of the model against adversarial examples. However, because adversarial training solved a min-max value problem, in comparison with natural training, the robustness and generalization are contradictory, i.e., the robustness improvement of the model will decrease the generalization of the model. To address this issue, in this paper, a new concept, namely confidence threshold (CT), is introduced and the reducing of the confidence threshold, known as confidence threshold reduction (CTR), is proven to improve both the generalization and robustness of the model. Specifically, to reduce the CT for natural training (i.e., for natural training with CTR), we propose a mask-guided divergence loss function (MDL) consisting of a cross-entropy loss term and an orthogonal term. The empirical and theoretical analysis demonstrates that the MDL loss improves the robustness and generalization of the model simultaneously for natural training. However, the model robustness improvement of natural training with CTR is not comparable to that of adversarial training. Therefore, for adversarial training, we propose a standard deviation loss function (STD), which minimizes the difference in the probabilities of the wrong categories, to reduce the CT by being integrated into the loss function of adversarial training. The empirical and theoretical analysis demonstrates that the STD based loss function can further improve the robustness of the adversarially trained model on basis of guaranteeing the changeless or slight improvement of the natural accuracy.
abstract_zh: 深层神经网络很容易受到难以察觉的扰动的攻击。目前，对抗训练（AT）是增强模型针对对抗样本的鲁棒性的最有效方法。然而，由于对抗性训练解决的是最小值-最大值问题，与自然训练相比，鲁棒性和泛化性是矛盾的，即模型鲁棒性的提高会降低模型的泛化性。为了解决这个问题，本文引入了一个新概念，即置信度阈值（CT），并证明降低置信度阈值（称为置信度阈值降低（CTR））可以提高模型的泛化性和鲁棒性。具体来说，为了减少自然训练（即使用 CTR 进行自然训练）的 CT，我们提出了一种由交叉熵损失项和正交项组成的掩模引导散度损失函数（MDL）。实证和理论分析表明，MDL 损失同时提高了模型自然训练的鲁棒性和泛化性。然而，使用 CTR 的自然训练的模型鲁棒性提升与对抗性训练无法相比。因此，对于对抗性训练，我们提出了标准差损失函数（STD），它可以最小化错误类别的概率差异，通过集成到对抗性训练的损失函数中来减少CT。实证和理论分析表明，基于STD的损失函数可以在保证自然精度不变或略有提高的基础上，进一步提高对抗训练模型的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过降低置信度阈值（CTR）来同时提升深度神经网络的鲁棒性和泛化能力，分别设计了自然训练和对抗训练的损失函数。
AI.motivation: 对抗训练虽能增强模型鲁棒性，但会损害泛化能力，现有方法难以兼顾两者，需解决鲁棒性与泛化性的矛盾。
AI.method: 提出置信度阈值降低（CTR）概念，针对自然训练设计掩码引导的散度损失（MDL），针对对抗训练设计标准差损失（STD），通过理论与实验验证其有效性。
AI.result: MDL在自然训练中同时提升鲁棒性与泛化性；STD在对抗训练中增强鲁棒性且基本保持自然准确率，优于传统对抗训练。
AI.conclusion: CTR结合MDL/STD可有效平衡模型鲁棒性与泛化性，为对抗样本防御提供新思路，优于现有对抗训练方法。

authors_text: Yizhou Xie,Kunpeng Dai,Yong Zhang
title: A Real-time Critical-scenario-generation Framework for Testing Autonomous Driving System
title_zh: 用于测试自动驾驶系统的实时关键场景生成框架
comment: 7pages,9 figures, 21 references
comments: 7pages,9 figures, 21 references
abstract: In order to find the most likely failure scenarios which may occur under certain given operation domain, critical-scenario-based test is supposed as an effective and widely used method, which gives suggestions for designers to improve the developing algorithm. However, for the state of art, critical-scenario generation approaches commonly utilize random-search or reinforcement learning methods to generate series of scenarios for a specific algorithm, which takes amounts of computing resource for testing a developing target that is always changing, and inapplicable for testing a real-time system. In this paper, we proposed a real-time critical-scenario-generation (RTCSG) framework to address the above challenges. In our framework, an aggressive-driving algorithm is proposed in controlling the virtual agent vehicles, a specially designed cost function is presented to guide scenarios to evolve towards critical conditions, and a self-adaptive coefficient iteration is designed that enable the approach to operate successfully in different conditions. With our proposed method, the critical-scenarios can be directly generated for the target under test which is a black-box system, and the real-time critical-scenario test can be brought into reality. The simulation results show that our approach is able to obtain more critical scenarios in most conditions than current methods, with a higher stability of success. For a real-time testing, our approach improves the efficiency around 16 times.
summary: In order to find the most likely failure scenarios which may occur under certain given operation domain, critical-scenario-based test is supposed as an effective and widely used method, which gives suggestions for designers to improve the developing algorithm. However, for the state of art, critical-scenario generation approaches commonly utilize random-search or reinforcement learning methods to generate series of scenarios for a specific algorithm, which takes amounts of computing resource for testing a developing target that is always changing, and inapplicable for testing a real-time system. In this paper, we proposed a real-time critical-scenario-generation (RTCSG) framework to address the above challenges. In our framework, an aggressive-driving algorithm is proposed in controlling the virtual agent vehicles, a specially designed cost function is presented to guide scenarios to evolve towards critical conditions, and a self-adaptive coefficient iteration is designed that enable the approach to operate successfully in different conditions. With our proposed method, the critical-scenarios can be directly generated for the target under test which is a black-box system, and the real-time critical-scenario test can be brought into reality. The simulation results show that our approach is able to obtain more critical scenarios in most conditions than current methods, with a higher stability of success. For a real-time testing, our approach improves the efficiency around 16 times.
abstract_zh: 为了找到在给定操作域下最有可能发生的故障场景，基于关键场景的测试被认为是一种有效且广泛使用的方法，它为设计人员改进开发算法提供建议。然而，就现有技术而言，关键场景生成方法通常利用随机搜索或强化学习方法来为特定算法生成一系列场景，这需要大量的计算资源来测试不断变化的开发目标，并且不适用于测试实时系统。在本文中，我们提出了一种实时关键场景生成（RTCSG）框架来解决上述挑战。在我们的框架中，提出了一种主动驾驶算法来控制虚拟代理车辆，提出了专门设计的成本函数来指导场景向临界条件演进，并设计了自适应系数迭代，使该方法能够在不同条件下成功运行。利用我们提出的方法，可以直接为黑盒系统的被测目标生成关键场景，并使实时关键场景测试成为现实。仿真结果表明，我们的方法在大多数情况下能够比现有方法获得更多的关键场景，并且成功的稳定性更高。对于实时测试，我们的方法将效率提高了约 16 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种实时关键场景生成框架（RTCSG），用于测试自动驾驶系统，以解决现有方法在计算资源消耗和实时性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有关键场景生成方法依赖随机搜索或强化学习，计算资源消耗大且无法适应实时系统测试需求，亟需更高效稳定的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计激进驾驶算法控制虚拟车辆，结合自适应代价函数引导场景向临界条件演化，并通过自适应系数迭代实现不同环境下的稳定运行。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该方法在多数场景下生成的关键场景数量比现有方法增加，实时测试效率提升约16倍，成功率稳定性更高。
AI.conclusion: RTCSG框架通过算法创新实现了黑盒系统的实时关键场景生成，显著提升了自动驾驶系统测试的效率和实用性。

authors_text: Aleksandr Nesterov,Bulat Ibragimov,Dmitriy Umerenkov,Artem Shelmanov,Galina Zubkova,Vladimir Kokh
title: NeuralSympCheck: A Symptom Checking and Disease Diagnostic Neural Model with Logic Regularization
title_zh: NeuralSympCheck：具有逻辑正则化的症状检查和疾病诊断神经模型
comment: Published in the proceedings of the conference "Artificial Intelligence in Medicine 2022"
comments: Published in the proceedings of the conference "Artificial Intelligence in Medicine 2022"
abstract: The symptom checking systems inquire users for their symptoms and perform a rapid and affordable medical assessment of their condition. The basic symptom checking systems based on Bayesian methods, decision trees, or information gain methods are easy to train and do not require significant computational resources. However, their drawbacks are low relevance of proposed symptoms and insufficient quality of diagnostics. The best results on these tasks are achieved by reinforcement learning models. Their weaknesses are the difficulty of developing and training such systems and limited applicability to cases with large and sparse decision spaces. We propose a new approach based on the supervised learning of neural models with logic regularization that combines the advantages of the different methods. Our experiments on real and synthetic data show that the proposed approach outperforms the best existing methods in the accuracy of diagnosis when the number of diagnoses and symptoms is large.
summary: The symptom checking systems inquire users for their symptoms and perform a rapid and affordable medical assessment of their condition. The basic symptom checking systems based on Bayesian methods, decision trees, or information gain methods are easy to train and do not require significant computational resources. However, their drawbacks are low relevance of proposed symptoms and insufficient quality of diagnostics. The best results on these tasks are achieved by reinforcement learning models. Their weaknesses are the difficulty of developing and training such systems and limited applicability to cases with large and sparse decision spaces. We propose a new approach based on the supervised learning of neural models with logic regularization that combines the advantages of the different methods. Our experiments on real and synthetic data show that the proposed approach outperforms the best existing methods in the accuracy of diagnosis when the number of diagnoses and symptoms is large.
abstract_zh: 症状检查系统询问用户的症状，并对他们的病情进行快速且经济实惠的医疗评估。基于贝叶斯方法、决策树或信息增益方法的基本症状检查系统易于训练，并且不需要大量的计算资源。然而，它们的缺点是所提出的症状相关性较低且诊断质量不足。这些任务的最佳结果是通过强化学习模型实现的。它们的弱点是开发和训练此类系统的难度以及对决策空间大且稀疏的情况的适用性有限。我们提出了一种基于具有逻辑正则化的神经模型监督学习的新方法，该方法结合了不同方法的优点。我们对真实数据和合成数据的实验表明，当诊断和症状数量很大时，所提出的方法在诊断准确性方面优于现有的最佳方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合逻辑正则化的神经模型NeuralSympCheck，用于症状检查和疾病诊断，旨在克服现有方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统基于贝叶斯方法、决策树或信息增益的症状检查系统存在症状相关性低和诊断质量差的问题，而强化学习模型虽效果更好但开发困难且难以处理大规模稀疏决策空间。
AI.method: 采用监督学习的神经网络模型，并引入逻辑正则化技术，融合不同方法的优势以提升诊断准确性。
AI.result: 在真实和合成数据集上的实验表明，该方法在诊断数量和症状数量较大的情况下，诊断准确率优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的逻辑正则化神经模型有效结合了多种方法的优点，在大规模医疗诊断场景中展现出更高的准确性。

search_text: NeuralSympCheck: A Symptom Checking and Disease Diagnostic Neural Model with Logic Regularization NeuralSympCheck：具有逻辑正则化的症状检查和疾病诊断神经模型 The symptom checking systems inquire users for their symptoms and perform a rapid and affordable medical assessment of their condition. The basic symptom checking systems based on Bayesian methods, decision trees, or information gain methods are easy to train and do not require significant computational resources. However, their drawbacks are low relevance of proposed symptoms and insufficient quality of diagnostics. The best results on these tasks are achieved by reinforcement learning models. Their weaknesses are the difficulty of developing and training such systems and limited applicability to cases with large and sparse decision spaces. We propose a new approach based on the supervised learning of neural models with logic regularization that combines the advantages of the different methods. Our experiments on real and synthetic data show that the proposed approach outperforms the best existing methods in the accuracy of diagnosis when the number of diagnoses and symptoms is large. 症状检查系统询问用户的症状，并对他们的病情进行快速且经济实惠的医疗评估。基于贝叶斯方法、决策树或信息增益方法的基本症状检查系统易于训练，并且不需要大量的计算资源。然而，它们的缺点是所提出的症状相关性较低且诊断质量不足。这些任务的最佳结果是通过强化学习模型实现的。它们的弱点是开发和训练此类系统的难度以及对决策空间大且稀疏的情况的适用性有限。我们提出了一种基于具有逻辑正则化的神经模型监督学习的新方法，该方法结合了不同方法的优点。我们对真实数据和合成数据的实验表明，当诊断和症状数量很大时，所提出的方法在诊断准确性方面优于现有的最佳方法。 本文提出了一种结合逻辑正则化的神经模型NeuralSympCheck，用于症状检查和疾病诊断，旨在克服现有方法的不足。 Aleksandr Nesterov,Bulat Ibragimov,Dmitriy Umerenkov,Artem Shelmanov,Galina Zubkova,Vladimir Kokh cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.NE

authors_text: Nan Wang,Shaohui Lin,Xiaoxiao Li,Ke Li,Yunhang Shen,Yue Gao,Lizhuang Ma
title: MISSU: 3D Medical Image Segmentation via Self-distilling TransUNet
title_zh: MISSU：通过自蒸馏 TransUNet 进行 3D 医学图像分割
abstract: U-Nets have achieved tremendous success in medical image segmentation. Nevertheless, it may suffer limitations in global (long-range) contextual interactions and edge-detail preservation. In contrast, Transformer has an excellent ability to capture long-range dependencies by leveraging the self-attention mechanism into the encoder. Although Transformer was born to model the long-range dependency on the extracted feature maps, it still suffers from extreme computational and spatial complexities in processing high-resolution 3D feature maps. This motivates us to design the efficiently Transformer-based UNet model and study the feasibility of Transformer-based network architectures for medical image segmentation tasks. To this end, we propose to self-distill a Transformer-based UNet for medical image segmentation, which simultaneously learns global semantic information and local spatial-detailed features. Meanwhile, a local multi-scale fusion block is first proposed to refine fine-grained details from the skipped connections in the encoder by the main CNN stem through self-distillation, only computed during training and removed at inference with minimal overhead. Extensive experiments on BraTS 2019 and CHAOS datasets show that our MISSU achieves the best performance over previous state-of-the-art methods. Code and models are available at \url{https://github.com/wangn123/MISSU.git}
summary: U-Nets have achieved tremendous success in medical image segmentation. Nevertheless, it may suffer limitations in global (long-range) contextual interactions and edge-detail preservation. In contrast, Transformer has an excellent ability to capture long-range dependencies by leveraging the self-attention mechanism into the encoder. Although Transformer was born to model the long-range dependency on the extracted feature maps, it still suffers from extreme computational and spatial complexities in processing high-resolution 3D feature maps. This motivates us to design the efficiently Transformer-based UNet model and study the feasibility of Transformer-based network architectures for medical image segmentation tasks. To this end, we propose to self-distill a Transformer-based UNet for medical image segmentation, which simultaneously learns global semantic information and local spatial-detailed features. Meanwhile, a local multi-scale fusion block is first proposed to refine fine-grained details from the skipped connections in the encoder by the main CNN stem through self-distillation, only computed during training and removed at inference with minimal overhead. Extensive experiments on BraTS 2019 and CHAOS datasets show that our MISSU achieves the best performance over previous state-of-the-art methods. Code and models are available at \url{https://github.com/wangn123/MISSU.git}
abstract_zh: U-Nets 在医学图像分割方面取得了巨大的成功。然而，它在全局（远程）上下文交互和边缘细节保留方面可能会受到限制。相比之下，Transformer 通过利用编码器的自注意力机制，具有出色的捕获远程依赖关系的能力。尽管 Transformer 的诞生是为了对提取的特征图的远程依赖性进行建模，但它在处理高分辨率 3D 特征图时仍然面临着极端的计算和空间复杂性。这促使我们设计高效的基于 Transformer 的 UNet 模型，并研究基于 Transformer 的网络架构用于医学图像分割任务的可行性。为此，我们提出自蒸馏基于 Transformer 的 UNet 用于医学图像分割，它同时学习全局语义信息和局部空间细节特征。同时，首先提出了一个局部多尺度融合块，通过自蒸馏从编码器中跳过的连接中精炼细粒度细节，仅在训练期间计算，并在推理时以最小的开销删除。在 BraTS 2019 和 CHAOS 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们的 MISSU 比之前最先进的方法实现了最佳性能。代码和模型可在 \url{https://github.com/wangn123/MISSU.git} 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出MISSU模型，通过自蒸馏TransUNet实现高效的3D医学图像分割。
AI.motivation: 传统U-Net在全局上下文建模和边缘细节保留存在不足，而Transformer处理高分辨率3D特征时计算复杂度高，需设计更高效的架构。
AI.method: 结合Transformer的全局建模能力与CNN的局部细节提取，提出自蒸馏TransUNet，并设计多尺度融合模块强化细节特征学习。
AI.result: 在BraTS 2019和CHAOS数据集上优于现有最先进方法，代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 自蒸馏TransUNet有效平衡了全局语义与局部细节，为医学图像分割提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Yijie Liu,Yanfang Yin,Qigang Zhu,Wenzhuo Cui
title: Musical Instrument Recognition by XGBoost Combining Feature Fusion
title_zh: XGBoost结合特征融合的乐器识别
abstract: Musical instrument classification is one of the focuses of Music Information Retrieval (MIR). In order to solve the problem of poor performance of current musical instrument classification models, we propose a musical instrument classification algorithm based on multi-channel feature fusion and XGBoost. Based on audio feature extraction and fusion of the dataset, the features are input into the XGBoost model for training; secondly, we verified the superior performance of the algorithm in the musical instrument classification task by com-paring different feature combinations and several classical machine learning models such as Naive Bayes. The algorithm achieves an accuracy of 97.65% on the Medley-solos-DB dataset, outperforming existing models. The experiments provide a reference for feature selection in feature engineering for musical instrument classification.
summary: Musical instrument classification is one of the focuses of Music Information Retrieval (MIR). In order to solve the problem of poor performance of current musical instrument classification models, we propose a musical instrument classification algorithm based on multi-channel feature fusion and XGBoost. Based on audio feature extraction and fusion of the dataset, the features are input into the XGBoost model for training; secondly, we verified the superior performance of the algorithm in the musical instrument classification task by com-paring different feature combinations and several classical machine learning models such as Naive Bayes. The algorithm achieves an accuracy of 97.65% on the Medley-solos-DB dataset, outperforming existing models. The experiments provide a reference for feature selection in feature engineering for musical instrument classification.
abstract_zh: 乐器分类是音乐信息检索（MIR）的焦点之一。为了解决当前乐器分类模型性能较差的问题，提出一种基于多通道特征融合和XGBoost的乐器分类算法。基于数据集的音频特征提取和融合，将特征输入到XGBoost模型中进行训练；其次，我们通过比较不同的特征组合和朴素贝叶斯等几种经典机器学习模型，验证了算法在乐器分类任务中的优越性能。该算法在 Medley-solos-DB 数据集上的准确率达到 97.65%，优于现有模型。实验为乐器分类特征工程中的特征选择提供参考。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合多通道特征融合与XGBoost的乐器分类算法，以提升音乐乐器分类的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐乐器分类模型存在性能不足的问题，需通过特征融合与优化算法提升分类效果。
AI.method: 基于音频特征提取与多通道融合，将特征输入XGBoost模型训练，并与朴素贝叶斯等经典模型对比验证。
AI.result: 在Medley-solos-DB数据集上达到97.65%的分类准确率，优于现有模型。
AI.conclusion: 特征融合结合XGBoost能有效提升乐器分类性能，为特征工程提供参考依据。

Based on audio feature extraction and fusion of the dataset, the features are input into the XGBoost model for training; secondly, we verified the superior performance of the algorithm in the musical instrument classification task by com-paring different feature combinations and several classical machine learning models such as Naive Bayes. The algorithm achieves an accuracy of 97.65% on the Medley-solos-DB dataset, outperforming existing models. The experiments provide a reference for feature selection in feature engineering for musical instrument classification. 乐器分类是音乐信息检索（MIR）的焦点之一。为了解决当前乐器分类模型性能较差的问题，提出一种基于多通道特征融合和XGBoost的乐器分类算法。基于数据集的音频特征提取和融合，将特征输入到XGBoost模型中进行训练；其次，我们通过比较不同的特征组合和朴素贝叶斯等几种经典机器学习模型，验证了算法在乐器分类任务中的优越性能。该算法在 Medley-solos-DB 数据集上的准确率达到 97.65%，优于现有模型。实验为乐器分类特征工程中的特征选择提供参考。 本文提出一种结合多通道特征融合与XGBoost的乐器分类算法，以提升音乐乐器分类的准确率。 Yijie Liu,Yanfang Yin,Qigang Zhu,Wenzhuo Cui cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Fernando Paolo,Tsu-ting Tim Lin,Ritwik Gupta,Bryce Goodman,Nirav Patel,Daniel Kuster,David Kroodsma,Jared Dunnmon
title: xView3-SAR: Detecting Dark Fishing Activity Using Synthetic Aperture Radar Imagery
title_zh: xView3-SAR：使用合成孔径雷达图像检测黑暗捕鱼活动
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022. 10 pages (25 with references and supplement)
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022. 10 pages (25 with references and supplement)
abstract: Unsustainable fishing practices worldwide pose a major threat to marine resources and ecosystems. Identifying vessels that do not show up in conventional monitoring systems -- known as ``dark vessels'' -- is key to managing and securing the health of marine environments. With the rise of satellite-based synthetic aperture radar (SAR) imaging and modern machine learning (ML), it is now possible to automate detection of dark vessels day or night, under all-weather conditions. SAR images, however, require a domain-specific treatment and are not widely accessible to the ML community. Maritime objects (vessels and offshore infrastructure) are relatively small and sparse, challenging traditional computer vision approaches. We present the largest labeled dataset for training ML models to detect and characterize vessels and ocean structures in SAR imagery. xView3-SAR consists of nearly 1,000 analysis-ready SAR images from the Sentinel-1 mission that are, on average, 29,400-by-24,400 pixels each. The images are annotated using a combination of automated and manual analysis. Co-located bathymetry and wind state rasters accompany every SAR image. We also provide an overview of the xView3 Computer Vision Challenge, an international competition using xView3-SAR for ship detection and characterization at large scale. We release the data (\href{https://iuu.xview.us/}{https://iuu.xview.us/}) and code (\href{https://github.com/DIUx-xView}{https://github.com/DIUx-xView}) to support ongoing development and evaluation of ML approaches for this important application.

SAR images, however, require a domain-specific treatment and are not widely accessible to the ML community. Maritime objects (vessels and offshore infrastructure) are relatively small and sparse, challenging traditional computer vision approaches. We present the largest labeled dataset for training ML models to detect and characterize vessels and ocean structures in SAR imagery. xView3-SAR consists of nearly 1,000 analysis-ready SAR images from the Sentinel-1 mission that are, on average, 29,400-by-24,400 pixels each. The images are annotated using a combination of automated and manual analysis. Co-located bathymetry and wind state rasters accompany every SAR image. We also provide an overview of the xView3 Computer Vision Challenge, an international competition using xView3-SAR for ship detection and characterization at large scale. We release the data (\href{https://iuu.xview.us/}{https://iuu.xview.us/}) and code (\href{https://github.com/DIUx-xView}{https://github.com/DIUx-xView}) to support ongoing development and evaluation of ML approaches for this important application.
abstract_zh: 全世界不可持续的捕捞方式对海洋资源和生态系统构成重大威胁。识别未出现在传统监测系统中的船只（称为“暗船”）是管理和确保海洋环境健康的关键。随着基于卫星的合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 成像和现代机器学习 (ML) 的兴起，现在可以在全天候条件下白天或晚上自动检测黑暗船只。然而，SAR 图像需要进行特定领域的处理，并且机器学习社区无法广泛访问。海洋物体（船舶和海上基础设施）相对较小且稀疏，对传统的计算机视觉方法提出了挑战。我们提供了最大的标记数据集，用于训练 ML 模型，以检测和表征 SAR 图像中的船只和海洋结构。 xView3-SAR 包含来自 Sentinel-1 任务的近 1,000 张可供分析的 SAR 图像，每张图像平均为 29,400 x 24,400 像素。使用自动和手动分析的组合对图像进行注释。每幅 SAR 图像均附有同位测深和风态栅格。我们还概述了 xView3 计算机视觉挑战赛，这是一项使用 xView3-SAR 进行大规模船舶检测和表征的国际竞赛。我们发布了数据 (\href{https://iuu.xview.us/}{https://iuu.xview.us/}) 和代码 (\href{https://github.com/DIUx-xView}{https://github.com/DIUx-xView})，以支持这一重要应用的机器学习方法的持续开发和评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出xView3-SAR数据集，利用合成孔径雷达（SAR）影像检测非法捕鱼活动中的‘暗船’。
AI.motivation: 全球不可持续捕捞威胁海洋生态，传统监测系统难以识别‘暗船’，需借助SAR影像与机器学习实现全天候自动化检测。
AI.method: 构建包含近1000张Sentinel-1 SAR影像的标注数据集，结合自动化与人工标注，并提供水深和风况数据；发起xView3计算机视觉竞赛推动算法研发。
AI.result: 发布全球最大SAR船舶检测标注数据集（含图像及配套环境数据）及开源代码，促进相关机器学习模型的开发与评估。
AI.conclusion: xView3-SAR为暗船检测提供关键数据支持，助力提升海洋资源保护的智能化水平。

authors_text: Jiachen Kang,Wenjing Jia,Xiangjian He
title: Leveraging Systematic Knowledge of 2D Transformations
title_zh: 利用二维变换的系统知识
abstract: The existing deep learning models suffer from out-of-distribution (o.o.d.) performance drop in computer vision tasks. In comparison, humans have a remarkable ability to interpret images, even if the scenes in the images are rare, thanks to the systematicity of acquired knowledge. This work focuses on 1) the acquisition of systematic knowledge of 2D transformations, and 2) architectural components that can leverage the learned knowledge in image classification tasks in an o.o.d. setting. With a new training methodology based on synthetic datasets that are constructed under the causal framework, the deep neural networks acquire knowledge from semantically different domains (e.g. even from noise), and exhibit certain level of systematicity in parameter estimation experiments. Based on this, a novel architecture is devised consisting of a classifier, an estimator and an identifier (abbreviated as "CED"). By emulating the "hypothesis-verification" process in human visual perception, CED improves the classification accuracy significantly on test sets under covariate shift.
summary: The existing deep learning models suffer from out-of-distribution (o.o.d.) performance drop in computer vision tasks. In comparison, humans have a remarkable ability to interpret images, even if the scenes in the images are rare, thanks to the systematicity of acquired knowledge. This work focuses on 1) the acquisition of systematic knowledge of 2D transformations, and 2) architectural components that can leverage the learned knowledge in image classification tasks in an o.o.d. setting. With a new training methodology based on synthetic datasets that are constructed under the causal framework, the deep neural networks acquire knowledge from semantically different domains (e.g. even from noise), and exhibit certain level of systematicity in parameter estimation experiments. Based on this, a novel architecture is devised consisting of a classifier, an estimator and an identifier (abbreviated as "CED"). By emulating the "hypothesis-verification" process in human visual perception, CED improves the classification accuracy significantly on test sets under covariate shift.
abstract_zh: 现有的深度学习模型在计算机视觉任务中存在分布外（o.o.d.）性能下降的问题。相比之下，由于所获得的知识的系统性，即使图像中的场景很少，人类也具有非凡的解释图像的能力。这项工作的重点是 1) 获取 2D 转换的系统知识，以及 2) 可以在 O.O.D. 中利用图像分类任务中学到的知识的架构组件。环境。通过基于因果框架下构建的合成数据集的新训练方法，深度神经网络从语义不同的领域（例如甚至从噪声）获取知识，并在参数估计实验中表现出一定程度的系统性。在此基础上，设计了一种由分类器、估计器和标识符（缩写为“CED”）组成的新颖架构。通过模拟人类视觉感知中的“假设-验证”过程，CED 显着提高了协变量偏移下测试集上的分类准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过获取2D变换的系统性知识并设计相应架构，提升深度学习模型在分布外场景下的图像分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在分布外（o.o.d.）场景中表现不佳，而人类凭借系统性知识可有效处理罕见场景，因此需探索模型学习系统性知识的方法。
AI.method: 基于因果框架构建合成数据集，通过新训练方法使网络从多领域（如噪声）学习知识，并设计CED架构（分类器+估计器+标识符）模拟人类假设验证过程。
AI.result: 在协变量转移测试集上，CED架构显著提升了分类准确率，验证了系统性知识利用的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统性知识获取与CED架构设计，模型在分布外任务中表现优化，为未来研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Sehoon Kim,Amir Gholami,Albert Shaw,Nicholas Lee,Karttikeya Mangalam,Jitendra Malik,Michael W. Mahoney,Kurt Keutzer
title: Squeezeformer: An Efficient Transformer for Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: Squeezeformer：用于自动语音识别的高效变压器
comment: NeurIPS 2022
comments: NeurIPS 2022
abstract: The recently proposed Conformer model has become the de facto backbone model for various downstream speech tasks based on its hybrid attention-convolution architecture that captures both local and global features. However, through a series of systematic studies, we find that the Conformer architecture's design choices are not optimal. After re-examining the design choices for both the macro and micro-architecture of Conformer, we propose Squeezeformer which consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art ASR models under the same training schemes. In particular, for the macro-architecture, Squeezeformer incorporates (i) the Temporal U-Net structure which reduces the cost of the multi-head attention modules on long sequences, and (ii) a simpler block structure of multi-head attention or convolution modules followed up by feed-forward module instead of the Macaron structure proposed in Conformer. Furthermore, for the micro-architecture, Squeezeformer (i) simplifies the activations in the convolutional block, (ii) removes redundant Layer Normalization operations, and (iii) incorporates an efficient depthwise down-sampling layer to efficiently sub-sample the input signal. Squeezeformer achieves state-of-the-art results of 7.5%, 6.5%, and 6.0% word-error-rate (WER) on LibriSpeech test-other without external language models, which are 3.1%, 1.4%, and 0.6% better than Conformer-CTC with the same number of FLOPs. Our code is open-sourced and available online.
summary: The recently proposed Conformer model has become the de facto backbone model for various downstream speech tasks based on its hybrid attention-convolution architecture that captures both local and global features. However, through a series of systematic studies, we find that the Conformer architecture's design choices are not optimal. After re-examining the design choices for both the macro and micro-architecture of Conformer, we propose Squeezeformer which consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art ASR models under the same training schemes. In particular, for the macro-architecture, Squeezeformer incorporates (i) the Temporal U-Net structure which reduces the cost of the multi-head attention modules on long sequences, and (ii) a simpler block structure of multi-head attention or convolution modules followed up by feed-forward module instead of the Macaron structure proposed in Conformer. Furthermore, for the micro-architecture, Squeezeformer (i) simplifies the activations in the convolutional block, (ii) removes redundant Layer Normalization operations, and (iii) incorporates an efficient depthwise down-sampling layer to efficiently sub-sample the input signal. Squeezeformer achieves state-of-the-art results of 7.5%, 6.5%, and 6.0% word-error-rate (WER) on LibriSpeech test-other without external language models, which are 3.1%, 1.4%, and 0.6% better than Conformer-CTC with the same number of FLOPs. Our code is open-sourced and available online.
abstract_zh: 最近提出的 Conformer 模型已成为各种下游语音任务事实上的骨干模型，该模型基于其混合注意力卷积架构，可捕获局部和全局特征。然而，通过一系列的系统研究，我们发现Conformer架构的设计选择并不是最优的。在重新检查 Conformer 的宏观和微观架构的设计选择后，我们提出了 Squeezeformer，它在相同的训练方案下始终优于最先进的 ASR 模型。特别是，对于宏观架构，Squeezeformer 结合了 (i) Temporal U-Net 结构，该结构降低了长序列上多头注意力模块的成本，以及 (ii) 更简单的多头注意力或卷积模块块结构，后跟前馈模块，而不是 Conformer 中提出的 Macaron 结构。此外，对于微架构，Squeezeformer (i) 简化了卷积块中的激活，(ii) 删除了冗余的层归一化操作，以及 (iii) 结合了高效的深度下采样层以有效地对输入信号进行子采样。 Squeezeformer 在没有外部语言模型的 LibriSpeech 测试其他上取得了 7.5%、6.5% 和 6.0% 的最先进结果，比具有相同 FLOP 次数的 Conformer-CTC 好 3.1%、1.4% 和 0.6%。我们的代码是开源的并且可以在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Squeezeformer的高效Transformer模型，用于自动语音识别（ASR），通过优化Conformer架构的设计选择，在保持计算量的同时显著提升了识别性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管Conformer模型在语音任务中表现优异，但其设计存在冗余和非最优之处。作者通过系统研究发现，其宏架构和微架构的某些选择限制了效率与性能的平衡，因此提出更高效的Squeezeformer。
AI.method: 在宏架构上，引入Temporal U-Net结构降低长序列注意力模块成本，并采用简化块结构替代Conformer的Macaron结构；在微架构上，简化卷积激活函数、移除冗余的Layer Normalization，并引入高效深度下采样层。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech test-other数据集上，Squeezeformer在无外部语言模型情况下达到7.5%、6.5%、6.0%的词错误率（WER），分别比同FLOPs的Conformer-CTC模型降低3.1%、1.4%、0.6%。
AI.conclusion: Squeezeformer通过架构优化实现了更优的效率与性能平衡，在相同计算成本下超越现有SOTA模型，且代码已开源。

authors_text: Saurabh Jha,Shengkun Cui,Zbigniew Kalbarczyk,Ravishankar K. Iyer
title: Watch Out for the Safety-Threatening Actors: Proactively Mitigating Safety Hazards
title_zh: 警惕威胁安全的行为者：主动减轻安全隐患
abstract: Despite the successful demonstration of autonomous vehicles (AVs), such as self-driving cars, ensuring AV safety remains a challenging task. Although some actors influence an AV's driving decisions more than others, current approaches pay equal attention to each actor on the road. An actor's influence on the AV's decision can be characterized in terms of its ability to decrease the number of safe navigational choices for the AV. In this work, we propose a safety threat indicator (STI) using counterfactual reasoning to estimate the importance of each actor on the road with respect to its influence on the AV's safety. We use this indicator to (i) characterize the existing real-world datasets to identify rare hazardous scenarios as well as the poor performance of existing controllers in such scenarios; and (ii) design an RL based safety mitigation controller to proactively mitigate the safety hazards those actors pose to the AV. Our approach reduces the accident rate for the state-of-the-art AV agent(s) in rare hazardous scenarios by more than 70%.
summary: Despite the successful demonstration of autonomous vehicles (AVs), such as self-driving cars, ensuring AV safety remains a challenging task. Although some actors influence an AV's driving decisions more than others, current approaches pay equal attention to each actor on the road. An actor's influence on the AV's decision can be characterized in terms of its ability to decrease the number of safe navigational choices for the AV. In this work, we propose a safety threat indicator (STI) using counterfactual reasoning to estimate the importance of each actor on the road with respect to its influence on the AV's safety. We use this indicator to (i) characterize the existing real-world datasets to identify rare hazardous scenarios as well as the poor performance of existing controllers in such scenarios; and (ii) design an RL based safety mitigation controller to proactively mitigate the safety hazards those actors pose to the AV. Our approach reduces the accident rate for the state-of-the-art AV agent(s) in rare hazardous scenarios by more than 70%.
abstract_zh: 尽管自动驾驶汽车等自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 的演示取得了成功，但确保自动驾驶汽车的安全仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。尽管某些参与者比其他参与者对自动驾驶汽车的驾驶决策的影响更大，但当前的方法对道路上的每个参与者都给予同等的关注。参与者对 AV 决策的影响可以用其减少 AV 安全导航选择数量的能力来表征。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种安全威胁指标（STI），使用反事实推理来估计道路上每个参与者对自动驾驶汽车安全影响的重要性。我们使用该指标来（i）表征现有的现实世界数据集，以识别罕见的危险场景以及现有控制器在此类场景中的不良性能； (ii) 设计一个基于强化学习的安全缓解控制器，以主动缓解这些参与者对自动驾驶汽车造成的安全危害。我们的方法将最先进的 AV 代理在罕见危险场景中的事故率降低了 70% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于反事实推理的安全威胁指标（STI），用于识别对自动驾驶车辆安全影响最大的道路行为者，并设计强化学习控制器主动缓解其威胁。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶安全研究对所有道路参与者平等对待，忽视了某些行为者对安全决策的差异化影响，导致在罕见危险场景中控制效果不佳。
AI.method: 通过反事实推理构建安全威胁指标（STI）量化行为者影响，利用该指标分析真实数据集中的危险场景，并基于强化学习设计安全缓解控制器。
AI.result: 在罕见危险场景中，该方法使先进自动驾驶代理的事故率降低超过70%。
AI.conclusion: STI指标与强化学习控制器的结合有效提升了自动驾驶在高风险场景下的安全性，为动态安全威胁管理提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tao Hu,Shu Liu,Yilun Chen,Tiancheng Shen,Jiaya Jia
title: EfficientNeRF: Efficient Neural Radiance Fields
title_zh: EfficientNeRF：高效神经辐射场
abstract: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) has been wildly applied to various tasks for its high-quality representation of 3D scenes. It takes long per-scene training time and per-image testing time. In this paper, we present EfficientNeRF as an efficient NeRF-based method to represent 3D scene and synthesize novel-view images. Although several ways exist to accelerate the training or testing process, it is still difficult to much reduce time for both phases simultaneously. We analyze the density and weight distribution of the sampled points then propose valid and pivotal sampling at the coarse and fine stage, respectively, to significantly improve sampling efficiency. In addition, we design a novel data structure to cache the whole scene during testing to accelerate the rendering speed. Overall, our method can reduce over 88\% of training time, reach rendering speed of over 200 FPS, while still achieving competitive accuracy. Experiments prove that our method promotes the practicality of NeRF in the real world and enables many applications.
summary: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) has been wildly applied to various tasks for its high-quality representation of 3D scenes. It takes long per-scene training time and per-image testing time. In this paper, we present EfficientNeRF as an efficient NeRF-based method to represent 3D scene and synthesize novel-view images. Although several ways exist to accelerate the training or testing process, it is still difficult to much reduce time for both phases simultaneously. We analyze the density and weight distribution of the sampled points then propose valid and pivotal sampling at the coarse and fine stage, respectively, to significantly improve sampling efficiency. In addition, we design a novel data structure to cache the whole scene during testing to accelerate the rendering speed. Overall, our method can reduce over 88\% of training time, reach rendering speed of over 200 FPS, while still achieving competitive accuracy. Experiments prove that our method promotes the practicality of NeRF in the real world and enables many applications.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 因其高质量的 3D 场景表示而被广泛应用于各种任务。每个场景的训练时间和每个图像的测试时间都较长。在本文中，我们提出 EfficientNeRF 作为一种高效的基于 NeRF 的方法来表示 3D 场景并合成新颖的视图图像。尽管有多种方法可以加速训练或测试过程，但同时大幅减少两个阶段的时间仍然很困难。我们分析采样点的密度和权重分布，然后分别在粗略和精细阶段提出有效采样和关键采样，以显着提高采样效率。此外，我们设计了一种新颖的数据结构来在测试过程中缓存整个场景，以加快渲染速度。总的来说，我们的方法可以减少超过 88% 的训练时间，达到超过 200 FPS 的渲染速度，同时仍然达到有竞争力的准确性。实验证明我们的方法促进了 NeRF 在现实世界中的实用性并实现了许多应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EfficientNeRF的高效神经辐射场方法，旨在减少NeRF在训练和测试阶段的时间消耗。
AI.motivation: NeRF在3D场景表示和图像合成方面表现出色，但其训练和测试时间较长，限制了其在实际中的应用。
AI.method: 本文通过分析采样点的密度和权重分布，在粗细阶段分别提出有效的采样方法，并设计了一种新的数据结构以在测试过程中缓存整个场景，从而加快渲染速度。
AI.result: 该方法在训练时间上减少了超过88%，渲染速度达到每秒200帧以上，同时保持了较高的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 本文的方法提高了NeRF在现实世界中的实用性，使其能够支持更多实际应用。
